search_text: CitySpec with Shield: A Secure Intelligent Assistant for Requirement Formalization CitySpec with Shield：需求形式化的安全智能助手 An increasing number of monitoring systems have been developed in smart cities to ensure that the real-time operations of a city satisfy safety and performance requirements. However, many existing city requirements are written in English with missing, inaccurate, or ambiguous information. There is a high demand for assisting city policymakers in converting human-specified requirements to machine-understandable formal specifications for monitoring systems. To tackle this limitation, we build CitySpec, the first intelligent assistant system for requirement specification in smart cities. To create CitySpec, we first collect over 1,500 real-world city requirements across different domains (e.g., transportation and energy) from over 100 cities and extract city-specific knowledge to generate a dataset of city vocabulary with 3,061 words. We also build a translation model and enhance it through requirement synthesis and develop a novel online learning framework with shielded validation. The evaluation results on real-world city requirements show that CitySpec increases the sentence-level accuracy of requirement specification from 59.02% to 86.64%, and has strong adaptability to a new city and a new domain (e.g., the F1 score for requirements in Seattle increases from 77.6% to 93.75% with online learning). After the enhancement from the shield function, CitySpec is now immune to most known textual adversarial inputs (e.g., the attack success rate of DeepWordBug after the shield function is reduced to 0% from 82.73%). We test the CitySpec with 18 participants from different domains. CitySpec shows its strong usability and adaptability to different domains, and also its robustness to malicious inputs. 智慧城市中开发了越来越多的监控系统，以确保城市的实时运行满足安全和性能要求。然而，许多现有的城市要求都是用英语编写的，信息缺失、不准确或含糊不清。迫切需要协助城市决策者将人类指定的要求转换为机器可理解的监控系统正式规范。为了解决这个限制，我们构建了 CitySpec，这是智慧城市中第一个用于需求规范的智能辅助系统。为了创建 CitySpec，我们首先从 100 多个城市收集了跨不同领域（例如交通和能源）的 1,500 多个现实世界城市需求，并提取特定于城市的知识，以生成包含 3,061 个单词的城市词汇数据集。我们还构建了一个翻译模型，并通过需求综合来增强它，并开发了一个具有屏蔽验证的新颖的在线学习框架。对现实城市需求的评估结果表明，CitySpec将需求规范的句子级准确率从59.02%提高到86.64%，并且对新城市和新领域具有很强的适应性（例如西雅图的需求F1分数通过在线学习从77.6%提高到93.75%）。经过屏蔽功能增强后，CitySpec 现在对大多数已知的文本对抗性输入免疫（例如，屏蔽功能后 DeepWordBug 的攻击成功率从 82.73% 降低到 0%）。我们对来自不同领域的 18 名参与者进行了 CitySpec 测试。 CitySpec 展示了其强大的可用性和对不同领域的适应性，以及对恶意输入的鲁棒性。 论文的主要任务是开发CitySpec，一个智能助手系统，将城市政策要求转化为机器可理解的规范，并增强其安全性。 Zirong Chen,Issa Li,Haoxiang Zhang,Sarah Preum,John A. Stankovic,Meiyi Ma cs.AI

title: Semantic Uncertainty: Linguistic Invariances for Uncertainty Estimation in Natural Language Generation
title_zh: 语义不确定性：自然语言生成中不确定性估计的语言不变性
abstract: We introduce a method to measure uncertainty in large language models. For tasks like question answering, it is essential to know when we can trust the natural language outputs of foundation models. We show that measuring uncertainty in natural language is challenging because of "semantic equivalence" -- different sentences can mean the same thing. To overcome these challenges we introduce semantic entropy -- an entropy which incorporates linguistic invariances created by shared meanings. Our method is unsupervised, uses only a single model, and requires no modifications to off-the-shelf language models. In comprehensive ablation studies we show that the semantic entropy is more predictive of model accuracy on question answering data sets than comparable baselines.
summary: We introduce a method to measure uncertainty in large language models. For tasks like question answering, it is essential to know when we can trust the natural language outputs of foundation models. We show that measuring uncertainty in natural language is challenging because of "semantic equivalence" -- different sentences can mean the same thing. To overcome these challenges we introduce semantic entropy -- an entropy which incorporates linguistic invariances created by shared meanings. Our method is unsupervised, uses only a single model, and requires no modifications to off-the-shelf language models. In comprehensive ablation studies we show that the semantic entropy is more predictive of model accuracy on question answering data sets than comparable baselines.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种测量大型语言模型中不确定性的方法。对于诸如问答之类的任务，必须知道我们何时可以信任基础模型的自然语言输出。我们表明，由于“语义等效”，测量自然语言中的不确定性具有挑战性——不同的句子可能意味着相同的事情。为了克服这些挑战，我们引入了语义熵——一种包含了由共享含义产生的语言不变性的熵。我们的方法是无监督的，仅使用单个模型，并且不需要对现成的语言模型进行修改。在综合消融研究中，我们表明语义熵比可比较的基线更能预测问答数据集上的模型准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种测量大语言模型不确定性的方法，通过引入语义熵解决自然语言生成中因语义等价导致的不确定性评估难题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以准确评估语言模型输出的可信度，因为语义等价现象导致不同表述可能具有相同含义，使不确定性测量变得复杂。
AI.method: 提出语义熵指标，利用语言不变性特征进行不确定性估计，该方法无需监督学习且不依赖模型修改。
AI.result: 在问答数据集的消融实验中，语义熵相比现有基线方法能更准确预测模型表现。
AI.conclusion: 语义熵有效解决了语义等价带来的不确定性评估挑战，为自然语言生成中的可信度判断提供了新思路。

authors_text: Kaustubh Milind Kulkarni,Rohan S Jamadagni,Jeffrey Aaron Paul,Sucheth Shenoy
title: Table Tennis Stroke Detection and Recognition Using Ball Trajectory Data
title_zh: 使用球轨迹数据进行乒乓球击球检测和识别
abstract: In this work, the novel task of detecting and classifying table tennis strokes solely using the ball trajectory has been explored. A single camera setup positioned in the umpire's view has been employed to procure a dataset consisting of six stroke classes executed by four professional table tennis players. Ball tracking using YOLOv4, a traditional object detection model, and TrackNetv2, a temporal heatmap based model, have been implemented on our dataset and their performances have been benchmarked. A mathematical approach developed to extract temporal boundaries of strokes using the ball trajectory data yielded a total of 2023 valid strokes in our dataset, while also detecting services and missed strokes successfully. The temporal convolutional network developed performed stroke recognition on completely unseen data with an accuracy of 87.155%. Several machine learning and deep learning based model architectures have been trained for stroke recognition using ball trajectory input and benchmarked based on their performances. While stroke recognition in the field of table tennis has been extensively explored based on human action recognition using video data focused on the player's actions, the use of ball trajectory data for the same is an unexplored characteristic of the sport. Hence, the motivation behind the work is to demonstrate that meaningful inferences such as stroke detection and recognition can be drawn using minimal input information.
summary: In this work, the novel task of detecting and classifying table tennis strokes solely using the ball trajectory has been explored. A single camera setup positioned in the umpire's view has been employed to procure a dataset consisting of six stroke classes executed by four professional table tennis players. Ball tracking using YOLOv4, a traditional object detection model, and TrackNetv2, a temporal heatmap based model, have been implemented on our dataset and their performances have been benchmarked. A mathematical approach developed to extract temporal boundaries of strokes using the ball trajectory data yielded a total of 2023 valid strokes in our dataset, while also detecting services and missed strokes successfully. The temporal convolutional network developed performed stroke recognition on completely unseen data with an accuracy of 87.155%. Several machine learning and deep learning based model architectures have been trained for stroke recognition using ball trajectory input and benchmarked based on their performances. While stroke recognition in the field of table tennis has been extensively explored based on human action recognition using video data focused on the player's actions, the use of ball trajectory data for the same is an unexplored characteristic of the sport. Hence, the motivation behind the work is to demonstrate that meaningful inferences such as stroke detection and recognition can be drawn using minimal input information.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，探索了仅使用球轨迹来检测和分类乒乓球击球的新任务。裁判员视野中的单个摄像机设置用于获取由四名职业乒乓球运动员执行的六个击球类别组成的数据集。使用传统目标检测模型 YOLOv4 和基于时间热图的模型 TrackNetv2 的球跟踪已在我们的数据集上实现，并且已对它们的性能进行了基准测试。使用球轨迹数据提取击球时间边界的数学方法在我们的数据集中产生了总共 2023 个有效击球，同时还成功检测了发球和错过的击球。开发的时间卷积网络对完全看不见的数据进行笔画识别，准确率达到 87.155%。几种基于机器学习和深度学习的模型架构已经使用球轨迹输入进行了击球识别训练，并根据其性能进行了基准测试。虽然乒乓球领域中的击球识别已经基于使用专注于运动员动作的视频数据的人类动作识别进行了广泛的探索，但球轨迹数据的使用是这项运动的尚未探索的特征。因此，这项工作背后的动机是证明可以使用最少的输入信息得出有意义的推论，例如笔划检测和识别。

AI.tldr: 本研究通过分析乒乓球轨迹数据，实现了乒乓球击球动作的检测与识别。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多基于视频中选手动作进行乒乓球击球识别，而利用球轨迹数据进行识别尚未被探索，因此本文旨在证明仅通过球轨迹数据即可进行有效击球检测。
AI.method: 采用单摄像头采集裁判视角数据，使用YOLOv4和TrackNetv2进行球追踪，结合数学方法提取击球时间边界，并构建时序卷积网络进行击球动作识别。
AI.result: 在未见过的数据上达到87.155%的击球识别准确率，成功检测出2023个有效击球动作及发球和未击中情况。
AI.conclusion: 球轨迹数据可有效用于击球检测与识别，为乒乓球运动分析提供了新的数据驱动方法。

search_text: Table Tennis Stroke Detection and Recognition Using Ball Trajectory Data 使用球轨迹数据进行乒乓球击球检测和识别 In this work, the novel task of detecting and classifying table tennis strokes solely using the ball trajectory has been explored. A single camera setup positioned in the umpire's view has been employed to procure a dataset consisting of six stroke classes executed by four professional table tennis players. Ball tracking using YOLOv4, a traditional object detection model, and TrackNetv2, a temporal heatmap based model, have been implemented on our dataset and their performances have been benchmarked. A mathematical approach developed to extract temporal boundaries of strokes using the ball trajectory data yielded a total of 2023 valid strokes in our dataset, while also detecting services and missed strokes successfully. The temporal convolutional network developed performed stroke recognition on completely unseen data with an accuracy of 87.155%. Several machine learning and deep learning based model architectures have been trained for stroke recognition using ball trajectory input and benchmarked based on their performances. While stroke recognition in the field of table tennis has been extensively explored based on human action recognition using video data focused on the player's actions, the use of ball trajectory data for the same is an unexplored characteristic of the sport. Hence, the motivation behind the work is to demonstrate that meaningful inferences such as stroke detection and recognition can be drawn using minimal input information. 在这项工作中，探索了仅使用球轨迹来检测和分类乒乓球击球的新任务。裁判员视野中的单个摄像机设置用于获取由四名职业乒乓球运动员执行的六个击球类别组成的数据集。使用传统目标检测模型 YOLOv4 和基于时间热图的模型 TrackNetv2 的球跟踪已在我们的数据集上实现，并且已对它们的性能进行了基准测试。使用球轨迹数据提取击球时间边界的数学方法在我们的数据集中产生了总共 2023 个有效击球，同时还成功检测了发球和错过的击球。开发的时间卷积网络对完全看不见的数据进行笔画识别，准确率达到 87.155%。几种基于机器学习和深度学习的模型架构已经使用球轨迹输入进行了击球识别训练，并根据其性能进行了基准测试。虽然乒乓球领域中的击球识别已经基于使用专注于运动员动作的视频数据的人类动作识别进行了广泛的探索，但球轨迹数据的使用是这项运动的尚未探索的特征。因此，这项工作背后的动机是证明可以使用最少的输入信息得出有意义的推论，例如笔划检测和识别。 本研究通过分析乒乓球轨迹数据，实现了乒乓球击球动作的检测与识别。 Kaustubh Milind Kulkarni,Rohan S Jamadagni,Jeffrey Aaron Paul,Sucheth Shenoy cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Joohyung Kim,Dhruv C Mathur,Kazuki Shin,Sean Taylor
title: PAPRAS: Plug-And-Play Robotic Arm System
title_zh: PAPRAS：即插即用机械臂系统
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: This paper presents a novel robotic arm system, named PAPRAS (Plug-And-Play Robotic Arm System). PAPRAS consists of a portable robotic arm(s), docking mount(s), and software architecture including a control system. By analyzing the target task spaces at home, the dimensions and configuration of PAPRAS are determined. PAPRAS's arm is light (less than 6kg) with an optimized 3D-printed structure, and it has a high payload (3kg) as a human-arm-sized manipulator. A locking mechanism is embedded in the structure for better portability and the 3D-printed docking mount can be installed easily. PAPRAS's software architecture is developed on an open-source framework and optimized for low-latency multiagent-based distributed manipulator control. A process to create new demonstrations is presented to show PAPRAS's ease of use and efficiency. In the paper, simulations and hardware experiments are presented in various demonstrations, including sink-to-dishwasher manipulation, coffee making, mobile manipulation on a quadruped, and suit-up demo to validate the hardware and software design.
summary: This paper presents a novel robotic arm system, named PAPRAS (Plug-And-Play Robotic Arm System). PAPRAS consists of a portable robotic arm(s), docking mount(s), and software architecture including a control system. By analyzing the target task spaces at home, the dimensions and configuration of PAPRAS are determined. PAPRAS's arm is light (less than 6kg) with an optimized 3D-printed structure, and it has a high payload (3kg) as a human-arm-sized manipulator. A locking mechanism is embedded in the structure for better portability and the 3D-printed docking mount can be installed easily. PAPRAS's software architecture is developed on an open-source framework and optimized for low-latency multiagent-based distributed manipulator control. A process to create new demonstrations is presented to show PAPRAS's ease of use and efficiency. In the paper, simulations and hardware experiments are presented in various demonstrations, including sink-to-dishwasher manipulation, coffee making, mobile manipulation on a quadruped, and suit-up demo to validate the hardware and software design.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新型机械臂系统，名为 PAPRAS（即插即用机械臂系统）。 PAPRAS 由便携式机械臂、对接支架和包括控制系统的软件架构组成。通过分析家中的目标任务空间，确定 PAPRAS 的尺寸和配置。 PAPRAS的手臂重量轻（不到6公斤），采用优化的3D打印结构，并且具有高有效载荷（3公斤），相当于人臂大小的机械臂。结构中嵌入了锁定机构，以实现更好的便携性，并且 3D 打印的对接支架可以轻松安装。 PAPRAS 的软件架构是在开源框架上开发的，并针对基于低延迟多智能体的分布式机械臂控制进行了优化。提出了创建新演示的流程，以展示 PAPRAS 的易用性和效率。在本文中，通过各种演示进行了模拟和硬件实验，包括从水槽到洗碗机的操作、咖啡制作、四足动物的移动操作以及用于验证硬件和软件设计的套装演示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型的即插即用机械臂系统PAPRAS，包括便携式机械臂、对接支架和软件架构，用于家庭环境中的各种任务。
AI.motivation: 为了开发一种适用于家庭环境的便携、高效且易于使用的机械臂系统，以满足日常任务自动化的需求。
AI.method: 通过分析家庭任务空间，确定PAPRAS的尺寸和配置，采用轻量级3D打印结构和高负载能力的机械臂，并开发基于开源框架的低延迟多智能体分布式控制软件架构。
AI.result: 通过仿真和硬件实验验证了PAPRAS在洗碗机操作、咖啡制作、四足机器人移动操作和服装穿戴演示中的性能。
AI.conclusion: PAPRAS系统展示了其在家庭环境中的便携性、灵活性和高效性，为家庭自动化提供了新的解决方案。

title: Communication-Efficient Distributed Graph Clustering and Sparsification under Duplication Models
title_zh: 重复模型下通信高效的分布式图聚类和稀疏化
comment: This is the full version of an article published in the Proceedings of CIAC 2023
comments: This is the full version of an article published in the Proceedings of CIAC 2023
abstract: In this paper, we consider the problem of clustering graph nodes and sparsifying graph edges over distributed graphs, when graph edges with possibly edge duplicates are observed at physically remote sites. Although edge duplicates across different sites appear to be beneficial at the first glance, in fact they could make the clustering and sparsification more complicated since potentially their processing would need extra computations and communications. We propose the first communication-optimal algorithms for two well-established communication models namely the message passing and the blackboard models. Specifically, given a graph on $n$ nodes with edges observed at $s$ sites, our algorithms achieve communication costs $\tilde{O}(ns)$ and $\tilde{O}(n+s)$ ($\tilde{O}$ hides a polylogarithmic factor), which almost match their lower bounds, $Ω(ns)$ and $Ω(n+s)$, in the message passing and the blackboard models respectively. The communication costs are asymptotically the same as those under non-duplication models, under an assumption on edge distribution. Our algorithms can also guarantee clustering quality nearly as good as that of centralizing all edges and then applying any standard clustering algorithm. Moreover, we perform the first investigation of distributed constructions of graph spanners in the blackboard model. We provide almost matching communication lower and upper bounds for both multiplicative and additive spanners. For example, the communication lower bounds of constructing a $(2k-1)$-spanner in the blackboard with and without duplication models are $Ω(s+n^{1+1/k}\log s)$ and $Ω(s+n^{1+1/k}\max\{1,s^{-1/2-1/(2k)}\log s\})$ respectively, which almost match the upper bound $\tilde{O}(s+n^{1+1/k})$ for both models.

Specifically, given a graph on $n$ nodes with edges observed at $s$ sites, our algorithms achieve communication costs $\tilde{O}(ns)$ and $\tilde{O}(n+s)$ ($\tilde{O}$ hides a polylogarithmic factor), which almost match their lower bounds, $Ω(ns)$ and $Ω(n+s)$, in the message passing and the blackboard models respectively. The communication costs are asymptotically the same as those under non-duplication models, under an assumption on edge distribution. Our algorithms can also guarantee clustering quality nearly as good as that of centralizing all edges and then applying any standard clustering algorithm. Moreover, we perform the first investigation of distributed constructions of graph spanners in the blackboard model. We provide almost matching communication lower and upper bounds for both multiplicative and additive spanners. For example, the communication lower bounds of constructing a $(2k-1)$-spanner in the blackboard with and without duplication models are $Ω(s+n^{1+1/k}\log s)$ and $Ω(s+n^{1+1/k}\max\{1,s^{-1/2-1/(2k)}\log s\})$ respectively, which almost match the upper bound $\tilde{O}(s+n^{1+1/k})$ for both models.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，当在物理远程站点观察到可能具有边缘重复的图边缘时，我们考虑在分布式图上聚类图节点和稀疏图边缘的问题。尽管乍一看，跨不同站点的边缘重复似乎是有益的，但事实上，它们可能会使聚类和稀疏化变得更加复杂，因为它们的处理可能需要额外的计算和通信。我们为两种成熟的通信模型（即消息传递模型和黑板模型）提出了第一个通信优化算法。具体来说，给定在 $s$ 站点观察到边缘的 $n$ 节点上的图，我们的算法实现通信成本 $\tilde{O}(ns)$ 和 $\tilde{O}(n+s)$ （$\tilde{O}$ 隐藏多对数因子），几乎分别在消息传递和黑板模型中匹配其下限 $Ω(ns)$ 和 $Ω(n+s)$。在边缘分布的假设下，通信成本与非重复模型下的通信成本渐近相同。我们的算法还可以保证聚类质量几乎与集中所有边缘然后应用任何标准聚类算法一样好。此外，我们对黑板模型中图扳手的分布式构造进行了首次研究。我们为乘法和加法扳手提供几乎匹配的通信下限和上限。例如，在黑板上构建 $(2k-1)$-spanner，有和没有重复模型的通信下界分别为 $Ω(s+n^{1+1/k}\log s)$ 和 $Ω(s+n^{1+1/k}\max\{1,s^{-1/2-1/(2k)}\log s\})$，几乎与上界匹配$\tilde{O}(s+n^{1+1/k})$ 对于两个模型。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在分布式图中存在边重复的情况下，如何高效地进行图聚类和稀疏化，提出通信开销最优的算法。
AI.motivation: 当图边在不同远程站点存在重复时，虽看似有益，但实际会增加聚类和稀疏化的计算与通信复杂性，需设计高效算法减少通信开销并保证质量。
AI.method: 针对消息传递和黑板模型，提出通信最优算法，通信成本接近理论下限，并假设边分布条件下与无重复模型通信成本相当；首次研究分布式图spanner构建，给出通信上下界。
AI.result: 算法通信成本达到近似理论下限，聚类质量接近集中式处理；spanner构造的通信上下界几乎匹配，如(2k-1)-spanner的通信下界为Ω(s+n^{1+1/k}log s)等。
AI.conclusion: 所提算法在通信效率上接近最优，适用于分布式环境下的图聚类与稀疏化，且spanner结果为理论分析提供了有效边界。

Our algorithms can also guarantee clustering quality nearly as good as that of centralizing all edges and then applying any standard clustering algorithm. Moreover, we perform the first investigation of distributed constructions of graph spanners in the blackboard model. We provide almost matching communication lower and upper bounds for both multiplicative and additive spanners. For example, the communication lower bounds of constructing a $(2k-1)$-spanner in the blackboard with and without duplication models are $Ω(s+n^{1+1/k}\log s)$ and $Ω(s+n^{1+1/k}\max\{1,s^{-1/2-1/(2k)}\log s\})$ respectively, which almost match the upper bound $\tilde{O}(s+n^{1+1/k})$ for both models. 在本文中，当在物理远程站点观察到可能具有边缘重复的图边缘时，我们考虑在分布式图上聚类图节点和稀疏图边缘的问题。尽管乍一看，跨不同站点的边缘重复似乎是有益的，但事实上，它们可能会使聚类和稀疏化变得更加复杂，因为它们的处理可能需要额外的计算和通信。我们为两种成熟的通信模型（即消息传递模型和黑板模型）提出了第一个通信优化算法。具体来说，给定在 $s$ 站点观察到边缘的 $n$ 节点上的图，我们的算法实现通信成本 $\tilde{O}(ns)$ 和 $\tilde{O}(n+s)$ （$\tilde{O}$ 隐藏多对数因子），几乎分别在消息传递和黑板模型中匹配其下限 $Ω(ns)$ 和 $Ω(n+s)$。在边缘分布的假设下，通信成本与非重复模型下的通信成本渐近相同。我们的算法还可以保证聚类质量几乎与集中所有边缘然后应用任何标准聚类算法一样好。此外，我们对黑板模型中图扳手的分布式构造进行了首次研究。我们为乘法和加法扳手提供几乎匹配的通信下限和上限。例如，在黑板上构建 $(2k-1)$-spanner，有和没有重复模型的通信下界分别为 $Ω(s+n^{1+1/k}\log s)$ 和 $Ω(s+n^{1+1/k}\max\{1,s^{-1/2-1/(2k)}\log s\})$，几乎与上界匹配$\tilde{O}(s+n^{1+1/k})$ 对于两个模型。 本文研究了在分布式图中存在边重复的情况下，如何高效地进行图聚类和稀疏化，提出通信开销最优的算法。 Chun Jiang Zhu cs.DS

title: Wrapyfi: A Python Wrapper for Integrating Robots, Sensors, and Applications across Multiple Middleware
title_zh: Wrapyfi：用于跨多个中间件集成机器人、传感器和应用程序的 Python 包装器
abstract: Message oriented and robotics middleware play an important role in facilitating robot control, abstracting complex functionality, and unifying communication patterns between sensors and devices. However, using multiple middleware frameworks presents a challenge in integrating different robots within a single system. To address this challenge, we present Wrapyfi, a Python wrapper supporting multiple message oriented and robotics middleware, including ZeroMQ, YARP, ROS, and ROS 2. Wrapyfi also provides plugins for exchanging deep learning framework data, without additional encoding or preprocessing steps. Using Wrapyfi eases the development of scripts that run on multiple machines, thereby enabling cross-platform communication and workload distribution. We finally present the three communication schemes that form the cornerstone of Wrapyfi's communication model, along with examples that demonstrate their applicability.
summary: Message oriented and robotics middleware play an important role in facilitating robot control, abstracting complex functionality, and unifying communication patterns between sensors and devices. However, using multiple middleware frameworks presents a challenge in integrating different robots within a single system. To address this challenge, we present Wrapyfi, a Python wrapper supporting multiple message oriented and robotics middleware, including ZeroMQ, YARP, ROS, and ROS 2. Wrapyfi also provides plugins for exchanging deep learning framework data, without additional encoding or preprocessing steps. Using Wrapyfi eases the development of scripts that run on multiple machines, thereby enabling cross-platform communication and workload distribution. We finally present the three communication schemes that form the cornerstone of Wrapyfi's communication model, along with examples that demonstrate their applicability.
abstract_zh: 面向消息的机器人中间件在促进机器人控制、抽象复杂功能以及统一传感器和设备之间的通信模式方面发挥着重要作用。然而，使用多个中间件框架给在单个系统中集成不同的机器人带来了挑战。为了应对这一挑战，我们推出了 Wrapyfi，这是一个支持多种面向消息和机器人中间件的 Python 包装器，包括 ZeroMQ、YARP、ROS 和 ROS 2。Wrapyfi 还提供了用于交换深度学习框架数据的插件，无需额外的编码或预处理步骤。使用 Wrapyfi 可以简化在多台计算机上运行的脚本的开发，从而实现跨平台通信和工作负载分配。最后，我们介绍了构成 Wrapyfi 通信模型基石的三种通信方案，以及证明其适用性的示例。

AI.tldr: 开发一个Python包装器，用于整合多种中间件的机器人、传感器和应用，实现跨平台通信与负载分配。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人系统中多中间件整合困难，需统一接口简化跨平台协作。
AI.method: 提出Wrapyfi Python包装器，支持多种中间件（如ROS、ZeroMQ）及深度学习数据插件，无需额外编码。
AI.result: 实现三种通信方案并验证其在跨平台通信和负载分配中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Wrapyfi有效解决多中间件整合难题，提升机器人系统开发效率与跨平台协作能力。

title: An Explainable Collaborative Dialogue System using a Theory of Mind
title_zh: 使用心理理论的可解释协作对话系统
abstract: Eva is a neuro-symbolic domain-independent multimodal collaborative dialogue system that takes seriously that the purpose of task-oriented dialogue is to assist the user. To do this, the system collaborates by inferring their intentions and plans, detects obstacles to success, finds plans to overcome them or to achieve higher-level goals, and plans its actions, including speech acts, to help users accomplish those goals. In doing so, the system maintains and reasons with its own declaratively-specified beliefs, goals and intentions, and explicitly reasons about those of its user. Because Eva can track different users' mental states, it can engage multiple agents in multi-party dialogues. Reasoning is accomplished with a modal Horn-clause meta-interpreter that enables computable inference within the subset of logic implemented. The system employs both hierarchical and backward-chaining planning, operating over a rich modal logic-based knowledge and action representation. The planning and reasoning subsystems obey the principles of persistent goals and intentions including: 1) The formation and decomposition of intentions to perform complex actions, 2) the conditions under which persistent goals and intentions can be given up, and 3) persistent goal and intention revision using the relativizing formulas that are created during the planning process. The system treats its speech acts just like its other actions. This general approach enables Eva to plan a variety of speech acts, including requests, informs, questions, confirmations, offers, acceptances, and emotive expressions. Because the dialogue engine is a planner, as the dialogue proceeds, the system can flexibly generate, execute, and potentially repair its plans using physical, digital, and speech actions. Importantly, Eva can explain its utterances because it has created a plan that caused it to utter them.

abstract_zh: Eva 是一个神经符号域无关的多模态协作对话系统，它认真对待面向任务的对话的目的是帮助用户。为此，系统通过推断用户的意图和计划进行协作，检测成功的障碍，找到克服这些障碍或实现更高级别目标的计划，并计划其行动（包括言语行为）以帮助用户实现这些目标。在此过程中，系统用自己声明式指定的信念、目标和意图来维护和推理，并明确地对其用户的信念、目标和意图进行推理。由于Eva可以追踪不同用户的心理状态，因此它可以让多个智能体进行多方对话。推理是通过模态霍恩子句元解释器完成的，该解释器可以在所实现的逻辑子集中进行可计算的推理。该系统采用分层和后向链接规划，在丰富的基于模态逻辑的知识和动作表示上运行。规划和推理子系统遵循持久性目标和意图的原则，包括：1）执行复杂动作的意图的形成和分解，2）可以放弃持久性目标和意图的条件，3）使用在规划过程中创建的相对化公式来修改持久性目标和意图。系统对待其言语行为就像对待其他行为一样。这种通用方法使伊娃能够计划各种言语行为，包括请求、通知、问题、确认、提议、接受和情感表达。由于对话引擎是一个规划器，随着对话的进行，系统可以使用物理、数字和语音动作灵活地生成、执行并可能修复其计划。重要的是，伊娃可以解释它的话语，因为它制定了一个计划，导致它说出这些话。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于心智理论的可解释协作对话系统Eva，通过推理用户意图和计划来协助完成任务。
AI.motivation: 现有对话系统缺乏对用户心理状态的深入理解，难以有效协作完成复杂任务。
AI.method: 结合神经符号系统与模态逻辑，采用分层规划和反向链推理，通过显式推理用户及系统的信念、目标和意图实现协作。
AI.result: Eva能跟踪多用户心理状态，生成解释性对话行为，并在多智能体对话中动态调整计划。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过心智理论建模和逻辑推理，显著提升了对话系统的协作能力与可解释性。

title: An overview of differentiable particle filters for data-adaptive sequential Bayesian inference
title_zh: 用于数据自适应顺序贝叶斯推理的可微粒子滤波器概述
comment: 29 pages, accepted for publication by AIMS Foundation of Data Science
comments: 29 pages, accepted for publication by AIMS Foundation of Data Science
abstract: By approximating posterior distributions with weighted samples, particle filters (PFs) provide an efficient mechanism for solving non-linear sequential state estimation problems. While the effectiveness of particle filters has been recognised in various applications, their performance relies on the knowledge of dynamic models and measurement models, as well as the construction of effective proposal distributions. An emerging trend involves constructing components of particle filters using neural networks and optimising them by gradient descent, and such data-adaptive particle filtering approaches are often called differentiable particle filters. Due to the expressiveness of neural networks, differentiable particle filters are a promising computational tool for performing inference on sequential data in complex, high-dimensional tasks, such as vision-based robot localisation. In this paper, we review recent advances in differentiable particle filters and their applications. We place special emphasis on different design choices for key components of differentiable particle filters, including dynamic models, measurement models, proposal distributions, optimisation objectives, and differentiable resampling techniques.
summary: By approximating posterior distributions with weighted samples, particle filters (PFs) provide an efficient mechanism for solving non-linear sequential state estimation problems. While the effectiveness of particle filters has been recognised in various applications, their performance relies on the knowledge of dynamic models and measurement models, as well as the construction of effective proposal distributions. An emerging trend involves constructing components of particle filters using neural networks and optimising them by gradient descent, and such data-adaptive particle filtering approaches are often called differentiable particle filters. Due to the expressiveness of neural networks, differentiable particle filters are a promising computational tool for performing inference on sequential data in complex, high-dimensional tasks, such as vision-based robot localisation. In this paper, we review recent advances in differentiable particle filters and their applications. We place special emphasis on different design choices for key components of differentiable particle filters, including dynamic models, measurement models, proposal distributions, optimisation objectives, and differentiable resampling techniques.
abstract_zh: 通过使用加权样本近似后验分布，粒子滤波器 (PF) 提供了解决非线性顺序状态估计问题的有效机制。虽然粒子滤波器的有效性已在各种应用中得到认可，但其性能依赖于动态模型和测量模型的知识，以及有效建议分布的构建。一种新兴趋势涉及使用神经网络构建粒子滤波器的组件并通过梯度下降对其进行优化，这种数据自适应粒子滤波方法通常称为可微粒子滤波器。由于神经网络的表达能力，可微分粒子滤波器是一种很有前途的计算工具，用于在复杂的高维任务（例如基于视觉的机器人定位）中对顺序数据进行推理。在本文中，我们回顾了可微粒子滤波器及其应用的最新进展。我们特别强调可微粒子滤波器关键组件的不同设计选择，包括动态模型、测量模型、建议分布、优化目标和可微重采样技术。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了可微分粒子滤波器在数据自适应序列贝叶斯推理中的最新进展及其应用，重点分析其关键组件的设计选择。
AI.motivation: 传统粒子滤波器依赖已知动态模型和测量模型，且需手动设计提议分布，难以适应复杂高维任务。可微分粒子滤波器通过神经网络和梯度下降自动学习模型参数，提升了适应性。
AI.method: 系统回顾了可微分粒子滤波器的核心组件设计，包括动态模型、测量模型、提议分布、优化目标及可微分重采样技术，并分析其在复杂任务中的应用。
AI.result: 总结了不同设计选择对算法性能的影响，验证了可微分粒子滤波器在视觉机器人定位等高维任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 可微分粒子滤波器为复杂序列推理提供了高效工具，未来需进一步优化组件设计以提升鲁棒性和计算效率。

search_text: An overview of differentiable particle filters for data-adaptive sequential Bayesian inference 用于数据自适应顺序贝叶斯推理的可微粒子滤波器概述 By approximating posterior distributions with weighted samples, particle filters (PFs) provide an efficient mechanism for solving non-linear sequential state estimation problems. While the effectiveness of particle filters has been recognised in various applications, their performance relies on the knowledge of dynamic models and measurement models, as well as the construction of effective proposal distributions. An emerging trend involves constructing components of particle filters using neural networks and optimising them by gradient descent, and such data-adaptive particle filtering approaches are often called differentiable particle filters. Due to the expressiveness of neural networks, differentiable particle filters are a promising computational tool for performing inference on sequential data in complex, high-dimensional tasks, such as vision-based robot localisation. In this paper, we review recent advances in differentiable particle filters and their applications. We place special emphasis on different design choices for key components of differentiable particle filters, including dynamic models, measurement models, proposal distributions, optimisation objectives, and differentiable resampling techniques. 通过使用加权样本近似后验分布，粒子滤波器 (PF) 提供了解决非线性顺序状态估计问题的有效机制。虽然粒子滤波器的有效性已在各种应用中得到认可，但其性能依赖于动态模型和测量模型的知识，以及有效建议分布的构建。一种新兴趋势涉及使用神经网络构建粒子滤波器的组件并通过梯度下降对其进行优化，这种数据自适应粒子滤波方法通常称为可微粒子滤波器。由于神经网络的表达能力，可微分粒子滤波器是一种很有前途的计算工具，用于在复杂的高维任务（例如基于视觉的机器人定位）中对顺序数据进行推理。在本文中，我们回顾了可微粒子滤波器及其应用的最新进展。我们特别强调可微粒子滤波器关键组件的不同设计选择，包括动态模型、测量模型、建议分布、优化目标和可微重采样技术。 本文综述了可微分粒子滤波器在数据自适应序列贝叶斯推理中的最新进展及其应用，重点分析其关键组件的设计选择。 Xiongjie Chen,Yunpeng Li cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Xinyue Hu,Lin Gu,Kazuma Kobayashi,Qiyuan An,Qingyu Chen,Zhiyong Lu,Chang Su,Tatsuya Harada,Yingying Zhu
title: Interpretable Medical Image Visual Question Answering via Multi-Modal Relationship Graph Learning
title_zh: 通过多模态关系图学习进行可解释的医学图像视觉问答
abstract: Medical visual question answering (VQA) aims to answer clinically relevant questions regarding input medical images. This technique has the potential to improve the efficiency of medical professionals while relieving the burden on the public health system, particularly in resource-poor countries. Existing medical VQA methods tend to encode medical images and learn the correspondence between visual features and questions without exploiting the spatial, semantic, or medical knowledge behind them. This is partially because of the small size of the current medical VQA dataset, which often includes simple questions. Therefore, we first collected a comprehensive and large-scale medical VQA dataset, focusing on chest X-ray images. The questions involved detailed relationships, such as disease names, locations, levels, and types in our dataset. Based on this dataset, we also propose a novel baseline method by constructing three different relationship graphs: spatial relationship, semantic relationship, and implicit relationship graphs on the image regions, questions, and semantic labels. The answer and graph reasoning paths are learned for different questions.
summary: Medical visual question answering (VQA) aims to answer clinically relevant questions regarding input medical images. This technique has the potential to improve the efficiency of medical professionals while relieving the burden on the public health system, particularly in resource-poor countries. Existing medical VQA methods tend to encode medical images and learn the correspondence between visual features and questions without exploiting the spatial, semantic, or medical knowledge behind them. This is partially because of the small size of the current medical VQA dataset, which often includes simple questions. Therefore, we first collected a comprehensive and large-scale medical VQA dataset, focusing on chest X-ray images. The questions involved detailed relationships, such as disease names, locations, levels, and types in our dataset. Based on this dataset, we also propose a novel baseline method by constructing three different relationship graphs: spatial relationship, semantic relationship, and implicit relationship graphs on the image regions, questions, and semantic labels. The answer and graph reasoning paths are learned for different questions.
abstract_zh: 医学视觉问答 (VQA) 旨在回答有关输入医学图像的临床相关问题。这项技术有可能提高医疗专业人员的效率，同时减轻公共卫生系统的负担，特别是在资源匮乏的国家。现有的医学 VQA 方法倾向于对医学图像进行编码并学习视觉特征和问题之间的对应关系，而不利用其背后的空间、语义或医学知识。部分原因是当前医学 VQA 数据集规模较小，其中通常包含简单的问题。因此，我们首先收集了一个全面且大规模的医学 VQA 数据集，重点关注胸部 X 射线图像。这些问题涉及详细的关系，例如数据集中的疾病名称、位置、水平和类型。基于该数据集，我们还提出了一种新颖的基线方法，通过构建三种不同的关系图：空间关系、语义关系以及图像区域、问题和语义标签上的隐式关系图。针对不同的问题学习答案和图形推理路径。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可解释的医学图像问答方法，通过构建多模态关系图学习胸部X光图像中复杂问题的解答。
AI.motivation: 现有医学VQA方法未充分利用空间、语义及医学知识，且数据集规模小、问题简单，难以满足临床需求。
AI.method: 构建空间关系图、语义关系图和隐含关系图，融合图像区域、问题及语义标签信息，学习答案与图推理路径。
AI.result: 创建了包含详细关系问题的大规模医学VQA数据集，并提出新型基线方法，提升模型可解释性与问答准确性。
AI.conclusion: 多模态关系图学习有效增强医学VQA的可解释性，为复杂临床问题解答提供新思路，并推动相关数据集与方法的发展。

authors_text: Md Hafizur Rahman,Md Ali Azam,Md Abir Hossen,Shankarachary Ragi,Venkataramana Gadhamshetty
title: BiofilmScanner: A Computational Intelligence Approach to Obtain Bacterial Cell Morphological Attributes from Biofilm Image
title_zh: BiofilmScanner：一种从生物膜图像中获取细菌细胞形态属性的计算智能方法
abstract: Desulfovibrio alaskensis G20 (DA-G20) is utilized as a model for sulfate-reducing bacteria (SRB) that are associated with corrosion issues caused by microorganisms. SRB-based biofilms are thought to be responsible for the billion-dollar-per-year bio-corrosion of metal infrastructure. Understanding the extraction of the bacterial cells' shape and size properties in the SRB-biofilm at different growth stages will assist with the design of anti-corrosion techniques. However, numerous issues affect current approaches, including time-consuming geometric property extraction, low efficiency, and high error rates. This paper proposes BiofilScanner, a Yolact-based deep learning method integrated with invariant moments to address these problems. Our approach efficiently detects and segments bacterial cells in an SRB image while simultaneously invariant moments measure the geometric characteristics of the segmented cells with low errors. The numerical experiments of the proposed method demonstrate that the BiofilmScanner is 2.1x and 6.8x faster than our earlier Mask-RCNN and DLv3+ methods for detecting, segmenting, and measuring the geometric properties of the cell. Furthermore, the BiofilmScanner achieved an F1-score of 85.28% while Mask-RCNN and DLv3+ obtained F1-scores of 77.67% and 75.18%, respectively.
summary: Desulfovibrio alaskensis G20 (DA-G20) is utilized as a model for sulfate-reducing bacteria (SRB) that are associated with corrosion issues caused by microorganisms. SRB-based biofilms are thought to be responsible for the billion-dollar-per-year bio-corrosion of metal infrastructure. Understanding the extraction of the bacterial cells' shape and size properties in the SRB-biofilm at different growth stages will assist with the design of anti-corrosion techniques. However, numerous issues affect current approaches, including time-consuming geometric property extraction, low efficiency, and high error rates. This paper proposes BiofilScanner, a Yolact-based deep learning method integrated with invariant moments to address these problems. Our approach efficiently detects and segments bacterial cells in an SRB image while simultaneously invariant moments measure the geometric characteristics of the segmented cells with low errors. The numerical experiments of the proposed method demonstrate that the BiofilmScanner is 2.1x and 6.8x faster than our earlier Mask-RCNN and DLv3+ methods for detecting, segmenting, and measuring the geometric properties of the cell. Furthermore, the BiofilmScanner achieved an F1-score of 85.28% while Mask-RCNN and DLv3+ obtained F1-scores of 77.67% and 75.18%, respectively.
abstract_zh: Desulfovibrio alaskensis G20 (DA-G20) 被用作与微生物引起的腐蚀问题相关的硫酸盐还原菌 (SRB) 的模型。基于SRB的生物膜被认为是导致每年价值数十亿美元的金属基础设施生物腐蚀的原因。了解不同生长阶段 SRB 生物膜中细菌细胞形状和大小特性的提取将有助于防腐技术的设计。然而，当前的方法存在许多问题，包括几何属性提取耗时、效率低和错误率高。本文提出了 BiofilScanner，一种基于 Yolact 并结合不变矩的深度学习方法来解决这些问题。我们的方法有效地检测和分割 SRB 图像中的细菌细胞，同时不变矩以低误差测量分割细胞的几何特征。该方法的数值实验表明，BiofilmScanner 比我们早期用于检测、分割和测量细胞几何特性的 Mask-RCNN 和 DLv3+ 方法快 2.1 倍和 6.8 倍。此外，BiofilmScanner 的 F1 分数为 85.28%，而 Mask-RCNN 和 DLv3+ 的 F1 分数分别为 77.67% 和 75.18%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BiofilmScanner，一种结合深度学习和不变矩的方法，用于高效提取SRB生物膜图像中细菌细胞的形态属性。
AI.motivation: 硫酸盐还原菌（SRB）引起的生物腐蚀导致金属基础设施每年损失数十亿美元，现有方法在提取细菌细胞几何特性时存在效率低、误差高的问题。
AI.method: 基于Yolact的深度学习模型与不变矩技术结合，实现细菌细胞的检测、分割及几何特征测量。
AI.result: BiofilmScanner检测速度比Mask-RCNN和DLv3+分别快2.1倍和6.8倍，F1-score达到85.28%，显著优于对比方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为抗腐蚀技术设计提供了高效准确的细菌形态分析工具，具有重要的工程应用价值。

search_text: BiofilmScanner: A Computational Intelligence Approach to Obtain Bacterial Cell Morphological Attributes from Biofilm Image BiofilmScanner：一种从生物膜图像中获取细菌细胞形态属性的计算智能方法 Desulfovibrio alaskensis G20 (DA-G20) is utilized as a model for sulfate-reducing bacteria (SRB) that are associated with corrosion issues caused by microorganisms. SRB-based biofilms are thought to be responsible for the billion-dollar-per-year bio-corrosion of metal infrastructure. Understanding the extraction of the bacterial cells' shape and size properties in the SRB-biofilm at different growth stages will assist with the design of anti-corrosion techniques. However, numerous issues affect current approaches, including time-consuming geometric property extraction, low efficiency, and high error rates. This paper proposes BiofilScanner, a Yolact-based deep learning method integrated with invariant moments to address these problems. Our approach efficiently detects and segments bacterial cells in an SRB image while simultaneously invariant moments measure the geometric characteristics of the segmented cells with low errors. The numerical experiments of the proposed method demonstrate that the BiofilmScanner is 2.1x and 6.8x faster than our earlier Mask-RCNN and DLv3+ methods for detecting, segmenting, and measuring the geometric properties of the cell. Furthermore, the BiofilmScanner achieved an F1-score of 85.28% while Mask-RCNN and DLv3+ obtained F1-scores of 77.67% and 75.18%, respectively. Desulfovibrio alaskensis G20 (DA-G20) 被用作与微生物引起的腐蚀问题相关的硫酸盐还原菌 (SRB) 的模型。基于SRB的生物膜被认为是导致每年价值数十亿美元的金属基础设施生物腐蚀的原因。了解不同生长阶段 SRB 生物膜中细菌细胞形状和大小特性的提取将有助于防腐技术的设计。然而，当前的方法存在许多问题，包括几何属性提取耗时、效率低和错误率高。本文提出了 BiofilScanner，一种基于 Yolact 并结合不变矩的深度学习方法来解决这些问题。我们的方法有效地检测和分割 SRB 图像中的细菌细胞，同时不变矩以低误差测量分割细胞的几何特征。该方法的数值实验表明，BiofilmScanner 比我们早期用于检测、分割和测量细胞几何特性的 Mask-RCNN 和 DLv3+ 方法快 2.1 倍和 6.8 倍。此外，BiofilmScanner 的 F1 分数为 85.28%，而 Mask-RCNN 和 DLv3+ 的 F1 分数分别为 77.67% 和 75.18%。 本文提出BiofilmScanner，一种结合深度学习和不变矩的方法，用于高效提取SRB生物膜图像中细菌细胞的形态属性。 Md Hafizur Rahman,Md Ali Azam,Md Abir Hossen,Shankarachary Ragi,Venkataramana Gadhamshetty cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Qihao Shi,Wenjie Tian,Wujian Yang,Mengqi Xue,Can Wang,Minghui Wu
title: Jointly Complementary&Competitive Influence Maximization with Concurrent Ally-Boosting and Rival-Preventing
title_zh: 联合互补和竞争影响力最大化，同时促进盟友和防止竞争对手
comment: proof is wrong in the time complexity analysis
comments: proof is wrong in the time complexity analysis
abstract: In this paper, we propose a new influence spread model, namely, Complementary\&Competitive Independent Cascade (C$^2$IC) model. C$^2$IC model generalizes three well known influence model, i.e., influence boosting (IB) model, campaign oblivious (CO)IC model and the IC-N (IC model with negative opinions) model. This is the first model that considers both complementary and competitive influence spread comprehensively under multi-agent environment. Correspondingly, we propose the Complementary\&Competitive influence maximization (C$^2$IM) problem. Given an ally seed set and a rival seed set, the C$^2$IM problem aims to select a set of assistant nodes that can boost the ally spread and prevent the rival spread concurrently. We show the problem is NP-hard and can generalize the influence boosting problem and the influence blocking problem. With classifying the different cascade priorities into 4 cases by the monotonicity and submodularity (M\&S) holding conditions, we design 4 algorithms respectively, with theoretical approximation bounds provided. We conduct extensive experiments on real social networks and the experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed algorithms. We hope this work can inspire abundant future exploration for constructing more generalized influence models that help streamline the works of this area.
summary: In this paper, we propose a new influence spread model, namely, Complementary\&Competitive Independent Cascade (C$^2$IC) model. C$^2$IC model generalizes three well known influence model, i.e., influence boosting (IB) model, campaign oblivious (CO)IC model and the IC-N (IC model with negative opinions) model. This is the first model that considers both complementary and competitive influence spread comprehensively under multi-agent environment. Correspondingly, we propose the Complementary\&Competitive influence maximization (C$^2$IM) problem. Given an ally seed set and a rival seed set, the C$^2$IM problem aims to select a set of assistant nodes that can boost the ally spread and prevent the rival spread concurrently. We show the problem is NP-hard and can generalize the influence boosting problem and the influence blocking problem. With classifying the different cascade priorities into 4 cases by the monotonicity and submodularity (M\&S) holding conditions, we design 4 algorithms respectively, with theoretical approximation bounds provided. We conduct extensive experiments on real social networks and the experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed algorithms. We hope this work can inspire abundant future exploration for constructing more generalized influence models that help streamline the works of this area.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新的影响力传播模型，即互补\&竞争独立级联（C$^2$IC）模型。 C$^2$IC模型概括了三种众所周知的影响力模型，即影响力提升（IB）模型、竞选不经意（CO）IC模型和IC-N（带有负面意见的IC模型）模型。这是第一个综合考虑多智能体环境下互补性和竞争性影响力传播的模型。相应地，我们提出了互补\&竞争影响力最大化（C$^2$IM）问题。给定一个盟友种子集和一个竞争对手种子集，C$^2$IM 问题旨在选择一组辅助节点，这些节点可以同时促进盟友传播并阻止竞争对手传播。我们证明该问题是 NP 难问题，并且可以推广影响力提升问题和影响力阻塞问题。通过单调性和子模性（M\&S）保持条件将不同级联优先级分为4种情况，分别设计了4种算法，并给出了理论近似界限。我们在真实的社交网络上进行了广泛的实验，实验结果证明了所提出算法的有效性。我们希望这项工作能够激发未来的丰富探索，构建更通用的影响力模型，帮助简化该领域的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的影响传播模型C²IC，并设计算法解决同时增强盟友和抑制对手的影响最大化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有模型难以同时处理多智能体环境下的互补性与竞争性影响传播，缺乏对盟友增强与对手抑制的联合优化方法。
AI.method: 构建融合互补与竞争机制的C²IC模型，分类四种级联优先级场景，设计对应算法并提供理论近似界保证。
AI.result: 在真实社交网络实验中验证算法有效性，证明其优于现有影响增强与阻断方法。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为构建更通用的影响传播模型提供了新方向，推动多智能体环境下的影响力优化研究。

title: On Existence of Must-Include Paths and Cycles in Undirected Graphs
title_zh: 关于无向图中必包含路径和环的存在性
abstract: Given an undirected graph $G=(V,E)$ and vertices $s,t,w_1,w_2\in V$, we study finding whether there exists a simple path $P$ from $s$ to $t$ such that $w_1,w_2 \in P$. As a sub-problem, we study the question: given an undirected graph and three of its edges, does there exist a simple cycle containing all those edges? We provide necessary and sufficient conditions for the existence of such paths and cycles, and develop efficient algorithms to solve this and related problems.
summary: Given an undirected graph $G=(V,E)$ and vertices $s,t,w_1,w_2\in V$, we study finding whether there exists a simple path $P$ from $s$ to $t$ such that $w_1,w_2 \in P$. As a sub-problem, we study the question: given an undirected graph and three of its edges, does there exist a simple cycle containing all those edges? We provide necessary and sufficient conditions for the existence of such paths and cycles, and develop efficient algorithms to solve this and related problems.
abstract_zh: 给定无向图 $G=(V,E)$ 和 V$ 中的顶点 $s,t,w_1,w_2\in，我们研究是否存在从 $s$ 到 $t$ 的简单路径 $P$，使得 P$ 中的 $w_1,w_2\in。作为一个子问题，我们研究以下问题：给定一个无向图及其三个边，是否存在包含所有这些边的简单循环？我们为此类路径和循环的存在提供充分必要条件，并开发有效的算法来解决此问题及相关问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究无向图中是否存在包含指定顶点的路径和包含指定边的循环的问题，并提供相关条件和算法。
AI.motivation: 此类问题在图论中具有基础性意义，广泛应用于网络路由、电路设计等领域，但缺乏系统性的存在性条件和高效算法。
AI.method: 通过图论分析，提出必要且充分的条件，并设计高效算法解决路径和循环的存在性问题及子问题。
AI.result: 建立了包含指定顶点的路径和指定边的循环的判定条件，开发了多项式时间算法解决相关问题。
AI.conclusion: 本文解决了无向图中必须包含特定顶点或边的路径与循环的存在性问题，为相关应用提供了理论支持和计算方法。

title: Exploring the Potential of Machine Translation for Generating Named Entity Datasets: A Case Study between Persian and English
title_zh: 探索机器翻译生成命名实体数据集的潜力：波斯语和英语之间的案例研究
comment: ef:2023 9th International Conference on Web Research (ICWR), 2023, 368-372
comments: ef:2023 9th International Conference on Web Research (ICWR), 2023, 368-372
abstract: This study focuses on the generation of Persian named entity datasets through the application of machine translation on English datasets. The generated datasets were evaluated by experimenting with one monolingual and one multilingual transformer model. Notably, the CoNLL 2003 dataset has achieved the highest F1 score of 85.11%. In contrast, the WNUT 2017 dataset yielded the lowest F1 score of 40.02%. The results of this study highlight the potential of machine translation in creating high-quality named entity recognition datasets for low-resource languages like Persian. The study compares the performance of these generated datasets with English named entity recognition systems and provides insights into the effectiveness of machine translation for this task. Additionally, this approach could be used to augment data in low-resource language or create noisy data to make named entity systems more robust and improve them.
summary: This study focuses on the generation of Persian named entity datasets through the application of machine translation on English datasets. The generated datasets were evaluated by experimenting with one monolingual and one multilingual transformer model. Notably, the CoNLL 2003 dataset has achieved the highest F1 score of 85.11%. In contrast, the WNUT 2017 dataset yielded the lowest F1 score of 40.02%. The results of this study highlight the potential of machine translation in creating high-quality named entity recognition datasets for low-resource languages like Persian. The study compares the performance of these generated datasets with English named entity recognition systems and provides insights into the effectiveness of machine translation for this task. Additionally, this approach could be used to augment data in low-resource language or create noisy data to make named entity systems more robust and improve them.
abstract_zh: 本研究的重点是通过在英语数据集上应用机器翻译来生成波斯语命名实体数据集。通过使用一种单语言和一种多语言 Transformer 模型进行实验来评估生成的数据集。值得注意的是，CoNLL 2003 数据集取得了最高的 F1 分数 85.11%。相比之下，WNUT 2017 数据集的 F1 分数最低，为 40.02%。这项研究的结果凸显了机器翻译在为波斯语等低资源语言创建高质量命名实体识别数据集方面的潜力。该研究将这些生成的数据集与英语命名实体识别系统的性能进行了比较，并提供了有关机器翻译对该任务的有效性的见解。此外，这种方法可用于增强低资源语言中的数据或创建噪声数据，以使命名实体系统更加健壮并对其进行改进。

AI.tldr: 本研究通过机器翻译生成波斯语命名实体数据集，并评估其在命名实体识别任务中的效果。
AI.motivation: 低资源语言（如波斯语）缺乏高质量的命名实体数据集，而机器翻译可能为数据生成提供有效途径。
AI.method: 使用机器翻译将英语命名实体数据集（如CoNLL 2003、WNUT 2017）转换为波斯语数据集，再通过单语和多语Transformer模型进行性能评估。
AI.result: CoNLL 2003数据集在波斯语中达到85.11%的F1值，而WNUT 2017仅40.02%，表明数据源质量显著影响生成效果。
AI.conclusion: 机器翻译能有效生成低资源语言的命名实体数据集，且该方法可增强系统鲁棒性或补充数据不足。

authors_text: Paul Maria Scheikl,Balázs Gyenes,Rayan Younis,Christoph Haas,Gerhard Neumann,Martin Wagner,Franziska Mathis-Ullrich
title: LapGym -- An Open Source Framework for Reinforcement Learning in Robot-Assisted Laparoscopic Surgery
title_zh: LapGym——机器人辅助腹腔镜手术强化学习的开源框架
abstract: Recent advances in reinforcement learning (RL) have increased the promise of introducing cognitive assistance and automation to robot-assisted laparoscopic surgery (RALS). However, progress in algorithms and methods depends on the availability of standardized learning environments that represent skills relevant to RALS. We present LapGym, a framework for building RL environments for RALS that models the challenges posed by surgical tasks, and sofa_env, a diverse suite of 12 environments. Motivated by surgical training, these environments are organized into 4 tracks: Spatial Reasoning, Deformable Object Manipulation & Grasping, Dissection, and Thread Manipulation. Each environment is highly parametrizable for increasing difficulty, resulting in a high performance ceiling for new algorithms. We use Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) to establish a baseline for model-free RL algorithms, investigating the effect of several environment parameters on task difficulty. Finally, we show that many environments and parameter configurations reflect well-known, open problems in RL research, allowing researchers to continue exploring these fundamental problems in a surgical context. We aim to provide a challenging, standard environment suite for further development of RL for RALS, ultimately helping to realize the full potential of cognitive surgical robotics. LapGym is publicly accessible through GitHub (https://github.com/ScheiklP/lap_gym).
summary: Recent advances in reinforcement learning (RL) have increased the promise of introducing cognitive assistance and automation to robot-assisted laparoscopic surgery (RALS). However, progress in algorithms and methods depends on the availability of standardized learning environments that represent skills relevant to RALS. We present LapGym, a framework for building RL environments for RALS that models the challenges posed by surgical tasks, and sofa_env, a diverse suite of 12 environments. Motivated by surgical training, these environments are organized into 4 tracks: Spatial Reasoning, Deformable Object Manipulation & Grasping, Dissection, and Thread Manipulation. Each environment is highly parametrizable for increasing difficulty, resulting in a high performance ceiling for new algorithms. We use Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) to establish a baseline for model-free RL algorithms, investigating the effect of several environment parameters on task difficulty. Finally, we show that many environments and parameter configurations reflect well-known, open problems in RL research, allowing researchers to continue exploring these fundamental problems in a surgical context. We aim to provide a challenging, standard environment suite for further development of RL for RALS, ultimately helping to realize the full potential of cognitive surgical robotics. LapGym is publicly accessible through GitHub (https://github.com/ScheiklP/lap_gym).
abstract_zh: 强化学习 (RL) 的最新进展增加了将认知辅助和自动化引入机器人辅助腹腔镜手术 (RALS) 的希望。然而，算法和方法的进步取决于代表 RALS 相关技能的标准化学习环境的可用性。我们推出了 LapGym（一个为 RALS 构建 RL 环境的框架，用于模拟手术任务带来的挑战）以及沙发_env（包含 12 个环境的多样化套件）。受外科训练的启发，这些环境分为 4 个轨道：空间推理、可变形物体操纵和抓取、解剖和螺纹操纵。每个环境都是高度参数化的，以增加难度，从而为新算法带来高性能上限。我们使用近端策略优化 (PPO) 为无模型 RL 算法建立基线，研究多个环境参数对任务难度的影响。最后，我们表明许多环境和参数配置反映了强化学习研究中众所周知的开放问题，使研究人员能够在外科手术环境中继续探索这些基本问题。我们的目标是为 RALS 强化学习的进一步开发提供一个具有挑战性的标准环境套件，最终帮助实现认知手术机器人的全部潜力。 LapGym 可通过 GitHub (https://github.com/ScheiklP/lap_gym) 公开访问。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LapGym框架及sofa_env环境套件，为机器人辅助腹腔镜手术（RALS）中的强化学习（RL）研究提供标准化学习环境。
AI.motivation: 现有RL算法在RALS中的应用受限于缺乏标准化的手术任务模拟环境，难以推动算法发展。
AI.method: 构建包含12个环境的sofa_env套件，按空间推理、可变形物体操作、解剖和线材操控四大类组织，并通过PPO算法建立基线模型验证环境参数对任务难度的影响。
AI.result: 成功开发LapGym开源框架及多样化环境，证明其能反映RL领域的经典难题，为算法研究提供标准化测试平台。
AI.conclusion: LapGym通过公开可复现的手术模拟环境，推动RL在RALS中的研究，助力认知手术机器人技术发展。

title: Parameterized Max Min Feedback Vertex Set
title_zh: 参数化最大最小反馈顶点集
comment: Extended abstract presented in MFCS 2023, full version to appear in SIDMA
comments: Extended abstract presented in MFCS 2023, full version to appear in SIDMA
abstract: Given a graph $G$ and an integer $k$, Max Min FVS asks whether there exists a minimal set of vertices of size at least $k$ whose deletion destroys all cycles. We present several results that improve upon the state of the art of the parameterized complexity of this problem with respect to both structural and natural parameters. Using standard DP techniques, we first present an algorithm of time $\textrm{tw}^{O(\textrm{tw})}n^{O(1)}$, significantly generalizing a recent algorithm of Gaikwad et al. of time $\textrm{vc}^{O(\textrm{vc})}n^{O(1)}$, where $\textrm{tw}, \textrm{vc}$ denote the input graph's treewidth and vertex cover respectively. Subsequently, we show that both of these algorithms are essentially optimal, since a $\textrm{vc}^{o(\textrm{vc})}n^{O(1)}$ algorithm would refute the ETH. With respect to the natural parameter $k$, the aforementioned recent work by Gaikwad et al. claimed an FPT branching algorithm with complexity $10^k n^{O(1)}$. We point out that this algorithm is incorrect and present a branching algorithm of complexity $9.34^k n^{O(1)}$.
summary: Given a graph $G$ and an integer $k$, Max Min FVS asks whether there exists a minimal set of vertices of size at least $k$ whose deletion destroys all cycles. We present several results that improve upon the state of the art of the parameterized complexity of this problem with respect to both structural and natural parameters. Using standard DP techniques, we first present an algorithm of time $\textrm{tw}^{O(\textrm{tw})}n^{O(1)}$, significantly generalizing a recent algorithm of Gaikwad et al. of time $\textrm{vc}^{O(\textrm{vc})}n^{O(1)}$, where $\textrm{tw}, \textrm{vc}$ denote the input graph's treewidth and vertex cover respectively. Subsequently, we show that both of these algorithms are essentially optimal, since a $\textrm{vc}^{o(\textrm{vc})}n^{O(1)}$ algorithm would refute the ETH. With respect to the natural parameter $k$, the aforementioned recent work by Gaikwad et al. claimed an FPT branching algorithm with complexity $10^k n^{O(1)}$. We point out that this algorithm is incorrect and present a branching algorithm of complexity $9.34^k n^{O(1)}$.
abstract_zh: 给定图 $G$ 和整数 $k$，Max Min FVS 询问是否存在大小至少为 $k$ 的最小顶点集，其删除会破坏所有循环。我们提出了一些结果，这些结果在结构参数和自然参数方面改进了该问题的参数化复杂性的现有技术。使用标准的 DP 技术，我们首先提出一种时间算法 $\textrm{tw}^{O(\textrm{tw})}n^{O(1)}$，显着地概括了 Gaikwad 等人的最新算法。时间$\textrm{vc}^{O(\textrm{vc})}n^{O(1)}$，其中$\textrm{tw}、\textrm{vc}$分别表示输入图的树宽和顶点覆盖。随后，我们证明这两种算法本质上都是最优的，因为 $\textrm{vc}^{o(\textrm{vc})}n^{O(1)}$ 算法会反驳 ETH。关于自然参数 $k$，上述 Gaikwad 等人最近的工作。声称 FPT 分支算法的复杂度为 $10^k n^{O(1)}$。我们指出该算法是不正确的，并提出了复杂度为 $9.34^k n^{O(1)}$ 的分支算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究参数化最大最小反馈顶点集问题，旨在寻找删除后能破坏所有环的顶点集合，改进了该问题的参数化复杂度。
AI.motivation: 反馈顶点集问题是图论中的经典问题，具有重要的理论和应用价值。现有算法在参数化复杂度方面仍有优化空间，需探索更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用动态规划技术设计基于树宽和顶点覆盖数的算法，并通过分支算法改进自然参数k的复杂度，同时证明算法的最优性。
AI.result: 提出时间复杂度为tw^{O(tw)}n^{O(1)}的算法，证明vc^{o(vc)}n^{O(1)}算法违背ETH，并修正了先前声称的10^k复杂度，提出9.34^k的分支算法。
AI.conclusion: 本文在结构参数和自然参数两个维度上改进了最大最小反馈顶点集问题的参数化复杂度，同时确立了现有算法的最优性边界。

search_text: Parameterized Max Min Feedback Vertex Set 参数化最大最小反馈顶点集 Given a graph $G$ and an integer $k$, Max Min FVS asks whether there exists a minimal set of vertices of size at least $k$ whose deletion destroys all cycles. We present several results that improve upon the state of the art of the parameterized complexity of this problem with respect to both structural and natural parameters. Using standard DP techniques, we first present an algorithm of time $\textrm{tw}^{O(\textrm{tw})}n^{O(1)}$, significantly generalizing a recent algorithm of Gaikwad et al. of time $\textrm{vc}^{O(\textrm{vc})}n^{O(1)}$, where $\textrm{tw}, \textrm{vc}$ denote the input graph's treewidth and vertex cover respectively. Subsequently, we show that both of these algorithms are essentially optimal, since a $\textrm{vc}^{o(\textrm{vc})}n^{O(1)}$ algorithm would refute the ETH. With respect to the natural parameter $k$, the aforementioned recent work by Gaikwad et al. claimed an FPT branching algorithm with complexity $10^k n^{O(1)}$. We point out that this algorithm is incorrect and present a branching algorithm of complexity $9.34^k n^{O(1)}$. 给定图 $G$ 和整数 $k$，Max Min FVS 询问是否存在大小至少为 $k$ 的最小顶点集，其删除会破坏所有循环。我们提出了一些结果，这些结果在结构参数和自然参数方面改进了该问题的参数化复杂性的现有技术。使用标准的 DP 技术，我们首先提出一种时间算法 $\textrm{tw}^{O(\textrm{tw})}n^{O(1)}$，显着地概括了 Gaikwad 等人的最新算法。时间$\textrm{vc}^{O(\textrm{vc})}n^{O(1)}$，其中$\textrm{tw}、\textrm{vc}$分别表示输入图的树宽和顶点覆盖。随后，我们证明这两种算法本质上都是最优的，因为 $\textrm{vc}^{o(\textrm{vc})}n^{O(1)}$ 算法会反驳 ETH。关于自然参数 $k$，上述 Gaikwad 等人最近的工作。声称 FPT 分支算法的复杂度为 $10^k n^{O(1)}$。我们指出该算法是不正确的，并提出了复杂度为 $9.34^k n^{O(1)}$ 的分支算法。 本文研究参数化最大最小反馈顶点集问题，旨在寻找删除后能破坏所有环的顶点集合，改进了该问题的参数化复杂度。 Michael Lampis,Nikolaos Melissinos,Manolis Vasilakis cs.DS,cs.CC

authors_text: Jie Wang,Rui Yang,Zijie Geng,Zhihao Shi,Mingxuan Ye,Qi Zhou,Shuiwang Ji,Bin Li,Yongdong Zhang,Feng Wu
title: Generalization in Visual Reinforcement Learning with the Reward Sequence Distribution
title_zh: 具有奖励序列分布的视觉强化学习的泛化
abstract: Generalization in partially observed markov decision processes (POMDPs) is critical for successful applications of visual reinforcement learning (VRL) in real scenarios. A widely used idea is to learn task-relevant representations that encode task-relevant information of common features in POMDPs, i.e., rewards and transition dynamics. As transition dynamics in the latent state space -- which are task-relevant and invariant to visual distractions -- are unknown to the agents, existing methods alternatively use transition dynamics in the observation space to extract task-relevant information in transition dynamics. However, such transition dynamics in the observation space involve task-irrelevant visual distractions, degrading the generalization performance of VRL methods. To tackle this problem, we propose the reward sequence distribution conditioned on the starting observation and the predefined subsequent action sequence (RSD-OA). The appealing features of RSD-OA include that: (1) RSD-OA is invariant to visual distractions, as it is conditioned on the predefined subsequent action sequence without task-irrelevant information from transition dynamics, and (2) the reward sequence captures long-term task-relevant information in both rewards and transition dynamics. Experiments demonstrate that our representation learning approach based on RSD-OA significantly improves the generalization performance on unseen environments, outperforming several state-of-the-arts on DeepMind Control tasks with visual distractions.
summary: Generalization in partially observed markov decision processes (POMDPs) is critical for successful applications of visual reinforcement learning (VRL) in real scenarios. A widely used idea is to learn task-relevant representations that encode task-relevant information of common features in POMDPs, i.e., rewards and transition dynamics. As transition dynamics in the latent state space -- which are task-relevant and invariant to visual distractions -- are unknown to the agents, existing methods alternatively use transition dynamics in the observation space to extract task-relevant information in transition dynamics. However, such transition dynamics in the observation space involve task-irrelevant visual distractions, degrading the generalization performance of VRL methods. To tackle this problem, we propose the reward sequence distribution conditioned on the starting observation and the predefined subsequent action sequence (RSD-OA). The appealing features of RSD-OA include that: (1) RSD-OA is invariant to visual distractions, as it is conditioned on the predefined subsequent action sequence without task-irrelevant information from transition dynamics, and (2) the reward sequence captures long-term task-relevant information in both rewards and transition dynamics. Experiments demonstrate that our representation learning approach based on RSD-OA significantly improves the generalization performance on unseen environments, outperforming several state-of-the-arts on DeepMind Control tasks with visual distractions.
abstract_zh: 部分观察马尔可夫决策过程 (POMDP) 的泛化对于视觉强化学习 (VRL) 在实际场景中的成功应用至关重要。一个广泛使用的想法是学习任务相关的表示，这些表示对 POMDP 中共同特征的任务相关信息进行编码，即奖励和转换动态。由于潜在状态空间中的转换动力学（与任务相关且不受视觉干扰影响）对于代理来说是未知的，现有方法或者使用观察空间中的转换动力学来提取转换动力学中与任务相关的信息。然而，观察空间中的这种过渡动态涉及与任务无关的视觉干扰，从而降低了 VRL 方法的泛化性能。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了以开始观察和预定义的后续动作序列为条件的奖励序列分布（RSD-OA）。 RSD-OA 的吸引人的特征包括：（1）RSD-OA 对视觉干扰具有不变性，因为它以预定义的后续动作序列为条件，而没有来自转换动态的与任务无关的信息；（2）奖励序列捕获奖励和转换动态中的长期任务相关信息。实验表明，我们基于 RSD-OA 的表示学习方法显着提高了在不可见环境中的泛化性能，在具有视觉干扰的 DeepMind Control 任务上的表现优于多种最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的方法，通过奖励序列分布（RSD-OA）来提高视觉强化学习在部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程中的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 在视觉强化学习中，泛化能力对于实际应用至关重要，但现有方法因受到视觉干扰的影响，难以提取任务相关的转移动态信息，从而影响了泛化性能。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于奖励序列分布（RSD-OA）的表示学习方法，该方法通过起始观察和预定义后续动作序列进行条件化，能够有效忽略视觉干扰并捕捉长期任务相关的信息。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于RSD-OA的表示学习方法在存在视觉干扰的DeepMind Control任务中显著提高了未见环境的泛化性能，优于多个最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: RSD-OA方法通过捕捉长期任务相关信息并忽略视觉干扰，有效提升了视觉强化学习的泛化能力，为实际应用提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Zhiwei Zhong,Xianming Liu,Junjun Jiang,Debin Zhao,Xiangyang Ji
title: Guided Depth Map Super-resolution: A Survey
title_zh: 引导深度图超分辨率：一项调查
abstract: Guided depth map super-resolution (GDSR), which aims to reconstruct a high-resolution (HR) depth map from a low-resolution (LR) observation with the help of a paired HR color image, is a longstanding and fundamental problem, it has attracted considerable attention from computer vision and image processing communities. A myriad of novel and effective approaches have been proposed recently, especially with powerful deep learning techniques. This survey is an effort to present a comprehensive survey of recent progress in GDSR. We start by summarizing the problem of GDSR and explaining why it is challenging. Next, we introduce some commonly used datasets and image quality assessment methods. In addition, we roughly classify existing GDSR methods into three categories, i.e., filtering-based methods, prior-based methods, and learning-based methods. In each category, we introduce the general description of the published algorithms and design principles, summarize the representative methods, and discuss their highlights and limitations. Moreover, the depth related applications are introduced. Furthermore, we conduct experiments to evaluate the performance of some representative methods based on unified experimental configurations, so as to offer a systematic and fair performance evaluation to readers. Finally, we conclude this survey with possible directions and open problems for further research. All the related materials can be found at \url{https://github.com/zhwzhong/Guided-Depth-Map-Super-resolution-A-Survey}.
summary: Guided depth map super-resolution (GDSR), which aims to reconstruct a high-resolution (HR) depth map from a low-resolution (LR) observation with the help of a paired HR color image, is a longstanding and fundamental problem, it has attracted considerable attention from computer vision and image processing communities. A myriad of novel and effective approaches have been proposed recently, especially with powerful deep learning techniques. This survey is an effort to present a comprehensive survey of recent progress in GDSR. We start by summarizing the problem of GDSR and explaining why it is challenging. Next, we introduce some commonly used datasets and image quality assessment methods. In addition, we roughly classify existing GDSR methods into three categories, i.e., filtering-based methods, prior-based methods, and learning-based methods. In each category, we introduce the general description of the published algorithms and design principles, summarize the representative methods, and discuss their highlights and limitations. Moreover, the depth related applications are introduced. Furthermore, we conduct experiments to evaluate the performance of some representative methods based on unified experimental configurations, so as to offer a systematic and fair performance evaluation to readers. Finally, we conclude this survey with possible directions and open problems for further research. All the related materials can be found at \url{https://github.com/zhwzhong/Guided-Depth-Map-Super-resolution-A-Survey}.
abstract_zh: 引导深度图超分辨率（GDSR）旨在借助配对的 HR 彩色图像从低分辨率（LR）观测中重建高分辨率（HR）深度图，是一个长期存在的基本问题，它引起了计算机视觉和图像处理界的广泛关注。最近提出了无数新颖且有效的方法，尤其是强大的深度学习技术。本调查旨在对 GDSR 的最新进展进行全面调查。我们首先总结 GDSR 的问题并解释为什么它具有挑战性。接下来，我们介绍一些常用的数据集和图像质量评估方法。此外，我们将现有的GDSR方法大致分为三类，即基于过滤的方法、基于先验的方法和基于学习的方法。在每个类别中，我们介绍了已发表的算法和设计原理的一般描述，总结了代表性方法，并讨论了它们的亮点和局限性。此外，还介绍了深度相关的应用。此外，我们还基于统一的实验配置对一些代表性方法的性能进行了实验评估，以便为读者提供系统、公平的性能评估。最后，我们总结了本次调查，提出了进一步研究的可能方向和开放问题。所有相关资料都可以在\url{https://github.com/zhwzhong/Guided-Depth-Map-Super-resolution-A-Survey}找到。

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了引导深度图超分辨率（GDSR）领域的最新进展，分类总结了现有方法并评估其性能。
AI.motivation: GDSR是计算机视觉中的基础问题，随着深度学习技术的发展，亟需全面总结现有方法、挑战及未来方向。
AI.method: 通过总结问题定义与挑战，介绍常用数据集与评估指标，将方法分为基于滤波、先验知识和学习的方法三类，并设计统一实验对比分析代表算法。
AI.result: 系统分类了现有GDSR方法，实验验证了不同方法的性能差异，并分析了其优缺点及适用场景。
AI.conclusion: 未来研究需关注更高效的算法设计、多模态数据融合及真实场景下的鲁棒性提升，同时需解决数据集多样性不足等问题。

tldr: 本文系统综述了引导深度图超分辨率（GDSR）领域的最新进展，分类总结了现有方法并评估其性能。
motivation: GDSR是计算机视觉中的基础问题，随着深度学习技术的发展，亟需全面总结现有方法、挑战及未来方向。
method: 通过总结问题定义与挑战，介绍常用数据集与评估指标，将方法分为基于滤波、先验知识和学习的方法三类，并设计统一实验对比分析代表算法。
result: 系统分类了现有GDSR方法，实验验证了不同方法的性能差异，并分析了其优缺点及适用场景。
conclusion: 未来研究需关注更高效的算法设计、多模态数据融合及真实场景下的鲁棒性提升，同时需解决数据集多样性不足等问题。
search_text: Guided Depth Map Super-resolution: A Survey 引导深度图超分辨率：一项调查 Guided depth map super-resolution (GDSR), which aims to reconstruct a high-resolution (HR) depth map from a low-resolution (LR) observation with the help of a paired HR color image, is a longstanding and fundamental problem, it has attracted considerable attention from computer vision and image processing communities. A myriad of novel and effective approaches have been proposed recently, especially with powerful deep learning techniques. This survey is an effort to present a comprehensive survey of recent progress in GDSR. We start by summarizing the problem of GDSR and explaining why it is challenging. Next, we introduce some commonly used datasets and image quality assessment methods. In addition, we roughly classify existing GDSR methods into three categories, i.e., filtering-based methods, prior-based methods, and learning-based methods. In each category, we introduce the general description of the published algorithms and design principles, summarize the representative methods, and discuss their highlights and limitations. Moreover, the depth related applications are introduced. Furthermore, we conduct experiments to evaluate the performance of some representative methods based on unified experimental configurations, so as to offer a systematic and fair performance evaluation to readers. Finally, we conclude this survey with possible directions and open problems for further research. All the related materials can be found at \url{https://github.com/zhwzhong/Guided-Depth-Map-Super-resolution-A-Survey}. 引导深度图超分辨率（GDSR）旨在借助配对的 HR 彩色图像从低分辨率（LR）观测中重建高分辨率（HR）深度图，是一个长期存在的基本问题，它引起了计算机视觉和图像处理界的广泛关注。最近提出了无数新颖且有效的方法，尤其是强大的深度学习技术。本调查旨在对 GDSR 的最新进展进行全面调查。我们首先总结 GDSR 的问题并解释为什么它具有挑战性。接下来，我们介绍一些常用的数据集和图像质量评估方法。此外，我们将现有的GDSR方法大致分为三类，即基于过滤的方法、基于先验的方法和基于学习的方法。在每个类别中，我们介绍了已发表的算法和设计原理的一般描述，总结了代表性方法，并讨论了它们的亮点和局限性。此外，还介绍了深度相关的应用。此外，我们还基于统一的实验配置对一些代表性方法的性能进行了实验评估，以便为读者提供系统、公平的性能评估。最后，我们总结了本次调查，提出了进一步研究的可能方向和开放问题。所有相关资料都可以在\url{https://github.com/zhwzhong/Guided-Depth-Map-Super-resolution-A-Survey}找到。 本文系统综述了引导深度图超分辨率（GDSR）领域的最新进展，分类总结了现有方法并评估其性能。 Zhiwei Zhong,Xianming Liu,Junjun Jiang,Debin Zhao,Xiangyang Ji cs.CV

title: Accelerated Video Annotation driven by Deep Detector and Tracker
title_zh: 由深度检测器和跟踪器驱动的加速视频注释
abstract: Annotating object ground truth in videos is vital for several downstream tasks in robot perception and machine learning, such as for evaluating the performance of an object tracker or training an image-based object detector. The accuracy of the annotated instances of the moving objects on every image frame in a video is crucially important. Achieving that through manual annotations is not only very time consuming and labor intensive, but is also prone to high error rate. State-of-the-art annotation methods depend on manually initializing the object bounding boxes only in the first frame and then use classical tracking methods, e.g., adaboost, or kernelized correlation filters, to keep track of those bounding boxes. These can quickly drift, thereby requiring tedious manual supervision. In this paper, we propose a new annotation method which leverages a combination of a learning-based detector (SSD) and a learning-based tracker (RE$^3$). Through this, we significantly reduce annotation drifts, and, consequently, the required manual supervision. We validate our approach through annotation experiments using our proposed annotation method and existing baselines on a set of drone video frames. Source code and detailed information on how to run the annotation program can be found at https://github.com/robot-perception-group/smarter-labelme
summary: Annotating object ground truth in videos is vital for several downstream tasks in robot perception and machine learning, such as for evaluating the performance of an object tracker or training an image-based object detector. These can quickly drift, thereby requiring tedious manual supervision. In this paper, we propose a new annotation method which leverages a combination of a learning-based detector (SSD) and a learning-based tracker (RE$^3$). Through this, we significantly reduce annotation drifts, and, consequently, the required manual supervision. We validate our approach through annotation experiments using our proposed annotation method and existing baselines on a set of drone video frames. Source code and detailed information on how to run the annotation program can be found at https://github.com/robot-perception-group/smarter-labelme
abstract_zh: 在视频中注释对象地面实况对于机器人感知和机器学习中的多个下游任务至关重要，例如评估对象跟踪器的性能或训练基于图像的对象检测器。视频中每个图像帧上运动对象的注释实例的准确性至关重要。通过手动标注来实现这一点，不仅非常耗时耗力，而且容易出现较高的错误率。最先进的注释方法依赖于仅在第一帧中手动初始化对象边界框，然后使用经典的跟踪方法（例如 adaboost 或核化相关滤波器）来跟踪这些边界框。这些可能会快速漂移，因此需要繁琐的手动监督。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的注释方法，该方法结合了基于学习的检测器（SSD）和基于学习的跟踪器（RE$^3$）。通过这种方式，我们显着减少了注释漂移，从而减少了所需的手动监督。我们使用我们提出的注释方法和一组无人机视频帧上的现有基线通过注释实验来验证我们的方法。有关如何运行注释程序的源代码和详细信息可以在 https://github.com/robot-perception-group/smarter-labelme 找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度检测器（SSD）和跟踪器（RE³）的视频标注方法，以减少人工干预并提高标注准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统视频标注方法依赖手动初始化和经典跟踪算法，易出现跟踪漂移且需大量人工监督，效率低下且误差率高。
AI.method: 通过集成学习型检测器（SSD）与学习型跟踪器（RE³），自动校正边界框漂移，降低对人工标注的依赖。
AI.result: 在无人机视频数据集上验证了方法的有效性，显著减少标注漂移并提升标注效率。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过深度学习模型协同优化，有效解决了传统标注工具的漂移问题，代码已开源供进一步研究。

authors_text: Yining Shi,Kun Jiang,Ke Wang,Jiusi Li,Yunlong Wang,Mengmeng Yang,Diange Yang
title: StreamingFlow: Streaming Occupancy Forecasting with Asynchronous Multi-modal Data Streams via Neural Ordinary Differential Equation
title_zh: StreamingFlow：通过神经常微分方程使用异步多模态数据流进行流式占用预测
abstract: Predicting the future occupancy states of the surrounding environment is a vital task for autonomous driving. However, current best-performing single-modality methods or multi-modality fusion perception methods are only able to predict uniform snapshots of future occupancy states and require strictly synchronized sensory data for sensor fusion. We propose a novel framework, StreamingFlow, to lift these strong limitations. StreamingFlow is a novel BEV occupancy predictor that ingests asynchronous multi-sensor data streams for fusion and performs streaming forecasting of the future occupancy map at any future timestamps. By integrating neural ordinary differential equations (N-ODE) into recurrent neural networks, StreamingFlow learns derivatives of BEV features over temporal horizons, updates the implicit sensor's BEV features as part of the fusion process, and propagates BEV states to the desired future time point. It shows good zero-shot generalization ability of prediction, reflected in the interpolation of the observed prediction time horizon and the reasonable inference of the unseen farther future period. Extensive experiments on two large-scale datasets, nuScenes and Lyft L5, demonstrate that StreamingFlow significantly outperforms previous vision-based, LiDAR-based methods, and shows superior performance compared to state-of-the-art fusion-based methods.
summary: Predicting the future occupancy states of the surrounding environment is a vital task for autonomous driving. However, current best-performing single-modality methods or multi-modality fusion perception methods are only able to predict uniform snapshots of future occupancy states and require strictly synchronized sensory data for sensor fusion. We propose a novel framework, StreamingFlow, to lift these strong limitations. StreamingFlow is a novel BEV occupancy predictor that ingests asynchronous multi-sensor data streams for fusion and performs streaming forecasting of the future occupancy map at any future timestamps. By integrating neural ordinary differential equations (N-ODE) into recurrent neural networks, StreamingFlow learns derivatives of BEV features over temporal horizons, updates the implicit sensor's BEV features as part of the fusion process, and propagates BEV states to the desired future time point. It shows good zero-shot generalization ability of prediction, reflected in the interpolation of the observed prediction time horizon and the reasonable inference of the unseen farther future period. Extensive experiments on two large-scale datasets, nuScenes and Lyft L5, demonstrate that StreamingFlow significantly outperforms previous vision-based, LiDAR-based methods, and shows superior performance compared to state-of-the-art fusion-based methods.
abstract_zh: 预测周围环境的未来占用状态是自动驾驶的一项重要任务。然而，当前性能最好的单模态方法或多模态融合感知方法只能预测未来占用状态的统一快照，并且需要严格同步的传感数据来进行传感器融合。我们提出了一个新颖的框架 StreamingFlow 来消除这些强大的限制。 StreamingFlow 是一种新颖的 BEV 占用预测器，它摄取异步多传感器数据流进行融合，并在任何未来时间戳对未来占用图进行流式预测。通过将神经常微分方程 (N-ODE) 集成到递归神经网络中，StreamingFlow 学习 BEV 特征在时间范围内的导数，更新隐式传感器的 BEV 特征作为融合过程的一部分，并将 BEV 状态传播到所需的未来时间点。它表现出良好的零样本预测泛化能力，体现在对观测到的预测时间范围的插值以及对未见的更远未来时期的合理推断。对 nuScenes 和 Lyft L5 这两个大型数据集进行的大量实验表明，StreamingFlow 的性能显着优于之前基于视觉、基于 LiDAR 的方法，并且与最先进的基于融合的方法相比，表现出了更优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出StreamingFlow框架，利用异步多模态传感器数据流和神经常微分方程（N-ODE），实现任意未来时间点的鸟瞰图（BEV）占用状态流预测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法受限于同步传感器数据要求，无法处理异步多模态数据流，且只能预测固定时间点的占用状态，缺乏对未来更远时间的泛化能力。
AI.method: 将N-ODE嵌入循环神经网络，通过异步数据流融合更新BEV特征，利用微分方程建模时间连续性，实现从观测时间到未来任意时间点的状态传播。
AI.result: 在nuScenes和Lyft L5数据集上显著优于基于视觉、激光雷达的单模态方法及现有融合方法，且能合理推断未观测的更远未来时段。
AI.conclusion: StreamingFlow通过N-ODE建模时间连续性，有效解决了异步多模态数据融合与未来状态预测问题，展现出优秀的零样本泛化能力。

By integrating neural ordinary differential equations (N-ODE) into recurrent neural networks, StreamingFlow learns derivatives of BEV features over temporal horizons, updates the implicit sensor's BEV features as part of the fusion process, and propagates BEV states to the desired future time point. It shows good zero-shot generalization ability of prediction, reflected in the interpolation of the observed prediction time horizon and the reasonable inference of the unseen farther future period. Extensive experiments on two large-scale datasets, nuScenes and Lyft L5, demonstrate that StreamingFlow significantly outperforms previous vision-based, LiDAR-based methods, and shows superior performance compared to state-of-the-art fusion-based methods. 预测周围环境的未来占用状态是自动驾驶的一项重要任务。然而，当前性能最好的单模态方法或多模态融合感知方法只能预测未来占用状态的统一快照，并且需要严格同步的传感数据来进行传感器融合。我们提出了一个新颖的框架 StreamingFlow 来消除这些强大的限制。 StreamingFlow 是一种新颖的 BEV 占用预测器，它摄取异步多传感器数据流进行融合，并在任何未来时间戳对未来占用图进行流式预测。通过将神经常微分方程 (N-ODE) 集成到递归神经网络中，StreamingFlow 学习 BEV 特征在时间范围内的导数，更新隐式传感器的 BEV 特征作为融合过程的一部分，并将 BEV 状态传播到所需的未来时间点。它表现出良好的零样本预测泛化能力，体现在对观测到的预测时间范围的插值以及对未见的更远未来时期的合理推断。对 nuScenes 和 Lyft L5 这两个大型数据集进行的大量实验表明，StreamingFlow 的性能显着优于之前基于视觉、基于 LiDAR 的方法，并且与最先进的基于融合的方法相比，表现出了更优越的性能。 本文提出StreamingFlow框架，利用异步多模态传感器数据流和神经常微分方程（N-ODE），实现任意未来时间点的鸟瞰图（BEV）占用状态流预测。 Yining Shi,Kun Jiang,Ke Wang,Jiusi Li,Yunlong Wang,Mengmeng Yang,Diange Yang cs.CV

title: DGP-Net: Dense Graph Prototype Network for Few-Shot SAR Target Recognition
title_zh: DGP-Net：用于少镜头 SAR 目标识别的密集图原型网络
abstract: The inevitable feature deviation of synthetic aperture radar (SAR) image due to the special imaging principle (depression angle variation) leads to poor recognition accuracy, especially in few-shot learning (FSL). To deal with this problem, we propose a dense graph prototype network (DGP-Net) to eliminate the feature deviation by learning potential features, and classify by learning feature distribution. The role of the prototype in this model is to solve the problem of large distance between congeneric samples taken due to the contingency of single sampling in FSL, and enhance the robustness of the model. Experimental results on the MSTAR dataset show that the DGP-Net has good classification results for SAR images with different depression angles and the recognition accuracy of it is higher than typical FSL methods.
summary: The inevitable feature deviation of synthetic aperture radar (SAR) image due to the special imaging principle (depression angle variation) leads to poor recognition accuracy, especially in few-shot learning (FSL). To deal with this problem, we propose a dense graph prototype network (DGP-Net) to eliminate the feature deviation by learning potential features, and classify by learning feature distribution. The role of the prototype in this model is to solve the problem of large distance between congeneric samples taken due to the contingency of single sampling in FSL, and enhance the robustness of the model. Experimental results on the MSTAR dataset show that the DGP-Net has good classification results for SAR images with different depression angles and the recognition accuracy of it is higher than typical FSL methods.
abstract_zh: 合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像由于特殊的成像原理（俯角变化）不可避免地会出现特征偏差，导致识别精度较差，尤其是在少样本学习（FSL）中。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种密集图原型网络（DGP-Net），通过学习潜在特征来消除特征偏差，并通过学习特征分布进行分类。该模型中原型的作用是解决FSL中由于单次采样的偶然性而导致的同类样本之间距离过大的问题，增强模型的鲁棒性。在MSTAR数据集上的实验结果表明，DGP-Net对不同俯角的SAR图像具有良好的分类效果，且识别精度高于典型的FSL方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DGP-Net网络，用于解决合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像在少样本学习中的特征偏差问题，提升目标识别准确率。
AI.motivation: SAR图像因成像原理（俯仰角变化）导致特征偏差，传统方法在少样本学习中识别准确率较低，需消除特征偏差并增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计密集图原型网络（DGP-Net），通过学习潜在特征和特征分布进行分类，利用原型机制缓解单次采样导致的同类样本距离过大的问题。
AI.result: 在MSTAR数据集上实验表明，DGP-Net在不同俯仰角的SAR图像分类中准确率优于典型少样本学习方法。
AI.conclusion: DGP-Net通过学习潜在特征和优化原型分布，有效缓解SAR图像特征偏差问题，提升少样本场景下的目标识别性能。
