search_text: A Bibliography of Multiple Sclerosis Lesions Detection Methods using Brain MRIs 使用脑 MRI 检测多发性硬化症病变方法的参考书目 Introduction: Multiple Sclerosis (MS) is a chronic disease that affects millions of people across the globe. MS can critically affect different organs of the central nervous system such as the eyes, the spinal cord, and the brain. Background: To help physicians in diagnosing MS lesions, computer-aided methods are widely used. In this regard, a considerable research has been carried out in the area of automatic detection and segmentation of MS lesions in magnetic resonance images (MRIs). Methodology: In this study, we review the different approaches that have been used in computer-aided detection and segmentation of MS lesions. Our review resulted in categorizing MS lesion segmentation approaches into six broad categories: data-driven, statistical, supervised machine learning, unsupervised machine learning, fuzzy, and deep learning-based techniques. We critically analyze the different techniques under these approaches and highlight their strengths and weaknesses. Results: From the study, we observe that a considerable amount of work, around 25% of related literature, is focused on statistical-based MS lesion segmentation techniques, followed by 21.15% for data-driven based methods, 19.23% for deep learning and 15.38% for supervised methods. Implication: The study points out the challenges/gaps to be addressed in future research. The study shows the work which has been done in last one decade in detection and segmentation of MS lesions. The results show that, in recent years, deep learning methods are outperforming all the others methods. 简介：多发性硬化症 (MS) 是一种影响全球数百万人的慢性疾病。多发性硬化症会严重影响中枢神经系统的不同器官，例如眼睛、脊髓和大脑。背景：为了帮助医生诊断多发性硬化症病变，计算机辅助方法被广泛使用。在这方面，在磁共振图像（MRI）中多发性硬化症病变的自动检测和分割领域已经进行了大量的研究。方法：在本研究中，我们回顾了计算机辅助检测和多发性硬化症病变分割中使用的不同方法。我们的审查结果将多发性硬化症病变分割方法分为六大类：数据驱动、统计、监督机器学习、无监督机器学习、模糊和基于深度学习的技术。我们批判性地分析这些方法下的不同技术，并强调它们的优点和缺点。结果：从研究中，我们观察到相当多的工作（大约 25% 的相关文献）集中在基于统计的 MS 病灶分割技术，其次是基于数据驱动的方法，占 21.15%，深度学习占 19.23%，监督方法占 15.38%。含义：该研究指出了未来研究中需要解决的挑战/差距。该研究展示了过去十年在多发性硬化症病变检测和分割方面所做的工作。结果表明，近年来，深度学习方法的性能优于所有其他方法。 该论文综述了用于脑部磁共振成像（MRI）中多发性硬化症（MS）病灶检测与分割的计算机辅助方法，并将其分类为六种主要技术类别。 Atif Shah,Maged S. Al-Shaibani,Moataz Ahmad,Reem Bunyan eess.IV,cs.CV

title: SAT Requires Exhaustive Search
title_zh: SAT 需要详尽的搜索
comment: 14 pages, added a two-page extended abstract
comments: 14 pages, added a two-page extended abstract
abstract: In this paper, by constructing extremely hard examples of CSP (with large domains) and SAT (with long clauses), we prove that such examples cannot be solved without exhaustive search, which is stronger than P $\neq$ NP. This constructive approach for proving impossibility results is very different (and missing) from those currently used in computational complexity theory, but is similar to that used by Kurt Gödel in proving his famous logical impossibility results. Just as shown by Gödel's results that proving formal unprovability is feasible in mathematics, the results of this paper show that proving computational hardness is not hard in mathematics. Specifically, proving lower bounds for many problems, such as 3-SAT, can be challenging because these problems have various effective strategies available for avoiding exhaustive search. However, in cases of extremely hard examples, exhaustive search may be the only viable option, and proving its necessity becomes more straightforward. Consequently, it makes the separation between SAT (with long clauses) and 3-SAT much easier than that between 3-SAT and 2-SAT. Finally, the main results of this paper demonstrate that the fundamental difference between the syntax and the semantics revealed by Gödel's results also exists in CSP and SAT.
summary: In this paper, by constructing extremely hard examples of CSP (with large domains) and SAT (with long clauses), we prove that such examples cannot be solved without exhaustive search, which is stronger than P $\neq$ NP. This constructive approach for proving impossibility results is very different (and missing) from those currently used in computational complexity theory, but is similar to that used by Kurt Gödel in proving his famous logical impossibility results. Just as shown by Gödel's results that proving formal unprovability is feasible in mathematics, the results of this paper show that proving computational hardness is not hard in mathematics. Specifically, proving lower bounds for many problems, such as 3-SAT, can be challenging because these problems have various effective strategies available for avoiding exhaustive search. However, in cases of extremely hard examples, exhaustive search may be the only viable option, and proving its necessity becomes more straightforward. Consequently, it makes the separation between SAT (with long clauses) and 3-SAT much easier than that between 3-SAT and 2-SAT. Finally, the main results of this paper demonstrate that the fundamental difference between the syntax and the semantics revealed by Gödel's results also exists in CSP and SAT.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，通过构造 CSP（具有大域）和 SAT（具有长子句）的极其困难的示例，我们证明了此类示例无法在没有穷举搜索的情况下解决，这比 P $\neq$ NP 更强。这种证明不可能性结果的建设性方法与当前计算复杂性理论中使用的方法非常不同（并且缺失），但与库尔特·哥德尔在证明其著名的逻辑不可能性结果时使用的方法相似。正如哥德尔的结果表明证明形式不可证明性在数学中是可行的一样，本文的结果表明证明计算难度在数学中并不难。具体来说，证明许多问题（例如 3-SAT）的下界可能具有挑战性，因为这些问题有各种有效的策略可用于避免穷举搜索。然而，在极其困难的例子中，穷举搜索可能是唯一可行的选择，并且证明其必要性变得更加简单。因此，它使得 SAT（带有长子句）和 3-SAT 之间的分离比 3-SAT 和 2-SAT 之间的分离容易得多。最后，本文的主要结果表明，哥德尔结果所揭示的语法和语义之间的根本区别也存在于 CSP 和 SAT 中。

AI.tldr: 本文通过构造极难的CSP和SAT实例，证明解决这些实例必须依赖穷举搜索，且该结论比P≠NP更强。
AI.motivation: 现有计算复杂性理论缺乏构造性方法证明计算难题的不可解性，而哥德尔的逻辑不可能性证明提供了新思路，旨在揭示语法与语义的根本差异。
AI.method: 构建具有大域值的CSP和长子句的SAT实例，采用构造性方法证明穷举搜索的必要性，类比哥德尔的逻辑证明技术。
AI.result: 证明极难实例无法避免穷举搜索，区分SAT（长子句）与3-SAT比3-SAT与2-SAT更容易，并揭示CSP/SAT中存在语法与语义差异。
AI.conclusion: 哥德尔揭示的语法与语义差异同样存在于CSP和SAT中，证明计算硬度并非数学难题，构造性方法可有效突破复杂性理论瓶颈。

authors_text: Jiexing Qi,Shuhao Li,Zhixin Guo,Yusheng Huang,Chenghu Zhou,Weinan Zhang,Xinbing Wang,Zhouhan Lin
title: Text Classification in the Wild: a Large-scale Long-tailed Name Normalization Dataset
title_zh: 野外文本分类：大规模长尾名称标准化数据集
comment: A shorter version is accepted in ICASSP 2023
comments: A shorter version is accepted in ICASSP 2023
abstract: Real-world data usually exhibits a long-tailed distribution,with a few frequent labels and a lot of few-shot labels. The study of institution name normalization is a perfect application case showing this phenomenon. There are many institutions worldwide with enormous variations of their names in the publicly available literature. In this work, we first collect a large-scale institution name normalization dataset LoT-insts1, which contains over 25k classes that exhibit a naturally long-tailed distribution. In order to isolate the few-shot and zero-shot learning scenarios from the massive many-shot classes, we construct our test set from four different subsets: many-, medium-, and few-shot sets, as well as a zero-shot open set. We also replicate several important baseline methods on our data, covering a wide range from search-based methods to neural network methods that use the pretrained BERT model. Further, we propose our specially pretrained, BERT-based model that shows better out-of-distribution generalization on few-shot and zero-shot test sets. Compared to other datasets focusing on the long-tailed phenomenon, our dataset has one order of magnitude more training data than the largest existing long-tailed datasets and is naturally long-tailed rather than manually synthesized. We believe it provides an important and different scenario to study this problem. To our best knowledge, this is the first natural language dataset that focuses on long-tailed and open-set classification problems.

abstract_zh: 现实世界的数据通常呈现长尾分布，具有一些频繁的标签和大量的少样本标签。机构名称规范化研究就是体现这一现象的一个完美应用案例。世界各地有许多机构，在公开文献中其名称存在巨大差异。在这项工作中，我们首先收集了一个大规模的机构名称标准化数据集 LoT-insts1，其中包含超过 25k 个类别，这些类别表现出自然的长尾分布。为了将少样本和零样本学习场景与大量多样本类隔离开来，我们从四个不同的子集构建测试集：多样本集、中样本集和少样本集，以及零样本开放集。我们还在数据上复制了几种重要的基线方法，涵盖从基于搜索的方法到使用预训练 BERT 模型的神经网络方法的广泛范围。此外，我们提出了经过专门预训练、基于 BERT 的模型，该模型在少样本和零样本测试集上显示出更好的分布外泛化能力。与其他关注长尾现象的数据集相比，我们的数据集的训练数据比现有最大的长尾数据集多一个数量级，并且是自然的长尾而不是手动合成。我们相信它为研究这个问题提供了一个重要且不同的场景。据我们所知，这是第一个专注于长尾和开放集分类问题的自然语言数据集。

AI.tldr: 构建一个大规模自然长尾分布的机构名称归一化数据集LoT-insts1，并评估不同方法在长尾和开放集分类中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现实世界数据存在长尾分布问题，现有数据集规模有限或为人工合成，需自然长尾数据集以研究长尾及开放集分类挑战。
AI.method: 收集25k类自然长尾机构名称数据，构建多子集测试集；复现多种基线方法（搜索法、预训练BERT模型），并提出改进的BERT模型。
AI.result: 数据集规模超现有最大长尾数据集10倍，提出的模型在少样本/零样本任务中表现更优，验证了其分布外泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: LoT-insts1是首个聚焦长尾与开放集分类的自然语言数据集，为相关研究提供重要新场景。

Compared to other datasets focusing on the long-tailed phenomenon, our dataset has one order of magnitude more training data than the largest existing long-tailed datasets and is naturally long-tailed rather than manually synthesized. We believe it provides an important and different scenario to study this problem. To our best knowledge, this is the first natural language dataset that focuses on long-tailed and open-set classification problems. 现实世界的数据通常呈现长尾分布，具有一些频繁的标签和大量的少样本标签。机构名称规范化研究就是体现这一现象的一个完美应用案例。世界各地有许多机构，在公开文献中其名称存在巨大差异。在这项工作中，我们首先收集了一个大规模的机构名称标准化数据集 LoT-insts1，其中包含超过 25k 个类别，这些类别表现出自然的长尾分布。为了将少样本和零样本学习场景与大量多样本类隔离开来，我们从四个不同的子集构建测试集：多样本集、中样本集和少样本集，以及零样本开放集。我们还在数据上复制了几种重要的基线方法，涵盖从基于搜索的方法到使用预训练 BERT 模型的神经网络方法的广泛范围。此外，我们提出了经过专门预训练、基于 BERT 的模型，该模型在少样本和零样本测试集上显示出更好的分布外泛化能力。与其他关注长尾现象的数据集相比，我们的数据集的训练数据比现有最大的长尾数据集多一个数量级，并且是自然的长尾而不是手动合成。我们相信它为研究这个问题提供了一个重要且不同的场景。据我们所知，这是第一个专注于长尾和开放集分类问题的自然语言数据集。 构建一个大规模自然长尾分布的机构名称归一化数据集LoT-insts1，并评估不同方法在长尾和开放集分类中的表现。 Jiexing Qi,Shuhao Li,Zhixin Guo,Yusheng Huang,Chenghu Zhou,Weinan Zhang,Xinbing Wang,Zhouhan Lin cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Self-supervised Cloth Reconstruction via Action-conditioned Cloth Tracking
title_zh: 通过动作条件布料跟踪进行自监督布料重建
comment: ef:International Conference on Robotics and Automation 2023
comments: ef:International Conference on Robotics and Automation 2023
abstract: State estimation is one of the greatest challenges for cloth manipulation due to cloth's high dimensionality and self-occlusion. Prior works propose to identify the full state of crumpled clothes by training a mesh reconstruction model in simulation. However, such models are prone to suffer from a sim-to-real gap due to differences between cloth simulation and the real world. In this work, we propose a self-supervised method to finetune a mesh reconstruction model in the real world. Since the full mesh of crumpled cloth is difficult to obtain in the real world, we design a special data collection scheme and an action-conditioned model-based cloth tracking method to generate pseudo-labels for self-supervised learning. By finetuning the pretrained mesh reconstruction model on this pseudo-labeled dataset, we show that we can improve the quality of the reconstructed mesh without requiring human annotations, and improve the performance of downstream manipulation task.
summary: State estimation is one of the greatest challenges for cloth manipulation due to cloth's high dimensionality and self-occlusion. Prior works propose to identify the full state of crumpled clothes by training a mesh reconstruction model in simulation. However, such models are prone to suffer from a sim-to-real gap due to differences between cloth simulation and the real world. In this work, we propose a self-supervised method to finetune a mesh reconstruction model in the real world. Since the full mesh of crumpled cloth is difficult to obtain in the real world, we design a special data collection scheme and an action-conditioned model-based cloth tracking method to generate pseudo-labels for self-supervised learning. By finetuning the pretrained mesh reconstruction model on this pseudo-labeled dataset, we show that we can improve the quality of the reconstructed mesh without requiring human annotations, and improve the performance of downstream manipulation task.
abstract_zh: 由于布料的高维性和自遮挡性，状态估计是布料操纵的最大挑战之一。先前的工作提出通过在模拟中训练网格重建模型来识别皱巴巴衣服的完整状态。然而，由于布料模拟与现实世界之间的差异，此类模型很容易出现模拟与真实之间的差距。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种自监督方法来微调现实世界中的网格重建模型。由于在现实世界中很难获得褶皱布料的完整网格，因此我们设计了一种特殊的数据收集方案和基于动作条件模型的布料跟踪方法来生成用于自监督学习的伪标签。通过在这个伪标记数据集上微调预训练的网格重建模型，我们表明我们可以在不需要人工注释的情况下提高重建网格的质量，并提高下游操作任务的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督方法，通过动作条件化的布料追踪技术，在真实世界中微调网格重建模型以提升布料状态估计的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于模拟的布料网格重建方法存在模拟与现实环境差异导致的性能下降问题，而真实世界中缺乏带标注的皱褶布料数据。
AI.method: 设计特殊数据采集方案与动作条件化模型追踪算法生成伪标签，利用自监督学习微调预训练网格重建模型。
AI.result: 在无人工标注情况下提升网格重建质量，并增强下游布料操作任务的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效弥合了模拟到现实的性能差距，为真实场景下的布料状态估计提供了可行的自监督学习解决方案。

authors_text: Haixu Long,Xiaolin Zhang,Yanbin Liu,Zongtai Luo,Jianbo Liu
title: Mutual Exclusive Modulator for Long-Tailed Recognition
title_zh: 用于长尾识别的互斥调制器
abstract: The long-tailed recognition (LTR) is the task of learning high-performance classifiers given extremely imbalanced training samples between categories. Most of the existing works address the problem by either enhancing the features of tail classes or re-balancing the classifiers to reduce the inductive bias. In this paper, we try to look into the root cause of the LTR task, i.e., training samples for each class are greatly imbalanced, and propose a straightforward solution. We split the categories into three groups, i.e., many, medium and few, according to the number of training images. The three groups of categories are separately predicted to reduce the difficulty for classification. This idea naturally arises a new problem of how to assign a given sample to the right class groups? We introduce a mutual exclusive modulator which can estimate the probability of an image belonging to each group. Particularly, the modulator consists of a light-weight module and learned with a mutual exclusive objective. Hence, the output probabilities of the modulator encode the data volume clues of the training dataset. They are further utilized as prior information to guide the prediction of the classifier. We conduct extensive experiments on multiple datasets, e.g., ImageNet-LT, Place-LT and iNaturalist 2018 to evaluate the proposed approach. Our method achieves competitive performance compared to the state-of-the-art benchmarks.
summary: The long-tailed recognition (LTR) is the task of learning high-performance classifiers given extremely imbalanced training samples between categories. Most of the existing works address the problem by either enhancing the features of tail classes or re-balancing the classifiers to reduce the inductive bias. In this paper, we try to look into the root cause of the LTR task, i.e., training samples for each class are greatly imbalanced, and propose a straightforward solution. We split the categories into three groups, i.e., many, medium and few, according to the number of training images. The three groups of categories are separately predicted to reduce the difficulty for classification. This idea naturally arises a new problem of how to assign a given sample to the right class groups? We introduce a mutual exclusive modulator which can estimate the probability of an image belonging to each group. Particularly, the modulator consists of a light-weight module and learned with a mutual exclusive objective. Hence, the output probabilities of the modulator encode the data volume clues of the training dataset. They are further utilized as prior information to guide the prediction of the classifier. We conduct extensive experiments on multiple datasets, e.g., ImageNet-LT, Place-LT and iNaturalist 2018 to evaluate the proposed approach. Our method achieves competitive performance compared to the state-of-the-art benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 长尾识别（LTR）是在类别之间训练样本极其不平衡的情况下学习高性能分类器的任务。大多数现有的工作通过增强尾类的特征或重新平衡分类器以减少归纳偏差来解决该问题。在本文中，我们试图探究 LTR 任务的根本原因，即每个类别的训练样本严重不平衡，并提出一个简单的解决方案。我们根据训练图像的数量将类别分为三组，即多组、中组和少组。三组类别分别预测，降低分类难度。这个想法自然产生了一个新问题：如何将给定的样本分配到正确的班级组？我们引入了一种互斥调制器，它可以估计图像属于每个组的概率。特别是，调制器由轻量级模块组成，并且以互斥的目标进行学习。因此，调制器的输出概率对训练数据集的数据量线索进行编码。它们进一步用作先验信息来指导分类器的预测。我们对多个数据集（例如 ImageNet-LT、Place-LT 和 iNaturalist 2018）进行了广泛的实验，以评估所提出的方法。与最先进的基准相比，我们的方法实现了具有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对长尾识别任务的解决方案，通过分组预测和相互排斥调制器解决类别样本极度不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要通过增强尾类特征或重新平衡分类器来处理长尾识别，但未从样本不平衡的根本原因入手，导致效果受限。
AI.method: 将类别按训练样本量分为many/medium/few三组，引入轻量级相互排斥调制器估计样本所属组别概率，作为先验信息指导分类器预测。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-LT、Place-LT和iNaturalist 2018等数据集上实验，方法性能达到现有最优水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过分组策略与调制器的结合，有效缓解了长尾识别中的样本不平衡问题，为该领域提供新思路。

Most of the existing works address the problem by either enhancing the features of tail classes or re-balancing the classifiers to reduce the inductive bias. In this paper, we try to look into the root cause of the LTR task, i.e., training samples for each class are greatly imbalanced, and propose a straightforward solution. We split the categories into three groups, i.e., many, medium and few, according to the number of training images. The three groups of categories are separately predicted to reduce the difficulty for classification. This idea naturally arises a new problem of how to assign a given sample to the right class groups? Particularly, the modulator consists of a light-weight module and learned with a mutual exclusive objective. Hence, the output probabilities of the modulator encode the data volume clues of the training dataset. They are further utilized as prior information to guide the prediction of the classifier. We conduct extensive experiments on multiple datasets, e.g., ImageNet-LT, Place-LT and iNaturalist 2018 to evaluate the proposed approach. Our method achieves competitive performance compared to the state-of-the-art benchmarks. 长尾识别（LTR）是在类别之间训练样本极其不平衡的情况下学习高性能分类器的任务。大多数现有的工作通过增强尾类的特征或重新平衡分类器以减少归纳偏差来解决该问题。在本文中，我们试图探究 LTR 任务的根本原因，即每个类别的训练样本严重不平衡，并提出一个简单的解决方案。我们根据训练图像的数量将类别分为三组，即多组、中组和少组。三组类别分别预测，降低分类难度。这个想法自然产生了一个新问题：如何将给定的样本分配到正确的班级组？我们引入了一种互斥调制器，它可以估计图像属于每个组的概率。特别是，调制器由轻量级模块组成，并且以互斥的目标进行学习。因此，调制器的输出概率对训练数据集的数据量线索进行编码。它们进一步用作先验信息来指导分类器的预测。我们对多个数据集（例如 ImageNet-LT、Place-LT 和 iNaturalist 2018）进行了广泛的实验，以评估所提出的方法。与最先进的基准相比，我们的方法实现了具有竞争力的性能。 本文提出一种针对长尾识别任务的解决方案，通过分组预测和相互排斥调制器解决类别样本极度不平衡问题。 Haixu Long,Xiaolin Zhang,Yanbin Liu,Zongtai Luo,Jianbo Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Hui Zhao,Jianga Shang,Kai Liu,Chao Chen,Fuqiang Gu
title: EdgeVO: An Efficient and Accurate Edge-based Visual Odometry
title_zh: EdgeVO：高效、准确的基于边缘的视觉里程计
comment: Accepted by 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: Accepted by 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: Visual odometry is important for plenty of applications such as autonomous vehicles, and robot navigation. It is challenging to conduct visual odometry in textureless scenes or environments with sudden illumination changes where popular feature-based methods or direct methods cannot work well. To address this challenge, some edge-based methods have been proposed, but they usually struggle between the efficiency and accuracy. In this work, we propose a novel visual odometry approach called \textit{EdgeVO}, which is accurate, efficient, and robust. By efficiently selecting a small set of edges with certain strategies, we significantly improve the computational efficiency without sacrificing the accuracy. Compared to existing edge-based method, our method can significantly reduce the computational complexity while maintaining similar accuracy or even achieving better accuracy. This is attributed to that our method removes useless or noisy edges. Experimental results on the TUM datasets indicate that EdgeVO significantly outperforms other methods in terms of efficiency, accuracy and robustness.
summary: Visual odometry is important for plenty of applications such as autonomous vehicles, and robot navigation. It is challenging to conduct visual odometry in textureless scenes or environments with sudden illumination changes where popular feature-based methods or direct methods cannot work well. To address this challenge, some edge-based methods have been proposed, but they usually struggle between the efficiency and accuracy. In this work, we propose a novel visual odometry approach called \textit{EdgeVO}, which is accurate, efficient, and robust. By efficiently selecting a small set of edges with certain strategies, we significantly improve the computational efficiency without sacrificing the accuracy. Compared to existing edge-based method, our method can significantly reduce the computational complexity while maintaining similar accuracy or even achieving better accuracy. This is attributed to that our method removes useless or noisy edges. Experimental results on the TUM datasets indicate that EdgeVO significantly outperforms other methods in terms of efficiency, accuracy and robustness.
abstract_zh: 视觉里程计对于自动驾驶汽车和机器人导航等许多应用非常重要。在无纹理场景或光照突然变化的环境中进行视觉里程测量具有挑战性，而流行的基于特征的方法或直接方法无法很好地工作。为了应对这一挑战，人们提出了一些基于边缘的方法，但它们通常在效率和准确性之间挣扎。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种称为 \textit{EdgeVO} 的新型视觉里程计方法，该方法准确、高效且稳健。通过使用某些策略有效地选择一小组边，我们在不牺牲准确性的情况下显着提高了计算效率。与现有的基于边缘的方法相比，我们的方法可以显着降低计算复杂度，同时保持相似的精度甚至实现更好的精度。这是因为我们的方法去除了无用或嘈杂的边缘。 TUM 数据集上的实验结果表明，EdgeVO 在效率、准确性和鲁棒性方面显着优于其他方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为EdgeVO的高效且精确的基于边缘的视觉里程计方法，用于解决在无纹理场景或光照突变环境下传统方法效率与精度难以兼顾的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统基于特征或直接法的视觉里程计在无纹理场景或光照突变环境下表现不佳，而现有基于边缘的方法难以平衡计算效率与精度，亟需一种更优的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过策略性选择少量关键边缘并去除冗余或噪声边缘，EdgeVO在保持精度的同时显著提升计算效率，降低复杂度。
AI.result: 在TUM数据集上的实验表明，EdgeVO在效率、精度和鲁棒性方面均优于现有方法，同时保持相似或更高的精度。
AI.conclusion: EdgeVO有效解决了边缘视觉里程计中效率与精度的矛盾，为复杂环境下的自动驾驶和机器人导航提供了可靠方案。

search_text: EdgeVO: An Efficient and Accurate Edge-based Visual Odometry EdgeVO：高效、准确的基于边缘的视觉里程计 Visual odometry is important for plenty of applications such as autonomous vehicles, and robot navigation. It is challenging to conduct visual odometry in textureless scenes or environments with sudden illumination changes where popular feature-based methods or direct methods cannot work well. To address this challenge, some edge-based methods have been proposed, but they usually struggle between the efficiency and accuracy. In this work, we propose a novel visual odometry approach called \textit{EdgeVO}, which is accurate, efficient, and robust. By efficiently selecting a small set of edges with certain strategies, we significantly improve the computational efficiency without sacrificing the accuracy. Compared to existing edge-based method, our method can significantly reduce the computational complexity while maintaining similar accuracy or even achieving better accuracy. This is attributed to that our method removes useless or noisy edges. Experimental results on the TUM datasets indicate that EdgeVO significantly outperforms other methods in terms of efficiency, accuracy and robustness. 视觉里程计对于自动驾驶汽车和机器人导航等许多应用非常重要。在无纹理场景或光照突然变化的环境中进行视觉里程测量具有挑战性，而流行的基于特征的方法或直接方法无法很好地工作。为了应对这一挑战，人们提出了一些基于边缘的方法，但它们通常在效率和准确性之间挣扎。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种称为 \textit{EdgeVO} 的新型视觉里程计方法，该方法准确、高效且稳健。通过使用某些策略有效地选择一小组边，我们在不牺牲准确性的情况下显着提高了计算效率。与现有的基于边缘的方法相比，我们的方法可以显着降低计算复杂度，同时保持相似的精度甚至实现更好的精度。这是因为我们的方法去除了无用或嘈杂的边缘。 TUM 数据集上的实验结果表明，EdgeVO 在效率、准确性和鲁棒性方面显着优于其他方法。 本文提出了一种名为EdgeVO的高效且精确的基于边缘的视觉里程计方法，用于解决在无纹理场景或光照突变环境下传统方法效率与精度难以兼顾的问题。 Hui Zhao,Jianga Shang,Kai Liu,Chao Chen,Fuqiang Gu cs.RO

authors_text: Aishan Liu,Jun Guo,Jiakai Wang,Siyuan Liang,Renshuai Tao,Wenbo Zhou,Cong Liu,Xianglong Liu,Dacheng Tao
title: X-Adv: Physical Adversarial Object Attacks against X-ray Prohibited Item Detection
title_zh: X-Adv：针对 X 射线违禁物品检测的物理对抗性物体攻击
abstract: Adversarial attacks are valuable for evaluating the robustness of deep learning models. Existing attacks are primarily conducted on the visible light spectrum (e.g., pixel-wise texture perturbation). However, attacks targeting texture-free X-ray images remain underexplored, despite the widespread application of X-ray imaging in safety-critical scenarios such as the X-ray detection of prohibited items. In this paper, we take the first step toward the study of adversarial attacks targeted at X-ray prohibited item detection, and reveal the serious threats posed by such attacks in this safety-critical scenario. Specifically, we posit that successful physical adversarial attacks in this scenario should be specially designed to circumvent the challenges posed by color/texture fading and complex overlapping. To this end, we propose X-adv to generate physically printable metals that act as an adversarial agent capable of deceiving X-ray detectors when placed in luggage. To resolve the issues associated with color/texture fading, we develop a differentiable converter that facilitates the generation of 3D-printable objects with adversarial shapes, using the gradients of a surrogate model rather than directly generating adversarial textures. To place the printed 3D adversarial objects in luggage with complex overlapped instances, we design a policy-based reinforcement learning strategy to find locations eliciting strong attack performance in worst-case scenarios whereby the prohibited items are heavily occluded by other items. To verify the effectiveness of the proposed X-Adv, we conduct extensive experiments in both the digital and the physical world (employing a commercial X-ray security inspection system for the latter case). Furthermore, we present the physical-world X-ray adversarial attack dataset XAD.
summary: Adversarial attacks are valuable for evaluating the robustness of deep learning models. Existing attacks are primarily conducted on the visible light spectrum (e.g., pixel-wise texture perturbation). However, attacks targeting texture-free X-ray images remain underexplored, despite the widespread application of X-ray imaging in safety-critical scenarios such as the X-ray detection of prohibited items. In this paper, we take the first step toward the study of adversarial attacks targeted at X-ray prohibited item detection, and reveal the serious threats posed by such attacks in this safety-critical scenario. Specifically, we posit that successful physical adversarial attacks in this scenario should be specially designed to circumvent the challenges posed by color/texture fading and complex overlapping. To this end, we propose X-adv to generate physically printable metals that act as an adversarial agent capable of deceiving X-ray detectors when placed in luggage. To resolve the issues associated with color/texture fading, we develop a differentiable converter that facilitates the generation of 3D-printable objects with adversarial shapes, using the gradients of a surrogate model rather than directly generating adversarial textures. To place the printed 3D adversarial objects in luggage with complex overlapped instances, we design a policy-based reinforcement learning strategy to find locations eliciting strong attack performance in worst-case scenarios whereby the prohibited items are heavily occluded by other items. To verify the effectiveness of the proposed X-Adv, we conduct extensive experiments in both the digital and the physical world (employing a commercial X-ray security inspection system for the latter case). Furthermore, we present the physical-world X-ray adversarial attack dataset XAD.
abstract_zh: 对抗性攻击对于评估深度学习模型的稳健性很有价值。现有的攻击主要针对可见光谱进行（例如，像素级纹理扰动）。然而，尽管 X 射线成像广泛应用于安全关键场景（例如违禁物品的 X 射线检测），但针对无纹理 X 射线图像的攻击仍未得到充分研究。在本文中，我们迈出了研究针对 X 射线违禁物品检测的对抗性攻击的第一步，并揭示了此类攻击在这种安全关键场景中所带来的严重威胁。具体来说，我们认为在这种情况下成功的物理对抗攻击应该经过专门设计，以规避颜色/纹理褪色和复杂重叠带来的挑战。为此，我们建议 X-adv 生成可物理打印的金属，这些金属充当对抗剂，当放置在行李中时能够欺骗 X 射线探测器。为了解决与颜色/纹理褪色相关的问题，我们开发了一种可微分转换器，使用替代模型的梯度而不是直接生成对抗性纹理，有助于生成具有对抗性形状的 3D 打印对象。为了将打印的 3D 对抗对象放置在具有复杂重叠实例的行李中，我们设计了一种基于策略的强化学习策略，以找到在最坏情况下引发强烈攻击性能的位置，即违禁物品被其他物品严重遮挡。为了验证所提出的 X-Adv 的有效性，我们在数字世界和物理世界中进行了广泛的实验（针对后一种情况采用了商用 X 射线安全检查系统）。此外，我们还提出了物理世界 X 射线对抗攻击数据集 XAD。

AI.tldr: 本文提出X-Adv方法，通过生成可打印的物理对抗物体，针对X射线禁止物品检测系统发起物理对抗攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击主要针对可见光谱，而X射线在安全关键场景（如禁止物品检测）中应用广泛，但其对抗攻击研究不足，存在潜在威胁。
AI.method: 设计可微分转换器生成3D打印金属对抗物体以解决纹理褪色问题，并采用基于策略的强化学习定位复杂重叠场景下的攻击位置。
AI.result: 在数字和物理世界（使用商用X射线安检系统）均验证了X-Adv的有效性，并构建了物理世界X射线对抗攻击数据集XAD。
AI.conclusion: X-Adv揭示了X射线检测系统的安全风险，为物理对抗攻击研究提供了新框架和数据集，推动安全检测技术的鲁棒性提升。

authors_text: Yael Badian,Yaakov Ophir,Refael Tikochinski,Nitay Calderon,Anat Brunstein Klomek,Roi Reichart
title: A Picture May Be Worth a Thousand Lives: An Interpretable Artificial Intelligence Strategy for Predictions of Suicide Risk from Social Media Images
title_zh: 一张照片可能值一千条生命：一种可解释的人工智能策略，用于根据社交媒体图像预测自杀风险
abstract: The promising research on Artificial Intelligence usages in suicide prevention has principal gaps, including black box methodologies, inadequate outcome measures, and scarce research on non-verbal inputs, such as social media images (despite their popularity today, in our digital era). This study addresses these gaps and combines theory-driven and bottom-up strategies to construct a hybrid and interpretable prediction model of valid suicide risk from images. The lead hypothesis was that images contain valuable information about emotions and interpersonal relationships, two central concepts in suicide-related treatments and theories. The dataset included 177,220 images by 841 Facebook users who completed a gold-standard suicide scale. The images were represented with CLIP, a state-of-the-art algorithm, which was utilized, unconventionally, to extract predefined features that served as inputs to a simple logistic-regression prediction model (in contrast to complex neural networks). The features addressed basic and theory-driven visual elements using everyday language (e.g., bright photo, photo of sad people). The results of the hybrid model (that integrated theory-driven and bottom-up methods) indicated high prediction performance that surpassed common bottom-up algorithms, thus providing a first proof that images (alone) can be leveraged to predict validated suicide risk. Corresponding with the lead hypothesis, at-risk users had images with increased negative emotions and decreased belonginess. The results are discussed in the context of non-verbal warning signs of suicide. Notably, the study illustrates the advantages of hybrid models in such complicated tasks and provides simple and flexible prediction strategies that could be utilized to develop real-life monitoring tools of suicide.

The features addressed basic and theory-driven visual elements using everyday language (e.g., bright photo, photo of sad people). The results of the hybrid model (that integrated theory-driven and bottom-up methods) indicated high prediction performance that surpassed common bottom-up algorithms, thus providing a first proof that images (alone) can be leveraged to predict validated suicide risk. Corresponding with the lead hypothesis, at-risk users had images with increased negative emotions and decreased belonginess. The results are discussed in the context of non-verbal warning signs of suicide. Notably, the study illustrates the advantages of hybrid models in such complicated tasks and provides simple and flexible prediction strategies that could be utilized to develop real-life monitoring tools of suicide.
abstract_zh: 关于人工智能在自杀预防中的应用的前景广阔的研究存在主要差距，包括黑匣子方法、结果测量不足以及对非语言输入（例如社交媒体图像）的研究稀缺（尽管它们在今天很受欢迎，但在我们的数字时代）。这项研究解决了这些差距，并结合理论驱动和自下而上的策略，构建了一个混合且可解释的有效自杀风险预测模型。主要假设是图像包含有关情绪和人际关系的有价值的信息，这是自杀相关治疗和理论的两个核心概念。该数据集包含 841 名 Facebook 用户完成的黄金标准自杀量表的 177,220 张图像。这些图像用 CLIP 表示，这是一种最先进的算法，它非常规地用于提取预定义的特征，作为简单逻辑回归预测模型的输入（与复杂的神经网络相反）。这些功能使用日常语言解决了基本和理论驱动的视觉元素（例如，明亮的照片、悲伤的人的照片）。混合模型（集成了理论驱动和自下而上的方法）的结果表明，预测性能优于常见的自下而上的算法，从而提供了第一个证据，证明可以利用图像（单独）来预测经过验证的自杀风险。与主要假设相对应，高风险用户的图像负面情绪增加，归属感下降。研究结果是在自杀的非语言警告信号的背景下讨论的。值得注意的是，该研究说明了混合模型在此类复杂任务中的优势，并提供了简单灵活的预测策略，可用于开发现实生活中的自杀监测工具。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种结合理论驱动和数据驱动方法的可解释AI模型，利用社交媒体图像预测自杀风险。
AI.motivation: 现有AI在自杀预防中的研究存在黑箱方法、结果指标不足及忽视非语言输入（如社交媒体图像）等问题。
AI.method: 使用CLIP算法提取图像特征，结合理论驱动的视觉元素（如负面情绪、归属感）和数据驱动方法，构建逻辑回归预测模型。
AI.result: 混合模型预测性能优于传统方法，验证了图像可单独预测自杀风险，高风险用户图像呈现更多负面情绪和更低归属感。
AI.conclusion: 混合模型在复杂任务中表现优异，为开发基于非语言线索的自杀风险实时监测工具提供了可行策略。

search_text: A Picture May Be Worth a Thousand Lives: An Interpretable Artificial Intelligence Strategy for Predictions of Suicide Risk from Social Media Images 一张照片可能值一千条生命：一种可解释的人工智能策略，用于根据社交媒体图像预测自杀风险 The promising research on Artificial Intelligence usages in suicide prevention has principal gaps, including black box methodologies, inadequate outcome measures, and scarce research on non-verbal inputs, such as social media images (despite their popularity today, in our digital era). This study addresses these gaps and combines theory-driven and bottom-up strategies to construct a hybrid and interpretable prediction model of valid suicide risk from images. The lead hypothesis was that images contain valuable information about emotions and interpersonal relationships, two central concepts in suicide-related treatments and theories. The dataset included 177,220 images by 841 Facebook users who completed a gold-standard suicide scale. The images were represented with CLIP, a state-of-the-art algorithm, which was utilized, unconventionally, to extract predefined features that served as inputs to a simple logistic-regression prediction model (in contrast to complex neural networks). The features addressed basic and theory-driven visual elements using everyday language (e.g., bright photo, photo of sad people). The results of the hybrid model (that integrated theory-driven and bottom-up methods) indicated high prediction performance that surpassed common bottom-up algorithms, thus providing a first proof that images (alone) can be leveraged to predict validated suicide risk. Corresponding with the lead hypothesis, at-risk users had images with increased negative emotions and decreased belonginess. The results are discussed in the context of non-verbal warning signs of suicide. Notably, the study illustrates the advantages of hybrid models in such complicated tasks and provides simple and flexible prediction strategies that could be utilized to develop real-life monitoring tools of suicide. 关于人工智能在自杀预防中的应用的前景广阔的研究存在主要差距，包括黑匣子方法、结果测量不足以及对非语言输入（例如社交媒体图像）的研究稀缺（尽管它们在今天很受欢迎，但在我们的数字时代）。这项研究解决了这些差距，并结合理论驱动和自下而上的策略，构建了一个混合且可解释的有效自杀风险预测模型。主要假设是图像包含有关情绪和人际关系的有价值的信息，这是自杀相关治疗和理论的两个核心概念。该数据集包含 841 名 Facebook 用户完成的黄金标准自杀量表的 177,220 张图像。这些图像用 CLIP 表示，这是一种最先进的算法，它非常规地用于提取预定义的特征，作为简单逻辑回归预测模型的输入（与复杂的神经网络相反）。这些功能使用日常语言解决了基本和理论驱动的视觉元素（例如，明亮的照片、悲伤的人的照片）。混合模型（集成了理论驱动和自下而上的方法）的结果表明，预测性能优于常见的自下而上的算法，从而提供了第一个证据，证明可以利用图像（单独）来预测经过验证的自杀风险。与主要假设相对应，高风险用户的图像负面情绪增加，归属感下降。研究结果是在自杀的非语言警告信号的背景下讨论的。值得注意的是，该研究说明了混合模型在此类复杂任务中的优势，并提供了简单灵活的预测策略，可用于开发现实生活中的自杀监测工具。 该论文提出了一种结合理论驱动和数据驱动方法的可解释AI模型，利用社交媒体图像预测自杀风险。 Yael Badian,Yaakov Ophir,Refael Tikochinski,Nitay Calderon,Anat Brunstein Klomek,Roi Reichart cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.CY

authors_text: Ally Salim Jr,Megan Allen,Kelvin Mariki,Kevin James Masoy,Jafary Liana
title: Understanding how the use of AI decision support tools affect critical thinking and over-reliance on technology by drug dispensers in Tanzania
title_zh: 了解人工智能决策支持工具的使用如何影响坦桑尼亚配药员的批判性思维和对技术的过度依赖
abstract: The use of AI in healthcare is designed to improve care delivery and augment the decisions of providers to enhance patient outcomes. When deployed in clinical settings, the interaction between providers and AI is a critical component for measuring and understanding the effectiveness of these digital tools on broader health outcomes. Even in cases where AI algorithms have high diagnostic accuracy, healthcare providers often still rely on their experience and sometimes gut feeling to make a final decision. Other times, providers rely unquestioningly on the outputs of the AI models, which leads to a concern about over-reliance on the technology. The purpose of this research was to understand how reliant drug shop dispensers were on AI-powered technologies when determining a differential diagnosis for a presented clinical case vignette. We explored how the drug dispensers responded to technology that is framed as always correct in an attempt to measure whether they begin to rely on it without any critical thought of their own. We found that dispensers relied on the decision made by the AI 25 percent of the time, even when the AI provided no explanation for its decision.
summary: The use of AI in healthcare is designed to improve care delivery and augment the decisions of providers to enhance patient outcomes. When deployed in clinical settings, the interaction between providers and AI is a critical component for measuring and understanding the effectiveness of these digital tools on broader health outcomes. Even in cases where AI algorithms have high diagnostic accuracy, healthcare providers often still rely on their experience and sometimes gut feeling to make a final decision. Other times, providers rely unquestioningly on the outputs of the AI models, which leads to a concern about over-reliance on the technology. The purpose of this research was to understand how reliant drug shop dispensers were on AI-powered technologies when determining a differential diagnosis for a presented clinical case vignette. We explored how the drug dispensers responded to technology that is framed as always correct in an attempt to measure whether they begin to rely on it without any critical thought of their own. We found that dispensers relied on the decision made by the AI 25 percent of the time, even when the AI provided no explanation for its decision.
abstract_zh: 人工智能在医疗保健中的使用旨在改善护理服务并增强医疗服务提供者的决策，以改善患者的治疗效果。当部署在临床环境中时，提供者和人工智能之间的交互是衡量和了解这些数字工具对更广泛的健康结果的有效性的关键组成部分。即使人工智能算法具有很高的诊断准确性，医疗保健提供者通常仍然依靠他们的经验，有时甚至是直觉来做出最终决定。其他时候，提供商毫无疑问地依赖人工智能模型的输出，这导致人们担心过度依赖该技术。这项研究的目的是了解药店配药员在对所呈现的临床病例进行鉴别诊断时对人工智能技术的依赖程度。我们探讨了配药员如何对被认为总是正确的技术做出反应，试图衡量他们是否在没有任何批判性思考的情况下开始依赖它。我们发现分配器在 25% 的时间里依赖人工智能做出的决定，即使人工智能没有为其决定提供任何解释。

AI.tldr: 研究人工智能决策支持工具对坦桑尼亚药房工作人员批判性思维和过度依赖技术的影响。
AI.motivation: 探讨AI在医疗决策中的应用如何影响医护人员的判断，避免因过度依赖技术而忽视自身专业判断。
AI.method: 通过临床案例情景模拟，观察药房工作人员在AI被设定为‘始终正确’时的决策依赖程度。
AI.result: 药房工作人员在25%的情况下直接采纳AI决策，即使AI未提供任何解释。
AI.conclusion: AI辅助工具可能引发过度依赖风险，需加强医疗人员批判性思维训练以平衡技术应用。

ai_content.tldr: 研究人工智能决策支持工具对坦桑尼亚药房工作人员批判性思维和过度依赖技术的影响。

ai_content.conclusion: AI辅助工具可能引发过度依赖风险，需加强医疗人员批判性思维训练以平衡技术应用。

authors_text: Wenyang Zhou,Lu Yuan,Shuyu Chen,Lin Gao,Shimin Hu
title: LC-NeRF: Local Controllable Face Generation in Neural Randiance Field
title_zh: LC-NeRF：神经辐射场中的局部可控人脸生成
abstract: 3D face generation has achieved high visual quality and 3D consistency thanks to the development of neural radiance fields (NeRF). Recently, to generate and edit 3D faces with NeRF representation, some methods are proposed and achieve good results in decoupling geometry and texture. The latent codes of these generative models affect the whole face, and hence modifications to these codes cause the entire face to change. However, users usually edit a local region when editing faces and do not want other regions to be affected. Since changes to the latent code affect global generation results, these methods do not allow for fine-grained control of local facial regions. To improve local controllability in NeRF-based face editing, we propose LC-NeRF, which is composed of a Local Region Generators Module and a Spatial-Aware Fusion Module, allowing for local geometry and texture control of local facial regions. Qualitative and quantitative evaluations show that our method provides better local editing than state-of-the-art face editing methods. Our method also performs well in downstream tasks, such as text-driven facial image editing.
summary: 3D face generation has achieved high visual quality and 3D consistency thanks to the development of neural radiance fields (NeRF). Recently, to generate and edit 3D faces with NeRF representation, some methods are proposed and achieve good results in decoupling geometry and texture. The latent codes of these generative models affect the whole face, and hence modifications to these codes cause the entire face to change. However, users usually edit a local region when editing faces and do not want other regions to be affected. Since changes to the latent code affect global generation results, these methods do not allow for fine-grained control of local facial regions. To improve local controllability in NeRF-based face editing, we propose LC-NeRF, which is composed of a Local Region Generators Module and a Spatial-Aware Fusion Module, allowing for local geometry and texture control of local facial regions. Qualitative and quantitative evaluations show that our method provides better local editing than state-of-the-art face editing methods. Our method also performs well in downstream tasks, such as text-driven facial image editing.
abstract_zh: 得益于神经辐射场 (NeRF) 的发展，3D 脸部生成实现了高视觉质量和 3D 一致性。最近，为了用 NeRF 表示生成和编辑 3D 人脸，提出了一些方法，并在解耦几何和纹理方面取得了良好的效果。这些生成模型的潜在代码会影响整个面部，因此对这些代码的修改会导致整个面部发生变化。然而，用户在编辑人脸时通常会编辑局部区域，不希望影响其他区域。由于潜在代码的更改会影响全局生成结果，因此这些方法不允许对局部面部区域进行细粒度控制。为了提高基于 NeRF 的面部编辑的局部可控性，我们提出了 LC-NeRF，它由局部区域生成器模块和空间感知融合模块组成，允许对局部面部区域进行局部几何和纹理控制。定性和定量评估表明，我们的方法提供了比最先进的面部编辑方法更好的本地编辑。我们的方法在下游任务中也表现良好，例如文本驱动的面部图像编辑。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LC-NeRF方法，通过局部可控的几何和纹理生成模块，实现基于神经辐射场的面部局部精细编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有NeRF人脸生成方法修改全局潜在码时会影响整张人脸，无法满足用户对局部区域编辑的需求，需实现细粒度的局部控制。
AI.method: 设计局部区域生成模块和空间感知融合模块，分别控制局部几何与纹理，并通过空间感知机制实现编辑区域与全局表征的融合。
AI.result: 在定性和定量评估中优于现有方法，且在文本驱动的人脸编辑等下游任务中表现良好。
AI.conclusion: LC-NeRF通过模块化设计有效解决了NeRF人脸编辑中的局部可控性问题，实现了更精准的面部区域编辑效果。

search_text: LC-NeRF: Local Controllable Face Generation in Neural Randiance Field LC-NeRF：神经辐射场中的局部可控人脸生成 3D face generation has achieved high visual quality and 3D consistency thanks to the development of neural radiance fields (NeRF). Recently, to generate and edit 3D faces with NeRF representation, some methods are proposed and achieve good results in decoupling geometry and texture. The latent codes of these generative models affect the whole face, and hence modifications to these codes cause the entire face to change. However, users usually edit a local region when editing faces and do not want other regions to be affected. Since changes to the latent code affect global generation results, these methods do not allow for fine-grained control of local facial regions. To improve local controllability in NeRF-based face editing, we propose LC-NeRF, which is composed of a Local Region Generators Module and a Spatial-Aware Fusion Module, allowing for local geometry and texture control of local facial regions. Qualitative and quantitative evaluations show that our method provides better local editing than state-of-the-art face editing methods. Our method also performs well in downstream tasks, such as text-driven facial image editing. 得益于神经辐射场 (NeRF) 的发展，3D 脸部生成实现了高视觉质量和 3D 一致性。最近，为了用 NeRF 表示生成和编辑 3D 人脸，提出了一些方法，并在解耦几何和纹理方面取得了良好的效果。这些生成模型的潜在代码会影响整个面部，因此对这些代码的修改会导致整个面部发生变化。然而，用户在编辑人脸时通常会编辑局部区域，不希望影响其他区域。由于潜在代码的更改会影响全局生成结果，因此这些方法不允许对局部面部区域进行细粒度控制。为了提高基于 NeRF 的面部编辑的局部可控性，我们提出了 LC-NeRF，它由局部区域生成器模块和空间感知融合模块组成，允许对局部面部区域进行局部几何和纹理控制。定性和定量评估表明，我们的方法提供了比最先进的面部编辑方法更好的本地编辑。我们的方法在下游任务中也表现良好，例如文本驱动的面部图像编辑。 本文提出LC-NeRF方法，通过局部可控的几何和纹理生成模块，实现基于神经辐射场的面部局部精细编辑。 Wenyang Zhou,Lu Yuan,Shuyu Chen,Lin Gao,Shimin Hu cs.CV

title: Gradient-based Wang-Landau Algorithm: A Novel Sampler for Output Distribution of Neural Networks over the Input Space
title_zh: 基于梯度的 Wang-Landau 算法：一种用于输入空间上神经网络输出分布的新型采样器
abstract: The output distribution of a neural network (NN) over the entire input space captures the complete input-output mapping relationship, offering insights toward a more comprehensive NN understanding. Exhaustive enumeration or traditional Monte Carlo methods for the entire input space can exhibit impractical sampling time, especially for high-dimensional inputs. To make such difficult sampling computationally feasible, in this paper, we propose a novel Gradient-based Wang-Landau (GWL) sampler. We first draw the connection between the output distribution of a NN and the density of states (DOS) of a physical system. Then, we renovate the classic sampler for the DOS problem, the Wang-Landau algorithm, by replacing its random proposals with gradient-based Monte Carlo proposals. This way, our GWL sampler investigates the under-explored subsets of the input space much more efficiently. Extensive experiments have verified the accuracy of the output distribution generated by GWL and also showcased several interesting findings - for example, in a binary image classification task, both CNN and ResNet mapped the majority of human unrecognizable images to very negative logit values.
summary: The output distribution of a neural network (NN) over the entire input space captures the complete input-output mapping relationship, offering insights toward a more comprehensive NN understanding. Exhaustive enumeration or traditional Monte Carlo methods for the entire input space can exhibit impractical sampling time, especially for high-dimensional inputs. To make such difficult sampling computationally feasible, in this paper, we propose a novel Gradient-based Wang-Landau (GWL) sampler. We first draw the connection between the output distribution of a NN and the density of states (DOS) of a physical system. Then, we renovate the classic sampler for the DOS problem, the Wang-Landau algorithm, by replacing its random proposals with gradient-based Monte Carlo proposals. This way, our GWL sampler investigates the under-explored subsets of the input space much more efficiently. Extensive experiments have verified the accuracy of the output distribution generated by GWL and also showcased several interesting findings - for example, in a binary image classification task, both CNN and ResNet mapped the majority of human unrecognizable images to very negative logit values.
abstract_zh: 神经网络 (NN) 在整个输入空间上的输出分布捕获了完整的输入-输出映射关系，为更全面的 NN 理解提供了见解。对整个输入空间进行详尽的枚举或传统的蒙特卡罗方法可能会出现不切实际的采样时间，特别是对于高维输入。为了使这种困难的采样在计算上变得可行，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于梯度的 Wang-Landau（GWL）采样器。我们首先绘制神经网络的输出分布与物理系统的状态密度（DOS）之间的联系。然后，我们更新了 DOS 问题的经典采样器 Wang-Landau 算法，用基于梯度的蒙特卡罗提案替换了随机提案。通过这种方式，我们的 GWL 采样器可以更有效地研究输入空间中未充分探索的子集。大量的实验验证了 GWL 生成的输出分布的准确性，并展示了一些有趣的发现 - 例如，在二值图像分类任务中，CNN 和 ResNet 将大多数人类无法识别的图像映射到非常负的 logit 值。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于梯度的Wang-Landau采样器，用于高效获取神经网络在输入空间上的输出分布。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在高维输入空间采样时计算效率低下，难以全面分析神经网络的输入输出映射关系。
AI.method: 将神经网络输出分布与物理系统状态密度关联，改进Wang-Landau算法，采用梯度基蒙特卡洛提案以高效探索输入空间。
AI.result: 实验验证了GWL生成输出分布的准确性，并发现CNN和ResNet将多数人类不可识别图像映射至极低logit值。
AI.conclusion: GWL算法有效提升了高维输入空间采样效率，为深入理解神经网络输入输出特性提供了新工具。

authors_text: Jie Zhang,Bo Li,Chen Chen,Lingjuan Lyu,Shuang Wu,Shouhong Ding,Chao Wu
title: Delving into the Adversarial Robustness of Federated Learning
title_zh: 深入研究联邦学习的对抗鲁棒性
abstract: In Federated Learning (FL), models are as fragile as centrally trained models against adversarial examples. However, the adversarial robustness of federated learning remains largely unexplored. This paper casts light on the challenge of adversarial robustness of federated learning. To facilitate a better understanding of the adversarial vulnerability of the existing FL methods, we conduct comprehensive robustness evaluations on various attacks and adversarial training methods. Moreover, we reveal the negative impacts induced by directly adopting adversarial training in FL, which seriously hurts the test accuracy, especially in non-IID settings. In this work, we propose a novel algorithm called Decision Boundary based Federated Adversarial Training (DBFAT), which consists of two components (local re-weighting and global regularization) to improve both accuracy and robustness of FL systems. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets demonstrate that DBFAT consistently outperforms other baselines under both IID and non-IID settings.
summary: In Federated Learning (FL), models are as fragile as centrally trained models against adversarial examples. However, the adversarial robustness of federated learning remains largely unexplored. This paper casts light on the challenge of adversarial robustness of federated learning. To facilitate a better understanding of the adversarial vulnerability of the existing FL methods, we conduct comprehensive robustness evaluations on various attacks and adversarial training methods. Moreover, we reveal the negative impacts induced by directly adopting adversarial training in FL, which seriously hurts the test accuracy, especially in non-IID settings. In this work, we propose a novel algorithm called Decision Boundary based Federated Adversarial Training (DBFAT), which consists of two components (local re-weighting and global regularization) to improve both accuracy and robustness of FL systems. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets demonstrate that DBFAT consistently outperforms other baselines under both IID and non-IID settings.
abstract_zh: 在联邦学习（FL）中，模型与针对对抗性示例的集中训练模型一样脆弱。然而，联邦学习的对抗鲁棒性在很大程度上仍未得到探索。本文揭示了联邦学习的对抗鲁棒性挑战。为了更好地理解现有 FL 方法的对抗漏洞，我们对各种攻击和对抗训练方法进行了全面的鲁棒性评估。此外，我们还揭示了在 FL 中直接采用对抗性训练所带来的负面影响，这严重损害了测试准确性，尤其是在非独立同分布环境中。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种称为基于决策边界的联合对抗训练（DBFAT）的新颖算法，它由两个部分组成（局部重新加权和全局正则化），以提高 FL 系统的准确性和鲁棒性。对多个数据集的大量实验表明，在 IID 和非 IID 设置下，DBFAT 始终优于其他基线。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究联邦学习（FL）的对抗鲁棒性问题，并提出一种新的算法DBFAT以提高FL系统的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习方法在对抗样本面前表现脆弱，且直接应用对抗训练会显著降低测试准确率，尤其在非独立同分布（non-IID）场景下效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出Decision Boundary based Federated Adversarial Training（DBFAT）算法，包含本地数据重加权和全局正则化两个组件，以协调模型鲁棒性与准确率。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，DBFAT在IID和non-IID设置下均优于现有基线方法，显著提升模型鲁棒性且保持较高准确率。
AI.conclusion: DBFAT通过局部与全局策略的协同优化，有效解决了联邦学习中的对抗鲁棒性问题，为FL安全训练提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本论文研究联邦学习（FL）的对抗鲁棒性问题，并提出一种新的算法DBFAT以提高FL系统的准确性和鲁棒性。

Moreover, we reveal the negative impacts induced by directly adopting adversarial training in FL, which seriously hurts the test accuracy, especially in non-IID settings. In this work, we propose a novel algorithm called Decision Boundary based Federated Adversarial Training (DBFAT), which consists of two components (local re-weighting and global regularization) to improve both accuracy and robustness of FL systems. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets demonstrate that DBFAT consistently outperforms other baselines under both IID and non-IID settings. 在联邦学习（FL）中，模型与针对对抗性示例的集中训练模型一样脆弱。然而，联邦学习的对抗鲁棒性在很大程度上仍未得到探索。本文揭示了联邦学习的对抗鲁棒性挑战。为了更好地理解现有 FL 方法的对抗漏洞，我们对各种攻击和对抗训练方法进行了全面的鲁棒性评估。此外，我们还揭示了在 FL 中直接采用对抗性训练所带来的负面影响，这严重损害了测试准确性，尤其是在非独立同分布环境中。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种称为基于决策边界的联合对抗训练（DBFAT）的新颖算法，它由两个部分组成（局部重新加权和全局正则化），以提高 FL 系统的准确性和鲁棒性。对多个数据集的大量实验表明，在 IID 和非 IID 设置下，DBFAT 始终优于其他基线。 本论文研究联邦学习（FL）的对抗鲁棒性问题，并提出一种新的算法DBFAT以提高FL系统的准确性和鲁棒性。 Jie Zhang,Bo Li,Chen Chen,Lingjuan Lyu,Shuang Wu,Shouhong Ding,Chao Wu cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR

title: Video-Text Retrieval by Supervised Sparse Multi-Grained Learning
title_zh: 通过监督稀疏多粒度学习进行视频文本检索
abstract: While recent progress in video-text retrieval has been advanced by the exploration of better representation learning, in this paper, we present a novel multi-grained sparse learning framework, S3MA, to learn an aligned sparse space shared between the video and the text for video-text retrieval. The shared sparse space is initialized with a finite number of sparse concepts, each of which refers to a number of words. With the text data at hand, we learn and update the shared sparse space in a supervised manner using the proposed similarity and alignment losses. Moreover, to enable multi-grained alignment, we incorporate frame representations for better modeling the video modality and calculating fine-grained and coarse-grained similarities. Benefiting from the learned shared sparse space and multi-grained similarities, extensive experiments on several video-text retrieval benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of S3MA over existing methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/yimuwangcs/Better_Cross_Modal_Retrieval.
summary: While recent progress in video-text retrieval has been advanced by the exploration of better representation learning, in this paper, we present a novel multi-grained sparse learning framework, S3MA, to learn an aligned sparse space shared between the video and the text for video-text retrieval. The shared sparse space is initialized with a finite number of sparse concepts, each of which refers to a number of words. With the text data at hand, we learn and update the shared sparse space in a supervised manner using the proposed similarity and alignment losses. Moreover, to enable multi-grained alignment, we incorporate frame representations for better modeling the video modality and calculating fine-grained and coarse-grained similarities. Benefiting from the learned shared sparse space and multi-grained similarities, extensive experiments on several video-text retrieval benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of S3MA over existing methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/yimuwangcs/Better_Cross_Modal_Retrieval.
abstract_zh: 虽然视频文本检索的最新进展是通过探索更好的表示学习而取得的进展，但在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的多粒度稀疏学习框架 S3MA，以学习视频和文本之间共享的对齐稀疏空间以进行视频文本检索。共享稀疏空间用有限数量的稀疏概念初始化，每个稀疏概念引用多个单词。有了手头的文本数据，我们使用所提出的相似性和对齐损失以监督方式学习和更新共享稀疏空间。此外，为了实现多粒度对齐，我们结合了帧表示，以便更好地对视频模态进行建模并计算细粒度和粗粒度的相似性。受益于学习到的共享稀疏空间和多粒度相似性，在多个视频文本检索基准上的大量实验证明了 S3MA 相对于现有方法的优越性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/yimuwangcs/Better_Cross_Modal_Retrieval 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为S3MA的监督稀疏多粒度学习框架，用于视频-文本检索任务，通过构建共享的稀疏空间实现跨模态对齐。
AI.motivation: 现有视频-文本检索方法在表示学习上存在局限，难以有效捕捉跨模态的细粒度和粗粒度语义关联，需设计更高效的对齐机制。
AI.method: 基于有限稀疏概念初始化共享稀疏空间，结合文本数据通过相似性损失和对齐损失监督学习；引入帧级表示建模视频模态，实现多粒度相似度计算。
AI.result: 在多个视频-文本检索基准数据集上实验表明，S3MA方法优于现有主流方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: S3MA通过稀疏空间学习与多粒度对齐机制，有效提升了视频-文本检索性能，验证了跨模态稀疏表示的有效性。

title: Designing a 3D-Aware StyleNeRF Encoder for Face Editing
title_zh: 设计用于面部编辑的 3D 感知 StyleNeRF 编码器
comment: Accepted by 2023 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP 2023)
comments: Accepted by 2023 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP 2023)
abstract: GAN inversion has been exploited in many face manipulation tasks, but 2D GANs often fail to generate multi-view 3D consistent images. The encoders designed for 2D GANs are not able to provide sufficient 3D information for the inversion and editing. Therefore, 3D-aware GAN inversion is proposed to increase the 3D editing capability of GANs. However, the 3D-aware GAN inversion remains under-explored. To tackle this problem, we propose a 3D-aware (3Da) encoder for GAN inversion and face editing based on the powerful StyleNeRF model. Our proposed 3Da encoder combines a parametric 3D face model with a learnable detail representation model to generate geometry, texture and view direction codes. For more flexible face manipulation, we then design a dual-branch StyleFlow module to transfer the StyleNeRF codes with disentangled geometry and texture flows. Extensive experiments demonstrate that we realize 3D consistent face manipulation in both facial attribute editing and texture transfer. Furthermore, for video editing, we make the sequence of frame codes share a common canonical manifold, which improves the temporal consistency of the edited attributes.
summary: GAN inversion has been exploited in many face manipulation tasks, but 2D GANs often fail to generate multi-view 3D consistent images. The encoders designed for 2D GANs are not able to provide sufficient 3D information for the inversion and editing. Therefore, 3D-aware GAN inversion is proposed to increase the 3D editing capability of GANs. However, the 3D-aware GAN inversion remains under-explored. To tackle this problem, we propose a 3D-aware (3Da) encoder for GAN inversion and face editing based on the powerful StyleNeRF model. Our proposed 3Da encoder combines a parametric 3D face model with a learnable detail representation model to generate geometry, texture and view direction codes. For more flexible face manipulation, we then design a dual-branch StyleFlow module to transfer the StyleNeRF codes with disentangled geometry and texture flows. Extensive experiments demonstrate that we realize 3D consistent face manipulation in both facial attribute editing and texture transfer. Furthermore, for video editing, we make the sequence of frame codes share a common canonical manifold, which improves the temporal consistency of the edited attributes.
abstract_zh: GAN 反转已在许多人脸处理任务中得到利用，但 2D GAN 通常无法生成多视图 3D 一致图像。为 2D GAN 设计的编码器无法为反演和编辑提供足够的 3D 信息。因此，提出了 3D 感知 GAN 反转来提高 GAN 的 3D 编辑能力。然而，3D 感知的 GAN 反转仍未得到充分探索。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于强大的 StyleNeRF 模型的 3D 感知 (3Da) 编码器，用于 GAN 反转和面部编辑。我们提出的 3Da 编码器将参数化 3D 人脸模型与可学习的细节表示模型相结合，以生成几何、纹理和视图方向代码。为了更灵活的面部操作，我们设计了一个双分支 StyleFlow 模块来传输具有解缠结的几何和纹理流的 StyleNeRF 代码。大量实验表明，我们在面部属性编辑和纹理传输方面实现了 3D 一致的面部操作。此外，对于视频编辑，我们使帧代码序列共享一个共同的规范流形，这提高了编辑属性的时间一致性。

AI.tldr: 设计一种3D感知的StyleNeRF编码器，用于实现面部编辑中的多视角3D一致性生成。
AI.motivation: 传统2D GAN在生成多视角3D一致图像时存在局限，现有编码器无法提供足够的3D信息，导致编辑结果缺乏立体一致性。
AI.method: 提出3D-aware编码器，结合参数化3D人脸模型与可学习细节表示模型生成几何/纹理/视角代码，并设计双分支StyleFlow模块实现几何与纹理流的解耦传输。
AI.result: 在面部属性编辑和纹理迁移任务中实现3D一致性，视频编辑中通过共享规范流形提升时序一致性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效增强了GAN的3D编辑能力，为视频编辑提供了更自然的时空一致性保障。

title: RePrompt: Automatic Prompt Editing to Refine AI-Generative Art Towards Precise Expressions
title_zh: RePrompt：自动提示编辑，完善人工智能生成艺术，实现精确表达
comment: To appear in Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '23)
comments: To appear in Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '23)
abstract: Generative AI models have shown impressive ability to produce images with text prompts, which could benefit creativity in visual art creation and self-expression. However, it is unclear how precisely the generated images express contexts and emotions from the input texts. We explored the emotional expressiveness of AI-generated images and developed RePrompt, an automatic method to refine text prompts toward precise expression of the generated images. Inspired by crowdsourced editing strategies, we curated intuitive text features, such as the number and concreteness of nouns, and trained a proxy model to analyze the feature effects on the AI-generated image. With model explanations of the proxy model, we curated a rubric to adjust text prompts to optimize image generation for precise emotion expression. We conducted simulation and user studies, which showed that RePrompt significantly improves the emotional expressiveness of AI-generated images, especially for negative emotions.
summary: Generative AI models have shown impressive ability to produce images with text prompts, which could benefit creativity in visual art creation and self-expression. However, it is unclear how precisely the generated images express contexts and emotions from the input texts. We explored the emotional expressiveness of AI-generated images and developed RePrompt, an automatic method to refine text prompts toward precise expression of the generated images. Inspired by crowdsourced editing strategies, we curated intuitive text features, such as the number and concreteness of nouns, and trained a proxy model to analyze the feature effects on the AI-generated image. With model explanations of the proxy model, we curated a rubric to adjust text prompts to optimize image generation for precise emotion expression. We conducted simulation and user studies, which showed that RePrompt significantly improves the emotional expressiveness of AI-generated images, especially for negative emotions.
abstract_zh: 生成式人工智能模型已经显示出令人印象深刻的生成带有文本提示的图像的能力，这可能有利于视觉艺术创作和自我表达的创造力。然而，尚不清楚生成的图像如何准确地表达输入文本的上下文和情感。我们探索了人工智能生成图像的情感表达能力，并开发了 RePrompt，这是一种自动方法，可以细化文本提示，以精确表达生成的图像。受众包编辑策略的启发，我们策划了直观的文本特征，例如名词的数量和具体性，并训练了一个代理模型来分析特征对人工智能生成图像的影响。通过代理模型的模型解释，我们策划了一个标题来调整文本提示，以优化图像生成以实现精确的情感表达。我们进行了模拟和用户研究，结果表明 RePrompt 显着提高了 AI 生成图像的情感表达力，尤其是负面情绪。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RePrompt方法，通过自动编辑文本提示词来优化AI生成图像的情感表达精确性。
AI.motivation: 尽管生成式AI模型能根据文本生成图像，但其对输入文本中情感和语境的表达精度尚不明确，限制了艺术创作和自我表达的效果。
AI.method: 基于众包编辑策略，提取文本特征（如名词数量和具体性），训练代理模型分析特征对生成图像的影响，并制定调整规则优化提示词以增强情感表达。
AI.result: 模拟和用户研究表明，RePrompt显著提升了AI生成图像的情感表达能力，尤其在负面情绪表现上效果突出。
AI.conclusion: RePrompt通过自动提示词优化有效提高了AI生成图像的情感精确性，为精准艺术创作提供了可行方案。

search_text: RePrompt: Automatic Prompt Editing to Refine AI-Generative Art Towards Precise Expressions RePrompt：自动提示编辑，完善人工智能生成艺术，实现精确表达 Generative AI models have shown impressive ability to produce images with text prompts, which could benefit creativity in visual art creation and self-expression. However, it is unclear how precisely the generated images express contexts and emotions from the input texts. We explored the emotional expressiveness of AI-generated images and developed RePrompt, an automatic method to refine text prompts toward precise expression of the generated images. Inspired by crowdsourced editing strategies, we curated intuitive text features, such as the number and concreteness of nouns, and trained a proxy model to analyze the feature effects on the AI-generated image. With model explanations of the proxy model, we curated a rubric to adjust text prompts to optimize image generation for precise emotion expression. We conducted simulation and user studies, which showed that RePrompt significantly improves the emotional expressiveness of AI-generated images, especially for negative emotions. 生成式人工智能模型已经显示出令人印象深刻的生成带有文本提示的图像的能力，这可能有利于视觉艺术创作和自我表达的创造力。然而，尚不清楚生成的图像如何准确地表达输入文本的上下文和情感。我们探索了人工智能生成图像的情感表达能力，并开发了 RePrompt，这是一种自动方法，可以细化文本提示，以精确表达生成的图像。受众包编辑策略的启发，我们策划了直观的文本特征，例如名词的数量和具体性，并训练了一个代理模型来分析特征对人工智能生成图像的影响。通过代理模型的模型解释，我们策划了一个标题来调整文本提示，以优化图像生成以实现精确的情感表达。我们进行了模拟和用户研究，结果表明 RePrompt 显着提高了 AI 生成图像的情感表达力，尤其是负面情绪。 本文提出RePrompt方法，通过自动编辑文本提示词来优化AI生成图像的情感表达精确性。 Yunlong Wang,Shuyuan Shen,Brian Y. Lim cs.HC,cs.AI

title: The Emerging Artificial Intelligence Protocol for Hierarchical Information Network
title_zh: 分层信息网络的新兴人工智能协议
abstract: The recent development of artificial intelligence enables a machine to achieve a human level of intelligence. Problem-solving and decision-making are two mental abilities to measure human intelligence. Many scholars have proposed different models. However, there is a gap in establishing an AI-oriented hierarchical model with a multilevel abstraction. This study proposes a novel model known as the emerged AI protocol that consists of seven distinct layers capable of providing an optimal and explainable solution for a given problem.
summary: The recent development of artificial intelligence enables a machine to achieve a human level of intelligence. Problem-solving and decision-making are two mental abilities to measure human intelligence. Many scholars have proposed different models. However, there is a gap in establishing an AI-oriented hierarchical model with a multilevel abstraction. This study proposes a novel model known as the emerged AI protocol that consists of seven distinct layers capable of providing an optimal and explainable solution for a given problem.
abstract_zh: 人工智能的最新发展使机器能够达到人类的智能水平。解决问题和决策是衡量人类智力的两种心理能力。许多学者提出了不同的模型。然而，建立面向人工智能的多层次抽象层次模型还存在差距。这项研究提出了一种被称为新兴人工智能协议的新模型，它由七个不同的层组成，能够为给定问题提供最佳且可解释的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为'新兴AI协议'的七层分层模型，旨在解决现有AI模型在多级抽象层次上的不足，提供更优且可解释的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 现有AI模型缺乏针对多级抽象层次的分层结构，难以有效模拟人类问题解决和决策能力，需建立更符合AI特性的分层框架。
AI.method: 设计包含七层结构的'新兴AI协议'模型，通过分层抽象实现信息处理与决策的优化。
AI.result: 该模型能够为特定问题提供更优且具有可解释性的解决方案，弥补了传统模型的不足。
AI.conclusion: 新兴AI协议通过多级分层结构有效提升了AI的决策与问题解决能力，为未来AI研究提供了新的方向。

authors_text: Omid Nejati Manzari,Hamid Ahmadabadi,Hossein Kashiani,Shahriar B. Shokouhi,Ahmad Ayatollahi
title: MedViT: A Robust Vision Transformer for Generalized Medical Image Classification
title_zh: MedViT：用于广义医学图像分类的鲁棒视觉转换器
abstract: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have advanced existing medical systems for automatic disease diagnosis. However, there are still concerns about the reliability of deep medical diagnosis systems against the potential threats of adversarial attacks since inaccurate diagnosis could lead to disastrous consequences in the safety realm. In this study, we propose a highly robust yet efficient CNN-Transformer hybrid model which is equipped with the locality of CNNs as well as the global connectivity of vision Transformers. To mitigate the high quadratic complexity of the self-attention mechanism while jointly attending to information in various representation subspaces, we construct our attention mechanism by means of an efficient convolution operation. Moreover, to alleviate the fragility of our Transformer model against adversarial attacks, we attempt to learn smoother decision boundaries. To this end, we augment the shape information of an image in the high-level feature space by permuting the feature mean and variance within mini-batches. With less computational complexity, our proposed hybrid model demonstrates its high robustness and generalization ability compared to the state-of-the-art studies on a large-scale collection of standardized MedMNIST-2D datasets.
summary: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have advanced existing medical systems for automatic disease diagnosis. However, there are still concerns about the reliability of deep medical diagnosis systems against the potential threats of adversarial attacks since inaccurate diagnosis could lead to disastrous consequences in the safety realm. In this study, we propose a highly robust yet efficient CNN-Transformer hybrid model which is equipped with the locality of CNNs as well as the global connectivity of vision Transformers. To mitigate the high quadratic complexity of the self-attention mechanism while jointly attending to information in various representation subspaces, we construct our attention mechanism by means of an efficient convolution operation. Moreover, to alleviate the fragility of our Transformer model against adversarial attacks, we attempt to learn smoother decision boundaries. To this end, we augment the shape information of an image in the high-level feature space by permuting the feature mean and variance within mini-batches. With less computational complexity, our proposed hybrid model demonstrates its high robustness and generalization ability compared to the state-of-the-art studies on a large-scale collection of standardized MedMNIST-2D datasets.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 先进了现有的自动疾病诊断医疗系统。然而，人们仍然担心深度医学诊断系统针对对抗性攻击的潜在威胁的可靠性，因为不准确的诊断可能会导致安全领域的灾难性后果。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种高度稳健且高效的 CNN-Transformer 混合模型，该模型配备了 CNN 的局部性以及视觉 Transformer 的全局连接性。为了减轻自注意力机制的高二次复杂度，同时共同关注各种表示子空间中的信息，我们通过有效的卷积运算构建了我们的注意力机制。此外，为了减轻 Transformer 模型对抗对抗性攻击的脆弱性，我们尝试学习更平滑的决策边界。为此，我们通过排列小批量内的特征均值和方差来增强高级特征空间中图像的形状信息。与大规模标准化 MedMNIST-2D 数据集的最新研究相比，我们提出的混合模型具有较低的计算复杂性，展示了其高鲁棒性和泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MedViT的高效且鲁棒的CNN-Transformer混合模型，用于解决医疗图像分类中的对抗攻击问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管卷积神经网络（CNN）在医疗诊断中广泛应用，但其对对抗攻击的脆弱性可能导致严重误诊，因此需要更可靠且鲁棒的模型。
AI.method: 设计CNN-Transformer混合架构，结合CNN的局部感知能力与Transformer的全局连接性；通过高效卷积操作降低自注意力机制的复杂度，并在高层特征空间中通过批量内特征均值和方差置换增强形状信息以提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在MedMNIST-2D数据集上，该模型在保持较低计算复杂度的同时，相比现有方法展现出更高的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: MedViT通过混合架构与特征增强策略有效平衡了效率与鲁棒性，为医疗图像分类提供了更安全可靠的解决方案。

With less computational complexity, our proposed hybrid model demonstrates its high robustness and generalization ability compared to the state-of-the-art studies on a large-scale collection of standardized MedMNIST-2D datasets. 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 先进了现有的自动疾病诊断医疗系统。然而，人们仍然担心深度医学诊断系统针对对抗性攻击的潜在威胁的可靠性，因为不准确的诊断可能会导致安全领域的灾难性后果。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种高度稳健且高效的 CNN-Transformer 混合模型，该模型配备了 CNN 的局部性以及视觉 Transformer 的全局连接性。为了减轻自注意力机制的高二次复杂度，同时共同关注各种表示子空间中的信息，我们通过有效的卷积运算构建了我们的注意力机制。此外，为了减轻 Transformer 模型对抗对抗性攻击的脆弱性，我们尝试学习更平滑的决策边界。为此，我们通过排列小批量内的特征均值和方差来增强高级特征空间中图像的形状信息。与大规模标准化 MedMNIST-2D 数据集的最新研究相比，我们提出的混合模型具有较低的计算复杂性，展示了其高鲁棒性和泛化能力。 本文提出一种名为MedViT的高效且鲁棒的CNN-Transformer混合模型，用于解决医疗图像分类中的对抗攻击问题。 Omid Nejati Manzari,Hamid Ahmadabadi,Hossein Kashiani,Shahriar B. Shokouhi,Ahmad Ayatollahi cs.CV

authors_text: Youngjun Kwak,Minyoung Jung,Hunjae Yoo,JinHo Shin,Changick Kim
title: Liveness score-based regression neural networks for face anti-spoofing
title_zh: 用于人脸反欺骗的基于活跃度评分的回归神经网络
abstract: Previous anti-spoofing methods have used either pseudo maps or user-defined labels, and the performance of each approach depends on the accuracy of the third party networks generating pseudo maps and the way in which the users define the labels. In this paper, we propose a liveness score-based regression network for overcoming the dependency on third party networks and users. First, we introduce a new labeling technique, called pseudo-discretized label encoding for generating discretized labels indicating the amount of information related to real images. Secondly, we suggest the expected liveness score based on a regression network for training the difference between the proposed supervision and the expected liveness score. Finally, extensive experiments were conducted on four face anti-spoofing benchmarks to verify our proposed method on both intra-and cross-dataset tests. The experimental results show our approach outperforms previous methods.
summary: Previous anti-spoofing methods have used either pseudo maps or user-defined labels, and the performance of each approach depends on the accuracy of the third party networks generating pseudo maps and the way in which the users define the labels. In this paper, we propose a liveness score-based regression network for overcoming the dependency on third party networks and users. First, we introduce a new labeling technique, called pseudo-discretized label encoding for generating discretized labels indicating the amount of information related to real images. Secondly, we suggest the expected liveness score based on a regression network for training the difference between the proposed supervision and the expected liveness score. Finally, extensive experiments were conducted on four face anti-spoofing benchmarks to verify our proposed method on both intra-and cross-dataset tests. The experimental results show our approach outperforms previous methods.
abstract_zh: 以前的反欺骗方法要么使用伪地图，要么使用用户定义的标签，每种方法的性能取决于第三方网络生成伪地图的准确性以及用户定义标签的方式。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于活跃度得分的回归网络，用于克服对第三方网络和用户的依赖。首先，我们引入一种新的标记技术，称为伪离散标签编码，用于生成指示与真实图像相关的信息量的离散标签。其次，我们建议基于回归网络的预期活跃度分数，用于训练建议的监督与预期活跃度分数之间的差异。最后，在四个人脸反欺骗基准上进行了广泛的实验，以验证我们在数据集内和跨数据集测试中提出的方法。实验结果表明我们的方法优于以前的方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于活体分数的回归神经网络，用于改进人脸防伪方法，减少对第三方网络和用户定义标签的依赖。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖第三方生成的伪图或用户定义标签，其性能受第三方网络准确性和用户标签定义方式的影响，存在局限性。
AI.method: 引入伪离散标签编码生成离散标签，并设计基于回归网络的预期活体分数，以训练模型学习监督信号与预期活体分数之间的差异。
AI.result: 在四个人脸防伪基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法在内部和跨数据集测试中均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效减少了对第三方网络和用户标签的依赖，提升了人脸防伪的准确性和鲁棒性。

authors_text: Zhongyu Li,Xue Bin Peng,Pieter Abbeel,Sergey Levine,Glen Berseth,Koushil Sreenath
title: Robust and Versatile Bipedal Jumping Control through Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过强化学习实现稳健且多功能的双足跳跃控制
comment: Accepted in Robotics: Science and Systems 2023 (RSS 2023). The accompanying video is at https://youtu.be/aAPSZ2QFB-E
comments: Accepted in Robotics: Science and Systems 2023 (RSS 2023). The accompanying video is at https://youtu.be/aAPSZ2QFB-E
abstract: This work aims to push the limits of agility for bipedal robots by enabling a torque-controlled bipedal robot to perform robust and versatile dynamic jumps in the real world. We present a reinforcement learning framework for training a robot to accomplish a large variety of jumping tasks, such as jumping to different locations and directions. To improve performance on these challenging tasks, we develop a new policy structure that encodes the robot's long-term input/output (I/O) history while also providing direct access to a short-term I/O history. In order to train a versatile jumping policy, we utilize a multi-stage training scheme that includes different training stages for different objectives. After multi-stage training, the policy can be directly transferred to a real bipedal Cassie robot. Training on different tasks and exploring more diverse scenarios lead to highly robust policies that can exploit the diverse set of learned maneuvers to recover from perturbations or poor landings during real-world deployment. Such robustness in the proposed policy enables Cassie to succeed in completing a variety of challenging jump tasks in the real world, such as standing long jumps, jumping onto elevated platforms, and multi-axes jumps.
summary: This work aims to push the limits of agility for bipedal robots by enabling a torque-controlled bipedal robot to perform robust and versatile dynamic jumps in the real world. We present a reinforcement learning framework for training a robot to accomplish a large variety of jumping tasks, such as jumping to different locations and directions. To improve performance on these challenging tasks, we develop a new policy structure that encodes the robot's long-term input/output (I/O) history while also providing direct access to a short-term I/O history. In order to train a versatile jumping policy, we utilize a multi-stage training scheme that includes different training stages for different objectives. After multi-stage training, the policy can be directly transferred to a real bipedal Cassie robot. Training on different tasks and exploring more diverse scenarios lead to highly robust policies that can exploit the diverse set of learned maneuvers to recover from perturbations or poor landings during real-world deployment. Such robustness in the proposed policy enables Cassie to succeed in completing a variety of challenging jump tasks in the real world, such as standing long jumps, jumping onto elevated platforms, and multi-axes jumps.
abstract_zh: 这项工作旨在通过使扭矩控制的双足机器人能够在现实世界中执行稳健且多功能的动态跳跃，从而突破双足机器人敏捷性的极限。我们提出了一个强化学习框架，用于训练机器人完成各种跳跃任务，例如跳跃到不同的位置和方向。为了提高这些挑战性任务的性能，我们开发了一种新的策略结构，对机器人的长期输入/输出 (I/O) 历史记录进行编码，同时还提供对短期 I/O 历史记录的直接访问。为了训练多功能的跳跃策略，我们采用多阶段训练方案，其中包括针对不同目标的不同训练阶段。经过多阶段训练后，该策略可以直接转移到真正的双足 Cassie 机器人上。对不同任务的训练和探索更多样化的场景会产生高度稳健的策略，这些策略可以利用不同的学习策略来从现实世界部署期间的扰动或不良着陆中恢复。拟议策略的这种稳健性使 Cassie 能够成功完成现实世界中各种具有挑战性的跳跃任务，例如立定跳远、跳上高架平台和多轴跳跃。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在通过强化学习方法，使扭矩控制的双足机器人能够执行鲁棒且多样化的动态跳跃任务。
AI.motivation: 现有双足机器人在复杂动态任务中的适应性和鲁棒性不足，需提升其敏捷性以完成多样化跳跃任务。
AI.method: 设计融合长期与短期输入/输出历史的策略结构，并采用多阶段训练方案，分阶段优化不同目标，最终将策略迁移至真实机器人。
AI.result: Cassie机器人成功完成多种复杂跳跃任务，包括立定跳远、跳上平台及多轴跳跃，展现出高鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该强化学习框架有效提升了双足机器人在真实环境中的跳跃敏捷性与鲁棒性，为复杂动态任务提供了可行解决方案。

We present a reinforcement learning framework for training a robot to accomplish a large variety of jumping tasks, such as jumping to different locations and directions. To improve performance on these challenging tasks, we develop a new policy structure that encodes the robot's long-term input/output (I/O) history while also providing direct access to a short-term I/O history. In order to train a versatile jumping policy, we utilize a multi-stage training scheme that includes different training stages for different objectives. After multi-stage training, the policy can be directly transferred to a real bipedal Cassie robot. Training on different tasks and exploring more diverse scenarios lead to highly robust policies that can exploit the diverse set of learned maneuvers to recover from perturbations or poor landings during real-world deployment. Such robustness in the proposed policy enables Cassie to succeed in completing a variety of challenging jump tasks in the real world, such as standing long jumps, jumping onto elevated platforms, and multi-axes jumps. 这项工作旨在通过使扭矩控制的双足机器人能够在现实世界中执行稳健且多功能的动态跳跃，从而突破双足机器人敏捷性的极限。我们提出了一个强化学习框架，用于训练机器人完成各种跳跃任务，例如跳跃到不同的位置和方向。为了提高这些挑战性任务的性能，我们开发了一种新的策略结构，对机器人的长期输入/输出 (I/O) 历史记录进行编码，同时还提供对短期 I/O 历史记录的直接访问。为了训练多功能的跳跃策略，我们采用多阶段训练方案，其中包括针对不同目标的不同训练阶段。经过多阶段训练后，该策略可以直接转移到真正的双足 Cassie 机器人上。对不同任务的训练和探索更多样化的场景会产生高度稳健的策略，这些策略可以利用不同的学习策略来从现实世界部署期间的扰动或不良着陆中恢复。拟议策略的这种稳健性使 Cassie 能够成功完成现实世界中各种具有挑战性的跳跃任务，例如立定跳远、跳上高架平台和多轴跳跃。 本论文旨在通过强化学习方法，使扭矩控制的双足机器人能够执行鲁棒且多样化的动态跳跃任务。 Zhongyu Li,Xue Bin Peng,Pieter Abbeel,Sergey Levine,Glen Berseth,Koushil Sreenath cs.RO,cs.AI,eess.SY

title: GRAFS: Graphical Faceted Search System to Support Conceptual Understanding in Exploratory Search
title_zh: GRAFS：支持探索性搜索中概念理解的图形分面搜索系统
comment: 37 pages, 12 figures, to be published in ACM Transactions on Interactive Intelligent Systems
comments: 37 pages, 12 figures, to be published in ACM Transactions on Interactive Intelligent Systems
abstract: When people search for information about a new topic within large document collections, they implicitly construct a mental model of the unfamiliar information space to represent what they currently know and guide their exploration into the unknown. Building this mental model can be challenging as it requires not only finding relevant documents, but also synthesizing important concepts and the relationships that connect those concepts both within and across documents. This paper describes a novel interactive approach designed to help users construct a mental model of an unfamiliar information space during exploratory search. We propose a new semantic search system to organize and visualize important concepts and their relations for a set of search results. A user study ($n=20$) was conducted to compare the proposed approach against a baseline faceted search system on exploratory literature search tasks. Experimental results show that the proposed approach is more effective in helping users recognize relationships between key concepts, leading to a more sophisticated understanding of the search topic while maintaining similar functionality and usability as a faceted search system.
summary: When people search for information about a new topic within large document collections, they implicitly construct a mental model of the unfamiliar information space to represent what they currently know and guide their exploration into the unknown. Building this mental model can be challenging as it requires not only finding relevant documents, but also synthesizing important concepts and the relationships that connect those concepts both within and across documents. This paper describes a novel interactive approach designed to help users construct a mental model of an unfamiliar information space during exploratory search. We propose a new semantic search system to organize and visualize important concepts and their relations for a set of search results. A user study ($n=20$) was conducted to compare the proposed approach against a baseline faceted search system on exploratory literature search tasks. Experimental results show that the proposed approach is more effective in helping users recognize relationships between key concepts, leading to a more sophisticated understanding of the search topic while maintaining similar functionality and usability as a faceted search system.
abstract_zh: 当人们在大型文档集合中搜索有关新主题的信息时，他们会隐式地构建一个不熟悉的信息空间的心理模型，以表示他们当前所知道的内容并指导他们对未知事物的探索。构建这种心理模型可能具有挑战性，因为它不仅需要查找相关文档，还需要综合重要的概念以及在文档内部和文档之间连接这些概念的关系。本文描述了一种新颖的交互方法，旨在帮助用户在探索性搜索过程中构建不熟悉的信息空间的心理模型。我们提出了一种新的语义搜索系统，用于组织和可视化一组搜索结果的重要概念及其关系。进行了一项用户研究 ($n=20$)，以将所提出的方法与探索性文献搜索任务的基线分面搜索系统进行比较。实验结果表明，所提出的方法可以更有效地帮助用户识别关键概念之间的关系，从而更深入地理解搜索主题，同时保持与分面搜索系统类似的功能和可用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GRAFS系统，通过可视化概念及其关系，帮助用户在探索性搜索中构建信息空间的思维模型。
AI.motivation: 用户在探索新主题时需构建思维模型，但传统系统难以有效呈现概念间关系，导致理解困难。
AI.method: 设计GRAFS系统，利用语义搜索组织并可视化搜索结果中的关键概念及其关联，并通过20人用户研究对比基准系统。
AI.result: GRAFS显著提升用户识别关键概念关系的能力，同时保持与传统系统的相似功能和可用性。
AI.conclusion: GRAFS通过概念可视化增强探索性搜索中的理解深度，为信息检索提供了更有效的工具。
