While the latter brings better exploration and finds more appropriate weight values by random updates. Theoretically, we prove our method can be viewed as a hierarchical variational approximation of a probabilistic deep Gaussian process. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets, model architectures, and sparsities show that our method reduces ECE values by up to 47.8\% and simultaneously maintains or even improves accuracy with only a slight increase in computation and storage burden. 尽管稀疏训练已成功应用于各种资源有限的深度学习任务中，以节省内存、加速训练并减少推理时间，但所生成的稀疏模型的可靠性仍有待探索。之前的研究表明深度神经网络往往过于自信，我们发现稀疏训练加剧了这个问题。因此，校准稀疏模型对于可靠的预测和决策至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的稀疏训练方法来生成具有改进的置信度校准的稀疏模型。与之前仅使用一个掩模来控制稀疏拓扑的研究相比，我们的方法使用两个掩模，包括确定性掩模和随机掩模。前者通过利用权重和梯度的大小来有效地搜索和激活重要的权重。而后者带来了更好的探索，通过随机更新找到更合适的权重值。从理论上讲，我们证明我们的方法可以被视为概率深高斯过程的分层变分近似。对多个数据集、模型架构和稀疏性的大量实验表明，我们的方法将 ECE 值降低了高达 47.8%，同时保持甚至提高了准确性，而计算和存储负担仅略有增加。 本文提出了一种新的稀疏训练方法，旨在提高稀疏模型的置信度校准，从而提高预测和决策的可靠性。 Bowen Lei,Ruqi Zhang,Dongkuan Xu,Bani Mallick cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

title: Hyneter: Hybrid Network Transformer for Object Detection
title_zh: Hyneter：用于物体检测的混合网络变压器
abstract: In this paper, we point out that the essential differences between CNN-based and Transformer-based detectors, which cause the worse performance of small objects in Transformer-based methods, are the gap between local information and global dependencies in feature extraction and propagation. To address these differences, we propose a new vision Transformer, called Hybrid Network Transformer (Hyneter), after pre-experiments that indicate the gap causes CNN-based and Transformer-based methods to increase size-different objects result unevenly. Different from the divide and conquer strategy in previous methods, Hyneters consist of Hybrid Network Backbone (HNB) and Dual Switching module (DS), which integrate local information and global dependencies, and transfer them simultaneously. Based on the balance strategy, HNB extends the range of local information by embedding convolution layers into Transformer blocks, and DS adjusts excessive reliance on global dependencies outside the patch.
summary: In this paper, we point out that the essential differences between CNN-based and Transformer-based detectors, which cause the worse performance of small objects in Transformer-based methods, are the gap between local information and global dependencies in feature extraction and propagation. To address these differences, we propose a new vision Transformer, called Hybrid Network Transformer (Hyneter), after pre-experiments that indicate the gap causes CNN-based and Transformer-based methods to increase size-different objects result unevenly. Different from the divide and conquer strategy in previous methods, Hyneters consist of Hybrid Network Backbone (HNB) and Dual Switching module (DS), which integrate local information and global dependencies, and transfer them simultaneously. Based on the balance strategy, HNB extends the range of local information by embedding convolution layers into Transformer blocks, and DS adjusts excessive reliance on global dependencies outside the patch.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们指出基于 CNN 和基于 Transformer 的检测器之间的本质区别是特征提取和传播中局部信息和全局依赖性之间的差距，这导致基于 Transformer 的方法中小目标的性能较差。为了解决这些差异，我们提出了一种新的视觉 Transformer，称为混合网络变压器（Hyneter），经过预实验表明，这种差距会导致基于 CNN 和基于 Transformer 的方法增加尺寸——不同的对象结果不均匀。与以往方法中的分而治之策略不同，Hyneters由混合网络骨干网（HNB）和双交换模块（DS）组成，它们集成了本地信息和全局依赖关系，并同时传输它们。基于平衡策略，HNB通过将卷积层嵌入到Transformer块中来扩展局部信息的范围，而DS则调整了对patch之外的全局依赖关系的过度依赖。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合网络Transformer（Hyneter），通过结合卷积神经网络（CNN）与Transformer的优势，解决基于Transformer的目标检测方法在小物体检测中的性能问题。
AI.motivation: 基于Transformer的目标检测方法在处理小物体时表现较差，主要原因是局部信息与全局依赖之间的差距，而CNN在局部特征提取上更具优势。
AI.method: Hyneter包含混合网络主干（HNB）和双切换模块（DS）。HNB通过在Transformer块中嵌入卷积层扩展局部信息范围，DS则通过动态调整全局依赖的权重来平衡局部与全局特征。
AI.result: 实验表明，Hyneter在小物体检测任务上相比现有方法具有更优的性能，有效缓解了局部与全局特征提取的不平衡问题。
AI.conclusion: Hyneter通过融合CNN与Transformer的优势，成功解决了基于Transformer方法在小物体检测中的缺陷，为未来多模态特征融合提供了新思路。

title: Autocodificadores Variacionales (VAE) Fundamentos Teóricos y Aplicaciones
title_zh: 变量自动编码 (VAE) 原理和应用基础
comment: 15 pages, in Spanish language, 2 figures, review
comments: 15 pages, in Spanish language, 2 figures, review
abstract: VAEs are probabilistic graphical models based on neural networks that allow the coding of input data in a latent space formed by simpler probability distributions and the reconstruction, based on such latent variables, of the source data. After training, the reconstruction network, called decoder, is capable of generating new elements belonging to a close distribution, ideally equal to the original one. This article has been written in Spanish to facilitate the arrival of this scientific knowledge to the Spanish-speaking community.
summary: VAEs are probabilistic graphical models based on neural networks that allow the coding of input data in a latent space formed by simpler probability distributions and the reconstruction, based on such latent variables, of the source data. After training, the reconstruction network, called decoder, is capable of generating new elements belonging to a close distribution, ideally equal to the original one. This article has been written in Spanish to facilitate the arrival of this scientific knowledge to the Spanish-speaking community.
abstract_zh: VAE 是基于神经网络的概率图形模型，允许在由更简单的概率分布形成的潜在空间中对输入数据进行编码，并基于此类潜在变量对源数据进行重建。训练后，称为解码器的重建网络能够生成属于紧密分布的新元素，理想情况下等于原始元素。本文以西班牙语撰写，旨在促进西班牙语社区了解这些科学知识。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了变分自编码器（VAE）的理论基础及其应用，阐述其通过潜在空间编码和解码数据的机制。
AI.motivation: 旨在向西班牙语社区传播变分自编码器的科学知识，促进相关技术的普及与应用。
AI.method: 基于神经网络的概率图模型，通过编码器将输入数据映射到潜在空间，并利用解码器根据潜在变量重建数据。
AI.result: 训练后的解码器能够生成符合原始数据分布的新样本，验证了VAE在数据生成任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 变分自编码器在数据编码与生成任务中表现出色，为后续研究和应用提供了理论支持。

authors_text: Caoyun Fan,Wenqing Chen,Jidong Tian,Yitian Li,Hao He,Yaohui Jin
title: MaxGNR: A Dynamic Weight Strategy via Maximizing Gradient-to-Noise Ratio for Multi-Task Learning
title_zh: MaxGNR：通过最大化多任务学习的梯度噪声比的动态权重策略
abstract: When modeling related tasks in computer vision, Multi-Task Learning (MTL) can outperform Single-Task Learning (STL) due to its ability to capture intrinsic relatedness among tasks. However, MTL may encounter the insufficient training problem, i.e., some tasks in MTL may encounter non-optimal situation compared with STL. A series of studies point out that too much gradient noise would lead to performance degradation in STL, however, in the MTL scenario, Inter-Task Gradient Noise (ITGN) is an additional source of gradient noise for each task, which can also affect the optimization process. In this paper, we point out ITGN as a key factor leading to the insufficient training problem. We define the Gradient-to-Noise Ratio (GNR) to measure the relative magnitude of gradient noise and design the MaxGNR algorithm to alleviate the ITGN interference of each task by maximizing the GNR of each task. We carefully evaluate our MaxGNR algorithm on two standard image MTL datasets: NYUv2 and Cityscapes. The results show that our algorithm outperforms the baselines under identical experimental conditions.
summary: When modeling related tasks in computer vision, Multi-Task Learning (MTL) can outperform Single-Task Learning (STL) due to its ability to capture intrinsic relatedness among tasks. However, MTL may encounter the insufficient training problem, i.e., some tasks in MTL may encounter non-optimal situation compared with STL. A series of studies point out that too much gradient noise would lead to performance degradation in STL, however, in the MTL scenario, Inter-Task Gradient Noise (ITGN) is an additional source of gradient noise for each task, which can also affect the optimization process. In this paper, we point out ITGN as a key factor leading to the insufficient training problem. We define the Gradient-to-Noise Ratio (GNR) to measure the relative magnitude of gradient noise and design the MaxGNR algorithm to alleviate the ITGN interference of each task by maximizing the GNR of each task. We carefully evaluate our MaxGNR algorithm on two standard image MTL datasets: NYUv2 and Cityscapes. The results show that our algorithm outperforms the baselines under identical experimental conditions.
abstract_zh: 在计算机视觉中对相关任务进行建模时，多任务学习（MTL）由于能够捕获任务之间的内在相关性，因此可以优于单任务学习（STL）。然而，MTL可能会遇到训练不足的问题，即MTL中的某些任务与STL相比可能会遇到非最优的情况。一系列研究指出，STL中梯度噪声过多会导致性能下降，然而，在MTL场景中，任务间梯度噪声（ITGN）是每个任务的额外梯度噪声源，也会影响优化过程。在本文中，我们指出ITGN是导致训练不足问题的关键因素。我们定义梯度噪声比（GNR）来衡量梯度噪声的相对大小，并设计MaxGNR算法通过最大化每个任务的GNR来减轻每个任务的ITGN干扰。我们在两个标准图像 MTL 数据集：NYUv2 和 Cityscapes 上仔细评估了我们的 MaxGNR 算法。结果表明，我们的算法在相同的实验条件下优于基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MaxGNR算法，通过最大化梯度噪声比（GNR）解决多任务学习中的训练不足问题。
AI.motivation: 多任务学习虽能提升性能，但任务间梯度噪声（ITGN）会导致部分任务优化不足，现有方法未有效解决该问题。
AI.method: 定义梯度噪声比（GNR）指标，设计MaxGNR算法动态调整任务权重以最大化各任务的GNR，抑制ITGN干扰。
AI.result: 在NYUv2和Cityscapes数据集上，MaxGNR算法在相同条件下优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: MaxGNR通过优化梯度噪声比有效缓解多任务学习中的训练不足问题，提升整体性能。

conclusion: MaxGNR通过优化梯度噪声比有效缓解多任务学习中的训练不足问题，提升整体性能。
search_text: MaxGNR: A Dynamic Weight Strategy via Maximizing Gradient-to-Noise Ratio for Multi-Task Learning MaxGNR：通过最大化多任务学习的梯度噪声比的动态权重策略 When modeling related tasks in computer vision, Multi-Task Learning (MTL) can outperform Single-Task Learning (STL) due to its ability to capture intrinsic relatedness among tasks. However, MTL may encounter the insufficient training problem, i.e., some tasks in MTL may encounter non-optimal situation compared with STL. A series of studies point out that too much gradient noise would lead to performance degradation in STL, however, in the MTL scenario, Inter-Task Gradient Noise (ITGN) is an additional source of gradient noise for each task, which can also affect the optimization process. In this paper, we point out ITGN as a key factor leading to the insufficient training problem. We define the Gradient-to-Noise Ratio (GNR) to measure the relative magnitude of gradient noise and design the MaxGNR algorithm to alleviate the ITGN interference of each task by maximizing the GNR of each task. We carefully evaluate our MaxGNR algorithm on two standard image MTL datasets: NYUv2 and Cityscapes. The results show that our algorithm outperforms the baselines under identical experimental conditions. 在计算机视觉中对相关任务进行建模时，多任务学习（MTL）由于能够捕获任务之间的内在相关性，因此可以优于单任务学习（STL）。然而，MTL可能会遇到训练不足的问题，即MTL中的某些任务与STL相比可能会遇到非最优的情况。一系列研究指出，STL中梯度噪声过多会导致性能下降，然而，在MTL场景中，任务间梯度噪声（ITGN）是每个任务的额外梯度噪声源，也会影响优化过程。在本文中，我们指出ITGN是导致训练不足问题的关键因素。我们定义梯度噪声比（GNR）来衡量梯度噪声的相对大小，并设计MaxGNR算法通过最大化每个任务的GNR来减轻每个任务的ITGN干扰。我们在两个标准图像 MTL 数据集：NYUv2 和 Cityscapes 上仔细评估了我们的 MaxGNR 算法。结果表明，我们的算法在相同的实验条件下优于基线。 本文提出MaxGNR算法，通过最大化梯度噪声比（GNR）解决多任务学习中的训练不足问题。 Caoyun Fan,Wenqing Chen,Jidong Tian,Yitian Li,Hao He,Yaohui Jin cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Xili Dai,Ke Chen,Shengbang Tong,Jingyuan Zhang,Xingjian Gao,Mingyang Li,Druv Pai,Yuexiang Zhai,XIaojun Yuan,Heung-Yeung Shum,Lionel M. Ni,Yi Ma
title: Closed-Loop Transcription via Convolutional Sparse Coding
title_zh: 通过卷积稀疏编码进行闭环转录
abstract: Autoencoding has achieved great empirical success as a framework for learning generative models for natural images. Autoencoders often use generic deep networks as the encoder or decoder, which are difficult to interpret, and the learned representations lack clear structure. In this work, we make the explicit assumption that the image distribution is generated from a multi-stage sparse deconvolution. The corresponding inverse map, which we use as an encoder, is a multi-stage convolution sparse coding (CSC), with each stage obtained from unrolling an optimization algorithm for solving the corresponding (convexified) sparse coding program. To avoid computational difficulties in minimizing distributional distance between the real and generated images, we utilize the recent closed-loop transcription (CTRL) framework that optimizes the rate reduction of the learned sparse representations. Conceptually, our method has high-level connections to score-matching methods such as diffusion models. Empirically, our framework demonstrates competitive performance on large-scale datasets, such as ImageNet-1K, compared to existing autoencoding and generative methods under fair conditions. Even with simpler networks and fewer computational resources, our method demonstrates high visual quality in regenerated images. More surprisingly, the learned autoencoder performs well on unseen datasets. Our method enjoys several side benefits, including more structured and interpretable representations, more stable convergence, and scalability to large datasets. Our method is arguably the first to demonstrate that a concatenation of multiple convolution sparse coding/decoding layers leads to an interpretable and effective autoencoder for modeling the distribution of large-scale natural image datasets.
summary: Autoencoding has achieved great empirical success as a framework for learning generative models for natural images. Autoencoders often use generic deep networks as the encoder or decoder, which are difficult to interpret, and the learned representations lack clear structure. In this work, we make the explicit assumption that the image distribution is generated from a multi-stage sparse deconvolution. The corresponding inverse map, which we use as an encoder, is a multi-stage convolution sparse coding (CSC), with each stage obtained from unrolling an optimization algorithm for solving the corresponding (convexified) sparse coding program. To avoid computational difficulties in minimizing distributional distance between the real and generated images, we utilize the recent closed-loop transcription (CTRL) framework that optimizes the rate reduction of the learned sparse representations. Conceptually, our method has high-level connections to score-matching methods such as diffusion models. Empirically, our framework demonstrates competitive performance on large-scale datasets, such as ImageNet-1K, compared to existing autoencoding and generative methods under fair conditions. Even with simpler networks and fewer computational resources, our method demonstrates high visual quality in regenerated images. More surprisingly, the learned autoencoder performs well on unseen datasets. Our method enjoys several side benefits, including more structured and interpretable representations, more stable convergence, and scalability to large datasets. Our method is arguably the first to demonstrate that a concatenation of multiple convolution sparse coding/decoding layers leads to an interpretable and effective autoencoder for modeling the distribution of large-scale natural image datasets.
abstract_zh: 作为学习自然图像生成模型的框架，自动编码已经取得了巨大的经验成功。自动编码器通常使用通用的深度网络作为编码器或解码器，这很难解释，并且学习到的表示缺乏清晰的结构。在这项工作中，我们明确假设图像分布是由多级稀疏反卷积生成的。我们用作编码器的相应逆映射是多级卷积稀疏编码（CSC），每个阶段都是通过展开用于求解相应（凸）稀疏编码程序的优化算法而获得的。为了避免最小化真实图像和生成图像之间的分布距离的计算困难，我们利用最近的闭环转录（CTRL）框架来优化学习稀疏表示的速率降低。从概念上讲，我们的方法与扩散模型等分数匹配方法具有高级别的联系。根据经验，与公平条件下现有的自动编码和生成方法相比，我们的框架在大规模数据集（例如 ImageNet-1K）上展示了具有竞争力的性能。即使使用更简单的网络和更少的计算资源，我们的方法也能在再生图像中展示出高视觉质量。更令人惊讶的是，学习到的自动编码器在未见过的数据集上表现良好。我们的方法有几个附带的好处，包括更结构化和可解释的表示、更稳定的收敛以及对大型数据集的可扩展性。我们的方法可以说是第一个证明多个卷积稀疏编码/解码层的串联可以产生可解释且有效的自动编码器，用于对大规模自然图像数据集的分布进行建模。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积稀疏编码的闭环转录框架，通过多阶段稀疏编码与解码层的组合，构建可解释且高效的自编码器模型，用于大规模自然图像分布建模。
AI.motivation: 传统自编码器使用深度网络导致表示结构不清晰且难以解释，而稀疏编码方法在图像生成中缺乏有效优化框架，需解决分布距离最小化与计算复杂性之间的矛盾。
AI.method: 假设图像分布由多阶段稀疏反卷积生成，设计对应逆映射作为编码器（多阶段卷积稀疏编码CSC），通过展开优化算法求解凸化稀疏编码问题；结合CTRL框架优化稀疏表示的速率减少，避免直接分布距离最小化的计算困难。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K等大规模数据集上，该方法在视觉质量与生成效果上优于现有自编码与生成模型，且在未见数据集上表现良好，具有结构化表示、稳定收敛及扩展性优势。
AI.conclusion: 首次证明多阶段卷积稀疏编解码层的级联可构建有效且可解释的自编码器，为自然图像分布建模提供新思路，兼具理论可解释性与工程实用性。

title: Redes Generativas Adversarias (GAN) Fundamentos Teóricos y Aplicaciones
title_zh: Redes Generativas Adversarias (GAN) 基本原理和应用
comment: 14 pages, in Spanish language, 2 figures, review
comments: 14 pages, in Spanish language, 2 figures, review
abstract: Generative adversarial networks (GANs) are a method based on the training of two neural networks, one called generator and the other discriminator, competing with each other to generate new instances that resemble those of the probability distribution of the training data. GANs have a wide range of applications in fields such as computer vision, semantic segmentation, time series synthesis, image editing, natural language processing, and image generation from text, among others. Generative models model the probability distribution of a data set, but instead of providing a probability value, they generate new instances that are close to the original distribution. GANs use a learning scheme that allows the defining attributes of the probability distribution to be encoded in a neural network, allowing instances to be generated that resemble the original probability distribution. This article presents the theoretical foundations of this type of network as well as the basic architecture schemes and some of its applications. This article is in Spanish to facilitate the arrival of this scientific knowledge to the Spanish-speaking community.
summary: Generative adversarial networks (GANs) are a method based on the training of two neural networks, one called generator and the other discriminator, competing with each other to generate new instances that resemble those of the probability distribution of the training data. GANs have a wide range of applications in fields such as computer vision, semantic segmentation, time series synthesis, image editing, natural language processing, and image generation from text, among others. This article presents the theoretical foundations of this type of network as well as the basic architecture schemes and some of its applications. This article is in Spanish to facilitate the arrival of this scientific knowledge to the Spanish-speaking community.
abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络（GAN）是一种基于两个神经网络（一个称为生成器，另一个称为鉴别器）训练的方法，它们相互竞争以生成类似于训练数据概率分布的新实例。 GAN 在计算机视觉、语义分割、时间序列合成、图像编辑、自然语言处理和文本图像生成等领域有着广泛的应用。生成模型对数据集的概率分布进行建模，但它们不提供概率值，而是生成接近原始分布的新实例。 GAN 使用一种学习方案，允许在神经网络中对概率分布的定义属性进行编码，从而允许生成类似于原始概率分布的实例。本文介绍了此类网络的理论基础以及基本架构方案及其一些应用。本文是西班牙语的，旨在促进西班牙语社区了解这些科学知识。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了生成对抗网络（GAN）的理论基础、基本架构及应用场景，旨在为西班牙语社区提供相关科学知识。
AI.motivation: 通过向西班牙语社区传播GAN的理论与应用，弥补该地区在生成对抗网络领域知识获取的不足。
AI.method: 采用理论分析与案例研究相结合的方法，阐述GAN的核心原理、网络结构及多领域应用实例。
AI.result: 系统性地梳理了GAN的数学基础、生成器与判别器的对抗机制，并列举了计算机视觉、自然语言处理等领域的典型应用。
AI.conclusion: GAN作为重要的生成模型，其理论与应用研究对推动人工智能技术发展具有重要意义，西班牙语地区的学术界应加强相关探索。

search_text: Redes Generativas Adversarias (GAN) Fundamentos Teóricos y Aplicaciones Redes Generativas Adversarias (GAN) 基本原理和应用 Generative adversarial networks (GANs) are a method based on the training of two neural networks, one called generator and the other discriminator, competing with each other to generate new instances that resemble those of the probability distribution of the training data. GANs have a wide range of applications in fields such as computer vision, semantic segmentation, time series synthesis, image editing, natural language processing, and image generation from text, among others. Generative models model the probability distribution of a data set, but instead of providing a probability value, they generate new instances that are close to the original distribution. GANs use a learning scheme that allows the defining attributes of the probability distribution to be encoded in a neural network, allowing instances to be generated that resemble the original probability distribution. This article presents the theoretical foundations of this type of network as well as the basic architecture schemes and some of its applications. This article is in Spanish to facilitate the arrival of this scientific knowledge to the Spanish-speaking community. 生成对抗网络（GAN）是一种基于两个神经网络（一个称为生成器，另一个称为鉴别器）训练的方法，它们相互竞争以生成类似于训练数据概率分布的新实例。 GAN 在计算机视觉、语义分割、时间序列合成、图像编辑、自然语言处理和文本图像生成等领域有着广泛的应用。生成模型对数据集的概率分布进行建模，但它们不提供概率值，而是生成接近原始分布的新实例。 GAN 使用一种学习方案，允许在神经网络中对概率分布的定义属性进行编码，从而允许生成类似于原始概率分布的实例。本文介绍了此类网络的理论基础以及基本架构方案及其一些应用。本文是西班牙语的，旨在促进西班牙语社区了解这些科学知识。 本文介绍了生成对抗网络（GAN）的理论基础、基本架构及应用场景，旨在为西班牙语社区提供相关科学知识。 Jordi de la Torre cs.AI

authors_text: Nihal Murali,Aahlad Puli,Ke Yu,Rajesh Ranganath,Kayhan Batmanghelich
title: Beyond Distribution Shift: Spurious Features Through the Lens of Training Dynamics
title_zh: 超越分布转变：通过训练动态的视角观察虚假特征
comment: Main paper: 12 pages, 2 tables, and 10 figures. Supplementary: 10 pages and 9 figures. Accepted in TMLR23 (https://openreview.net/pdf?id=Tkvmt9nDmB)
comments: Main paper: 12 pages, 2 tables, and 10 figures. Supplementary: 10 pages and 9 figures. Accepted in TMLR23 (https://openreview.net/pdf?id=Tkvmt9nDmB)
abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) are prone to learning spurious features that correlate with the label during training but are irrelevant to the learning problem. This hurts model generalization and poses problems when deploying them in safety-critical applications. This paper aims to better understand the effects of spurious features through the lens of the learning dynamics of the internal neurons during the training process. We make the following observations: (1) While previous works highlight the harmful effects of spurious features on the generalization ability of DNNs, we emphasize that not all spurious features are harmful. Spurious features can be "benign" or "harmful" depending on whether they are "harder" or "easier" to learn than the core features for a given model. This definition is model and dataset-dependent. (2) We build upon this premise and use instance difficulty methods (like Prediction Depth (Baldock et al., 2021)) to quantify "easiness" for a given model and to identify this behavior during the training phase. (3) We empirically show that the harmful spurious features can be detected by observing the learning dynamics of the DNN's early layers. In other words, easy features learned by the initial layers of a DNN early during the training can (potentially) hurt model generalization. We verify our claims on medical and vision datasets, both simulated and real, and justify the empirical success of our hypothesis by showing the theoretical connections between Prediction Depth and information-theoretic concepts like V-usable information (Ethayarajh et al., 2021). Lastly, our experiments show that monitoring only accuracy during training (as is common in machine learning pipelines) is insufficient to detect spurious features. We, therefore, highlight the need for monitoring early training dynamics using suitable instance difficulty metrics.

This hurts model generalization and poses problems when deploying them in safety-critical applications. This paper aims to better understand the effects of spurious features through the lens of the learning dynamics of the internal neurons during the training process. We make the following observations: (1) While previous works highlight the harmful effects of spurious features on the generalization ability of DNNs, we emphasize that not all spurious features are harmful. Spurious features can be "benign" or "harmful" depending on whether they are "harder" or "easier" to learn than the core features for a given model. This definition is model and dataset-dependent. (2) We build upon this premise and use instance difficulty methods (like Prediction Depth (Baldock et al., 2021)) to quantify "easiness" for a given model and to identify this behavior during the training phase. (3) We empirically show that the harmful spurious features can be detected by observing the learning dynamics of the DNN's early layers. In other words, easy features learned by the initial layers of a DNN early during the training can (potentially) hurt model generalization. We verify our claims on medical and vision datasets, both simulated and real, and justify the empirical success of our hypothesis by showing the theoretical connections between Prediction Depth and information-theoretic concepts like V-usable information (Ethayarajh et al., 2021). Lastly, our experiments show that monitoring only accuracy during training (as is common in machine learning pipelines) is insufficient to detect spurious features. We, therefore, highlight the need for monitoring early training dynamics using suitable instance difficulty metrics.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 很容易学习到在训练期间与标签相关但与学习问题无关的虚假特征。这会损害模型的泛化性，并在将模型部署到安全关键型应用程序中时带来问题。本文旨在通过训练过程中内部神经元的学习动态来更好地理解虚假特征的影响。我们做出以下观察：（1）虽然以前的工作强调了虚假特征对 DNN 泛化能力的有害影响，但我们强调并非所有虚假特征都是有害的。虚假特征可以是“良性的”或“有害的”，具体取决于它们比给定模型的核心特征“更难”还是“更容易”学习。该定义取决于模型和数据集。 (2) 我们在此前提基础上，使用实例难度方法（如预测深度（Baldock 等人，2021））来量化给定模型的“容易程度”，并在训练阶段识别这种行为。 (3) 我们凭经验表明，可以通过观察 DNN 早期层的学习动态来检测有害的虚假特征。换句话说，在训练早期 DNN 的初始层学习到的简单特征可能（可能）损害模型的泛化能力。我们验证了我们对模拟和真实的医学和视觉数据集的主张，并通过展示预测深度和 V 可用信息等信息论概念之间的理论联系来证明我们的假设的实证成功（Ethayarajh 等人，2021）。最后，我们的实验表明，仅监控训练期间的准确性（这在机器学习管道中很常见）不足以检测虚假特征。因此，我们强调需要使用合适的实例难度指标来监控早期训练动态。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析深度神经网络训练过程中内部神经元的学习动态，研究了虚假特征对模型泛化能力的影响，并提出通过监测早期训练动态来检测有害虚假特征的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究强调虚假特征对模型泛化能力的负面影响，但未明确区分不同虚假特征的危害性。本文旨在揭示虚假特征的复杂影响机制，并提出更有效的检测方法以提升模型可靠性。
AI.method: 基于实例难度量化方法（如Prediction Depth），通过分析DNN早期层的学习动态，区分有害与无害虚假特征，并建立与信息论概念的理论联系。
AI.result: 实验表明：早期层易学习的虚假特征可能损害泛化能力；仅监控准确率无法检测虚假特征；理论分析验证了Prediction Depth与V-usable信息的关联性。
AI.conclusion: 需通过监测训练早期动态指标而非仅依赖准确率来识别有害虚假特征，这对安全关键领域的模型部署具有重要指导意义。

title: Efficient Exploration via Epistemic-Risk-Seeking Policy Optimization
title_zh: 通过认知风险寻求政策优化进行有效探索
abstract: Exploration remains a key challenge in deep reinforcement learning (RL). Optimism in the face of uncertainty is a well-known heuristic with theoretical guarantees in the tabular setting, but how best to translate the principle to deep reinforcement learning, which involves online stochastic gradients and deep network function approximators, is not fully understood. In this paper we propose a new, differentiable optimistic objective that when optimized yields a policy that provably explores efficiently, with guarantees even under function approximation. Our new objective is a zero-sum two-player game derived from endowing the agent with an epistemic-risk-seeking utility function, which converts uncertainty into value and encourages the agent to explore uncertain states. We show that the solution to this game minimizes an upper bound on the regret, with the 'players' each attempting to minimize one component of a particular regret decomposition. We derive a new model-free algorithm which we call 'epistemic-risk-seeking actor-critic' (ERSAC), which is simply an application of simultaneous stochastic gradient ascent-descent to the game. Finally, we discuss a recipe for incorporating off-policy data and show that combining the risk-seeking objective with replay data yields a double benefit in terms of statistical efficiency. We conclude with some results showing good performance of a deep RL agent using the technique on the challenging 'DeepSea' environment, showing significant performance improvements even over other efficient exploration techniques, as well as improved performance on the Atari benchmark.
summary: Exploration remains a key challenge in deep reinforcement learning (RL). Optimism in the face of uncertainty is a well-known heuristic with theoretical guarantees in the tabular setting, but how best to translate the principle to deep reinforcement learning, which involves online stochastic gradients and deep network function approximators, is not fully understood. In this paper we propose a new, differentiable optimistic objective that when optimized yields a policy that provably explores efficiently, with guarantees even under function approximation. Our new objective is a zero-sum two-player game derived from endowing the agent with an epistemic-risk-seeking utility function, which converts uncertainty into value and encourages the agent to explore uncertain states. We show that the solution to this game minimizes an upper bound on the regret, with the 'players' each attempting to minimize one component of a particular regret decomposition. We derive a new model-free algorithm which we call 'epistemic-risk-seeking actor-critic' (ERSAC), which is simply an application of simultaneous stochastic gradient ascent-descent to the game. Finally, we discuss a recipe for incorporating off-policy data and show that combining the risk-seeking objective with replay data yields a double benefit in terms of statistical efficiency. We conclude with some results showing good performance of a deep RL agent using the technique on the challenging 'DeepSea' environment, showing significant performance improvements even over other efficient exploration techniques, as well as improved performance on the Atari benchmark.
abstract_zh: 探索仍然是深度强化学习（RL）的一个关键挑战。面对不确定性的乐观是一种众所周知的启发式方法，在表格设置中具有理论保证，但如何最好地将原理转化为深度强化学习（涉及在线随机梯度和深度网络函数逼近器）尚不完全清楚。在本文中，我们提出了一个新的、可微分的乐观目标，该目标经过优化后会产生一种可证明有效探索的策略，即使在函数逼近的情况下也能得到保证。我们的新目标是一种零和两人博弈，源自赋予智能体认知风险寻求效用函数，该函数将不确定性转化为价值，并鼓励智能体探索不确定状态。我们证明了这个游戏的解决方案最小化了遗憾的上限，每个“玩家”都试图最小化特定遗憾分解的一个组成部分。我们推导出一种新的无模型算法，称为“认知风险寻求行动者批评家”（ERSAC），它只是同时随机梯度上升-下降在游戏中的应用。最后，我们讨论了合并非策略数据的方法，并表明将风险寻求目标与重放数据相结合可以在统计效率方面产生双重好处。我们得出的一些结果表明，在具有挑战性的“DeepSea”环境中使用该技术的深度 RL 代理具有良好的性能，甚至比其他有效的探索技术也显示出显着的性能改进，以及在 Atari 基准测试中的性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于认识风险寻求的策略优化方法，解决深度强化学习中的高效探索问题。
AI.motivation: 现有乐观面对不确定性的启发式方法在表格型强化学习中有效，但难以直接应用于涉及函数近似的深度强化学习场景。
AI.method: 构建零和双人博弈框架，通过认识风险寻求效用函数将不确定性转化为价值，设计无模型算法ERSAC并结合离线数据提升效率。
AI.result: 在DeepSea环境和Atari基准测试中，该方法显著优于其他探索技术，实现性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 新方法在理论保证和实践效果上均表现出色，为深度强化学习的探索问题提供了有效解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于认识风险寻求的策略优化方法，解决深度强化学习中的高效探索问题。
motivation: 现有乐观面对不确定性的启发式方法在表格型强化学习中有效，但难以直接应用于涉及函数近似的深度强化学习场景。
method: 构建零和双人博弈框架，通过认识风险寻求效用函数将不确定性转化为价值，设计无模型算法ERSAC并结合离线数据提升效率。

search_text: Efficient Exploration via Epistemic-Risk-Seeking Policy Optimization 通过认知风险寻求政策优化进行有效探索 Exploration remains a key challenge in deep reinforcement learning (RL). Optimism in the face of uncertainty is a well-known heuristic with theoretical guarantees in the tabular setting, but how best to translate the principle to deep reinforcement learning, which involves online stochastic gradients and deep network function approximators, is not fully understood. In this paper we propose a new, differentiable optimistic objective that when optimized yields a policy that provably explores efficiently, with guarantees even under function approximation. Our new objective is a zero-sum two-player game derived from endowing the agent with an epistemic-risk-seeking utility function, which converts uncertainty into value and encourages the agent to explore uncertain states. We show that the solution to this game minimizes an upper bound on the regret, with the 'players' each attempting to minimize one component of a particular regret decomposition. We derive a new model-free algorithm which we call 'epistemic-risk-seeking actor-critic' (ERSAC), which is simply an application of simultaneous stochastic gradient ascent-descent to the game. Finally, we discuss a recipe for incorporating off-policy data and show that combining the risk-seeking objective with replay data yields a double benefit in terms of statistical efficiency. We conclude with some results showing good performance of a deep RL agent using the technique on the challenging 'DeepSea' environment, showing significant performance improvements even over other efficient exploration techniques, as well as improved performance on the Atari benchmark. 探索仍然是深度强化学习（RL）的一个关键挑战。面对不确定性的乐观是一种众所周知的启发式方法，在表格设置中具有理论保证，但如何最好地将原理转化为深度强化学习（涉及在线随机梯度和深度网络函数逼近器）尚不完全清楚。在本文中，我们提出了一个新的、可微分的乐观目标，该目标经过优化后会产生一种可证明有效探索的策略，即使在函数逼近的情况下也能得到保证。我们的新目标是一种零和两人博弈，源自赋予智能体认知风险寻求效用函数，该函数将不确定性转化为价值，并鼓励智能体探索不确定状态。我们证明了这个游戏的解决方案最小化了遗憾的上限，每个“玩家”都试图最小化特定遗憾分解的一个组成部分。我们推导出一种新的无模型算法，称为“认知风险寻求行动者批评家”（ERSAC），它只是同时随机梯度上升-下降在游戏中的应用。最后，我们讨论了合并非策略数据的方法，并表明将风险寻求目标与重放数据相结合可以在统计效率方面产生双重好处。我们得出的一些结果表明，在具有挑战性的“DeepSea”环境中使用该技术的深度 RL 代理具有良好的性能，甚至比其他有效的探索技术也显示出显着的性能改进，以及在 Atari 基准测试中的性能改进。 本文提出一种基于认识风险寻求的策略优化方法，解决深度强化学习中的高效探索问题。 Brendan O'Donoghue cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Xinyan Wang,Ting Jia,Chongyu Wang,Kuan Xu,Zixin Shu,Jian Yu,Kuo Yang,Xuezhong Zhou
title: Knowledge Graph Completion based on Tensor Decomposition for Disease Gene Prediction
title_zh: 基于张量分解的知识图谱补全用于疾病基因预测
abstract: Accurate identification of disease genes has consistently been one of the keys to decoding a disease's molecular mechanism. Most current approaches focus on constructing biological networks and utilizing machine learning, especially, deep learning to identify disease genes, but ignore the complex relations between entities in the biological knowledge graph. In this paper, we construct a biological knowledge graph centered on diseases and genes, and develop an end-to-end Knowledge graph completion model for Disease Gene Prediction using interactional tensor decomposition (called KDGene). KDGene introduces an interaction module between the embeddings of entities and relations to tensor decomposition, which can effectively enhance the information interaction in biological knowledge. Experimental results show that KDGene significantly outperforms state-of-the-art algorithms. Furthermore, the comprehensive biological analysis of the case of diabetes mellitus confirms KDGene's ability for identifying new and accurate candidate genes. This work proposes a scalable knowledge graph completion framework to identify disease candidate genes, from which the results are promising to provide valuable references for further wet experiments.
summary: Accurate identification of disease genes has consistently been one of the keys to decoding a disease's molecular mechanism. Most current approaches focus on constructing biological networks and utilizing machine learning, especially, deep learning to identify disease genes, but ignore the complex relations between entities in the biological knowledge graph. In this paper, we construct a biological knowledge graph centered on diseases and genes, and develop an end-to-end Knowledge graph completion model for Disease Gene Prediction using interactional tensor decomposition (called KDGene). KDGene introduces an interaction module between the embeddings of entities and relations to tensor decomposition, which can effectively enhance the information interaction in biological knowledge. Experimental results show that KDGene significantly outperforms state-of-the-art algorithms. Furthermore, the comprehensive biological analysis of the case of diabetes mellitus confirms KDGene's ability for identifying new and accurate candidate genes. This work proposes a scalable knowledge graph completion framework to identify disease candidate genes, from which the results are promising to provide valuable references for further wet experiments.
abstract_zh: 疾病基因的准确识别一直是解码疾病分子机制的关键之一。当前大多数方法侧重于构建生物网络并利用机器学习，特别是深度学习来识别疾病基因，但忽略了生物知识图谱中实体之间的复杂关系。在本文中，我们构建了一个以疾病和基因为中心的生物知识图谱，并利用交互张量分解开发了一种用于疾病基因预测的端到端知识图谱补全模型（称为KDGene）。 KDGene在张量分解中引入了实体嵌入和关系之间的交互模块，可以有效增强生物知识中的信息交互。实验结果表明，KDGene 的性能显着优于最先进的算法。此外，对糖尿病病例的全面生物学分析证实了 KDGene 识别新的、准确的候选基因的能力。这项工作提出了一个可扩展的知识图补全框架来识别疾病候选基因，其结果有望为进一步的湿实验提供有价值的参考。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于张量分解的知识图谱补全模型KDGene，用于疾病基因预测任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在构建生物网络和利用机器学习时忽视了生物知识图谱中实体间的复杂关系，限制了疾病基因预测的准确性。
AI.method: 构建以疾病和基因为中心的生物知识图谱，设计结合实体嵌入与关系交互的张量分解模型KDGene，增强生物信息交互。
AI.result: KDGene在实验中显著优于现有算法，糖尿病案例分析验证了其识别新候选基因的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为疾病候选基因识别提供了可扩展的解决方案，结果可为后续湿实验提供重要参考。

title: Eco-evolutionary Dynamics of Non-episodic Neuroevolution in Large Multi-agent Environments
title_zh: 大型多智能体环境中非情景神经进化的生态进化动力学
abstract: Neuroevolution (NE) has recently proven a competitive alternative to learning by gradient descent in reinforcement learning tasks. However, the majority of NE methods and associated simulation environments differ crucially from biological evolution: the environment is reset to initial conditions at the end of each generation, whereas natural environments are continuously modified by their inhabitants; agents reproduce based on their ability to maximize rewards within a population, while biological organisms reproduce and die based on internal physiological variables that depend on their resource consumption; simulation environments are primarily single-agent while the biological world is inherently multi-agent and evolves alongside the population. In this work we present a method for continuously evolving adaptive agents without any environment or population reset. The environment is a large grid world with complex spatiotemporal resource generation, containing many agents that are each controlled by an evolvable recurrent neural network and locally reproduce based on their internal physiology. The entire system is implemented in JAX, allowing very fast simulation on a GPU. We show that NE can operate in an ecologically-valid non-episodic multi-agent setting, finding sustainable collective foraging strategies in the presence of a complex interplay between ecological and evolutionary dynamics.
summary: Neuroevolution (NE) has recently proven a competitive alternative to learning by gradient descent in reinforcement learning tasks. However, the majority of NE methods and associated simulation environments differ crucially from biological evolution: the environment is reset to initial conditions at the end of each generation, whereas natural environments are continuously modified by their inhabitants; agents reproduce based on their ability to maximize rewards within a population, while biological organisms reproduce and die based on internal physiological variables that depend on their resource consumption; simulation environments are primarily single-agent while the biological world is inherently multi-agent and evolves alongside the population. In this work we present a method for continuously evolving adaptive agents without any environment or population reset. The environment is a large grid world with complex spatiotemporal resource generation, containing many agents that are each controlled by an evolvable recurrent neural network and locally reproduce based on their internal physiology. The entire system is implemented in JAX, allowing very fast simulation on a GPU. We show that NE can operate in an ecologically-valid non-episodic multi-agent setting, finding sustainable collective foraging strategies in the presence of a complex interplay between ecological and evolutionary dynamics.
abstract_zh: 最近，神经进化（NE）被证明是强化学习任务中梯度下降学习的一种有竞争力的替代方案。然而，大多数NE方法和相关的模拟环境与生物进化有很大不同：环境在每一代结束时重置为初始条件，而自然环境则不断地被其​​居民修改；个体根据其在群体内最大化奖励的能力进行繁殖，而生物有机体根据取决于其资源消耗的内部生理变量进行繁殖和死亡；模拟环境主要是单智能体，而生物世界本质上是多智能体，并且与种群一起进化。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种在没有任何环境或群体重置的情况下不断进化自适应代理的方法。环境是一个具有复杂时空资源生成的大型网格世界，包含许多代理，每个代理都由可进化的循环神经网络控制，并根据其内部生理学进行本地繁殖。整个系统在 JAX 中实现，允许在 GPU 上进行非常快速的模拟。我们证明，NE 可以在生态有效的非情景多主体环境中运作，在生态和进化动力学之间存在复杂相互作用的情况下找到可持续的集体觅食策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需重置环境和种群的持续进化方法，在大型多智能体环境中模拟生态与进化动态。
AI.motivation: 现有神经进化方法与生物进化存在关键差异，如环境重置、单智能体设定等，需构建更符合生态现实的进化模型。
AI.method: 基于JAX构建复杂网格世界，智能体通过可进化的循环神经网络控制，依据内部生理状态实现局部繁殖，环境持续演化无重置。
AI.result: 验证了神经进化可在生态有效场景中运作，发现智能体在资源竞争与进化压力下形成可持续的集体觅食策略。
AI.conclusion: 非事件驱动的神经进化框架揭示了生态动态与进化机制的交互作用，为多智能体系统研究提供新视角。

authors_text: Xie Chen,Ziyang Ma,Changli Tang,Yujin Wang,Zhisheng Zheng
title: Front-End Adapter: Adapting Front-End Input of Speech based Self-Supervised Learning for Speech Recognition
title_zh: 前端适配器：适应基于语音的自监督学习的前端输入以进行语音识别
abstract: Recent years have witnessed a boom in self-supervised learning (SSL) in various areas including speech processing. Speech based SSL models present promising performance in a range of speech related tasks. However, the training of SSL models is computationally expensive and a common practice is to fine-tune a released SSL model on the specific task. It is essential to use consistent front-end input during pre-training and fine-tuning. This consistency may introduce potential issues when the optimal front-end is not the same as that used in pre-training. In this paper, we propose a simple but effective front-end adapter to address this front-end discrepancy. By minimizing the distance between the outputs of different front-ends, the filterbank feature (Fbank) can be compatible with SSL models which are pre-trained with waveform. The experiment results demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed front-end adapter on several popular SSL models for the speech recognition task.
summary: Recent years have witnessed a boom in self-supervised learning (SSL) in various areas including speech processing. Speech based SSL models present promising performance in a range of speech related tasks. However, the training of SSL models is computationally expensive and a common practice is to fine-tune a released SSL model on the specific task. It is essential to use consistent front-end input during pre-training and fine-tuning. This consistency may introduce potential issues when the optimal front-end is not the same as that used in pre-training. In this paper, we propose a simple but effective front-end adapter to address this front-end discrepancy. By minimizing the distance between the outputs of different front-ends, the filterbank feature (Fbank) can be compatible with SSL models which are pre-trained with waveform. The experiment results demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed front-end adapter on several popular SSL models for the speech recognition task.
abstract_zh: 近年来，自我监督学习（SSL）在包括语音处理在内的各个领域蓬勃发展。基于语音的 SSL 模型在一系列语音相关任务中表现出了良好的性能。然而，SSL 模型的训练在计算上是昂贵的，常见的做法是针对特定任务对已发布的 SSL 模型进行微调。在预训练和微调期间使用一致的前端输入至关重要。当最佳前端与预训练中使用的前端不同时，这种一致性可能会带来潜在的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单但有效的前端适配器来解决这种前端差异。通过最小化不同前端输出之间的距离，滤波器组功能（Fbank）可以与预先用波形训练的SSL模型兼容。实验结果证明了我们提出的前端适配器在几种流行的 SSL 模型上用于语音识别任务的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种前端适配器，解决语音自监督学习模型在预训练与微调阶段因前端输入不一致导致的兼容性问题，提升语音识别效果。
AI.motivation: SSL模型预训练与微调阶段若前端输入不一致，可能影响性能；现有方法难以有效适配不同前端特征（如Fbank与波形）的差异。
AI.method: 设计前端适配器模块，通过最小化不同前端输出特征间的距离，使Fbank特征与基于波形预训练的SSL模型兼容。
AI.result: 实验表明该适配器在多个主流SSL模型上均有效，显著提升语音识别任务的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 前端适配器能有效缓解SSL模型预训练与微调阶段的前端差异问题，为实际应用提供实用解决方案。

This consistency may introduce potential issues when the optimal front-end is not the same as that used in pre-training. By minimizing the distance between the outputs of different front-ends, the filterbank feature (Fbank) can be compatible with SSL models which are pre-trained with waveform. authors_text: Xuxin Cheng,Zhihong Zhu,Hongxiang Li,Yaowei Li,Yuexian Zou
title: SSVMR: Saliency-based Self-training for Video-Music Retrieval
title_zh: SSVMR：基于显着性的视频音乐检索自我训练
abstract: With the rise of short videos, the demand for selecting appropriate background music (BGM) for a video has increased significantly, video-music retrieval (VMR) task gradually draws much attention by research community. As other cross-modal learning tasks, existing VMR approaches usually attempt to measure the similarity between the video and music in the feature space. However, they (1) neglect the inevitable label noise; (2) neglect to enhance the ability to capture critical video clips. In this paper, we propose a novel saliency-based self-training framework, which is termed SSVMR. Specifically, we first explore to fully make use of the information containing in the training dataset by applying a semi-supervised method to suppress the adverse impact of label noise problem, where a self-training approach is adopted. In addition, we propose to capture the saliency of the video by mixing two videos at span level and preserving the locality of the two original videos. Inspired by back translation in NLP, we also conduct back retrieval to obtain more training data. Experimental results on MVD dataset show that our SSVMR achieves the state-of-the-art performance by a large margin, obtaining a relative improvement of 34.8% over the previous best model in terms of R@1.
summary: With the rise of short videos, the demand for selecting appropriate background music (BGM) for a video has increased significantly, video-music retrieval (VMR) task gradually draws much attention by research community. As other cross-modal learning tasks, existing VMR approaches usually attempt to measure the similarity between the video and music in the feature space. However, they (1) neglect the inevitable label noise; (2) neglect to enhance the ability to capture critical video clips. In this paper, we propose a novel saliency-based self-training framework, which is termed SSVMR. Specifically, we first explore to fully make use of the information containing in the training dataset by applying a semi-supervised method to suppress the adverse impact of label noise problem, where a self-training approach is adopted. In addition, we propose to capture the saliency of the video by mixing two videos at span level and preserving the locality of the two original videos. Inspired by back translation in NLP, we also conduct back retrieval to obtain more training data. Experimental results on MVD dataset show that our SSVMR achieves the state-of-the-art performance by a large margin, obtaining a relative improvement of 34.8% over the previous best model in terms of R@1.
abstract_zh: 随着短视频的兴起，为视频选择合适的背景音乐（BGM）的需求显着增加，视频音乐检索（VMR）任务逐渐受到研究界的广泛关注。与其他跨模态学习任务一样，现有的 VMR 方法通常尝试测量特征空间中视频和音乐之间的相似性。然而，他们（1）忽略了不可避免的标签噪声； (2)忽视提升关键视频片段的捕捉能力。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于显着性的自训练框架，称为 SSVMR。具体来说，我们首先探索通过应用半监督方法来充分利用训练数据集中包含的信息来抑制标签噪声问题的不利影响，其中采用自训练方法。此外，我们建议通过在跨度级别混合两个视频并保留两个原始视频的局部性来捕获视频的显着性。受到NLP中反向翻译的启发，我们还进行反向检索以获得更多的训练数据。 MVD 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的 SSVMR 大幅实现了最先进的性能，在 R@1 方面比之前的最佳模型相对提高了 34.8%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于显著性的自训练框架SSVMR，用于改进视频-音乐检索任务，通过解决标签噪声和增强关键视频片段捕捉能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视频-音乐检索方法忽视了标签噪声问题及对关键视频片段的捕捉能力不足，导致检索效果受限。
AI.method: 采用半监督自训练方法抑制标签噪声，通过跨视频片段混合保留原始视频局部性，并受自然语言处理中反向翻译启发，引入反向检索生成更多训练数据。
AI.result: 在MVD数据集上，SSVMR相较之前最佳模型在R@1指标上实现了34.8%的相对提升，达到当前最优性能。
AI.conclusion: SSVMR通过显著性增强与自训练机制有效解决了标签噪声和关键片段捕捉问题，为视频-音乐检索任务提供了新思路。

title: Transformadores: Fundamentos teoricos y Aplicaciones
title_zh: 变形金刚：理论基础和应用
comment: 48 pages, in Spanish language, 24 figures, review
comments: 48 pages, in Spanish language, 24 figures, review
abstract: Transformers are a neural network architecture originally developed for natural language processing, which have since become a foundational tool for solving a wide range of problems, including text, audio, image processing, reinforcement learning, and other tasks involving heterogeneous input data. Their hallmark is the self-attention mechanism, which allows the model to weigh different parts of the input sequence dynamically, and is an evolution of earlier attention-based approaches. This article provides readers with the necessary background to understand recent research on transformer models, and presents the mathematical and algorithmic foundations of their core components. It also explores the architecture's various elements, potential modifications, and some of the most relevant applications. The article is written in Spanish to help make this scientific knowledge more accessible to the Spanish-speaking community.
summary: Transformers are a neural network architecture originally developed for natural language processing, which have since become a foundational tool for solving a wide range of problems, including text, audio, image processing, reinforcement learning, and other tasks involving heterogeneous input data. Their hallmark is the self-attention mechanism, which allows the model to weigh different parts of the input sequence dynamically, and is an evolution of earlier attention-based approaches. This article provides readers with the necessary background to understand recent research on transformer models, and presents the mathematical and algorithmic foundations of their core components. It also explores the architecture's various elements, potential modifications, and some of the most relevant applications. The article is written in Spanish to help make this scientific knowledge more accessible to the Spanish-speaking community.
abstract_zh: Transformer 是一种最初为自然语言处理开发的神经网络架构，现已成为解决各种问题的基础工具，包括文本、音频、图像处理、强化学习以及涉及异构输入数据的其他任务。它们的标志是自注意力机制，该机制允许模型动态权衡输入序列的不同部分，并且是早期基于注意力的方法的演变。本文为读者提供了了解变压器模型最新研究的必要背景，并介绍了其核心组件的数学和算法基础。它还探讨了该架构的各种元素、潜在的修改以及一些最相关的应用程序。这篇文章是用西班牙语写的，旨在帮助西班牙语社区更容易地了解这些科学知识。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Transformer神经网络架构的理论基础及其在多领域应用，旨在为读者提供理解相关研究的背景知识。
AI.motivation: 通过西班牙语撰写并普及Transformer知识，帮助西班牙语社区更便捷地获取这一重要技术的科学信息。
AI.method: 系统阐述Transformer的数学算法基础，解析其核心组件架构、潜在改进方案及典型应用场景。
AI.result: 构建了Transformer理论知识框架，梳理了其技术演进脉络并总结了跨领域应用案例。
AI.conclusion: Transformer凭借自注意力机制成为处理异构数据的核心工具，西班牙语版本有助于促进该技术的全球化应用。

search_text: Transformadores: Fundamentos teoricos y Aplicaciones 变形金刚：理论基础和应用 Transformers are a neural network architecture originally developed for natural language processing, which have since become a foundational tool for solving a wide range of problems, including text, audio, image processing, reinforcement learning, and other tasks involving heterogeneous input data. Their hallmark is the self-attention mechanism, which allows the model to weigh different parts of the input sequence dynamically, and is an evolution of earlier attention-based approaches. This article provides readers with the necessary background to understand recent research on transformer models, and presents the mathematical and algorithmic foundations of their core components. It also explores the architecture's various elements, potential modifications, and some of the most relevant applications. The article is written in Spanish to help make this scientific knowledge more accessible to the Spanish-speaking community. Transformer 是一种最初为自然语言处理开发的神经网络架构，现已成为解决各种问题的基础工具，包括文本、音频、图像处理、强化学习以及涉及异构输入数据的其他任务。它们的标志是自注意力机制，该机制允许模型动态权衡输入序列的不同部分，并且是早期基于注意力的方法的演变。本文为读者提供了了解变压器模型最新研究的必要背景，并介绍了其核心组件的数学和算法基础。它还探讨了该架构的各种元素、潜在的修改以及一些最相关的应用程序。这篇文章是用西班牙语写的，旨在帮助西班牙语社区更容易地了解这些科学知识。 本文介绍了Transformer神经网络架构的理论基础及其在多领域应用，旨在为读者提供理解相关研究的背景知识。 Jordi de la Torre cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Hao Li,Li Li,Yunmeng Huang,Ning Li,Yongtao Zhang
title: An Adaptive Plug-and-Play Network for Few-Shot Learning
title_zh: 用于少样本学习的自适应即插即用网络
abstract: Few-shot learning (FSL) requires a model to classify new samples after learning from only a few samples. While remarkable results are achieved in existing methods, the performance of embedding and metrics determines the upper limit of classification accuracy in FSL. The bottleneck is that deep networks and complex metrics tend to induce overfitting in FSL, making it difficult to further improve the performance. Towards this, we propose plug-and-play model-adaptive resizer (MAR) and adaptive similarity metric (ASM) without any other losses. MAR retains high-resolution details to alleviate the overfitting problem caused by data scarcity, and ASM decouples the relationship between different metrics and then fuses them into an advanced one. Extensive experiments show that the proposed method could boost existing methods on two standard dataset and a fine-grained datasets, and achieve state-of-the-art results on mini-ImageNet and tiered-ImageNet.
summary: Few-shot learning (FSL) requires a model to classify new samples after learning from only a few samples. While remarkable results are achieved in existing methods, the performance of embedding and metrics determines the upper limit of classification accuracy in FSL. The bottleneck is that deep networks and complex metrics tend to induce overfitting in FSL, making it difficult to further improve the performance. Towards this, we propose plug-and-play model-adaptive resizer (MAR) and adaptive similarity metric (ASM) without any other losses. MAR retains high-resolution details to alleviate the overfitting problem caused by data scarcity, and ASM decouples the relationship between different metrics and then fuses them into an advanced one. Extensive experiments show that the proposed method could boost existing methods on two standard dataset and a fine-grained datasets, and achieve state-of-the-art results on mini-ImageNet and tiered-ImageNet.
abstract_zh: 少样本学习（FSL）需要一个模型在仅学习少数样本后对新样本进行分类。虽然现有方法取得了显着的成果，但嵌入和度量的性能决定了 FSL 分类精度的上限。瓶颈在于深层网络和复杂的指标往往会导致FSL过度拟合，从而难以进一步提高性能。为此，我们提出了即插即用模型自适应缩放器（MAR）和自适应相似性度量（ASM），没有任何其他损失。 MAR保留了高分辨率的细节，以缓解数据稀缺带来的过拟合问题，而ASM解耦了不同指标之间的关系，然后将它们融合成一种高级指标。大量实验表明，所提出的方法可以在两个标准数据集和一个细粒度数据集上增强现有方法，并在 mini-ImageNet 和 tiered-ImageNet 上取得最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应插拔式网络，通过改进嵌入和度量方法解决少样本学习中的过拟合问题，提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本学习方法受限于嵌入和度量性能，深度网络和复杂度量易导致过拟合，难以进一步提升准确率。
AI.method: 设计无需额外损失函数的模型自适应缩放器（MAR）和自适应相似度度量（ASM），MAR保留高分辨率细节，ASM解耦并融合多度量关系。
AI.result: 在两个标准数据集和一个细粒度数据集上优于现有方法，在mini-ImageNet和tiered-ImageNet达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: MAR和ASM有效缓解数据稀缺导致的过拟合问题，通过自适应模块改进度量方式，显著提升少样本学习性能。

authors_text: Bradley Butcher,Miri Zilka,Darren Cook,Jiri Hron,Adrian Weller
title: Optimising Human-Machine Collaboration for Efficient High-Precision Information Extraction from Text Documents
title_zh: 优化人机协作，从文本文档中高效高精度提取信息
abstract: While humans can extract information from unstructured text with high precision and recall, this is often too time-consuming to be practical. Automated approaches, on the other hand, produce nearly-immediate results, but may not be reliable enough for high-stakes applications where precision is essential. In this work, we consider the benefits and drawbacks of various human-only, human-machine, and machine-only information extraction approaches. We argue for the utility of a human-in-the-loop approach in applications where high precision is required, but purely manual extraction is infeasible. We present a framework and an accompanying tool for information extraction using weak-supervision labelling with human validation. We demonstrate our approach on three criminal justice datasets. We find that the combination of computer speed and human understanding yields precision comparable to manual annotation while requiring only a fraction of time, and significantly outperforms fully automated baselines in terms of precision.
summary: While humans can extract information from unstructured text with high precision and recall, this is often too time-consuming to be practical. Automated approaches, on the other hand, produce nearly-immediate results, but may not be reliable enough for high-stakes applications where precision is essential. In this work, we consider the benefits and drawbacks of various human-only, human-machine, and machine-only information extraction approaches. We argue for the utility of a human-in-the-loop approach in applications where high precision is required, but purely manual extraction is infeasible. We present a framework and an accompanying tool for information extraction using weak-supervision labelling with human validation. We demonstrate our approach on three criminal justice datasets. We find that the combination of computer speed and human understanding yields precision comparable to manual annotation while requiring only a fraction of time, and significantly outperforms fully automated baselines in terms of precision.
abstract_zh: 虽然人类可以以高精度和高召回率从非结构化文本中提取信息，但这通常太耗时而不实用。另一方面，自动化方法几乎可以立即产生结果，但对于精度至关重要的高风险应用来说可能不够可靠。在这项工作中，我们考虑了各种纯人、人机和纯机器信息提取方法的优点和缺点。我们主张人机交互方法在需要高精度的应用中的实用性，但纯手动提取是不可行的。我们提出了一个框架和一个附带的工具，用于使用弱监督标签和人工验证来提取信息。我们在三个刑事司法数据集上展示了我们的方法。我们发现，计算机速度和人类理解的结合产生了与手动注释相当的精度，同时只需要一小部分时间，并且在精度方面显着优于全自动基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合弱监督标注与人工验证的人机协作框架，用于高效实现高精度文本信息提取。
AI.motivation: 纯人工信息提取效率低，纯自动化方法精度不足，需在高精度需求场景下平衡效率与可靠性。
AI.method: 设计包含弱监督标签生成与人类验证的混合框架，并开发配套工具实现人机协作的信息提取流程。
AI.result: 在刑事司法数据集上验证显示，该方法精度接近纯人工标注，耗时仅为人工的分数之一，且显著优于全自动方法。
AI.conclusion: 人机协作模式能有效兼顾高精度需求与效率，适用于需严格精确度的文本信息提取场景。

title: Heterogeneous Graph Convolutional Neural Network via Hodge-Laplacian for Brain Functional Data
title_zh: 通过霍奇拉普拉斯算子的异构图卷积神经网络用于脑功能数据
abstract: This study proposes a novel heterogeneous graph convolutional neural network (HGCNN) to handle complex brain fMRI data at regional and across-region levels. We introduce a generic formulation of spectral filters on heterogeneous graphs by introducing the $k-th$ Hodge-Laplacian (HL) operator. In particular, we propose Laguerre polynomial approximations of HL spectral filters and prove that their spatial localization on graphs is related to the polynomial order. Furthermore, based on the bijection property of boundary operators on simplex graphs, we introduce a generic topological graph pooling (TGPool) method that can be used at any dimensional simplices. This study designs HL-node, HL-edge, and HL-HGCNN neural networks to learn signal representation at a graph node, edge levels, and both, respectively. Our experiments employ fMRI from the Adolescent Brain Cognitive Development (ABCD; n=7693) to predict general intelligence. Our results demonstrate the advantage of the HL-edge network over the HL-node network when functional brain connectivity is considered as features. The HL-HGCNN outperforms the state-of-the-art graph neural networks (GNNs) approaches, such as GAT, BrainGNN, dGCN, BrainNetCNN, and Hypergraph NN. The functional connectivity features learned from the HL-HGCNN are meaningful in interpreting neural circuits related to general intelligence.
summary: This study proposes a novel heterogeneous graph convolutional neural network (HGCNN) to handle complex brain fMRI data at regional and across-region levels. We introduce a generic formulation of spectral filters on heterogeneous graphs by introducing the $k-th$ Hodge-Laplacian (HL) operator. In particular, we propose Laguerre polynomial approximations of HL spectral filters and prove that their spatial localization on graphs is related to the polynomial order. Furthermore, based on the bijection property of boundary operators on simplex graphs, we introduce a generic topological graph pooling (TGPool) method that can be used at any dimensional simplices. This study designs HL-node, HL-edge, and HL-HGCNN neural networks to learn signal representation at a graph node, edge levels, and both, respectively. Our experiments employ fMRI from the Adolescent Brain Cognitive Development (ABCD; n=7693) to predict general intelligence. Our results demonstrate the advantage of the HL-edge network over the HL-node network when functional brain connectivity is considered as features. The HL-HGCNN outperforms the state-of-the-art graph neural networks (GNNs) approaches, such as GAT, BrainGNN, dGCN, BrainNetCNN, and Hypergraph NN. The functional connectivity features learned from the HL-HGCNN are meaningful in interpreting neural circuits related to general intelligence.
abstract_zh: 本研究提出了一种新颖的异构图卷积神经网络（HGCNN）来处理区域和跨区域级别的复杂大脑功能磁共振成像数据。我们通过引入 $k-th$ Hodge-Laplacian (HL) 算子来介绍异构图上光谱滤波器的通用公式。特别是，我们提出了 HL 谱滤波器的拉盖尔多项式近似，并证明它们在图上的空间定位与多项式阶数相关。此外，基于单纯形图上边界算子的双射性质，我们引入了一种可以在任何维单纯形上使用的通用拓扑图池（TGPool）方法。本研究设计了 HL-node、HL-edge 和 HL-HGCNN 神经网络，分别学习图节点、边缘层和两者的信号表示。我们的实验利用青少年大脑认知发展（ABCD；n=7693）的功能磁共振成像来预测一般智力。我们的结果证明了当功能性大脑连接被视为特征时，HL 边缘网络相对于 HL 节点网络的优势。 HL-HGCNN 的性能优于最先进的图神经网络 (GNN) 方法，例如 GAT、BrainGNN、dGCN、BrainNetCNN 和 Hypergraph NN。从 HL-HGCNN 中学到的功能连接特征对于解释与一般智能相关的神经回路是有意义的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于霍奇拉普拉斯算子的异构图卷积神经网络（HGCNN），用于分析脑功能磁共振成像（fMRI）数据，以预测一般智力并解释神经回路。
AI.motivation: 现有图神经网络（GNN）在处理脑功能连接的复杂性和多尺度特征时存在局限，需开发能同时捕捉节点与边级特征的新型方法。
AI.method: 引入k阶霍奇拉普拉斯算子构建谱滤波器，采用拉盖尔多项式逼近并证明其空间局部性；设计拓扑图池化（TGPool）方法，构建HL-node、HL-edge和HL-HGCNN网络以学习节点、边及多尺度特征。
AI.result: 在ABCD数据集（n=7693）上，HL-edge网络在功能连接特征预测中优于HL-node网络，HL-HGCNN在准确率上超越GAT、BrainGNN等主流方法，且提取的特征与一般智力相关神经回路具有可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 霍奇拉普拉斯驱动的异构图卷积网络有效提升了脑功能数据的建模能力，为解析智力相关的神经机制提供了新工具。

search_text: Heterogeneous Graph Convolutional Neural Network via Hodge-Laplacian for Brain Functional Data 通过霍奇拉普拉斯算子的异构图卷积神经网络用于脑功能数据 This study proposes a novel heterogeneous graph convolutional neural network (HGCNN) to handle complex brain fMRI data at regional and across-region levels. We introduce a generic formulation of spectral filters on heterogeneous graphs by introducing the $k-th$ Hodge-Laplacian (HL) operator. In particular, we propose Laguerre polynomial approximations of HL spectral filters and prove that their spatial localization on graphs is related to the polynomial order. Furthermore, based on the bijection property of boundary operators on simplex graphs, we introduce a generic topological graph pooling (TGPool) method that can be used at any dimensional simplices. This study designs HL-node, HL-edge, and HL-HGCNN neural networks to learn signal representation at a graph node, edge levels, and both, respectively. Our experiments employ fMRI from the Adolescent Brain Cognitive Development (ABCD; n=7693) to predict general intelligence. Our results demonstrate the advantage of the HL-edge network over the HL-node network when functional brain connectivity is considered as features. The HL-HGCNN outperforms the state-of-the-art graph neural networks (GNNs) approaches, such as GAT, BrainGNN, dGCN, BrainNetCNN, and Hypergraph NN. The functional connectivity features learned from the HL-HGCNN are meaningful in interpreting neural circuits related to general intelligence. 本研究提出了一种新颖的异构图卷积神经网络（HGCNN）来处理区域和跨区域级别的复杂大脑功能磁共振成像数据。我们通过引入 $k-th$ Hodge-Laplacian (HL) 算子来介绍异构图上光谱滤波器的通用公式。特别是，我们提出了 HL 谱滤波器的拉盖尔多项式近似，并证明它们在图上的空间定位与多项式阶数相关。此外，基于单纯形图上边界算子的双射性质，我们引入了一种可以在任何维单纯形上使用的通用拓扑图池（TGPool）方法。本研究设计了 HL-node、HL-edge 和 HL-HGCNN 神经网络，分别学习图节点、边缘层和两者的信号表示。我们的实验利用青少年大脑认知发展（ABCD；n=7693）的功能磁共振成像来预测一般智力。我们的结果证明了当功能性大脑连接被视为特征时，HL 边缘网络相对于 HL 节点网络的优势。 HL-HGCNN 的性能优于最先进的图神经网络 (GNN) 方法，例如 GAT、BrainGNN、dGCN、BrainNetCNN 和 Hypergraph NN。从 HL-HGCNN 中学到的功能连接特征对于解释与一般智能相关的神经回路是有意义的。 本文提出一种基于霍奇拉普拉斯算子的异构图卷积神经网络（HGCNN），用于分析脑功能磁共振成像（fMRI）数据，以预测一般智力并解释神经回路。 Jinghan Huang,Moo K. Chung,Anqi Qiu cs.CV

title: Optimization of Cartesian Tasks with Configuration Selection
title_zh: 通过配置选择优化笛卡尔任务
comment: 8 pages, 2nd IMA Conference on Mathematics of Robotics, 2021
comments: 8 pages, 2nd IMA Conference on Mathematics of Robotics, 2021
abstract: A basic task in the design of an industrial robot application is the relative placement of robot and workpiece. Process points are defined in Cartesian coordinates relative to the workpiece coordinate system, and the workpiece has to be located such that the robot can reach all points. Finding such a location is still an iterative procedure based on the developers' intuition. One difficulty is the choice of one of the several solutions of the backward transform of a typical 6R robot. % combined with the limited range of the axes. We present a novel algorithm that simultaneously optimizes the workpiece location and the robot configuration at all process points using higher order optimization algorithms. A key ingredient is the extension of the robot with a virtual prismatic axis. The practical feasibility of the approach is shown with an example using a commercial industrial robot.
summary: A basic task in the design of an industrial robot application is the relative placement of robot and workpiece. Process points are defined in Cartesian coordinates relative to the workpiece coordinate system, and the workpiece has to be located such that the robot can reach all points. Finding such a location is still an iterative procedure based on the developers' intuition. One difficulty is the choice of one of the several solutions of the backward transform of a typical 6R robot. % combined with the limited range of the axes. We present a novel algorithm that simultaneously optimizes the workpiece location and the robot configuration at all process points using higher order optimization algorithms. A key ingredient is the extension of the robot with a virtual prismatic axis. The practical feasibility of the approach is shown with an example using a commercial industrial robot.
abstract_zh: 工业机器人应用设计的一项基本任务是机器人和工件的相对放置。工艺点是在相对于工件坐标系的笛卡尔坐标中定义的，并且必须定位工件以使机器人可以到达所有点。寻找这样的位置仍然是一个基于开发人员直觉的迭代过程。一个困难是选择典型 6R 机器人后向变换的几种解决方案之一。 % 与轴的有限范围相结合。我们提出了一种新颖的算法，该算法使用高阶优化算法同时优化所有工艺点的工件位置和机器人配置。一个关键因素是机器人具有虚拟棱柱轴的延伸。通过使用商用工业机器人的示例展示了该方法的实际可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种优化工业机器人应用中工件定位与机器人配置选择的算法，以确保机器人能高效完成笛卡尔坐标任务。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖开发者的直觉进行工件定位和机器人配置选择，存在效率低、易出错的问题，尤其在处理6R机器人反向变换多解选择时困难较大。
AI.method: 通过引入虚拟棱柱轴扩展机器人模型，并采用高阶优化算法，同时优化工件位置与机器人配置，解决多解选择难题。
AI.result: 以商业工业机器人为例验证了该方法的可行性，展示了其在实际应用中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为工业机器人任务规划提供了系统化解决方案，提升了工件定位与配置选择的效率与准确性。

authors_text: Feisha Hu,Qi Wang,Haijian Shao,Shang Gao,Hualong Yu
title: Anomaly Detection of UAV State Data Based on Single-class Triangular Global Alignment Kernel Extreme Learning Machine
title_zh: 基于单类三角全局对准核极限学习机的无人机状态数据异常检测
abstract: Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) are widely used and meet many demands in military and civilian fields. With the continuous enrichment and extensive expansion of application scenarios, the safety of UAVs is constantly being challenged. To address this challenge, we propose algorithms to detect anomalous data collected from drones to improve drone safety. We deployed a one-class kernel extreme learning machine (OCKELM) to detect anomalies in drone data. By default, OCKELM uses the radial basis (RBF) kernel function as the kernel function of the model. To improve the performance of OCKELM, we choose a Triangular Global Alignment Kernel (TGAK) instead of an RBF Kernel and introduce the Fast Independent Component Analysis (FastICA) algorithm to reconstruct UAV data. Based on the above improvements, we create a novel anomaly detection strategy FastICA-TGAK-OCELM. The method is finally validated on the UCI dataset and detected on the Aeronautical Laboratory Failures and Anomalies (ALFA) dataset. The experimental results show that compared with other methods, the accuracy of this method is improved by more than 30%, and point anomalies are effectively detected.
summary: Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) are widely used and meet many demands in military and civilian fields. With the continuous enrichment and extensive expansion of application scenarios, the safety of UAVs is constantly being challenged. To address this challenge, we propose algorithms to detect anomalous data collected from drones to improve drone safety. We deployed a one-class kernel extreme learning machine (OCKELM) to detect anomalies in drone data. By default, OCKELM uses the radial basis (RBF) kernel function as the kernel function of the model. To improve the performance of OCKELM, we choose a Triangular Global Alignment Kernel (TGAK) instead of an RBF Kernel and introduce the Fast Independent Component Analysis (FastICA) algorithm to reconstruct UAV data. Based on the above improvements, we create a novel anomaly detection strategy FastICA-TGAK-OCELM. The method is finally validated on the UCI dataset and detected on the Aeronautical Laboratory Failures and Anomalies (ALFA) dataset. The experimental results show that compared with other methods, the accuracy of this method is improved by more than 30%, and point anomalies are effectively detected.
abstract_zh: 无人机（UAV）应用广泛，满足军事和民用领域的多种需求。随着应用场景的不断丰富和广泛拓展，无人机的安全性不断受到挑战。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了检测从无人机收集的异常数据的算法，以提高无人机的安全性。我们部署了一级内核极限学习机 (OCKELM) 来检测无人机数据中的异常情况。默认情况下，OCKELM 使用径向基（RBF）核函数作为模型的核函数。为了提高 OCKELM 的性能，我们选择三角全局对齐核（TGAK）代替 RBF 核，并引入快速独立分量分析（FastICA）算法来重建无人机数据。基于上述改进，我们创建了一种新颖的异常检测策略FastICA-TGAK-OCELM。该方法最终在 UCI 数据集上得到验证，并在航空实验室故障和异常 (ALFA) 数据集上进行检测。实验结果表明，与其他方法相比，该方法准确率提高了30%以上，有效检测出点异常。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于单类三角全局对齐核极限学习机（FastICA-TGAK-OCELM）的无人机状态数据异常检测方法，以提升无人机安全性。
AI.motivation: 随着无人机应用场景的扩展，其安全面临挑战。传统异常检测方法在复杂数据下表现不足，需改进模型以提高检测精度。
AI.method: 采用三角全局对齐核（TGAK）替代传统径向基核（RBF），结合快速独立成分分析（FastICA）重构数据，构建FastICA-TGAK-OCELM算法。
AI.result: 在UCI和ALFA数据集上实验表明，该方法准确率提升超30%，有效检测点异常。
AI.conclusion: 新方法在无人机异常检测中表现优异，为实际应用提供了可行的技术方案。

ai_content.result: 在UCI和ALFA数据集上实验表明，该方法准确率提升超30%，有效检测点异常。

search_text: Anomaly Detection of UAV State Data Based on Single-class Triangular Global Alignment Kernel Extreme Learning Machine 基于单类三角全局对准核极限学习机的无人机状态数据异常检测 Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) are widely used and meet many demands in military and civilian fields. With the continuous enrichment and extensive expansion of application scenarios, the safety of UAVs is constantly being challenged. To address this challenge, we propose algorithms to detect anomalous data collected from drones to improve drone safety. We deployed a one-class kernel extreme learning machine (OCKELM) to detect anomalies in drone data. By default, OCKELM uses the radial basis (RBF) kernel function as the kernel function of the model. To improve the performance of OCKELM, we choose a Triangular Global Alignment Kernel (TGAK) instead of an RBF Kernel and introduce the Fast Independent Component Analysis (FastICA) algorithm to reconstruct UAV data. Based on the above improvements, we create a novel anomaly detection strategy FastICA-TGAK-OCELM. The method is finally validated on the UCI dataset and detected on the Aeronautical Laboratory Failures and Anomalies (ALFA) dataset. The experimental results show that compared with other methods, the accuracy of this method is improved by more than 30%, and point anomalies are effectively detected. 无人机（UAV）应用广泛，满足军事和民用领域的多种需求。随着应用场景的不断丰富和广泛拓展，无人机的安全性不断受到挑战。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了检测从无人机收集的异常数据的算法，以提高无人机的安全性。我们部署了一级内核极限学习机 (OCKELM) 来检测无人机数据中的异常情况。默认情况下，OCKELM 使用径向基（RBF）核函数作为模型的核函数。为了提高 OCKELM 的性能，我们选择三角全局对齐核（TGAK）代替 RBF 核，并引入快速独立分量分析（FastICA）算法来重建无人机数据。基于上述改进，我们创建了一种新颖的异常检测策略FastICA-TGAK-OCELM。该方法最终在 UCI 数据集上得到验证，并在航空实验室故障和异常 (ALFA) 数据集上进行检测。实验结果表明，与其他方法相比，该方法准确率提高了30%以上，有效检测出点异常。 本文提出一种基于单类三角全局对齐核极限学习机（FastICA-TGAK-OCELM）的无人机状态数据异常检测方法，以提升无人机安全性。 Feisha Hu,Qi Wang,Haijian Shao,Shang Gao,Hualong Yu cs.AI

authors_text: Astrid Carolus,Martin Koch,Samantha Straka,Marc Erich Latoschik,Carolin Wienrich
title: MAILS -- Meta AI Literacy Scale: Development and Testing of an AI Literacy Questionnaire Based on Well-Founded Competency Models and Psychological Change- and Meta-Competencies
title_zh: MAILS——元人工智能素养量表：基于完善的能力模型以及心理变化和元能力的人工智能素养问卷的开发和测试
abstract: The goal of the present paper is to develop and validate a questionnaire to assess AI literacy. In particular, the questionnaire should be deeply grounded in the existing literature on AI literacy, should be modular (i.e., including different facets that can be used independently of each other) to be flexibly applicable in professional life depending on the goals and use cases, and should meet psychological requirements and thus includes further psychological competencies in addition to the typical facets of AIL. We derived 60 items to represent different facets of AI Literacy according to Ng and colleagues conceptualisation of AI literacy and additional 12 items to represent psychological competencies such as problem solving, learning, and emotion regulation in regard to AI. For this purpose, data were collected online from 300 German-speaking adults. The items were tested for factorial structure in confirmatory factor analyses. The result is a measurement instrument that measures AI literacy with the facets Use & apply AI, Understand AI, Detect AI, and AI Ethics and the ability to Create AI as a separate construct, and AI Self-efficacy in learning and problem solving and AI Self-management. This study contributes to the research on AI literacy by providing a measurement instrument relying on profound competency models. In addition, higher-order psychological competencies are included that are particularly important in the context of pervasive change through AI systems.
summary: The goal of the present paper is to develop and validate a questionnaire to assess AI literacy. In particular, the questionnaire should be deeply grounded in the existing literature on AI literacy, should be modular (i.e., including different facets that can be used independently of each other) to be flexibly applicable in professional life depending on the goals and use cases, and should meet psychological requirements and thus includes further psychological competencies in addition to the typical facets of AIL. We derived 60 items to represent different facets of AI Literacy according to Ng and colleagues conceptualisation of AI literacy and additional 12 items to represent psychological competencies such as problem solving, learning, and emotion regulation in regard to AI. For this purpose, data were collected online from 300 German-speaking adults. The items were tested for factorial structure in confirmatory factor analyses. The result is a measurement instrument that measures AI literacy with the facets Use & apply AI, Understand AI, Detect AI, and AI Ethics and the ability to Create AI as a separate construct, and AI Self-efficacy in learning and problem solving and AI Self-management. This study contributes to the research on AI literacy by providing a measurement instrument relying on profound competency models. In addition, higher-order psychological competencies are included that are particularly important in the context of pervasive change through AI systems.
abstract_zh: 本文的目标是开发并验证一份评估人工智能素养的调查问卷。特别是，调查问卷应深深植根于现有的人工智能素养文献，应该是模块化的（即包括可以相互独立使用的不同方面），以便根据目标和用例灵活地应用于职业生活，并且应该满足心理要求，从而除了AIL的典型方面之外还包括进一步的心理能力。根据 Ng 及其同事对人工智能素养的概念化，我们得出了 60 个项目来代表人工智能素养的不同方面，另外还有 12 个项目来代表心理能力，例如与人工智能相关的问题解决、学习和情绪调节。为此，我们在线收集了 300 名德语成年人的数据。在验证性因子分析中测试了这些项目的因子结构。其结果是一个测量工具，可以通过使用和应用人工智能、理解人工智能、检测人工智能和人工智能道德以及将人工智能创建为单独结构的能力、人工智能学习和解决问题的自我效能以及人工智能自我管理等方面来衡量人工智能素养。这项研究通过提供依赖于深刻能力模型的测量工具，为人工智能素养的研究做出了贡献。此外，还包括高阶心理能力，这在人工智能系统普遍变化的背景下尤为重要。

AI.tldr: 开发并验证一个基于现有文献和心理能力模型的AI素养问卷（MAILS），包含多个可独立使用的模块。
AI.motivation: 现有AI素养评估工具缺乏模块化设计和心理能力整合，需开发符合专业场景需求且具备心理适应性的测量工具。
AI.method: 基于Ng等人的AI素养框架及心理能力模型，设计60个核心素养条目和12个心理能力条目，通过在线调查收集300名德语使用者数据，采用验证性因子分析检验结构效度。
AI.result: 形成包含使用AI、理解AI、检测AI、AI伦理、AI创作能力及自我效能感等维度的测量工具，验证了其心理测量学特性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提供了首个整合心理适应性能力的AI素养测评工具，为AI时代的能力评估提供了理论与实践框架。

authors_text: Jinming Ma,Feng Wu,Yingfeng Chen,Xianpeng Ji,Yu Ding
title: Effective Multimodal Reinforcement Learning with Modality Alignment and Importance Enhancement
title_zh: 具有模态对齐和重要性增强的有效多模态强化学习
comment: 10 pages, 12 figures, This article is an extended version of the Extended Abstract accepted by the International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multi-Agent Systems (AAMAS-2022)
comments: 10 pages, 12 figures, This article is an extended version of the Extended Abstract accepted by the International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multi-Agent Systems (AAMAS-2022)
abstract: Many real-world applications require an agent to make robust and deliberate decisions with multimodal information (e.g., robots with multi-sensory inputs). However, it is very challenging to train the agent via reinforcement learning (RL) due to the heterogeneity and dynamic importance of different modalities. Specifically, we observe that these issues make conventional RL methods difficult to learn a useful state representation in the end-to-end training with multimodal information. To address this, we propose a novel multimodal RL approach that can do multimodal alignment and importance enhancement according to their similarity and importance in terms of RL tasks respectively. By doing so, we are able to learn an effective state representation and consequentially improve the RL training process. We test our approach on several multimodal RL domains, showing that it outperforms state-of-the-art methods in terms of learning speed and policy quality.
summary: Many real-world applications require an agent to make robust and deliberate decisions with multimodal information (e.g., robots with multi-sensory inputs). However, it is very challenging to train the agent via reinforcement learning (RL) due to the heterogeneity and dynamic importance of different modalities. Specifically, we observe that these issues make conventional RL methods difficult to learn a useful state representation in the end-to-end training with multimodal information. To address this, we propose a novel multimodal RL approach that can do multimodal alignment and importance enhancement according to their similarity and importance in terms of RL tasks respectively. By doing so, we are able to learn an effective state representation and consequentially improve the RL training process. We test our approach on several multimodal RL domains, showing that it outperforms state-of-the-art methods in terms of learning speed and policy quality.
abstract_zh: 许多现实世界的应用程序需要代理利用多模式信息做出稳健且深思熟虑的决策（例如具有多感官输入的机器人）。然而，由于不同模态的异质性和动态重要性，通过强化学习（RL）来训练智能体非常具有挑战性。具体来说，我们观察到这些问题使得传统的强化学习方法很难在多模态信息的端到端训练中学习有用的状态表示。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的多模态 RL 方法，该方法可以根据 RL 任务的相似性和重要性分别进行多模态对齐和重要性增强。通过这样做，我们能够学习有效的状态表示，从而改进 RL 训练过程。我们在多个多模态 RL 领域测试了我们的方法，结果表明它在学习速度和策略质量方面优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态强化学习方法，通过模态对齐和重要性增强解决多模态信息异构性和动态重要性带来的状态表示学习难题。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习方法在处理多模态信息时，因模态异构性和动态重要性难以学习有效的状态表示，导致决策性能不足。
AI.method: 设计多模态对齐机制与重要性增强模块，根据模态相似性及任务重要性动态调整信息融合权重，优化状态表示学习过程。
AI.result: 在多个多模态RL基准测试中，该方法在学习速度和策略质量指标上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过模态对齐与重要性增强的联合优化，有效提升了多模态强化学习的训练效率与决策质量。
