To address this, we propose a novel multimodal RL approach that can do multimodal alignment and importance enhancement according to their similarity and importance in terms of RL tasks respectively. By doing so, we are able to learn an effective state representation and consequentially improve the RL training process. We test our approach on several multimodal RL domains, showing that it outperforms state-of-the-art methods in terms of learning speed and policy quality. 许多现实世界的应用程序需要代理利用多模式信息做出稳健且深思熟虑的决策（例如具有多感官输入的机器人）。然而，由于不同模态的异质性和动态重要性，通过强化学习（RL）来训练智能体非常具有挑战性。具体来说，我们观察到这些问题使得传统的强化学习方法很难在多模态信息的端到端训练中学习有用的状态表示。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的多模态 RL 方法，该方法可以根据 RL 任务的相似性和重要性分别进行多模态对齐和重要性增强。通过这样做，我们能够学习有效的状态表示，从而改进 RL 训练过程。我们在多个多模态 RL 领域测试了我们的方法，结果表明它在学习速度和策略质量方面优于最先进的方法。 本文提出一种多模态强化学习方法，通过模态对齐和重要性增强解决多模态信息异构性和动态重要性带来的状态表示学习难题。 Jinming Ma,Feng Wu,Yingfeng Chen,Xianpeng Ji,Yu Ding cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Sungheon Park,Minjung Son,Seokhwan Jang,Young Chun Ahn,Ji-Yeon Kim,Nahyup Kang
title: Temporal Interpolation Is All You Need for Dynamic Neural Radiance Fields
title_zh: 动态神经辐射场只需要时间插值即可
abstract: Temporal interpolation often plays a crucial role to learn meaningful representations in dynamic scenes. In this paper, we propose a novel method to train spatiotemporal neural radiance fields of dynamic scenes based on temporal interpolation of feature vectors. Two feature interpolation methods are suggested depending on underlying representations, neural networks or grids. In the neural representation, we extract features from space-time inputs via multiple neural network modules and interpolate them based on time frames. The proposed multi-level feature interpolation network effectively captures features of both short-term and long-term time ranges. In the grid representation, space-time features are learned via four-dimensional hash grids, which remarkably reduces training time. The grid representation shows more than 100 times faster training speed than the previous neural-net-based methods while maintaining the rendering quality. Concatenating static and dynamic features and adding a simple smoothness term further improve the performance of our proposed models. Despite the simplicity of the model architectures, our method achieved state-of-the-art performance both in rendering quality for the neural representation and in training speed for the grid representation.
summary: Temporal interpolation often plays a crucial role to learn meaningful representations in dynamic scenes. In this paper, we propose a novel method to train spatiotemporal neural radiance fields of dynamic scenes based on temporal interpolation of feature vectors. Two feature interpolation methods are suggested depending on underlying representations, neural networks or grids. In the neural representation, we extract features from space-time inputs via multiple neural network modules and interpolate them based on time frames. The proposed multi-level feature interpolation network effectively captures features of both short-term and long-term time ranges. In the grid representation, space-time features are learned via four-dimensional hash grids, which remarkably reduces training time. The grid representation shows more than 100 times faster training speed than the previous neural-net-based methods while maintaining the rendering quality. Concatenating static and dynamic features and adding a simple smoothness term further improve the performance of our proposed models. Despite the simplicity of the model architectures, our method achieved state-of-the-art performance both in rendering quality for the neural representation and in training speed for the grid representation.
abstract_zh: 时间插值通常在学习动态场景中有意义的表示方面发挥着至关重要的作用。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于特征向量的时间插值来训练动态场景的时空神经辐射场的新方法。根据底层表示、神经网络或网格，建议使用两种特征插值方法。在神经表示中，我们通过多个神经网络模块从时空输入中提取特征，并根据时间帧对它们进行插值。所提出的多级特征插值网络有效地捕获短期和长期时间范围的特征。在网格表示中，时空特征是通过四维哈希网格学习的，这显着减少了训练时间。网格表示的训练速度比以前基于神经网络的方法快 100 倍以上，同时保持渲染质量。连接静态和动态特征并添加简单的平滑项进一步提高了我们提出的模型的性能。尽管模型架构很简单，但我们的方法在神经表示的渲染质量和网格表示的训练速度方面都实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时间插值的动态神经辐射场训练方法，通过时空特征插值提升动态场景的渲染质量与训练效率。
AI.motivation: 动态场景建模需平衡渲染质量与训练速度，传统方法在复杂时序建模或计算效率上存在不足，需探索更高效的时间插值策略。
AI.method: 提出两种时空特征插值方法：神经网络表示通过多级模块提取时空特征并进行时间插值；网格表示采用四维哈希网格学习时空特征，结合静态动态特征与平滑项优化模型。
AI.result: 神经网络表示在渲染质量上达到SOTA，网格表示训练速度较传统方法快100倍以上，且保持高质量渲染效果。
AI.conclusion: 时间插值机制有效捕捉动态特征，网格表示显著提升计算效率，简单架构实现高质量与高效训练的双重突破。

title: On Handling Catastrophic Forgetting for Incremental Learning of Human Physical Activity on the Edge
title_zh: 关于边缘人类体力活动增量学习的灾难性遗忘处理
comment: Accepted by EDBT'23 - Industrial & Application track
comments: Accepted by EDBT'23 - Industrial & Application track
abstract: Human activity recognition (HAR) has been a classic research problem. In particular, with recent machine learning (ML) techniques, the recognition task has been largely investigated by companies and integrated into their products for customers. However, most of them apply a predefined activity set and conduct the learning process on the cloud, hindering specific personalizations from end users (i.e., edge devices). Even though recent progress in Incremental Learning allows learning new-class data on the fly, the learning process is generally conducted on the cloud, requiring constant data exchange between cloud and edge devices, thus leading to data privacy issues. In this paper, we propose PILOTE, which pushes the incremental learning process to the extreme edge, while providing reliable data privacy and practical utility, e.g., low processing latency, personalization, etc. In particular, we consider the practical challenge of extremely limited data during the incremental learning process on edge, where catastrophic forgetting is required to be handled in a practical way. We validate PILOTE with extensive experiments on human activity data collected from mobile sensors. The results show PILOTE can work on edge devices with extremely limited resources while providing reliable performance.
summary: Human activity recognition (HAR) has been a classic research problem. In particular, with recent machine learning (ML) techniques, the recognition task has been largely investigated by companies and integrated into their products for customers. However, most of them apply a predefined activity set and conduct the learning process on the cloud, hindering specific personalizations from end users (i.e., edge devices). Even though recent progress in Incremental Learning allows learning new-class data on the fly, the learning process is generally conducted on the cloud, requiring constant data exchange between cloud and edge devices, thus leading to data privacy issues. In this paper, we propose PILOTE, which pushes the incremental learning process to the extreme edge, while providing reliable data privacy and practical utility, e.g., low processing latency, personalization, etc. In particular, we consider the practical challenge of extremely limited data during the incremental learning process on edge, where catastrophic forgetting is required to be handled in a practical way. We validate PILOTE with extensive experiments on human activity data collected from mobile sensors. The results show PILOTE can work on edge devices with extremely limited resources while providing reliable performance.
abstract_zh: 人类活动识别（HAR）一直是一个经典的研究问题。特别是，随着最近的机器学习（ML）技术的发展，识别任务已被公司广泛研究并集成到其为客户提供的产品中。然而，它们中的大多数应用预定义的活动集并在云上进行学习过程，阻碍了最终用户（即边缘设备）的特定个性化。尽管增量学习的最新进展允许动态学习新类别的数据，但学习过程通常在云端进行，需要云端和边缘设备之间不断交换数据，从而导致数据隐私问题。在本文中，我们提出了PILOTE，它将增量学习过程推向极限，同时提供可靠的数据隐私和实用性，例如低处理延迟、个性化等。特别是，我们考虑了边缘增量学习过程中数据极其有限的实际挑战，需要以实用的方式处理灾难性遗忘。我们通过对从移动传感器收集的人类活动数据进行大量实验来验证 PILOTE。结果表明，PILOTE 可以在资源极其有限的边缘设备上工作，同时提供可靠的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为PILOTE的方法，在边缘设备上处理增量学习中的灾难性遗忘问题，实现对人类体力活动的个性化识别。
AI.motivation: 现有活动识别系统依赖云端预定义活动集，导致数据隐私泄露和用户个性化不足，需在边缘设备上实现增量学习以解决隐私和实时性问题。
AI.method: 设计边缘端增量学习框架PILOTE，结合有限数据下的灾难性遗忘处理机制，利用移动传感器数据进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明PILOTE可在资源受限的边缘设备上运行，保持可靠性能，有效处理增量学习中的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.conclusion: PILOTE为边缘设备上的增量活动识别提供了隐私保护和低延迟的实用解决方案，验证了其在资源受限场景下的有效性。

title: StyleAdv: Meta Style Adversarial Training for Cross-Domain Few-Shot Learning
title_zh: StyleAdv：跨域少样本学习的元风格对抗训练
abstract: Cross-Domain Few-Shot Learning (CD-FSL) is a recently emerging task that tackles few-shot learning across different domains. It aims at transferring prior knowledge learned on the source dataset to novel target datasets. The CD-FSL task is especially challenged by the huge domain gap between different datasets. Critically, such a domain gap actually comes from the changes of visual styles, and wave-SAN empirically shows that spanning the style distribution of the source data helps alleviate this issue. However, wave-SAN simply swaps styles of two images. Such a vanilla operation makes the generated styles ``real'' and ``easy'', which still fall into the original set of the source styles. Thus, inspired by vanilla adversarial learning, a novel model-agnostic meta Style Adversarial training (StyleAdv) method together with a novel style adversarial attack method is proposed for CD-FSL. Particularly, our style attack method synthesizes both ``virtual'' and ``hard'' adversarial styles for model training. This is achieved by perturbing the original style with the signed style gradients. By continually attacking styles and forcing the model to recognize these challenging adversarial styles, our model is gradually robust to the visual styles, thus boosting the generalization ability for novel target datasets. Besides the typical CNN-based backbone, we also employ our StyleAdv method on large-scale pretrained vision transformer. Extensive experiments conducted on eight various target datasets show the effectiveness of our method. Whether built upon ResNet or ViT, we achieve the new state of the art for CD-FSL. Code is available at https://github.com/lovelyqian/StyleAdv-CDFSL.
summary: Cross-Domain Few-Shot Learning (CD-FSL) is a recently emerging task that tackles few-shot learning across different domains. It aims at transferring prior knowledge learned on the source dataset to novel target datasets. The CD-FSL task is especially challenged by the huge domain gap between different datasets. Critically, such a domain gap actually comes from the changes of visual styles, and wave-SAN empirically shows that spanning the style distribution of the source data helps alleviate this issue. However, wave-SAN simply swaps styles of two images. Such a vanilla operation makes the generated styles ``real'' and ``easy'', which still fall into the original set of the source styles. Thus, inspired by vanilla adversarial learning, a novel model-agnostic meta Style Adversarial training (StyleAdv) method together with a novel style adversarial attack method is proposed for CD-FSL. Particularly, our style attack method synthesizes both ``virtual'' and ``hard'' adversarial styles for model training. This is achieved by perturbing the original style with the signed style gradients. By continually attacking styles and forcing the model to recognize these challenging adversarial styles, our model is gradually robust to the visual styles, thus boosting the generalization ability for novel target datasets. Besides the typical CNN-based backbone, we also employ our StyleAdv method on large-scale pretrained vision transformer. Extensive experiments conducted on eight various target datasets show the effectiveness of our method. Whether built upon ResNet or ViT, we achieve the new state of the art for CD-FSL. Code is available at https://github.com/lovelyqian/StyleAdv-CDFSL.
abstract_zh: 跨域少样本学习（CD-FSL）是最近出现的一项任务，旨在解决跨不同领域的少样本学习问题。它的目的是将源数据集上学到的先验知识转移到新的目标数据集上。 CD-FSL 任务尤其受到不同数据集之间巨大域差距的挑战。重要的是，这种领域差距实际上来自视觉风格的变化，wave-SAN 的经验表明，跨越源数据的风格分布有助于缓解这个问题。然而，wave-SAN 只是交换两个图像的样式。这样的普通操作使得生成的样式“真实”和“简单”，它们仍然属于原始的源样式集。因此，受普通对抗性学习的启发，针对 CD-FSL 提出了一种新颖的模型不可知元风格对抗训练（StyleAdv）方法以及新颖的对抗性攻击方法。特别是，我们的风格攻击方法综合了“虚拟”和“硬”对抗风格来进行模型训练。这是通过使用带符号的样式渐变扰动原始样式来实现的。通过不断攻击风格并迫使模型识别这些具有挑战性的对抗风格，我们的模型逐渐对视觉风格具有鲁棒性，从而提高了新目标数据集的泛化能力。除了典型的基于 CNN 的主干网之外，我们还在大规模预训练视觉 Transformer 上采用了 StyleAdv 方法。对八个不同目标数据集进行的广泛实验表明了我们方法的有效性。无论是基于 ResNet 还是 ViT，我们都实现了 CD-FSL 的最新技术水平。代码可在 https://github.com/lovelyqian/StyleAdv-CDFSL 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出StyleAdv方法，通过元风格对抗训练解决跨域少样本学习（CD-FSL）中的领域差异问题，提升模型在新型目标数据集上的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如wave-SAN仅简单交换图像风格，生成的风格仍局限于源域风格分布，无法有效缓解跨域风格差异带来的挑战。
AI.method: 设计模型无关的元风格对抗训练（StyleAdv），通过扰动源域风格生成对抗性风格（包括虚拟和困难样本），强制模型识别这些挑战性风格以增强鲁棒性，并应用于ResNet和ViT架构。
AI.result: 在八个不同目标数据集上实验表明，无论基于ResNet还是ViT，StyleAdv均达到CD-FSL任务的新状态-of-the-art性能。
AI.conclusion: StyleAdv通过对抗性风格训练有效提升模型对视觉风格的鲁棒性，为跨域少样本学习提供了通用且高效的新方法。

search_text: StyleAdv: Meta Style Adversarial Training for Cross-Domain Few-Shot Learning StyleAdv：跨域少样本学习的元风格对抗训练 Cross-Domain Few-Shot Learning (CD-FSL) is a recently emerging task that tackles few-shot learning across different domains. It aims at transferring prior knowledge learned on the source dataset to novel target datasets. The CD-FSL task is especially challenged by the huge domain gap between different datasets. Critically, such a domain gap actually comes from the changes of visual styles, and wave-SAN empirically shows that spanning the style distribution of the source data helps alleviate this issue. However, wave-SAN simply swaps styles of two images. Such a vanilla operation makes the generated styles ``real'' and ``easy'', which still fall into the original set of the source styles. Thus, inspired by vanilla adversarial learning, a novel model-agnostic meta Style Adversarial training (StyleAdv) method together with a novel style adversarial attack method is proposed for CD-FSL. Particularly, our style attack method synthesizes both ``virtual'' and ``hard'' adversarial styles for model training. This is achieved by perturbing the original style with the signed style gradients. By continually attacking styles and forcing the model to recognize these challenging adversarial styles, our model is gradually robust to the visual styles, thus boosting the generalization ability for novel target datasets. Besides the typical CNN-based backbone, we also employ our StyleAdv method on large-scale pretrained vision transformer. Extensive experiments conducted on eight various target datasets show the effectiveness of our method. Whether built upon ResNet or ViT, we achieve the new state of the art for CD-FSL. Code is available at https://github.com/lovelyqian/StyleAdv-CDFSL. 跨域少样本学习（CD-FSL）是最近出现的一项任务，旨在解决跨不同领域的少样本学习问题。它的目的是将源数据集上学到的先验知识转移到新的目标数据集上。 CD-FSL 任务尤其受到不同数据集之间巨大域差距的挑战。重要的是，这种领域差距实际上来自视觉风格的变化，wave-SAN 的经验表明，跨越源数据的风格分布有助于缓解这个问题。然而，wave-SAN 只是交换两个图像的样式。这样的普通操作使得生成的样式“真实”和“简单”，它们仍然属于原始的源样式集。因此，受普通对抗性学习的启发，针对 CD-FSL 提出了一种新颖的模型不可知元风格对抗训练（StyleAdv）方法以及新颖的对抗性攻击方法。特别是，我们的风格攻击方法综合了“虚拟”和“硬”对抗风格来进行模型训练。这是通过使用带符号的样式渐变扰动原始样式来实现的。通过不断攻击风格并迫使模型识别这些具有挑战性的对抗风格，我们的模型逐渐对视觉风格具有鲁棒性，从而提高了新目标数据集的泛化能力。除了典型的基于 CNN 的主干网之外，我们还在大规模预训练视觉 Transformer 上采用了 StyleAdv 方法。对八个不同目标数据集进行的广泛实验表明了我们方法的有效性。无论是基于 ResNet 还是 ViT，我们都实现了 CD-FSL 的最新技术水平。代码可在 https://github.com/lovelyqian/StyleAdv-CDFSL 获取。 本文提出StyleAdv方法，通过元风格对抗训练解决跨域少样本学习（CD-FSL）中的领域差异问题，提升模型在新型目标数据集上的泛化能力。 Yuqian Fu,Yu Xie,Yanwei Fu,Yu-Gang Jiang cs.CV

title: Interpretability in Activation Space Analysis of Transformers: A Focused Survey
title_zh: 变压器激活空间分析的可解释性：一项重点调查
comment: ef:CEUR WS - CIKM 2022 Workshops Proceedings, Vol-3318, 2022, paper6
comments: ef:CEUR WS - CIKM 2022 Workshops Proceedings, Vol-3318, 2022, paper6
abstract: The field of natural language processing has reached breakthroughs with the advent of transformers. They have remained state-of-the-art since then, and there also has been much research in analyzing, interpreting, and evaluating the attention layers and the underlying embedding space. In addition to the self-attention layers, the feed-forward layers in the transformer are a prominent architectural component. From extensive research, we observe that its role is under-explored. We focus on the latent space, known as the Activation Space, that consists of the neuron activations from these feed-forward layers. In this survey paper, we review interpretability methods that examine the learnings that occurred in this activation space. Since there exists only limited research in this direction, we conduct a detailed examination of each work and point out potential future directions of research. We hope our work provides a step towards strengthening activation space analysis.
summary: The field of natural language processing has reached breakthroughs with the advent of transformers. They have remained state-of-the-art since then, and there also has been much research in analyzing, interpreting, and evaluating the attention layers and the underlying embedding space. In addition to the self-attention layers, the feed-forward layers in the transformer are a prominent architectural component. From extensive research, we observe that its role is under-explored. We focus on the latent space, known as the Activation Space, that consists of the neuron activations from these feed-forward layers. In this survey paper, we review interpretability methods that examine the learnings that occurred in this activation space. Since there exists only limited research in this direction, we conduct a detailed examination of each work and point out potential future directions of research. We hope our work provides a step towards strengthening activation space analysis.
abstract_zh: 随着 Transformer 的出现，自然语言处理领域取得了突破。从那时起，它们一直保持着最先进的水平，并且在分析、解释和评估注意力层和底层嵌入空间方面也进行了大量研究。除了自注意力层之外，变压器中的前馈层也是一个重要的架构组件。通过广泛的研究，我们发现其作用尚未得到充分探索。我们关注潜在空间，称为激活空间，它由这些前馈层的神经元激活组成。在这篇调查论文中，我们回顾了检查该激活空间中发生的学习的可解释性方法。由于该方向的研究有限，我们对每项工作进行了详细的审查，并指出了未来潜在的研究方向。我们希望我们的工作为加强激活空间分析迈出了一步。

AI.tldr: 综述Transformer模型中前馈层激活空间的可解释性方法
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注注意力层和嵌入空间，前馈层的激活空间研究不足，需加强分析以促进模型理解
AI.method: 通过文献综述，详细分析现有激活空间解释方法，并指出未来研究方向
AI.result: 发现前馈层激活空间研究有限，系统总结现有方法并提出未来研究方向
AI.conclusion: 推动Transformer模型激活空间分析，促进模型可解释性研究

title: Exploring the Representation Manifolds of Stable Diffusion Through the Lens of Intrinsic Dimension
title_zh: 通过内在维度的透镜探索稳定扩散的表示流形
abstract: Prompting has become an important mechanism by which users can more effectively interact with many flavors of foundation model. Indeed, the last several years have shown that well-honed prompts can sometimes unlock emergent capabilities within such models. While there has been a substantial amount of empirical exploration of prompting within the community, relatively few works have studied prompting at a mathematical level. In this work we aim to take a first step towards understanding basic geometric properties induced by prompts in Stable Diffusion, focusing on the intrinsic dimension of internal representations within the model. We find that choice of prompt has a substantial impact on the intrinsic dimension of representations at both layers of the model which we explored, but that the nature of this impact depends on the layer being considered. For example, in certain bottleneck layers of the model, intrinsic dimension of representations is correlated with prompt perplexity (measured using a surrogate model), while this correlation is not apparent in the latent layers. Our evidence suggests that intrinsic dimension could be a useful tool for future studies of the impact of different prompts on text-to-image models.
summary: Prompting has become an important mechanism by which users can more effectively interact with many flavors of foundation model. Indeed, the last several years have shown that well-honed prompts can sometimes unlock emergent capabilities within such models. While there has been a substantial amount of empirical exploration of prompting within the community, relatively few works have studied prompting at a mathematical level. In this work we aim to take a first step towards understanding basic geometric properties induced by prompts in Stable Diffusion, focusing on the intrinsic dimension of internal representations within the model. We find that choice of prompt has a substantial impact on the intrinsic dimension of representations at both layers of the model which we explored, but that the nature of this impact depends on the layer being considered. For example, in certain bottleneck layers of the model, intrinsic dimension of representations is correlated with prompt perplexity (measured using a surrogate model), while this correlation is not apparent in the latent layers. Our evidence suggests that intrinsic dimension could be a useful tool for future studies of the impact of different prompts on text-to-image models.
abstract_zh: 提示已成为一种重要机制，用户可以通过它更有效地与多种基础模型进行交互。事实上，过去几年的情况表明，精心设计的提示有时可以释放此类模型中的新兴功能。虽然社区内对激励进行了大量的实证探索，但从数学层面研究激励的著作相对较少。在这项工作中，我们的目标是迈出第一步，了解稳定扩散中的提示引起的基本几何特性，重点关注模型内内部表示的内在维度。我们发现提示的选择对我们探索的模型的两个层的表示的内在维度都有重大影响，但这种影响的性质取决于所考虑的层。例如，在模型的某些瓶颈层中，表示的内在维度与提示困惑度（使用代理模型测量）相关，而这种相关性在潜在层中并不明显。我们的证据表明，内在维度可能是未来研究不同提示对文本到图像模型影响的有用工具。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过分析Stable Diffusion模型中提示词对内部表示的内在维度影响，探索其表示流形的几何特性。
AI.motivation: 尽管提示机制在基础模型交互中广泛应用，但缺乏对提示引发的几何特性的数学层面研究，尤其是内在维度的分析。
AI.method: 研究通过测量Stable Diffusion模型不同层级的内在维度，结合提示词的困惑度（通过替代模型计算），分析提示词对表示空间的影响。
AI.result: 提示词选择显著影响模型各层级的内在维度，其中瓶颈层的内在维度与提示词困惑度呈相关性，而潜在层则无明显关联。
AI.conclusion: 内在维度可作为研究不同提示词对文本到图像模型影响的有用工具，为后续研究提供新方向。

search_text: Exploring the Representation Manifolds of Stable Diffusion Through the Lens of Intrinsic Dimension 通过内在维度的透镜探索稳定扩散的表示流形 Prompting has become an important mechanism by which users can more effectively interact with many flavors of foundation model. Indeed, the last several years have shown that well-honed prompts can sometimes unlock emergent capabilities within such models. While there has been a substantial amount of empirical exploration of prompting within the community, relatively few works have studied prompting at a mathematical level. In this work we aim to take a first step towards understanding basic geometric properties induced by prompts in Stable Diffusion, focusing on the intrinsic dimension of internal representations within the model. We find that choice of prompt has a substantial impact on the intrinsic dimension of representations at both layers of the model which we explored, but that the nature of this impact depends on the layer being considered. For example, in certain bottleneck layers of the model, intrinsic dimension of representations is correlated with prompt perplexity (measured using a surrogate model), while this correlation is not apparent in the latent layers. Our evidence suggests that intrinsic dimension could be a useful tool for future studies of the impact of different prompts on text-to-image models. 提示已成为一种重要机制，用户可以通过它更有效地与多种基础模型进行交互。事实上，过去几年的情况表明，精心设计的提示有时可以释放此类模型中的新兴功能。虽然社区内对激励进行了大量的实证探索，但从数学层面研究激励的著作相对较少。在这项工作中，我们的目标是迈出第一步，了解稳定扩散中的提示引起的基本几何特性，重点关注模型内内部表示的内在维度。我们发现提示的选择对我们探索的模型的两个层的表示的内在维度都有重大影响，但这种影响的性质取决于所考虑的层。例如，在模型的某些瓶颈层中，表示的内在维度与提示困惑度（使用代理模型测量）相关，而这种相关性在潜在层中并不明显。我们的证据表明，内在维度可能是未来研究不同提示对文本到图像模型影响的有用工具。 该论文通过分析Stable Diffusion模型中提示词对内部表示的内在维度影响，探索其表示流形的几何特性。 Henry Kvinge,Davis Brown,Charles Godfrey cs.CL,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Ante Wang,Linfeng Song,Qi Liu,Haitao Mi,Longyue Wang,Zhaopeng Tu,Jinsong Su,Dong Yu
title: Search-Engine-augmented Dialogue Response Generation with Cheaply Supervised Query Production
title_zh: 搜索引擎增强的对话响应生成与廉价的监督查询生成
abstract: Knowledge-aided dialogue response generation aims at augmenting chatbots with relevant external knowledge in the hope of generating more informative responses. The majority of previous work assumes that the relevant knowledge is given as input or retrieved from a static pool of knowledge. However, this assumption violates the real-world situation, where knowledge is continually updated and a chatbot has to dynamically retrieve useful knowledge. We propose a dialogue model that can access the vast and dynamic information from any search engine for response generation. As the core module, a query producer is used to generate queries from a dialogue context to interact with a search engine. We design a training algorithm using cheap noisy supervision for the query producer, where the signals are obtained by comparing retrieved articles with the next dialogue response. As the result, the query producer is adjusted without any human annotation of gold queries, making it easily transferable to other domains and search engines. Experiments show that our query producer can achieve R@1 and R@5 rates of 62.4% and 74.8% for retrieving gold knowledge, and the overall model generates better responses over strong knowledge-aided baselines using BART and other typical systems.
summary: Knowledge-aided dialogue response generation aims at augmenting chatbots with relevant external knowledge in the hope of generating more informative responses. The majority of previous work assumes that the relevant knowledge is given as input or retrieved from a static pool of knowledge. However, this assumption violates the real-world situation, where knowledge is continually updated and a chatbot has to dynamically retrieve useful knowledge. We propose a dialogue model that can access the vast and dynamic information from any search engine for response generation. As the core module, a query producer is used to generate queries from a dialogue context to interact with a search engine. We design a training algorithm using cheap noisy supervision for the query producer, where the signals are obtained by comparing retrieved articles with the next dialogue response. As the result, the query producer is adjusted without any human annotation of gold queries, making it easily transferable to other domains and search engines. Experiments show that our query producer can achieve R@1 and R@5 rates of 62.4% and 74.8% for retrieving gold knowledge, and the overall model generates better responses over strong knowledge-aided baselines using BART and other typical systems.
abstract_zh: 知识辅助对话响应生成旨在用相关的外部知识增强聊天机器人，以期生成更多信息丰富的响应。以前的大部分工作都假设相关知识作为输入给出或从静态知识池中检索。然而，这种假设违反了现实世界的情况，在现实世界中，知识不断更新，聊天机器人必须动态检索有用的知识。我们提出了一种对话模型，可以从任何搜索引擎访问大量动态信息以生成响应。作为核心模块，查询生成器用于从对话上下文生成查询以与搜索引擎交互。我们为查询生成器设计了一种使用廉价噪声监督的训练算法，其中通过将检索到的文章与下一个对话响应进行比较来获得信号。因此，查询生成器无需对黄金查询进行任何人工注释即可进行调整，使其可以轻松转移到其他域和搜索引擎。实验表明，我们的查询生成器在检索黄金知识方面可以实现 62.4% 和 74.8% 的 R@1 和 R@5 率，并且整体模型比使用 BART 和其他典型系统的强知识辅助基线产生更好的响应。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合搜索引擎的对话响应生成方法，通过自动生成查询来动态检索知识，无需人工标注。
AI.motivation: 传统知识辅助对话系统依赖静态知识库，无法适应动态更新的知识，且人工标注查询成本高。
AI.method: 设计查询生成器从对话上下文生成搜索查询，并通过比较检索结果与对话响应进行廉价监督训练。
AI.result: 查询生成器在R@1和R@5指标上分别达到62.4%和74.8%，生成的响应优于BART等基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了无需人工标注的动态知识检索，具有跨领域和搜索引擎的可迁移性。

authors_text: Robert C. Gray,Jennifer Villareale,Thomas B. Fox,Diane H. Dallal,Santiago Ontañón,Danielle Arigo,Shahin Jabbari,Jichen Zhu
title: Improving Fairness in Adaptive Social Exergames via Shapley Bandits
title_zh: 通过 Shapley Bandits 提高自适应社交运动游戏的公平性
abstract: Algorithmic fairness is an essential requirement as AI becomes integrated in society. In the case of social applications where AI distributes resources, algorithms often must make decisions that will benefit a subset of users, sometimes repeatedly or exclusively, while attempting to maximize specific outcomes. How should we design such systems to serve users more fairly? This paper explores this question in the case where a group of users works toward a shared goal in a social exergame called Step Heroes. We identify adverse outcomes in traditional multi-armed bandits (MABs) and formalize the Greedy Bandit Problem. We then propose a solution based on a new type of fairness-aware multi-armed bandit, Shapley Bandits. It uses the Shapley Value for increasing overall player participation and intervention adherence rather than the maximization of total group output, which is traditionally achieved by favoring only high-performing participants. We evaluate our approach via a user study (n=46). Our results indicate that our Shapley Bandits effectively mediates the Greedy Bandit Problem and achieves better user retention and motivation across the participants.
summary: Algorithmic fairness is an essential requirement as AI becomes integrated in society. In the case of social applications where AI distributes resources, algorithms often must make decisions that will benefit a subset of users, sometimes repeatedly or exclusively, while attempting to maximize specific outcomes. How should we design such systems to serve users more fairly? This paper explores this question in the case where a group of users works toward a shared goal in a social exergame called Step Heroes. We identify adverse outcomes in traditional multi-armed bandits (MABs) and formalize the Greedy Bandit Problem. We then propose a solution based on a new type of fairness-aware multi-armed bandit, Shapley Bandits. It uses the Shapley Value for increasing overall player participation and intervention adherence rather than the maximization of total group output, which is traditionally achieved by favoring only high-performing participants. We evaluate our approach via a user study (n=46). Our results indicate that our Shapley Bandits effectively mediates the Greedy Bandit Problem and achieves better user retention and motivation across the participants.
abstract_zh: 算法公平是人工智能融入社会的基本要求。在人工智能分配资源的社交应用程序中，算法通常必须做出有利于部分用户的决策，有时是重复或专门的决策，同时尝试最大化特定结果。我们应该如何设计这样的系统才能更公平地为用户服务？本文探讨了这个问题，即一组用户在名为“Step Heroes”的社交运动游戏中朝着共同目标努力的情况。我们确定了传统多臂老虎机 (MAB) 的不利结果，并将贪婪老虎机问题形式化。然后，我们提出了一种基于新型公平意识多臂老虎机 Shapley Bandits 的解决方案。它使用沙普利值来提高整体参与者的参与度和干预依从性，而不是最大化小组总产出，传统上，后者是通过只支持高绩效参与者来实现的。我们通过用户研究（n=46）评估我们的方法。我们的结果表明，我们的 Shapley Bandit 有效地调解了贪婪 Bandit 问题，并在参与者中实现了更好的用户保留和激励。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于夏普利值的多臂老虎机算法（Shapley Bandits），以改进社交体感游戏中的公平性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统多臂老虎机算法在资源分配时倾向于优先奖励高绩效用户，导致参与度不均和公平性缺失，需设计更公平的决策机制。
AI.method: 通过引入夏普利值理论，构建公平感知的多臂老虎机模型，以提升整体用户参与度和干预依从性，而非单纯最大化群体总产出。
AI.result: 用户研究（n=46）表明，Shapley Bandits有效缓解了贪婪老虎机问题，显著提升了用户留存率和积极性。
AI.conclusion: Shapley Bandits为社交协作场景下的公平资源分配提供了可行方案，平衡了系统效率与用户公平性需求。

title: Platform-Independent and Curriculum-Oriented Intelligent Assistant for Higher Education
title_zh: 平台独立、课程导向的高等教育智能助手
abstract: Miscommunication and communication challenges between instructors and students represents one of the primary barriers to post-secondary learning. Students often avoid or miss opportunities to ask questions during office hours due to insecurities or scheduling conflicts. Moreover, students need to work at their own pace to have the freedom and time for the self-contemplation needed to build conceptual understanding and develop creative thinking skills. To eliminate barriers to student engagement, academic institutions need to redefine their fundamental approach to education by proposing flexible educational pathways that recognize continuous learning. To this end, we developed an AI-augmented intelligent educational assistance framework based on a power language model (i.e., GPT-3) that automatically generates course-specific intelligent assistants regardless of discipline or academic level. The virtual intelligent teaching assistant (TA) system will serve as a voice-enabled helper capable of answering course-specific questions concerning curriculum, logistics and course policies. It is envisioned to improve access to course-related information for the students and reduce logistical workload for the instructors and TAs. Its GPT-3-based knowledge discovery component as well as the generalized system architecture is presented accompanied by a methodical evaluation of the system accuracy and performance.
summary: Miscommunication and communication challenges between instructors and students represents one of the primary barriers to post-secondary learning. Students often avoid or miss opportunities to ask questions during office hours due to insecurities or scheduling conflicts. Moreover, students need to work at their own pace to have the freedom and time for the self-contemplation needed to build conceptual understanding and develop creative thinking skills. To eliminate barriers to student engagement, academic institutions need to redefine their fundamental approach to education by proposing flexible educational pathways that recognize continuous learning. To this end, we developed an AI-augmented intelligent educational assistance framework based on a power language model (i.e., GPT-3) that automatically generates course-specific intelligent assistants regardless of discipline or academic level. The virtual intelligent teaching assistant (TA) system will serve as a voice-enabled helper capable of answering course-specific questions concerning curriculum, logistics and course policies. It is envisioned to improve access to course-related information for the students and reduce logistical workload for the instructors and TAs. Its GPT-3-based knowledge discovery component as well as the generalized system architecture is presented accompanied by a methodical evaluation of the system accuracy and performance.
abstract_zh: 教师和学生之间的沟通不畅和沟通挑战是高等教育学习的主要障碍之一。由于不安全感或日程安排冲突，学生经常避免或错过在办公时间提问的机会。此外，学生需要按照自己的节奏学习，以便有自由和时间进行自我思考，以建立概念性理解和发展创造性思维技能。为了消除学生参与的障碍，学术机构需要重新定义其基本教育方法，提出认可持续学习的灵活教育途径。为此，我们开发了基于强力语言模型（即GPT-3）的AI增强智能教育辅助框架，无论学科或学术水平如何，都会自动生成特定于课程的智能助手。虚拟智能助教（TA）系统将作为语音助手，能够回答有关课程、后勤和课程政策等特定课程的问题。预计将改善学生获取课程相关信息的方式，并减少教师和助教的后勤工作量。提出了基于 GPT-3 的知识发现组件以及通用系统架构，并对系统准确性和性能进行了系统评估。

AI.tldr: 开发基于GPT-3的智能教学助手系统，解决高等教育中师生沟通障碍与学习自主性问题。
AI.motivation: 师生沟通不畅导致学生学习效率低下，传统教学模式难以满足个性化学习需求，需通过智能工具提升信息获取效率并减轻教师负担。
AI.method: 构建基于GPT-3的通用框架，自动生成跨学科课程的智能助手，集成语音交互功能并评估系统准确性与性能。
AI.result: 系统有效提升学生获取课程信息的便利性，减少教师事务性工作，实验验证了其知识发现能力与响应性能。
AI.conclusion: 该智能助手可优化高等教育教学流程，促进自主学习，但需进一步验证长期应用效果与多场景适应性。

To eliminate barriers to student engagement, academic institutions need to redefine their fundamental approach to education by proposing flexible educational pathways that recognize continuous learning. It is envisioned to improve access to course-related information for the students and reduce logistical workload for the instructors and TAs. title: FrAug: Frequency Domain Augmentation for Time Series Forecasting
title_zh: FrAug：时间序列预测的频域增强
abstract: Data augmentation (DA) has become a de facto solution to expand training data size for deep learning. With the proliferation of deep models for time series analysis, various time series DA techniques are proposed in the literature, e.g., cropping-, warping-, flipping-, and mixup-based methods. However, these augmentation methods mainly apply to time series classification and anomaly detection tasks. In time series forecasting (TSF), we need to model the fine-grained temporal relationship within time series segments to generate accurate forecasting results given data in a look-back window. Existing DA solutions in the time domain would break such a relationship, leading to poor forecasting accuracy. To tackle this problem, this paper proposes simple yet effective frequency domain augmentation techniques that ensure the semantic consistency of augmented data-label pairs in forecasting, named FrAug. We conduct extensive experiments on eight widely-used benchmarks with several state-of-the-art TSF deep models. Our results show that FrAug can boost the forecasting accuracy of TSF models in most cases. Moreover, we show that FrAug enables models trained with 1\% of the original training data to achieve similar performance to the ones trained on full training data, which is particularly attractive for cold-start forecasting. Finally, we show that applying test-time training with FrAug greatly improves forecasting accuracy for time series with significant distribution shifts, which often occurs in real-life TSF applications. Our code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Fraug-more-results-1785.
summary: Data augmentation (DA) has become a de facto solution to expand training data size for deep learning. With the proliferation of deep models for time series analysis, various time series DA techniques are proposed in the literature, e.g., cropping-, warping-, flipping-, and mixup-based methods. However, these augmentation methods mainly apply to time series classification and anomaly detection tasks. In time series forecasting (TSF), we need to model the fine-grained temporal relationship within time series segments to generate accurate forecasting results given data in a look-back window. Existing DA solutions in the time domain would break such a relationship, leading to poor forecasting accuracy. To tackle this problem, this paper proposes simple yet effective frequency domain augmentation techniques that ensure the semantic consistency of augmented data-label pairs in forecasting, named FrAug. We conduct extensive experiments on eight widely-used benchmarks with several state-of-the-art TSF deep models. Our results show that FrAug can boost the forecasting accuracy of TSF models in most cases. Moreover, we show that FrAug enables models trained with 1\% of the original training data to achieve similar performance to the ones trained on full training data, which is particularly attractive for cold-start forecasting. Finally, we show that applying test-time training with FrAug greatly improves forecasting accuracy for time series with significant distribution shifts, which often occurs in real-life TSF applications. Our code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Fraug-more-results-1785.
abstract_zh: 数据增强（DA）已成为扩展深度学习训练数据大小的事实上的解决方案。随着时间序列分析深度模型的激增，文献中提出了各种时间序列 DA 技术，例如基于裁剪、扭曲、翻转和混合的方法。然而，这些增强方法主要适用于时间序列分类和异常检测任务。在时间序列预测（TSF）中，我们需要对时间序列段内的细粒度时间关系进行建模，以便根据回溯窗口中的数据生成准确的预测结果。现有的时域 DA 解决方案会破坏这种关系，导致预测精度较差。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了简单而有效的频域增强技术，以确保预测中增强的数据标签对的语义一致性，称为 FrAug。我们使用几个最先进的 TSF 深度模型对八个广泛使用的基准进行了广泛的实验。我们的结果表明，在大多数情况下，FrAug 可以提高 TSF 模型的预测准确性。此外，我们表明，FrAug 使得使用 1% 的原始训练数据训练的模型能够达到与使用完整训练数据训练的模型相似的性能，这对于冷启动预测特别有吸引力。最后，我们表明，应用 FrAug 的测试时训练极大地提高了具有显着分布变化的时间序列的预测准确性，这在现实生活中的 TSF 应用中经常发生。我们的代码可在 https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Fraug-more-results-1785 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于频域增强的时序预测方法FrAug，解决传统时域增强破坏时间关系的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有时域数据增强方法会破坏时序片段中的细粒度时间关系，导致预测精度下降，而频域方法能保持语义一致性。
AI.method: 通过频域变换对时序数据进行增强，设计简单有效的频域扰动策略，确保增强后的数据与标签在预测任务中的语义一致性。
AI.result: 在8个基准数据集上验证，FrAug提升多数模型预测精度；使用1%训练数据时性能接近全数据训练；测试时训练结合FrAug可应对分布偏移。
AI.conclusion: FrAug为时序预测提供有效数据增强方案，尤其适用于冷启动和分布偏移场景，且易于与现有模型集成。

title: ARIS: An open source platform for developing mobile learning experiences
title_zh: ARIS：用于开发移动学习体验的开源平台
abstract: Inspired by mobile, Internet enabled computing and the maturing field of educational game design, the ARIS project has designed an open source tool for rapidly producing locative, interactive, narrative-centric, educational experiences. In addition to the software, the project contributes a global community of active designers and a growing set of compelling mechanics for learners in such designs.
summary: Inspired by mobile, Internet enabled computing and the maturing field of educational game design, the ARIS project has designed an open source tool for rapidly producing locative, interactive, narrative-centric, educational experiences. In addition to the software, the project contributes a global community of active designers and a growing set of compelling mechanics for learners in such designs.
abstract_zh: 受移动、互联网支持的计算和成熟的教育游戏设计领域的启发，ARIS 项目设计了一种开源工具，用于快速生成定位、交互式、以叙事为中心的教育体验。除了软件之外，该项目还为全球活跃的设计师社区提供了帮助，并为此类设计的学习者提供了越来越多的引人注目的机制。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为ARIS的开源平台，用于快速开发基于移动设备的定位、互动和叙事驱动的教育体验。
AI.motivation: 随着移动互联网和教育游戏设计的发展，需要一个工具来支持创建更沉浸式和互动性的移动学习体验，并促进全球设计者社区的协作。
AI.method: 通过开发开源软件工具，结合定位技术、互动叙事机制，并构建一个全球设计师社区，提供可扩展的学习体验设计框架。
AI.result: 成功创建了ARIS开源平台，形成了活跃的设计者社区，并开发出一系列适用于学习场景的互动机制。
AI.conclusion: ARIS为教育领域提供了可扩展的移动学习开发工具，其开源特性和社区支持有助于推动创新教育实践的发展。

search_text: ARIS: An open source platform for developing mobile learning experiences ARIS：用于开发移动学习体验的开源平台 Inspired by mobile, Internet enabled computing and the maturing field of educational game design, the ARIS project has designed an open source tool for rapidly producing locative, interactive, narrative-centric, educational experiences. In addition to the software, the project contributes a global community of active designers and a growing set of compelling mechanics for learners in such designs. 受移动、互联网支持的计算和成熟的教育游戏设计领域的启发，ARIS 项目设计了一种开源工具，用于快速生成定位、交互式、以叙事为中心的教育体验。除了软件之外，该项目还为全球活跃的设计师社区提供了帮助，并为此类设计的学习者提供了越来越多的引人注目的机制。 本文介绍了一个名为ARIS的开源平台，用于快速开发基于移动设备的定位、互动和叙事驱动的教育体验。 David J. Gagnon cs.CY,cs.HC

authors_text: Yunbo Qiu,Yue Jin,Lebin Yu,Jian Wang,Xudong Zhang
title: Promoting Cooperation in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning via Mutual Help
title_zh: 通过互助促进多智能体强化学习合作
comment: Accepted by 2023 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP 2023)
comments: Accepted by 2023 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP 2023)
abstract: Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) has achieved great progress in cooperative tasks in recent years. However, in the local reward scheme, where only local rewards for each agent are given without global rewards shared by all the agents, traditional MARL algorithms lack sufficient consideration of agents' mutual influence. In cooperative tasks, agents' mutual influence is especially important since agents are supposed to coordinate to achieve better performance. In this paper, we propose a novel algorithm Mutual-Help-based MARL (MH-MARL) to instruct agents to help each other in order to promote cooperation. MH-MARL utilizes an expected action module to generate expected other agents' actions for each particular agent. Then, the expected actions are delivered to other agents for selective imitation during training. Experimental results show that MH-MARL improves the performance of MARL both in success rate and cumulative reward.
summary: Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) has achieved great progress in cooperative tasks in recent years. However, in the local reward scheme, where only local rewards for each agent are given without global rewards shared by all the agents, traditional MARL algorithms lack sufficient consideration of agents' mutual influence. In cooperative tasks, agents' mutual influence is especially important since agents are supposed to coordinate to achieve better performance. In this paper, we propose a novel algorithm Mutual-Help-based MARL (MH-MARL) to instruct agents to help each other in order to promote cooperation. MH-MARL utilizes an expected action module to generate expected other agents' actions for each particular agent. Then, the expected actions are delivered to other agents for selective imitation during training. Experimental results show that MH-MARL improves the performance of MARL both in success rate and cumulative reward.
abstract_zh: 近年来，多智能体强化学习（MARL）在协作任务方面取得了长足的进步。然而，在局部奖励方案中，仅给予每个智能体局部奖励，而没有由所有智能体共享全局奖励，传统的MARL算法缺乏对智能体相互影响的充分考虑。在合作任务中，智能体之间的相互影响尤其重要，因为智能体应该进行协调以获得更好的性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于互助的 MARL (MH-MARL) 的新算法来指示代理互相帮助以促进合作。 MH-MARL 利用预期动作模块为每个特定代理生成预期的其他代理的动作。然后，将预期的动作传递给其他智能体，以便在训练期间进行选择性模仿。实验结果表明，MH-MARL 在成功率和累积奖励方面都提高了 MARL 的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于相互帮助的多智能体强化学习算法（MH-MARL），通过让智能体互相模仿预期动作来提升合作效率。
AI.motivation: 传统MARL在局部奖励机制下忽视智能体间的相互影响，而合作任务需要协调才能获得更优性能。
AI.method: 设计预期动作模块生成其他智能体的动作预测，并通过选择性模仿机制在训练中传递这些预期动作。
AI.result: 实验表明MH-MARL在成功率和累积奖励指标上均优于现有算法。
AI.conclusion: 相互帮助机制能有效提升多智能体系统的合作性能，为局部奖励场景下的MARL提供新思路。

authors_text: Calvin C. K. Yeung,Tony Sit,Keisuke Fujii
title: Transformer-Based Neural Marked Spatio Temporal Point Process Model for Football Match Events Analysis
title_zh: 基于 Transformer 的神经标记时空点过程模型用于足球比赛事件分析
abstract: With recently available football match event data that record the details of football matches, analysts and researchers have a great opportunity to develop new performance metrics, gain insight, and evaluate key performance. However, most sports sequential events modeling methods and performance metrics approaches could be incomprehensive in dealing with such large-scale spatiotemporal data (in particular, temporal process), thereby necessitating a more comprehensive spatiotemporal model and a holistic performance metric. To this end, we proposed the Transformer-Based Neural Marked Spatio Temporal Point Process (NMSTPP) model for football event data based on the neural temporal point processes (NTPP) framework. In the experiments, our model outperformed the prediction performance of the baseline models. Furthermore, we proposed the holistic possession utilization score (HPUS) metric for a more comprehensive football possession analysis. For verification, we examined the relationship with football teams' final ranking, average goal score, and average xG over a season. It was observed that the average HPUS showed significant correlations regardless of not using goal and details of shot information. Furthermore, we show HPUS examples in analyzing possessions, matches, and between matches.
summary: With recently available football match event data that record the details of football matches, analysts and researchers have a great opportunity to develop new performance metrics, gain insight, and evaluate key performance. However, most sports sequential events modeling methods and performance metrics approaches could be incomprehensive in dealing with such large-scale spatiotemporal data (in particular, temporal process), thereby necessitating a more comprehensive spatiotemporal model and a holistic performance metric. To this end, we proposed the Transformer-Based Neural Marked Spatio Temporal Point Process (NMSTPP) model for football event data based on the neural temporal point processes (NTPP) framework. In the experiments, our model outperformed the prediction performance of the baseline models. Furthermore, we proposed the holistic possession utilization score (HPUS) metric for a more comprehensive football possession analysis. For verification, we examined the relationship with football teams' final ranking, average goal score, and average xG over a season. It was observed that the average HPUS showed significant correlations regardless of not using goal and details of shot information. Furthermore, we show HPUS examples in analyzing possessions, matches, and between matches.
abstract_zh: 利用最近提供的记录足球比赛细节的足球比赛赛事数据，分析师和研究人员有很好的机会开发新的绩效指标、获得洞察力并评估关键绩效。然而，大多数体育序列事件建模方法和性能指标方法在处理如此大规模的时空数据（特别是时间过程）时可能不全面，因此需要更全面的时空模型和整体性能指标。为此，我们提出了基于神经时间点过程（NTPP）框架的足球事件数据的基于变压器的神经标记空间时间点过程（NMSTPP）模型。在实验中，我们的模型优于基线模型的预测性能。此外，我们提出了整体控球利用率得分（HPUS）指标，以进行更全面的足球控球分析。为了进行验证，我们检查了足球队的最终排名、平均进球数和一个赛季的平均目标得分之间的关​​系。据观察，无论不使用进球和射门细节信息，平均 HPUS 都显示出显着的相关性。此外，我们还展示了 HPUS 分析控球、比赛和比赛之间的示例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Transformer的神经标记时空点过程模型（NMSTPP）及整体控球利用评分（HPUS），以更全面分析足球比赛的时空事件数据。
AI.motivation: 现有足球赛事分析方法难以有效处理大规模时空数据，缺乏对控球等动态过程的综合评估指标。
AI.method: 基于神经时空点过程框架构建NMSTPP模型，结合Transformer处理时序依赖关系，并提出HPUS指标衡量球队控球效率。
AI.result: NMSTPP模型预测性能优于基线模型，HPUS指标与球队排名、场均进球及预期进球（xG）呈显著相关性，且无需依赖进球细节数据。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型与指标为足球赛事分析提供了更全面的时空建模方法和性能评估体系，可辅助战术研究与球队表现评价。

authors_text: Jiawen Deng,Jiale Cheng,Hao Sun,Zhexin Zhang,Minlie Huang
title: Towards Safer Generative Language Models: A Survey on Safety Risks, Evaluations, and Improvements
title_zh: 迈向更安全的生成语言模型：安全风险、评估和改进的调查
abstract: As generative large model capabilities advance, safety concerns become more pronounced in their outputs. To ensure the sustainable growth of the AI ecosystem, it's imperative to undertake a holistic evaluation and refinement of associated safety risks. This survey presents a framework for safety research pertaining to large models, delineating the landscape of safety risks as well as safety evaluation and improvement methods. We begin by introducing safety issues of wide concern, then delve into safety evaluation methods for large models, encompassing preference-based testing, adversarial attack approaches, issues detection, and other advanced evaluation methods. Additionally, we explore the strategies for enhancing large model safety from training to deployment, highlighting cutting-edge safety approaches for each stage in building large models. Finally, we discuss the core challenges in advancing towards more responsible AI, including the interpretability of safety mechanisms, ongoing safety issues, and robustness against malicious attacks. Through this survey, we aim to provide clear technical guidance for safety researchers and encourage further study on the safety of large models.
summary: As generative large model capabilities advance, safety concerns become more pronounced in their outputs. To ensure the sustainable growth of the AI ecosystem, it's imperative to undertake a holistic evaluation and refinement of associated safety risks. This survey presents a framework for safety research pertaining to large models, delineating the landscape of safety risks as well as safety evaluation and improvement methods. We begin by introducing safety issues of wide concern, then delve into safety evaluation methods for large models, encompassing preference-based testing, adversarial attack approaches, issues detection, and other advanced evaluation methods. Additionally, we explore the strategies for enhancing large model safety from training to deployment, highlighting cutting-edge safety approaches for each stage in building large models. Finally, we discuss the core challenges in advancing towards more responsible AI, including the interpretability of safety mechanisms, ongoing safety issues, and robustness against malicious attacks. Through this survey, we aim to provide clear technical guidance for safety researchers and encourage further study on the safety of large models.
abstract_zh: 随着生成大型模型能力的进步，其输出中的安全问题变得更加明显。为了确保人工智能生态系统的可持续发展，必须对相关安全风险进行全面评估和细化。该调查提出了与大型模型相关的安全研究框架，描绘了安全风险的情况以及安全评估和改进方法。我们首先介绍广泛关注的安全问题，然后深入研究大型模型的安全评估方法，包括基于偏好的测试、对抗性攻击方法、问题检测和其他高级评估方法。此外，我们还探讨了从训练到部署的过程中增强大型模型安全性的策略，重点介绍了构建大型模型每个阶段的前沿安全方法。最后，我们讨论了迈向更负责任的人工智能的核心挑战，包括安全机制的可解释性、持续的安全问题以及针对恶意攻击的鲁棒性。通过这次调查，我们旨在为安全研究人员提供明确的技术指导，并鼓励进一步研究大型模型的安全性。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了生成式大模型的安全风险、评估方法及改进策略，旨在为安全研究提供技术指导。
AI.motivation: 随着生成模型能力提升，其输出中的安全问题日益突出，需系统评估和优化以推动AI生态可持续发展。
AI.method: 通过梳理安全问题、分析评估方法（如偏好测试、对抗攻击）及改进策略（从训练到部署各阶段的安全措施），构建安全研究框架。
AI.result: 提出了涵盖风险分类、评估手段及改进技术的框架，并讨论了可解释性、持续安全性和鲁棒性等核心挑战。
AI.conclusion: 为安全研究者提供清晰的技术路线，呼吁进一步探索大模型安全方向以实现更负责任的AI发展。

search_text: Towards Safer Generative Language Models: A Survey on Safety Risks, Evaluations, and Improvements 迈向更安全的生成语言模型：安全风险、评估和改进的调查 As generative large model capabilities advance, safety concerns become more pronounced in their outputs. To ensure the sustainable growth of the AI ecosystem, it's imperative to undertake a holistic evaluation and refinement of associated safety risks. This survey presents a framework for safety research pertaining to large models, delineating the landscape of safety risks as well as safety evaluation and improvement methods. We begin by introducing safety issues of wide concern, then delve into safety evaluation methods for large models, encompassing preference-based testing, adversarial attack approaches, issues detection, and other advanced evaluation methods. Additionally, we explore the strategies for enhancing large model safety from training to deployment, highlighting cutting-edge safety approaches for each stage in building large models. Finally, we discuss the core challenges in advancing towards more responsible AI, including the interpretability of safety mechanisms, ongoing safety issues, and robustness against malicious attacks. Through this survey, we aim to provide clear technical guidance for safety researchers and encourage further study on the safety of large models. 随着生成大型模型能力的进步，其输出中的安全问题变得更加明显。为了确保人工智能生态系统的可持续发展，必须对相关安全风险进行全面评估和细化。该调查提出了与大型模型相关的安全研究框架，描绘了安全风险的情况以及安全评估和改进方法。我们首先介绍广泛关注的安全问题，然后深入研究大型模型的安全评估方法，包括基于偏好的测试、对抗性攻击方法、问题检测和其他高级评估方法。此外，我们还探讨了从训练到部署的过程中增强大型模型安全性的策略，重点介绍了构建大型模型每个阶段的前沿安全方法。最后，我们讨论了迈向更负责任的人工智能的核心挑战，包括安全机制的可解释性、持续的安全问题以及针对恶意攻击的鲁棒性。通过这次调查，我们旨在为安全研究人员提供明确的技术指导，并鼓励进一步研究大型模型的安全性。 本文综述了生成式大模型的安全风险、评估方法及改进策略，旨在为安全研究提供技术指导。 Jiawen Deng,Jiale Cheng,Hao Sun,Zhexin Zhang,Minlie Huang cs.AI

authors_text: Hamidreza Arjmandi,Mohamad Zoofaghari,Mitra Rezaei,Kajsa Kanebratt,Liisa Vilen,David Janzen,Peter Gennemark,Adam Noel
title: Diffusive Molecular Communication with a Spheroidal Receiver for Organ-on-Chip Systems
title_zh: 用于器官芯片系统的球形接收器的扩散分子通信
abstract: Realistic models of the components and processes are required for molecular communication (MC) systems. In this paper, a spheroidal receiver structure is proposed for MC that is inspired by the 3D cell cultures known as spheroids being widely used in organ-on-chip systems. A simple diffusive MC system is considered where the spheroidal receiver and a point source transmitter are in an unbounded fluid environment. The spheroidal receiver is modeled as a porous medium for diffusive signaling molecules, then its boundary conditions and effective diffusion coefficient are characterized. It is revealed that the spheroid amplifies the diffusion signal, but also disperses the signal which reduces the information communication rate. Furthermore, we analytically formulate and derive the concentration Green's function inside and outside the spheroid in terms of infinite series-forms that are confirmed by a particle-based simulator (PBS).
summary: Realistic models of the components and processes are required for molecular communication (MC) systems. In this paper, a spheroidal receiver structure is proposed for MC that is inspired by the 3D cell cultures known as spheroids being widely used in organ-on-chip systems. A simple diffusive MC system is considered where the spheroidal receiver and a point source transmitter are in an unbounded fluid environment. The spheroidal receiver is modeled as a porous medium for diffusive signaling molecules, then its boundary conditions and effective diffusion coefficient are characterized. It is revealed that the spheroid amplifies the diffusion signal, but also disperses the signal which reduces the information communication rate. Furthermore, we analytically formulate and derive the concentration Green's function inside and outside the spheroid in terms of infinite series-forms that are confirmed by a particle-based simulator (PBS).
abstract_zh: 分子通信 (MC) 系统需要组件和过程的真实模型。在本文中，为 MC 提出了一种球状接收器结构，其灵感来自广泛应用于器官芯片系统中的 3D 细胞培养物（称为球体）。考虑一个简单的扩散 MC 系统，其中球体接收器和点源发射器处于无界流体环境中。将球形接收器建模为扩散信号分子的多孔介质，然后表征其边界条件和有效扩散系数。结果表明，球体放大了扩散信号，但也分散了信号，降低了信息通信速率。此外，我们以无限级数形式分析地制定并推导了球体内部和外部的浓度格林函数，并由基于粒子的模拟器（PBS）确认。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种受类器官芯片系统中球状体启发的球状接收器结构，用于分子通信系统建模。
AI.motivation: 为提高分子通信系统的真实性，需建立符合生物组织特性的接收器模型，以适配类器官芯片系统中3D球状体培养技术的广泛应用。
AI.method: 将球状接收器建模为多孔介质，通过分析其边界条件和有效扩散系数，结合粒子模拟器验证解析推导的浓度格林函数（无限级数形式）。
AI.result: 发现球状体可增强扩散信号但导致信号分散，降低通信速率；推导出球状体内外浓度格林函数的解析表达式并经模拟验证。
AI.conclusion: 球状接收器模型为分子通信系统设计提供生物启发方案，但需平衡信号增强与分散的矛盾，解析模型可指导类器官芯片系统的通信优化。

title: Multistage Spatial Context Models for Learned Image Compression
title_zh: 用于学习图像压缩的多级空间上下文模型
abstract: Recent state-of-the-art Learned Image Compression methods feature spatial context models, achieving great rate-distortion improvements over hyperprior methods. However, the autoregressive context model requires serial decoding, limiting runtime performance. The Checkerboard context model allows parallel decoding at a cost of reduced RD performance. We present a series of multistage spatial context models allowing both fast decoding and better RD performance. We split the latent space into square patches and decode serially within each patch while different patches are decoded in parallel. The proposed method features a comparable decoding speed to Checkerboard while reaching the RD performance of Autoregressive and even also outperforming Autoregressive. Inside each patch, the decoding order must be carefully decided as a bad order negatively impacts performance; therefore, we also propose a decoding order optimization algorithm.
summary: Recent state-of-the-art Learned Image Compression methods feature spatial context models, achieving great rate-distortion improvements over hyperprior methods. However, the autoregressive context model requires serial decoding, limiting runtime performance. The Checkerboard context model allows parallel decoding at a cost of reduced RD performance. We present a series of multistage spatial context models allowing both fast decoding and better RD performance. We split the latent space into square patches and decode serially within each patch while different patches are decoded in parallel. The proposed method features a comparable decoding speed to Checkerboard while reaching the RD performance of Autoregressive and even also outperforming Autoregressive. Inside each patch, the decoding order must be carefully decided as a bad order negatively impacts performance; therefore, we also propose a decoding order optimization algorithm.
abstract_zh: 最近最先进的学习图像压缩方法以空间上下文模型为特色，与超先验方法相比，在率失真方面取得了巨大的改进。然而，自回归上下文模型需要串行解码，限制了运行时性能。棋盘上下文模型允许并行解码，但代价是降低 RD 性能。我们提出了一系列多级空间上下文模型，可以实现快速解码和更好的 RD 性能。我们将潜在空间分割成方形块，并在每个块内串行解码，同时并行解码不同的块。所提出的方法具有与棋盘格相当的解码速度，同时达到自回归的 RD 性能，甚至优于自回归。在每个补丁中，必须仔细决定解码顺序，因为错误的顺序会对性能产生负面影响；因此，我们还提出了一种解码顺序优化算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多阶段空间上下文模型，通过分块并行解码与串行优化，在图像压缩中实现快速解码与高率失真性能的平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有自回归模型解码速度慢，Checkerboard模型虽快但性能不足，需兼顾解码效率与压缩性能。
AI.method: 将潜在空间划分为方形块，块内串行解码、块间并行处理，并提出解码顺序优化算法以提升性能。
AI.result: 解码速度媲美Checkerboard，率失真性能超越自回归模型，部分场景下表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 多阶段分块策略有效平衡速度与性能，解码顺序优化是关键创新点。

We split the latent space into square patches and decode serially within each patch while different patches are decoded in parallel. Inside each patch, the decoding order must be carefully decided as a bad order negatively impacts performance; therefore, we also propose a decoding order optimization algorithm. 最近最先进的学习图像压缩方法以空间上下文模型为特色，与超先验方法相比，在率失真方面取得了巨大的改进。然而，自回归上下文模型需要串行解码，限制了运行时性能。棋盘上下文模型允许并行解码，但代价是降低 RD 性能。我们提出了一系列多级空间上下文模型，可以实现快速解码和更好的 RD 性能。我们将潜在空间分割成方形块，并在每个块内串行解码，同时并行解码不同的块。所提出的方法具有与棋盘格相当的解码速度，同时达到自回归的 RD 性能，甚至优于自回归。在每个补丁中，必须仔细决定解码顺序，因为错误的顺序会对性能产生负面影响；因此，我们还提出了一种解码顺序优化算法。 本文提出一种多阶段空间上下文模型，通过分块并行解码与串行优化，在图像压缩中实现快速解码与高率失真性能的平衡。 Fangzheng Lin,Heming Sun,Jinming Liu,Jiro Katto cs.CV,eess.IV

title: Attribute-Specific Manipulation Based on Layer-Wise Channels
title_zh: 基于分层通道的属性特定操作
abstract: Image manipulation on the latent space of the pre-trained StyleGAN can control the semantic attributes of the generated images. Recently, some studies have focused on detecting channels with specific properties to directly manipulate the latent code, which is limited by the entanglement of the latent space. To detect the attribute-specific channels, we propose a novel detection method in the context of pre-trained classifiers. We analyse the gradients layer by layer on the style space. The intensities of the gradients indicate the channel's responses to specific attributes. The latent style codes of channels control separate attributes in the layers. We choose channels with top-$k$ gradients to control specific attributes in the maximum response layer. We implement single-channel and multi-channel manipulations with a certain attribute. Our methods can accurately detect relevant channels for a large number of face attributes. Extensive qualitative and quantitative results demonstrate that the proposed methods outperform state-of-the-art methods in generalization and scalability.
summary: Image manipulation on the latent space of the pre-trained StyleGAN can control the semantic attributes of the generated images. Recently, some studies have focused on detecting channels with specific properties to directly manipulate the latent code, which is limited by the entanglement of the latent space. To detect the attribute-specific channels, we propose a novel detection method in the context of pre-trained classifiers. We analyse the gradients layer by layer on the style space. The intensities of the gradients indicate the channel's responses to specific attributes. The latent style codes of channels control separate attributes in the layers. We choose channels with top-$k$ gradients to control specific attributes in the maximum response layer. We implement single-channel and multi-channel manipulations with a certain attribute. Our methods can accurately detect relevant channels for a large number of face attributes. Extensive qualitative and quantitative results demonstrate that the proposed methods outperform state-of-the-art methods in generalization and scalability.
abstract_zh: 对预训练 StyleGAN 的潜在空间进行图像操作可以控制生成图像的语义属性。最近，一些研究集中在检测具有特定属性的通道来直接操纵潜在代码，这受到潜在空间纠缠的限制。为了检测特定于属性的通道，我们在预训练分类器的背景下提出了一种新颖的检测方法。我们在样式空间上逐层分析渐变。梯度的强度表示通道对特定属性的响应。通道的潜在样式代码控制图层中的单独属性。我们选择具有 top-$k$ 梯度的通道来控制最大响应层中的特定属性。我们实现具有特定属性的单通道和多通道操作。我们的方法可以准确地检测大量人脸属性的相关通道。广泛的定性和定量结果表明，所提出的方法在泛化性和可扩展性方面优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于层间通道的属性特异性图像编辑方法，通过分析StyleGAN预训练模型的梯度响应来定位控制特定属性的潜在通道。
AI.motivation: 现有基于StyleGAN的潜在空间编辑方法受限于潜在空间的纠缠特性，难以精准控制语义属性，需解决通道与属性映射的可解释性问题。
AI.method: 利用预训练分类器逐层分析风格空间梯度强度，通过筛选梯度响应最高的top-k通道实现单通道或多通道属性操控。
AI.result: 在大量人脸属性实验中，该方法在定性和定量评估中均优于现有方法，展现出更优的泛化能力和可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 通过梯度响应分析定位属性相关通道，有效提升了生成模型中语义属性编辑的精度与灵活性。

title: Multi-dimensional frequency dynamic convolution with confident mean teacher for sound event detection
title_zh: 具有置信均值教师的多维频率动态卷积用于声音事件检测
abstract: Recently, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have been widely used in sound event detection (SED). However, traditional convolution is deficient in learning time-frequency domain representation of different sound events. To address this issue, we propose multi-dimensional frequency dynamic convolution (MFDConv), a new design that endows convolutional kernels with frequency-adaptive dynamic properties along multiple dimensions. MFDConv utilizes a novel multi-dimensional attention mechanism with a parallel strategy to learn complementary frequency-adaptive attentions, which substantially strengthen the feature extraction ability of convolutional kernels. Moreover, in order to promote the performance of mean teacher, we propose the confident mean teacher to increase the accuracy of pseudo-labels from the teacher and train the student with high confidence labels. Experimental results show that the proposed methods achieve 0.470 and 0.692 of PSDS1 and PSDS2 on the DESED real validation dataset.
summary: Recently, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have been widely used in sound event detection (SED). However, traditional convolution is deficient in learning time-frequency domain representation of different sound events. To address this issue, we propose multi-dimensional frequency dynamic convolution (MFDConv), a new design that endows convolutional kernels with frequency-adaptive dynamic properties along multiple dimensions. MFDConv utilizes a novel multi-dimensional attention mechanism with a parallel strategy to learn complementary frequency-adaptive attentions, which substantially strengthen the feature extraction ability of convolutional kernels. Moreover, in order to promote the performance of mean teacher, we propose the confident mean teacher to increase the accuracy of pseudo-labels from the teacher and train the student with high confidence labels. Experimental results show that the proposed methods achieve 0.470 and 0.692 of PSDS1 and PSDS2 on the DESED real validation dataset.
abstract_zh: 最近，卷积神经网络（CNN）已广泛应用于声音事件检测（SED）。然而，传统的卷积在学习不同声音事件的时频域表示方面存在缺陷。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了多维频率动态卷积（MFDConv），这是一种新设计，赋予卷积核沿多个维度的频率自适应动态特性。 MFDConv 利用一种新颖的多维注意力机制和并行策略来学习互补的频率自适应注意力，从而大大增强了卷积核的特征提取能力。此外，为了提高平均教师的表现，我们提出了置信平均教师来提高教师伪标签的准确性，并训练具有高置信度标签的学生。实验结果表明，所提出的方法在 DESED 真实验证数据集上实现了 PSDS1 和 PSDS2 的 0.470 和 0.692。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合多维频率动态卷积和自信均值教师的方法，用于改进声音事件检测（SED）任务。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积神经网络在时频域表示不同声音事件时存在不足，需提升卷积核对频率的自适应能力以增强特征提取效果。
AI.method: 设计多维频率动态卷积（MFDConv），通过并行多维注意力机制学习互补频率注意力；结合自信均值教师策略优化伪标签质量，提升学生模型训练效果。
AI.result: 在DESED真实验证数据集上，PSDS1和PSDS2指标分别达到0.470和0.692。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过动态卷积与自信均值教师协同优化，有效提升了声音事件检测的性能。

title: Deep AHS: A Deep Learning Approach to Acoustic Howling Suppression
title_zh: Deep AHS：一种抑制声学啸叫的深度学习方法
abstract: In this paper, we formulate acoustic howling suppression (AHS) as a supervised learning problem and propose a deep learning approach, called Deep AHS, to address it. Deep AHS is trained in a teacher forcing way which converts the recurrent howling suppression process into an instantaneous speech separation process to simplify the problem and accelerate the model training. The proposed method utilizes properly designed features and trains an attention based recurrent neural network (RNN) to extract the target signal from the microphone recording, thus attenuating the playback signal that may lead to howling. Different training strategies are investigated and a streaming inference method implemented in a recurrent mode used to evaluate the performance of the proposed method for real-time howling suppression. Deep AHS avoids howling detection and intrinsically prohibits howling from happening, allowing for more flexibility in the design of audio systems. Experimental results show the effectiveness of the proposed method for howling suppression under different scenarios.
summary: In this paper, we formulate acoustic howling suppression (AHS) as a supervised learning problem and propose a deep learning approach, called Deep AHS, to address it. Deep AHS is trained in a teacher forcing way which converts the recurrent howling suppression process into an instantaneous speech separation process to simplify the problem and accelerate the model training. The proposed method utilizes properly designed features and trains an attention based recurrent neural network (RNN) to extract the target signal from the microphone recording, thus attenuating the playback signal that may lead to howling. Different training strategies are investigated and a streaming inference method implemented in a recurrent mode used to evaluate the performance of the proposed method for real-time howling suppression. Deep AHS avoids howling detection and intrinsically prohibits howling from happening, allowing for more flexibility in the design of audio systems. Experimental results show the effectiveness of the proposed method for howling suppression under different scenarios.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们将声学啸叫抑制（AHS）表述为监督学习问题，并提出了一种称为“深度 AHS”的深度学习方法来解决该问题。 Deep AHS 采用教师强制方式进行训练，将反复出现的啸叫抑制过程转化为瞬时语音分离过程，以简化问题并加速模型训练。所提出的方法利用正确设计的特征并训练基于注意力的循环神经网络（RNN）来从麦克风录音中提取目标信号，从而衰减可能导致啸叫的回放信号。研究了不同的训练策略，并以循环模式实现流式推理方法，用于评估所提出的实时啸叫抑制方法的性能。深度 AHS 避免了啸叫检测，并从本质上阻止啸叫的发生，从而为音频系统的设计提供了更大的灵活性。实验结果表明了该方法在不同场景下抑制啸叫的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于深度学习的声学啸叫抑制方法Deep AHS，通过监督学习解决啸叫问题
AI.motivation: 传统啸叫抑制方法依赖检测机制，设计受限；Deep AHS通过端到端学习直接抑制啸叫，提升系统灵活性和实时性
AI.method: 采用教师强制训练将递归抑制转化为即时语音分离，结合设计特征与注意力机制RNN提取目标信号，并实现流式推理以支持实时处理
AI.result: 实验表明Deep AHS在多种场景下有效抑制啸叫，且无需显式检测，验证了方法的鲁棒性与实用性
AI.conclusion: Deep AHS通过端到端深度学习有效解决啸叫问题，避免检测步骤，为音频系统设计提供更灵活方案

search_text: Deep AHS: A Deep Learning Approach to Acoustic Howling Suppression Deep AHS：一种抑制声学啸叫的深度学习方法 In this paper, we formulate acoustic howling suppression (AHS) as a supervised learning problem and propose a deep learning approach, called Deep AHS, to address it. Deep AHS is trained in a teacher forcing way which converts the recurrent howling suppression process into an instantaneous speech separation process to simplify the problem and accelerate the model training. The proposed method utilizes properly designed features and trains an attention based recurrent neural network (RNN) to extract the target signal from the microphone recording, thus attenuating the playback signal that may lead to howling. Different training strategies are investigated and a streaming inference method implemented in a recurrent mode used to evaluate the performance of the proposed method for real-time howling suppression. Deep AHS avoids howling detection and intrinsically prohibits howling from happening, allowing for more flexibility in the design of audio systems. Experimental results show the effectiveness of the proposed method for howling suppression under different scenarios. 在本文中，我们将声学啸叫抑制（AHS）表述为监督学习问题，并提出了一种称为“深度 AHS”的深度学习方法来解决该问题。 Deep AHS 采用教师强制方式进行训练，将反复出现的啸叫抑制过程转化为瞬时语音分离过程，以简化问题并加速模型训练。所提出的方法利用正确设计的特征并训练基于注意力的循环神经网络（RNN）来从麦克风录音中提取目标信号，从而衰减可能导致啸叫的回放信号。研究了不同的训练策略，并以循环模式实现流式推理方法，用于评估所提出的实时啸叫抑制方法的性能。深度 AHS 避免了啸叫检测，并从本质上阻止啸叫的发生，从而为音频系统的设计提供了更大的灵活性。实验结果表明了该方法在不同场景下抑制啸叫的有效性。 提出一种基于深度学习的声学啸叫抑制方法Deep AHS，通过监督学习解决啸叫问题 Hao Zhang,Meng Yu,Dong Yu eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Shirsha Bose,Ankit Jha,Enrico Fini,Mainak Singha,Elisa Ricci,Biplab Banerjee
title: StyLIP: Multi-Scale Style-Conditioned Prompt Learning for CLIP-based Domain Generalization
title_zh: StyLIP：基于 CLIP 的域泛化的多尺度风格条件即时学习
comment: 23 pages,5 figures, 7 tables, Accepted in WACV 2024
comments: 23 pages,5 figures, 7 tables, Accepted in WACV 2024
abstract: Large-scale foundation models, such as CLIP, have demonstrated impressive zero-shot generalization performance on downstream tasks, leveraging well-designed language prompts. However, these prompt learning techniques often struggle with domain shift, limiting their generalization capabilities. In our study, we tackle this issue by proposing StyLIP, a novel approach for Domain Generalization (DG) that enhances CLIP's classification performance across domains. Our method focuses on a domain-agnostic prompt learning strategy, aiming to disentangle the visual style and content information embedded in CLIP's pre-trained vision encoder, enabling effortless adaptation to novel domains during inference. To achieve this, we introduce a set of style projectors that directly learn the domain-specific prompt tokens from the extracted multi-scale style features. These generated prompt embeddings are subsequently combined with the multi-scale visual content features learned by a content projector. The projectors are trained in a contrastive manner, utilizing CLIP's fixed vision and text backbones. Through extensive experiments conducted in five different DG settings on multiple benchmark datasets, we consistently demonstrate that StyLIP outperforms the current state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods.
summary: Large-scale foundation models, such as CLIP, have demonstrated impressive zero-shot generalization performance on downstream tasks, leveraging well-designed language prompts. However, these prompt learning techniques often struggle with domain shift, limiting their generalization capabilities. In our study, we tackle this issue by proposing StyLIP, a novel approach for Domain Generalization (DG) that enhances CLIP's classification performance across domains. Our method focuses on a domain-agnostic prompt learning strategy, aiming to disentangle the visual style and content information embedded in CLIP's pre-trained vision encoder, enabling effortless adaptation to novel domains during inference. To achieve this, we introduce a set of style projectors that directly learn the domain-specific prompt tokens from the extracted multi-scale style features. These generated prompt embeddings are subsequently combined with the multi-scale visual content features learned by a content projector. The projectors are trained in a contrastive manner, utilizing CLIP's fixed vision and text backbones. Through extensive experiments conducted in five different DG settings on multiple benchmark datasets, we consistently demonstrate that StyLIP outperforms the current state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods.
abstract_zh: CLIP 等大型基础模型利用精心设计的语言提示，在下游任务上展示了令人印象深刻的零样本泛化性能。然而，这些即时学习技术常常难以适应领域转移，限制了它们的泛化能力。在我们的研究中，我们通过提出 StyLIP 来解决这个问题，这是一种新的域泛化 (DG) 方法，可以增强 CLIP 的跨域分类性能。我们的方法侧重于与领域无关的提示学习策略，旨在解开 CLIP 预训练视觉编码器中嵌入的视觉风格和内容信息，从而在推理过程中轻松适应新领域。为了实现这一目标，我们引入了一组风格投影器，它们直接从提取的多尺度风格特征中学习特定于领域的提示标记。这些生成的提示嵌入随后与内容投影仪学习的多尺度视觉内容特征相结合。投影仪利用 CLIP 的固定视觉和文本主干以对比方式进行训练。通过在多个基准数据集上的五种不同 DG 设置中进行的广泛实验，我们一致证明 StyLIP 优于当前最先进的 (SOTA) 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出StyLIP方法，通过多尺度风格条件提示学习提升CLIP模型在领域泛化任务中的分类性能。
AI.motivation: CLIP等基础模型在零样本任务中表现优异，但面对领域偏移时泛化能力受限，现有提示学习技术难以有效适应新领域。
AI.method: 设计风格投影器从多尺度特征中学习领域特定提示token，并与内容投影器提取的视觉内容特征结合，通过对比学习训练投影器。
AI.result: 在五个不同领域泛化设置下的多个基准数据集上，StyLIP持续优于当前最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: StyLIP通过解耦视觉风格与内容信息，有效提升了CLIP模型在未知领域的适应能力，验证了方法的有效性。

title: Distributed Planning with Asynchronous Execution with Local Navigation for Multi-agent Pickup and Delivery Problem
title_zh: 针对多智能体取货和送货问题的具有本地导航异步执行的分布式规划
comment: 11 pages, 12 figures. Accepted in AAMAS 2023 (The 22nd International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems)
comments: 11 pages, 12 figures. Accepted in AAMAS 2023 (The 22nd International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems)
abstract: We propose a distributed planning method with asynchronous execution for multi-agent pickup and delivery (MAPD) problems for environments with occasional delays in agents' activities and flexible endpoints. MAPD is a crucial problem framework with many applications; however, most existing studies assume ideal agent behaviors and environments, such as a fixed speed of agents, synchronized movements, and a well-designed environment with many short detours for multiple agents to perform tasks easily. However, such an environment is often infeasible; for example, the moving speed of agents may be affected by weather and floor conditions and is often prone to delays. The proposed method can relax some infeasible conditions to apply MAPD in more realistic environments by allowing fluctuated speed in agents' actions and flexible working locations (endpoints). Our experiments showed that our method enables agents to perform MAPD in such an environment efficiently, compared to the baseline methods. We also analyzed the behaviors of agents using our method and discuss the limitations.
summary: We propose a distributed planning method with asynchronous execution for multi-agent pickup and delivery (MAPD) problems for environments with occasional delays in agents' activities and flexible endpoints. MAPD is a crucial problem framework with many applications; however, most existing studies assume ideal agent behaviors and environments, such as a fixed speed of agents, synchronized movements, and a well-designed environment with many short detours for multiple agents to perform tasks easily. However, such an environment is often infeasible; for example, the moving speed of agents may be affected by weather and floor conditions and is often prone to delays. The proposed method can relax some infeasible conditions to apply MAPD in more realistic environments by allowing fluctuated speed in agents' actions and flexible working locations (endpoints). Our experiments showed that our method enables agents to perform MAPD in such an environment efficiently, compared to the baseline methods. We also analyzed the behaviors of agents using our method and discuss the limitations.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种异步执行的分布式规划方法，用于解决代理活动偶尔延迟和灵活端点的环境中的多代理取货和交付（MAPD）问题。 MAPD 是一个具有许多应用的关键问题框架；然而，大多数现有研究都假设理想的智能体行为和环境，例如智能体的固定速度、同步运动以及精心设计的环境，其中有许多短途绕道，可以让多个智能体轻松执行任务。然而，这样的环境往往是不可行的；例如，人员的移动速度可能会受到天气和楼层条件的影响，并且经常容易出现延误。所提出的方法可以通过允许代理动作的速度波动和灵活的工作位置（端点）来放宽一些不可行的条件，以便在更现实的环境中应用 MAPD。我们的实验表明，与基线方法相比，我们的方法使代理能够在这样的环境中有效地执行 MAPD。我们还使用我们的方法分析了代理的行为并讨论了其局限性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种适用于多智能体取送货问题的分布式规划方法，允许异步执行和灵活端点以适应现实环境中的延迟。
AI.motivation: 现有方法假设理想条件（如固定速度、同步移动），但现实环境中智能体易受天气、地形等因素影响导致延迟，需更灵活的解决方案。
AI.method: 结合分布式规划与异步执行机制，引入局部导航策略，允许智能体速度波动及动态调整任务端点。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在存在延迟的环境中比基线方法更高效，并分析了智能体行为及局限性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效应对现实环境中的延迟和不确定性，但需进一步优化以提升复杂场景下的鲁棒性。

title: Machine Love
title_zh: 机器之爱
abstract: While ML generates much economic value, many of us have problematic relationships with social media and other ML-powered applications. One reason is that ML often optimizes for what we want in the moment, which is easy to quantify but at odds with what is known scientifically about human flourishing. Thus, through its impoverished models of us, ML currently falls far short of its exciting potential, which is for it to help us to reach ours. While there is no consensus on defining human flourishing, from diverse perspectives across psychology, philosophy, and spiritual traditions, love is understood to be one of its primary catalysts. Motivated by this view, this paper explores whether there is a useful conception of love fitting for machines to embody, as historically it has been generative to explore whether a nebulous concept, such as life or intelligence, can be thoughtfully abstracted and reimagined, as in the fields of machine intelligence or artificial life. This paper forwards a candidate conception of machine love, inspired in particular by work in positive psychology and psychotherapy: to provide unconditional support enabling humans to autonomously pursue their own growth and development. Through proof of concept experiments, this paper aims to highlight the need for richer models of human flourishing in ML, provide an example framework through which positive psychology can be combined with ML to realize a rough conception of machine love, and demonstrate that current language models begin to enable embodying qualitative humanistic principles. The conclusion is that though at present ML may often serve to addict, distract, or divide us, an alternative path may be opening up: We may align ML to support our growth, through it helping us to align ourselves towards our highest aspirations.
summary: While ML generates much economic value, many of us have problematic relationships with social media and other ML-powered applications. One reason is that ML often optimizes for what we want in the moment, which is easy to quantify but at odds with what is known scientifically about human flourishing. Thus, through its impoverished models of us, ML currently falls far short of its exciting potential, which is for it to help us to reach ours. While there is no consensus on defining human flourishing, from diverse perspectives across psychology, philosophy, and spiritual traditions, love is understood to be one of its primary catalysts. Motivated by this view, this paper explores whether there is a useful conception of love fitting for machines to embody, as historically it has been generative to explore whether a nebulous concept, such as life or intelligence, can be thoughtfully abstracted and reimagined, as in the fields of machine intelligence or artificial life. This paper forwards a candidate conception of machine love, inspired in particular by work in positive psychology and psychotherapy: to provide unconditional support enabling humans to autonomously pursue their own growth and development. Through proof of concept experiments, this paper aims to highlight the need for richer models of human flourishing in ML, provide an example framework through which positive psychology can be combined with ML to realize a rough conception of machine love, and demonstrate that current language models begin to enable embodying qualitative humanistic principles. The conclusion is that though at present ML may often serve to addict, distract, or divide us, an alternative path may be opening up: We may align ML to support our growth, through it helping us to align ourselves towards our highest aspirations.
abstract_zh: 虽然机器学习产生了巨大的经济价值，但我们中的许多人与社交媒体和其他机器学习驱动的应用程序的关系存在问题。原因之一是机器学习经常针对我们当下想要的东西进行优化，这很容易量化，但与人类繁荣的科学认知不一致。因此，通过我们的贫困模型，机器学习目前还远远没有发挥出它令人兴奋的潜力，即它可以帮助我们实现我们的目标。虽然对于人类繁荣的定义尚未达成共识，但从心理学、哲学和精神传统的不同角度来看，爱被认为是其主要催化剂之一。受这种观点的启发，本文探讨了是否存在适合机器体现的有用的爱概念，因为历史上一直在探索诸如生命或智能之类的模糊概念是否可以被深思熟虑地抽象和重新想象，就像在机器智能或人工生命领域一样。本文提出了机器之爱的候选概念，特别受到积极心理学和心理治疗工作的启发：提供无条件的支持，使人类能够自主地追求自己的成长和发展。通过概念验证实验，本文旨在强调在机器学习中需要更丰富的人类繁荣模型，提供一个示例框架，通过该框架可以将积极心理学与机器学习相结合，以实现机器之爱的粗略概念，并证明当前的语言模型开始能够体现定性的人文原则。结论是，尽管目前机器学习可能经常使我们上瘾、分散注意力或分裂我们，但另一种途径可能正在开辟：我们可以调整机器学习来支持我们的成长，通过它帮助我们朝着我们的最高愿望调整自己。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种机器爱的概念，旨在通过结合积极心理学与机器学习，帮助人类实现自主成长，弥补当前机器学习在促进人类幸福方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 当前机器学习过度关注短期欲望满足，与科学定义的人类幸福目标相悖，需探索以爱为核心的人文导向模型以实现技术潜力。
AI.method: 基于积极心理学与心理治疗理论，构建机器爱框架并通过语言模型实验验证其可行性，展示机器学习系统可融入人文原则。
AI.result: 实验证明现有语言模型能初步体现无条件支持的人文特性，为机器学习与人类成长的结合提供实践路径。
AI.conclusion: 尽管机器学习常导致成瘾与分裂，但通过机器爱等概念的探索，技术可转向支持人类实现更高层次的自我追求。
