tldr: 本文提出一种结合粒子群优化（PSO）与卷积神经网络（ConvNet）及Transformer的动态模型，用于改进视频中的人类行为识别（HAR）。
motivation: 传统卷积神经网络（ConvNet）在图像识别中表现优异，但难以直接应用于视频动作识别，因其缺乏对时间特征的有效建模。本文旨在通过引入动态协作学习机制提升视频动作识别的准确性。
method: 提出动态PSO-ConvNet模型，将每个神经网络的权重向量视为相空间中的粒子，通过粒子间共享权重和损失函数梯度估计实现协作学习，并结合Transformer和循环神经网络（RNN）处理时间信息。
result: 在UCF-101、Kinetics-400和HMDB-51数据集上实验表明，该方法准确率提升最高达9%，且协作学习优于非协作学习。
conclusion: 动态PSO-ConvNet模型通过有效捕捉视频中人类动作的时空动态特性，为改进视频动作识别提供了可行方向。
search_text: Video Action Recognition Collaborative Learning with Dynamics via PSO-ConvNet Transformer 通过 PSO-ConvNet Transformer 进行视频动作识别动态协作学习 Recognizing human actions in video sequences, known as Human Action Recognition (HAR), is a challenging task in pattern recognition. While Convolutional Neural Networks (ConvNets) have shown remarkable success in image recognition, they are not always directly applicable to HAR, as temporal features are critical for accurate classification. In this paper, we propose a novel dynamic PSO-ConvNet model for learning actions in videos, building on our recent work in image recognition. Our approach leverages a framework where the weight vector of each neural network represents the position of a particle in phase space, and particles share their current weight vectors and gradient estimates of the Loss function. To extend our approach to video, we integrate ConvNets with state-of-the-art temporal methods such as Transformer and Recurrent Neural Networks. Our experimental results on the UCF-101 dataset demonstrate substantial improvements of up to 9% in accuracy, which confirms the effectiveness of our proposed method. In addition, we conducted experiments on larger and more variety of datasets including Kinetics-400 and HMDB-51 and obtained preference for Collaborative Learning in comparison with Non-Collaborative Learning (Individual Learning). Overall, our dynamic PSO-ConvNet model provides a promising direction for improving HAR by better capturing the spatio-temporal dynamics of human actions in videos. The code is available at https://github.com/leonlha/Video-Action-Recognition-Collaborative-Learning-with-Dynamics-via-PSO-ConvNet-Transformer. 识别视频序列中的人类动作，称为人类动作识别 (HAR)，是模式识别中的一项具有挑战性的任务。虽然卷积神经网络 (ConvNet) 在图像识别方面取得了显着的成功，但它们并不总是直接适用于 HAR，因为时间特征对于准确分类至关重要。在本文中，我们基于我们最近在图像识别方面的工作，提出了一种新颖的动态 PSO-ConvNet 模型，用于学习视频中的动作。我们的方法利用了一个框架，其中每个神经网络的权重向量表示粒子在相空间中的位置，并且粒子共享其当前的权重向量和损失函数的梯度估计。为了将我们的方法扩展到视频领域，我们将 ConvNet 与最先进的时间方法（例如 Transformer 和循环神经网络）集成。我们在 UCF-101 数据集上的实验结果表明，准确率大幅提高了 9%，这证实了我们提出的方法的有效性。此外，我们在包括 Kinetics-400 和 HMDB-51 在内的更大、更多样化的数据集上进行了实验，并获得了与非协作学习（个人学习）相比协作学习的偏好。总的来说，我们的动态 PSO-ConvNet 模型通过更好地捕捉视频中人类行为的时空动态，为改进 HAR 提供了一个有前途的方向。该代码位于 https://github.com/leonlha/Video-Action-Recognition-Collaborative-Learning-with-Dynamics-via-PSO-ConvNet-Transformer。 本文提出一种结合粒子群优化（PSO）与卷积神经网络（ConvNet）及Transformer的动态模型，用于改进视频中的人类行为识别（HAR）。 Nguyen Huu Phong,Bernardete Ribeiro cs.CV

authors_text: Albert Lu,Hongxin Zhang,Yanzhe Zhang,Xuezhi Wang,Diyi Yang
title: Bounding the Capabilities of Large Language Models in Open Text Generation with Prompt Constraints
title_zh: 通过即时约束限制大型语言模型在开放文本生成中的能力
comment: 27 pages, 13 figures, 11 tables, to be published in EACL 2023 Findings
comments: 27 pages, 13 figures, 11 tables, to be published in EACL 2023 Findings
abstract: The limits of open-ended generative models are unclear, yet increasingly important. What causes them to succeed and what causes them to fail? In this paper, we take a prompt-centric approach to analyzing and bounding the abilities of open-ended generative models. We present a generic methodology of analysis with two challenging prompt constraint types: structural and stylistic. These constraint types are categorized into a set of well-defined constraints that are analyzable by a single prompt. We then systematically create a diverse set of simple, natural, and useful prompts to robustly analyze each individual constraint. Using the GPT-3 text-davinci-002 model as a case study, we generate outputs from our collection of prompts and analyze the model's generative failures. We also show the generalizability of our proposed method on other large models like BLOOM and OPT. Our results and our in-context mitigation strategies reveal open challenges for future research. We have publicly released our code at https://github.com/SALT-NLP/Bound-Cap-LLM.
summary: The limits of open-ended generative models are unclear, yet increasingly important. What causes them to succeed and what causes them to fail? In this paper, we take a prompt-centric approach to analyzing and bounding the abilities of open-ended generative models. We present a generic methodology of analysis with two challenging prompt constraint types: structural and stylistic. These constraint types are categorized into a set of well-defined constraints that are analyzable by a single prompt. We then systematically create a diverse set of simple, natural, and useful prompts to robustly analyze each individual constraint. Using the GPT-3 text-davinci-002 model as a case study, we generate outputs from our collection of prompts and analyze the model's generative failures. We also show the generalizability of our proposed method on other large models like BLOOM and OPT. Our results and our in-context mitigation strategies reveal open challenges for future research. We have publicly released our code at https://github.com/SALT-NLP/Bound-Cap-LLM.
abstract_zh: 开放式生成模型的局限性尚不清楚，但越来越重要。是什么导致他们成功，又是什么导致他们失败？在本文中，我们采用以提示为中心的方法来分析和限制开放式生成模型的能力。我们提出了一种通用的分析方法，具有两种具有挑战性的提示约束类型：结构和文体。这些约束类型被分类为一组明确定义的约束，可以通过单个提示进行分析。然后，我们系统地创建一组多样化的简单、自然且有用的提示，以稳健地分析每个单独的约束。使用 GPT-3 text-davinci-002 模型作为案例研究，我们从提示集合中生成输出并分析模型的生成失败。我们还展示了我们提出的方法在 BLOOM 和 OPT 等其他大型模型上的通用性。我们的结果和我们的具体缓解策略揭示了未来研究的开放挑战。我们已在 https://github.com/SALT-NLP/Bound-Cap-LLM 公开发布了我们的代码。

AI.tldr: 本文通过提示约束分析大语言模型在开放文本生成中的能力边界。
AI.motivation: 开放生成模型的局限性尚不明确，但其成功与失败的原因对模型改进至关重要。
AI.method: 提出结构化和风格化两类提示约束，设计多样化提示测试模型，并分析GPT-3、BLOOM等模型的生成失败案例。
AI.result: 揭示了模型在复杂约束下的生成局限性，并提出了上下文缓解策略。
AI.conclusion: 当前模型仍存在开放性挑战，方法具有通用性且代码已公开。

title: Learning with Impartiality to Walk on the Pareto Frontier of Fairness, Privacy, and Utility
title_zh: 公正地学习，走在公平、隐私和实用的帕累托前沿
abstract: Deploying machine learning (ML) models often requires both fairness and privacy guarantees. Both of these objectives present unique trade-offs with the utility (e.g., accuracy) of the model. However, the mutual interactions between fairness, privacy, and utility are less well-understood. As a result, often only one objective is optimized, while the others are tuned as hyper-parameters. Because they implicitly prioritize certain objectives, such designs bias the model in pernicious, undetectable ways. To address this, we adopt impartiality as a principle: design of ML pipelines should not favor one objective over another. We propose impartially-specified models, which provide us with accurate Pareto frontiers that show the inherent trade-offs between the objectives. Extending two canonical ML frameworks for privacy-preserving learning, we provide two methods (FairDP-SGD and FairPATE) to train impartially-specified models and recover the Pareto frontier. Through theoretical privacy analysis and a comprehensive empirical study, we provide an answer to the question of where fairness mitigation should be integrated within a privacy-aware ML pipeline.
summary: Deploying machine learning (ML) models often requires both fairness and privacy guarantees. Both of these objectives present unique trade-offs with the utility (e.g., accuracy) of the model. However, the mutual interactions between fairness, privacy, and utility are less well-understood. As a result, often only one objective is optimized, while the others are tuned as hyper-parameters. Because they implicitly prioritize certain objectives, such designs bias the model in pernicious, undetectable ways. To address this, we adopt impartiality as a principle: design of ML pipelines should not favor one objective over another. We propose impartially-specified models, which provide us with accurate Pareto frontiers that show the inherent trade-offs between the objectives. Extending two canonical ML frameworks for privacy-preserving learning, we provide two methods (FairDP-SGD and FairPATE) to train impartially-specified models and recover the Pareto frontier. Through theoretical privacy analysis and a comprehensive empirical study, we provide an answer to the question of where fairness mitigation should be integrated within a privacy-aware ML pipeline.
abstract_zh: 部署机器学习 (ML) 模型通常需要公平和隐私保证。这两个目标都与模型的实用性（例如准确性）进行了独特的权衡。然而，公平、隐私和效用之间的相互作用尚不清楚。因此，通常只优化一个目标，而其他目标则作为超参数进行调整。因为它们隐式地优先考虑某些目标，所以这种设计会以有害的、不可察觉的方式使模型产生偏差。为了解决这个问题，我们采用公正性作为一项原则：机器学习管道的设计不应偏向一个目标而不是另一个目标。我们提出了公正指定的模型，它为我们提供了准确的帕累托前沿，显示了目标之间固有的权衡。扩展两个用于隐私保护学习的规范机器学习框架，我们提供了两种方法（FairDP-SGD 和 FairPATE）来训练公正指定的模型并恢复帕累托前沿。通过理论隐私分析和全面的实证研究，我们回答了公平缓解应该集成到隐私感知机器学习管道中的何处的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过设计无偏的机器学习模型，揭示公平性、隐私和效用三者之间的帕累托前沿，解决现有方法在单一目标优化导致的偏见问题。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习模型在部署时通常只优化单一目标（如公平性或隐私），而将其他目标作为超参数处理，这种设计隐含优先级导致模型存在不可检测的偏见。
AI.method: 提出两种方法（FairDP-SGD和FairPATE），基于隐私保护框架扩展，结合理论隐私分析与实证研究，构建无偏模型以恢复三目标间的帕累托前沿。
AI.result: 通过理论分析和实验验证，明确了公平性缓解在隐私感知机器学习流水线中的集成位置，展示了三目标间的真实权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡公平性、隐私与效用，提供准确的帕累托前沿，为实际应用中多目标协同优化提供了理论指导和实现路径。

authors_text: Sai Shankar Narasimhan,Sharachchandra Bhat,Sandeep P. Chinchali
title: Safe Networked Robotics with Probabilistic Verification
title_zh: 具有概率验证的安全网络机器人
abstract: Autonomous robots must utilize rich sensory data to make safe control decisions. To process this data, compute-constrained robots often require assistance from remote computation, or the cloud, that runs compute-intensive deep neural network perception or control models. However, this assistance comes at the cost of a time delay due to network latency, resulting in past observations being used in the cloud to compute the control commands for the present robot state. Such communication delays could potentially lead to the violation of essential safety properties, such as collision avoidance. This paper develops methods to ensure the safety of robots operated over communication networks with stochastic latency. To do so, we use tools from formal verification to construct a shield, i.e., a run-time monitor, that provides a list of safe actions for any delayed sensory observation, given the expected and maximum network latency. Our shield is minimally intrusive and enables networked robots to satisfy key safety constraints, expressed as temporal logic specifications, with desired probability. We demonstrate our approach on a real F1/10th autonomous vehicle that navigates in indoor environments and transmits rich LiDAR sensory data over congested WiFi links.

Such communication delays could potentially lead to the violation of essential safety properties, such as collision avoidance. To do so, we use tools from formal verification to construct a shield, i.e., a run-time monitor, that provides a list of safe actions for any delayed sensory observation, given the expected and maximum network latency. We demonstrate our approach on a real F1/10th autonomous vehicle that navigates in indoor environments and transmits rich LiDAR sensory data over congested WiFi links.
abstract_zh: 自主机器人必须利用丰富的传感数据来做出安全的控制决策。为了处理这些数据，计算受限的机器人通常需要远程计算或云的帮助，运行计算密集型深度神经网络感知或控制模型。然而，这种帮助是以网络延迟造成的时间延迟为代价的，导致过去的观察结果被用于云中来计算当前机器人状态的控制命令。这种通信延迟可能会导致违反基本安全特性，例如避免碰撞。本文开发了确保在随机延迟的通信网络上运行的机器人安全的方法。为此，我们使用形式验证中的工具来构建一个防护罩，即运行时监视器，在给定预期和最大网络延迟的情况下，它为任何延迟的感官观察提供安全操作列表。我们的防护罩具有最低限度的侵入性，使网络机器人能够以所需的概率满足关键的安全约束（以时间逻辑规范表示）。我们在真正的 F1/10 自动驾驶车辆上演示了我们的方法，该车辆在室内环境中导航并通过拥塞的 WiFi 链路传输丰富的 LiDAR 传感数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于概率验证的方法，通过构建实时监控器（shield）确保网络化机器人在随机延迟下的安全控制。
AI.motivation: 网络化机器人依赖云端计算处理感知数据，但通信延迟可能导致安全属性（如避障）违反，需解决延迟带来的安全风险问题。
AI.method: 利用形式化验证工具构建运行时监控器（shield），根据预期和最大网络延迟生成安全动作列表，满足时序逻辑规范的概率安全约束。
AI.result: 在室内环境下，基于F1/10th自动驾驶车辆的实验验证了该方法在拥堵WiFi链路传输LiDAR数据时的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过最小化干预实现了网络化机器人满足关键安全约束的概率保证，为实时网络控制提供了可行解决方案。

Our shield is minimally intrusive and enables networked robots to satisfy key safety constraints, expressed as temporal logic specifications, with desired probability. title: Generative Ornstein-Uhlenbeck Markets via Geometric Deep Learning
title_zh: 通过几何深度学习生成 Ornstein-Uhlenbeck 市场
abstract: We consider the problem of simultaneously approximating the conditional distribution of market prices and their log returns with a single machine learning model. We show that an instance of the GDN model of Kratsios and Papon (2022) solves this problem without having prior assumptions on the market's "clipped" log returns, other than that they follow a generalized Ornstein-Uhlenbeck process with a priori unknown dynamics. We provide universal approximation guarantees for these conditional distributions and contingent claims with a Lipschitz payoff function.
summary: We consider the problem of simultaneously approximating the conditional distribution of market prices and their log returns with a single machine learning model. We show that an instance of the GDN model of Kratsios and Papon (2022) solves this problem without having prior assumptions on the market's "clipped" log returns, other than that they follow a generalized Ornstein-Uhlenbeck process with a priori unknown dynamics. We provide universal approximation guarantees for these conditional distributions and contingent claims with a Lipschitz payoff function.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑使用单个机器学习模型同时逼近市场价格的条件分布及其对数回报的问题。我们证明，Kratsios 和 Papon（2022）的 GDN 模型的一个实例解决了这个问题，无需事先假设市场的“剪裁”对数回报，除了遵循具有先验未知动态的广义 Ornstein-Uhlenbeck 过程之外。我们通过 Lipschitz 支付函数为这些条件分布和或有债权提供通用近似保证。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出利用几何深度学习模型同时逼近市场价格及其对数收益率的条件分布。
AI.motivation: 传统模型常需预先假设市场收益率的分布形式，而实际市场动态复杂且未知，需更灵活的建模方法。
AI.method: 基于Kratsios和Papon（2022）的GDN模型，无需先验假设，直接建模广义奥恩斯坦-乌伦贝克过程的市场动态。
AI.result: 证明了该模型对条件分布及Lipschitz型衍生品支付函数具有通用逼近能力。
AI.conclusion: 几何深度学习为无需先验假设的市场动态建模提供了理论保证与有效工具。

authors_text: Lajanugen Logeswaran,Sungryull Sohn,Yunseok Jang,Moontae Lee,Honglak Lee
title: Unsupervised Task Graph Generation from Instructional Video Transcripts
title_zh: 从教学视频脚本生成无监督任务图
abstract: This work explores the problem of generating task graphs of real-world activities. Different from prior formulations, we consider a setting where text transcripts of instructional videos performing a real-world activity (e.g., making coffee) are provided and the goal is to identify the key steps relevant to the task as well as the dependency relationship between these key steps. We propose a novel task graph generation approach that combines the reasoning capabilities of instruction-tuned language models along with clustering and ranking components to generate accurate task graphs in a completely unsupervised manner. We show that the proposed approach generates more accurate task graphs compared to a supervised learning approach on tasks from the ProceL and CrossTask datasets.
summary: This work explores the problem of generating task graphs of real-world activities. Different from prior formulations, we consider a setting where text transcripts of instructional videos performing a real-world activity (e.g., making coffee) are provided and the goal is to identify the key steps relevant to the task as well as the dependency relationship between these key steps. We propose a novel task graph generation approach that combines the reasoning capabilities of instruction-tuned language models along with clustering and ranking components to generate accurate task graphs in a completely unsupervised manner. We show that the proposed approach generates more accurate task graphs compared to a supervised learning approach on tasks from the ProceL and CrossTask datasets.
abstract_zh: 这项工作探讨了生成现实世界活动的任务图的问题。与之前的表述不同，我们考虑提供执行现实世界活动（例如，煮咖啡）的教学视频的文本转录的设置，目标是识别与任务相关的关键步骤以及这些关键步骤之间的依赖关系。我们提出了一种新颖的任务图生成方法，它将指令调整语言模型的推理能力与聚类和排名组件结合起来，以完全无监督的方式生成准确的任务图。我们表明，与 ProceL 和 CrossTask 数据集任务的监督学习方法相比，所提出的方法可以生成更准确的任务图。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无监督方法，从教学视频字幕中生成现实任务的关键步骤及其依赖关系的任务图。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖监督学习且需标注数据，而实际场景中高质量标注成本高，需探索无需标注的自动任务图生成方案。
AI.method: 结合指令微调语言模型与聚类排序组件，通过文本分析提取关键步骤并构建依赖关系，实现完全无监督的任务图生成。
AI.result: 在ProceL和CrossTask数据集上，该方法生成的任务图准确性优于监督学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 无监督方法在任务图生成任务中表现优异，为自动化分析未标注教学视频提供了有效技术路径。

authors_text: Yan Xu,Mahdi Namazifar,Devamanyu Hazarika,Aishwarya Padmakumar,Yang Liu,Dilek Hakkani-Tür
title: KILM: Knowledge Injection into Encoder-Decoder Language Models
title_zh: KILM：将知识注入编码器-解码器语言模型
abstract: Large pre-trained language models (PLMs) have been shown to retain implicit knowledge within their parameters. To enhance this implicit knowledge, we propose Knowledge Injection into Language Models (KILM), a novel approach that injects entity-related knowledge into encoder-decoder PLMs, via a generative knowledge infilling objective through continued pre-training. This is done without architectural modifications to the PLMs or adding additional parameters. Experimental results over a suite of knowledge-intensive tasks spanning numerous datasets show that KILM enables models to retain more knowledge and hallucinate less, while preserving their original performance on general NLU and NLG tasks. KILM also demonstrates improved zero-shot performances on tasks such as entity disambiguation, outperforming state-of-the-art models having 30x more parameters.
summary: Large pre-trained language models (PLMs) have been shown to retain implicit knowledge within their parameters. To enhance this implicit knowledge, we propose Knowledge Injection into Language Models (KILM), a novel approach that injects entity-related knowledge into encoder-decoder PLMs, via a generative knowledge infilling objective through continued pre-training. This is done without architectural modifications to the PLMs or adding additional parameters. Experimental results over a suite of knowledge-intensive tasks spanning numerous datasets show that KILM enables models to retain more knowledge and hallucinate less, while preserving their original performance on general NLU and NLG tasks. KILM also demonstrates improved zero-shot performances on tasks such as entity disambiguation, outperforming state-of-the-art models having 30x more parameters.
abstract_zh: 大型预训练语言模型 (PLM) 已被证明可以在其参数内保留隐含知识。为了增强这种隐性知识，我们提出了语言模型知识注入（KILM），这是一种新方法，通过持续预训练生成知识填充目标，将实体相关知识注入编码器-解码器 PLM 中。无需对 PLM 进行架构修改或添加其他参数即可完成此操作。跨越大量数据集的一系列知识密集型任务的实验结果表明，KILM 使模型能够保留更多知识并减少幻觉，同时保留其在一般 NLU 和 NLG 任务上的原始性能。 KILM 还展示了在实体消歧等任务上改进的零样本性能，其性能优于具有 30 倍以上参数的最先进模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出KILM方法，通过生成式知识填充目标将实体相关知识注入编码器-解码器语言模型，无需修改模型结构或增加参数。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型已包含隐式知识，但其知识保留能力有限且易产生幻觉，需通过外部知识增强模型表现。
AI.method: 设计生成式知识填充目标，在保持模型架构不变的前提下，通过继续预训练将实体知识注入模型参数。
AI.result: 在多类知识密集型任务中，KILM显著提升知识保留能力并减少幻觉，同时保持原有NLU/NLG性能，零样本实体消歧任务表现优于参数规模大30倍的模型。
AI.conclusion: KILM提供了一种无需复杂修改即可增强模型知识储备的有效方法，在保持基础能力的同时提升知识密集型任务表现。

title: Mixed Traffic Control and Coordination from Pixels
title_zh: 混合交通控制和像素协调
comment: Accepted to IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2024
comments: Accepted to IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2024
abstract: Traffic congestion is a persistent problem in our society. Previous methods for traffic control have proven futile in alleviating current congestion levels leading researchers to explore ideas with robot vehicles given the increased emergence of vehicles with different levels of autonomy on our roads. This gives rise to mixed traffic control, where robot vehicles regulate human-driven vehicles through reinforcement learning (RL). However, most existing studies use precise observations that require domain expertise and hand engineering for each road network's observation space. Additionally, precise observations use global information, such as environment outflow, and local information, i.e., vehicle positions and velocities. Obtaining this information requires updating existing road infrastructure with vast sensor environments and communication to potentially unwilling human drivers. We consider image observations, a modality that has not been extensively explored for mixed traffic control via RL, as the alternative: 1) images do not require a complete re-imagination of the observation space from environment to environment; 2) images are ubiquitous through satellite imagery, in-car camera systems, and traffic monitoring systems; and 3) images only require communication to equipment. In this work, we show robot vehicles using image observations can achieve competitive performance to using precise information on environments, including ring, figure eight, intersection, merge, and bottleneck. In certain scenarios, our approach even outperforms using precision observations, e.g., up to 8% increase in average vehicle velocity in the merge environment, despite only using local traffic information as opposed to global traffic information.

Additionally, precise observations use global information, such as environment outflow, and local information, i.e., vehicle positions and velocities. Obtaining this information requires updating existing road infrastructure with vast sensor environments and communication to potentially unwilling human drivers. We consider image observations, a modality that has not been extensively explored for mixed traffic control via RL, as the alternative: 1) images do not require a complete re-imagination of the observation space from environment to environment; 2) images are ubiquitous through satellite imagery, in-car camera systems, and traffic monitoring systems; and 3) images only require communication to equipment. In this work, we show robot vehicles using image observations can achieve competitive performance to using precise information on environments, including ring, figure eight, intersection, merge, and bottleneck. In certain scenarios, our approach even outperforms using precision observations, e.g., up to 8% increase in average vehicle velocity in the merge environment, despite only using local traffic information as opposed to global traffic information.
abstract_zh: 交通拥堵是我们社会长期存在的问题。事实证明，以前的交通控制方法对于缓解当前的拥堵水平是徒劳的，鉴于道路上不同程度的自主车辆的出现越来越多，研究人员开始探索机器人车辆的想法。这就产生了混合交通控制，其中机器人车辆通过强化学习（RL）来调节人类驾驶的车辆。然而，大多数现有研究使用精确观测，需要领域专业知识和对每个道路网络观测空间的手工工程。此外，精确观测还使用全局信息（例如环境流出）和局部信息（例如车辆位置和速度）。获取这些信息需要更新现有的道路基础设施，提供大量的传感器环境以及与可能不情愿的人类驾驶员的通信。我们考虑将图像观察作为替代方案，这种方式尚未通过 RL 进行混合交通控制的广泛探索：1）图像不需要从一个环境到另一个环境对观察空间进行完全重新想象； 2) 通过卫星图像、车载摄像系统和交通监控系统，图像无处不在； 3) 图像仅需要与设备通信。在这项工作中，我们展示了使用图像观察的机器人车辆可以实现与使用精确的环境信息（包括环形、8 字形、交叉点、合并和瓶颈）竞争的性能。在某些情况下，我们的方法甚至优于使用精确观测的方法，例如，尽管仅使用本地交通信息而不是全局交通信息，但合并环境中的平均车辆速度提高了 8%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图像观测的混合交通控制方法，利用强化学习实现自动驾驶车辆对人类驾驶车辆的调控。
AI.motivation: 传统交通控制方法依赖精确的环境数据和基础设施改造，成本高且难以推广。图像观测无需重构观测空间，可通过现有摄像头系统实现，更具可行性。
AI.method: 采用强化学习框架，以图像作为观测输入，训练自动驾驶车辆在环形路、交叉口等复杂场景中协调交通流。
AI.result: 在多种交通场景中，图像观测方法表现与精确观测相当，部分场景（如合并车道）平均车速提升达8%。
AI.conclusion: 图像观测为混合交通控制提供了无需全局信息的可行方案，未来可扩展至更复杂的现实交通环境。

title: Machine Learning for Cutting Planes in Integer Programming: A Survey
title_zh: 整数规划中切割平面的机器学习：一项调查
abstract: We survey recent work on machine learning (ML) techniques for selecting cutting planes (or cuts) in mixed-integer linear programming (MILP). Despite the availability of various classes of cuts, the task of choosing a set of cuts to add to the linear programming (LP) relaxation at a given node of the branch-and-bound (B&B) tree has defied both formal and heuristic solutions to date. ML offers a promising approach for improving the cut selection process by using data to identify promising cuts that accelerate the solution of MILP instances. This paper presents an overview of the topic, highlighting recent advances in the literature, common approaches to data collection, evaluation, and ML model architectures. We analyze the empirical results in the literature in an attempt to quantify the progress that has been made and conclude by suggesting avenues for future research.
summary: We survey recent work on machine learning (ML) techniques for selecting cutting planes (or cuts) in mixed-integer linear programming (MILP). Despite the availability of various classes of cuts, the task of choosing a set of cuts to add to the linear programming (LP) relaxation at a given node of the branch-and-bound (B&B) tree has defied both formal and heuristic solutions to date. ML offers a promising approach for improving the cut selection process by using data to identify promising cuts that accelerate the solution of MILP instances. This paper presents an overview of the topic, highlighting recent advances in the literature, common approaches to data collection, evaluation, and ML model architectures. We analyze the empirical results in the literature in an attempt to quantify the progress that has been made and conclude by suggesting avenues for future research.
abstract_zh: 我们调查了用于在混合整数线性规划 (MILP) 中选择切割平面（或切割）的机器学习 (ML) 技术的最新工作。尽管存在各种类别的割断，但迄今为止，选择一组割断以添加到分支定界 (B&B) 树的给定节点处的线性规划 (LP) 松弛的任务仍然无法满足形式和启发式解决方案。 ML 提供了一种有前途的方法，通过使用数据来识别有希望的剪切，从而加速 MILP 实例的解决方案，从而改进剪切选择过程。本文概述了该主题，重点介绍了文献的最新进展、数据收集、评估和 ML 模型架构的常见方法。我们分析文献中的实证结果，试图量化已取得的进展，并通过建议未来研究的途径得出结论。

AI.tldr: 本文概述了机器学习技术在混合整数线性规划中切割平面选择的最新研究进展。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在切割平面选择上存在效率瓶颈，而机器学习可通过数据驱动方式提升整数规划求解速度。
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析现有研究的数据收集方法、评估指标及机器学习模型架构设计。
AI.result: 实证结果表明机器学习方法在特定场景下能有效加速MILP求解，但存在模型泛化能力不足等问题。
AI.conclusion: 未来需加强数据标准化建设，探索更高效的模型架构并提升算法在复杂实例中的稳定性。

search_text: Machine Learning for Cutting Planes in Integer Programming: A Survey 整数规划中切割平面的机器学习：一项调查 We survey recent work on machine learning (ML) techniques for selecting cutting planes (or cuts) in mixed-integer linear programming (MILP). Despite the availability of various classes of cuts, the task of choosing a set of cuts to add to the linear programming (LP) relaxation at a given node of the branch-and-bound (B&B) tree has defied both formal and heuristic solutions to date. ML offers a promising approach for improving the cut selection process by using data to identify promising cuts that accelerate the solution of MILP instances. This paper presents an overview of the topic, highlighting recent advances in the literature, common approaches to data collection, evaluation, and ML model architectures. We analyze the empirical results in the literature in an attempt to quantify the progress that has been made and conclude by suggesting avenues for future research. 我们调查了用于在混合整数线性规划 (MILP) 中选择切割平面（或切割）的机器学习 (ML) 技术的最新工作。尽管存在各种类别的割断，但迄今为止，选择一组割断以添加到分支定界 (B&B) 树的给定节点处的线性规划 (LP) 松弛的任务仍然无法满足形式和启发式解决方案。 ML 提供了一种有前途的方法，通过使用数据来识别有希望的剪切，从而加速 MILP 实例的解决方案，从而改进剪切选择过程。本文概述了该主题，重点介绍了文献的最新进展、数据收集、评估和 ML 模型架构的常见方法。我们分析文献中的实证结果，试图量化已取得的进展，并通过建议未来研究的途径得出结论。 本文概述了机器学习技术在混合整数线性规划中切割平面选择的最新研究进展。 Arnaud Deza,Elias B. Khalil math.OC,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: William T. Redman,Juan M. Bello-Rivas,Maria Fonoberova,Ryan Mohr,Ioannis G. Kevrekidis,Igor Mezić
title: Identifying Equivalent Training Dynamics
title_zh: 确定等效的训练动态
abstract: Study of the nonlinear evolution deep neural network (DNN) parameters undergo during training has uncovered regimes of distinct dynamical behavior. While a detailed understanding of these phenomena has the potential to advance improvements in training efficiency and robustness, the lack of methods for identifying when DNN models have equivalent dynamics limits the insight that can be gained from prior work. Topological conjugacy, a notion from dynamical systems theory, provides a precise definition of dynamical equivalence, offering a possible route to address this need. However, topological conjugacies have historically been challenging to compute. By leveraging advances in Koopman operator theory, we develop a framework for identifying conjugate and non-conjugate training dynamics. To validate our approach, we demonstrate that comparing Koopman eigenvalues can correctly identify a known equivalence between online mirror descent and online gradient descent. We then utilize our approach to: (a) identify non-conjugate training dynamics between shallow and wide fully connected neural networks; (b) characterize the early phase of training dynamics in convolutional neural networks; (c) uncover non-conjugate training dynamics in Transformers that do and do not undergo grokking. Our results, across a range of DNN architectures, illustrate the flexibility of our framework and highlight its potential for shedding new light on training dynamics.
summary: Study of the nonlinear evolution deep neural network (DNN) parameters undergo during training has uncovered regimes of distinct dynamical behavior. While a detailed understanding of these phenomena has the potential to advance improvements in training efficiency and robustness, the lack of methods for identifying when DNN models have equivalent dynamics limits the insight that can be gained from prior work. Topological conjugacy, a notion from dynamical systems theory, provides a precise definition of dynamical equivalence, offering a possible route to address this need. However, topological conjugacies have historically been challenging to compute. By leveraging advances in Koopman operator theory, we develop a framework for identifying conjugate and non-conjugate training dynamics. To validate our approach, we demonstrate that comparing Koopman eigenvalues can correctly identify a known equivalence between online mirror descent and online gradient descent. We then utilize our approach to: (a) identify non-conjugate training dynamics between shallow and wide fully connected neural networks; (b) characterize the early phase of training dynamics in convolutional neural networks; (c) uncover non-conjugate training dynamics in Transformers that do and do not undergo grokking. Our results, across a range of DNN architectures, illustrate the flexibility of our framework and highlight its potential for shedding new light on training dynamics.
abstract_zh: 对训练过程中非线性演化深度神经网络 (DNN) 参数的研究揭示了不同动态行为的机制。虽然对这些现象的详细理解有可能促进训练效率和鲁棒性的提高，但缺乏识别 DNN 模型何时具有等效动态的方法限制了从先前的工作中获得的见解。拓扑共轭是动力系统理论的一个概念，它提供了动力等价的精确定义，为满足这一需求提供了可能的途径。然而，拓扑共轭在历史上一直难以计算。通过利用库普曼算子理论的进步，我们开发了一个用于识别共轭和非共轭训练动态的框架。为了验证我们的方法，我们证明比较库普曼特征值可以正确识别在线镜像下降和在线梯度下降之间的已知等价性。然后，我们利用我们的方法：（a）识别浅层和广泛的全连接神经网络之间的非共轭训练动态； (b) 表征卷积神经网络训练动态的早期阶段； (c) 揭示变形金刚中经过和不经过 grokking 的非共轭训练动态。我们在一系列 DNN 架构中的结果说明了我们框架的灵活性，并强调了其为训练动态提供新思路的潜力。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于Koopman算子理论的框架，用于识别深度神经网络（DNN）训练过程中的等效动力学行为。
AI.motivation: 现有研究虽发现DNN训练中的不同动力学行为，但缺乏有效方法判断模型动力学是否等效，限制了研究进展。拓扑共轭理论虽能定义动力学等效性，但计算困难。
AI.method: 利用Koopman算子理论构建框架，通过比较Koopman特征值识别共轭与非共轭训练动力学，并验证于多种网络架构。
AI.result: 成功识别了在线镜像下降与梯度下降的等效性，发现浅层与宽网络、CNN早期训练阶段及存在/不存在grokking现象的Transformer的非共轭动力学差异。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在多种DNN架构中展现出灵活性，为深入理解训练动力学提供了新工具。

authors_text: Shuijing Liu,Aamir Hasan,Kaiwen Hong,Chun-Kai Yao,Justin Lin,Weihang Liang,Megan A. Bayles,Wendy A. Rogers,Katherine Driggs-Campbell
title: Designing a Wayfinding Robot for People with Visual Impairments
title_zh: 为视力障碍人士设计寻路机器人
comment: Presented at ICRA 2022 Workshop on Intelligent Control Methods and Machine Learning Algorithms for Human-Robot Interaction and Assistive Robotics
comments: Presented at ICRA 2022 Workshop on Intelligent Control Methods and Machine Learning Algorithms for Human-Robot Interaction and Assistive Robotics
abstract: People with visual impairments (PwVI) often have difficulties navigating through unfamiliar indoor environments. However, current wayfinding tools are fairly limited. In this short paper, we present our in-progress work on a wayfinding robot for PwVI. The robot takes an audio command from the user that specifies the intended destination. Then, the robot autonomously plans a path to navigate to the goal. We use sensors to estimate the real-time position of the user, which is fed to the planner to improve the safety and comfort of the user. In addition, the robot describes the surroundings to the user periodically to prevent disorientation and potential accidents. We demonstrate the feasibility of our design in a public indoor environment. Finally, we analyze the limitations of our current design, as well as our insights and future work. A demonstration video can be found at https://youtu.be/BS9r5bkIass.
summary: People with visual impairments (PwVI) often have difficulties navigating through unfamiliar indoor environments. However, current wayfinding tools are fairly limited. We use sensors to estimate the real-time position of the user, which is fed to the planner to improve the safety and comfort of the user. In addition, the robot describes the surroundings to the user periodically to prevent disorientation and potential accidents. We demonstrate the feasibility of our design in a public indoor environment. Finally, we analyze the limitations of our current design, as well as our insights and future work. A demonstration video can be found at https://youtu.be/BS9r5bkIass.
abstract_zh: 视力障碍人士 (PwVI) 在陌生的室内环境中通常会遇到困难。然而，当前的寻路工具相当有限。在这篇简短的论文中，我们介绍了我们正在进行的 PwVI 寻路机器人工作。机器人接受用户发出的指定目的地的音频命令。然后，机器人自主规划一条路径以导航至目标。我们使用传感器来估计用户的实时位置，并将其反馈给规划器以提高用户的安全性和舒适度。此外，机器人会定期向用户描述周围环境，以防止迷失方向和潜在的事故。我们在公共室内环境中展示了我们设计的可行性。最后，我们分析了当前设计的局限性，以及我们的见解和未来的工作。演示视频可在 https://youtu.be/BS9r5bkIass 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种辅助视障人士在室内环境中自主导航的机器人，通过音频指令规划路径并实时反馈环境信息。
AI.motivation: 视障人士在陌生室内环境中导航存在困难，现有导盲工具功能有限，需开发更安全、便捷的解决方案。
AI.method: 机器人通过音频指令接收目的地信息，结合传感器实时定位用户位置并规划路径，同时周期性描述周围环境以防止迷失。
AI.result: 在公共室内环境中验证了设计的可行性，并分析了当前系统的局限性及未来改进方向。
AI.conclusion: 该设计初步验证了可行性，但需进一步提升定位精度与环境适应性，未来将优化算法并扩展应用场景。

In addition, the robot describes the surroundings to the user periodically to prevent disorientation and potential accidents. We demonstrate the feasibility of our design in a public indoor environment. Finally, we analyze the limitations of our current design, as well as our insights and future work. A demonstration video can be found at https://youtu.be/BS9r5bkIass. 视力障碍人士 (PwVI) 在陌生的室内环境中通常会遇到困难。然而，当前的寻路工具相当有限。在这篇简短的论文中，我们介绍了我们正在进行的 PwVI 寻路机器人工作。机器人接受用户发出的指定目的地的音频命令。然后，机器人自主规划一条路径以导航至目标。我们使用传感器来估计用户的实时位置，并将其反馈给规划器以提高用户的安全性和舒适度。此外，机器人会定期向用户描述周围环境，以防止迷失方向和潜在的事故。我们在公共室内环境中展示了我们设计的可行性。最后，我们分析了当前设计的局限性，以及我们的见解和未来的工作。演示视频可在 https://youtu.be/BS9r5bkIass 找到。 本文设计了一种辅助视障人士在室内环境中自主导航的机器人，通过音频指令规划路径并实时反馈环境信息。 Shuijing Liu,Aamir Hasan,Kaiwen Hong,Chun-Kai Yao,Justin Lin,Weihang Liang,Megan A. Bayles,Wendy A. Rogers,Katherine Driggs-Campbell cs.RO

title: Towards Co-operative Congestion Mitigation
title_zh: 迈向合作缓解拥堵
comment: Presented at the ICRA 2022 Workshop on Shared Autonomy in Physical Human-Robot Interaction: Adaptability and Trust
comments: Presented at the ICRA 2022 Workshop on Shared Autonomy in Physical Human-Robot Interaction: Adaptability and Trust
abstract: The effects of traffic congestion are widespread and are an impedance to everyday life. Piecewise constant driving policies have shown promise in helping mitigate traffic congestion in simulation environments. However, no works currently test these policies in situations involving real human users. Thus, we propose to evaluate these policies through the use of a shared control framework in a collaborative experiment with the human driver and the driving policy aiming to co-operatively mitigate congestion. We intend to use the CARLA simulator alongside the Flow framework to conduct user studies to evaluate the affect of piecewise constant driving policies. As such, we present our in-progress work in building our framework and discuss our proposed plan on evaluating this framework through a human-in-the-loop simulation user study.
summary: The effects of traffic congestion are widespread and are an impedance to everyday life. Piecewise constant driving policies have shown promise in helping mitigate traffic congestion in simulation environments. However, no works currently test these policies in situations involving real human users. Thus, we propose to evaluate these policies through the use of a shared control framework in a collaborative experiment with the human driver and the driving policy aiming to co-operatively mitigate congestion. We intend to use the CARLA simulator alongside the Flow framework to conduct user studies to evaluate the affect of piecewise constant driving policies. As such, we present our in-progress work in building our framework and discuss our proposed plan on evaluating this framework through a human-in-the-loop simulation user study.
abstract_zh: 交通拥堵的影响是广泛的，并且阻碍了日常生活。分段持续驾驶策略已显示出有助于缓解模拟环境中的交通拥堵的前景。然而，目前还没有作品在涉及真实人类用户的情况下测试这些策略。因此，我们建议通过在与人类驾驶员的协作实验中使用共享控制框架和旨在合作缓解拥堵的驾驶策略来评估这些策略。我们打算将 CARLA 模拟器与 Flow 框架结合使用来进行用户研究，以评估分段恒定驾驶策略的影响。因此，我们介绍了我们在构建框架方面正在进行的工作，并讨论了我们提出的通过人机循环模拟用户研究来评估该框架的计划。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过构建共享控制框架，结合人类驾驶员与分段常值驾驶策略，在模拟环境中评估其协同缓解交通拥堵的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有分段常值驾驶策略在模拟中有效，但缺乏真实人类用户参与的验证，需探索其在实际场景中的可行性以解决交通拥堵问题。
AI.method: 采用CARLA模拟器与Flow框架搭建人机协同实验平台，通过用户研究测试共享控制框架下策略与人类驾驶员的协作效果。
AI.result: 当前完成框架初步构建，计划通过人机环仿真实验验证策略有效性，具体结果尚未公布。
AI.conclusion: 合作式控制框架为评估自动驾驶策略提供新方法，后续实验将揭示其在真实场景中的拥堵缓解潜力。

title: ImageAssist: Tools for Enhancing Touchscreen-Based Image Exploration Systems for Blind and Low Vision Users
title_zh: ImageAssist：增强盲人和低视力用户基于触摸屏的图像探索系统的工具
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '23), April 2023
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '23), April 2023
abstract: Blind and low vision (BLV) users often rely on alt text to understand what a digital image is showing. However, recent research has investigated how touch-based image exploration on touchscreens can supplement alt text. Touchscreen-based image exploration systems allow BLV users to deeply understand images while granting a strong sense of agency. Yet, prior work has found that these systems require a lot of effort to use, and little work has been done to explore these systems' bottlenecks on a deeper level and propose solutions to these issues. To address this, we present ImageAssist, a set of three tools that assist BLV users through the process of exploring images by touch -- scaffolding the exploration process. We perform a series of studies with BLV users to design and evaluate ImageAssist, and our findings reveal several implications for image exploration tools for BLV users.
summary: Blind and low vision (BLV) users often rely on alt text to understand what a digital image is showing. However, recent research has investigated how touch-based image exploration on touchscreens can supplement alt text. Touchscreen-based image exploration systems allow BLV users to deeply understand images while granting a strong sense of agency. Yet, prior work has found that these systems require a lot of effort to use, and little work has been done to explore these systems' bottlenecks on a deeper level and propose solutions to these issues. To address this, we present ImageAssist, a set of three tools that assist BLV users through the process of exploring images by touch -- scaffolding the exploration process. We perform a series of studies with BLV users to design and evaluate ImageAssist, and our findings reveal several implications for image exploration tools for BLV users.
abstract_zh: 盲人和低视力 (BLV) 用户通常依靠替代文本来理解数字图像所显示的内容。然而，最近的研究调查了触摸屏上基于触摸的图像探索如何补充替代文本。基于触摸屏的图像探索系统使 BLV 用户能够深入理解图像，同时赋予强烈的代理意识。然而，先前的工作发现这些系统需要花费大量的精力来使用，并且很少有工作来更深层次地探索这些系统的瓶颈并提出这些问题的解决方案。为了解决这个问题，我们推出了 ImageAssist，这是一套由三个工具组成的工具，可帮助 BLV 用户通过触摸探索图像的过程 - 为探索过程搭建脚手架。我们与 BLV 用户进行了一系列研究来设计和评估 ImageAssist，我们的研究结果揭示了对 BLV 用户图像探索工具的一些影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ImageAssist工具集，通过触摸屏增强盲人及低视力用户对图像的探索能力。
AI.motivation: 现有触摸屏图像探索系统使用门槛高，缺乏对使用瓶颈的深入分析和优化方案。
AI.method: 设计三个辅助工具并开展用户研究，通过实证评估验证工具有效性。
AI.result: 发现用户对探索过程的自主性需求、反馈及时性等关键影响因素。
AI.conclusion: 需通过工具设计降低操作复杂度，提升盲人及低视力用户的图像探索效率与体验。

authors_text: Chieh-Yang Huang,Saniya Naphade,Kavya Laalasa Karanam,Ting-Hao 'Kenneth' Huang
title: Conveying the Predicted Future to Users: A Case Study of Story Plot Prediction
title_zh: 向用户传达预测的未来：故事情节预测案例研究
comment: To appear in the AAAI 2023 Workshop- Creative AI Across Modalities
comments: To appear in the AAAI 2023 Workshop- Creative AI Across Modalities
abstract: Creative writing is hard: Novelists struggle with writer's block daily. While automatic story generation has advanced recently, it is treated as a "toy task" for advancing artificial intelligence rather than helping people. In this paper, we create a system that produces a short description that narrates a predicted plot using existing story generation approaches. Our goal is to assist writers in crafting a consistent and compelling story arc. We conducted experiments on Amazon Mechanical Turk (AMT) to examine the quality of the generated story plots in terms of consistency and storiability. The results show that short descriptions produced by our frame-enhanced GPT-2 (FGPT-2) were rated as the most consistent and storiable among all models; FGPT-2's outputs even beat some random story snippets written by humans. Next, we conducted a preliminary user study using a story continuation task where AMT workers were given access to machine-generated story plots and asked to write a follow-up story. FGPT-2 could positively affect the writing process, though people favor other baselines more. Our study shed some light on the possibilities of future creative writing support systems beyond the scope of completing sentences. Our code is available at: https://github.com/appleternity/Story-Plot-Generation.
summary: Creative writing is hard: Novelists struggle with writer's block daily. While automatic story generation has advanced recently, it is treated as a "toy task" for advancing artificial intelligence rather than helping people. In this paper, we create a system that produces a short description that narrates a predicted plot using existing story generation approaches. Our goal is to assist writers in crafting a consistent and compelling story arc. We conducted experiments on Amazon Mechanical Turk (AMT) to examine the quality of the generated story plots in terms of consistency and storiability. The results show that short descriptions produced by our frame-enhanced GPT-2 (FGPT-2) were rated as the most consistent and storiable among all models; FGPT-2's outputs even beat some random story snippets written by humans. Next, we conducted a preliminary user study using a story continuation task where AMT workers were given access to machine-generated story plots and asked to write a follow-up story. FGPT-2 could positively affect the writing process, though people favor other baselines more. Our study shed some light on the possibilities of future creative writing support systems beyond the scope of completing sentences. Our code is available at: https://github.com/appleternity/Story-Plot-Generation.
abstract_zh: 创意写作很难：小说家每天都在与写作障碍作斗争。虽然自动故事生成最近取得了进展，但它被视为推进人工智能的“玩具任务”，而不是帮助人们。在本文中，我们创建了一个系统，该系统可以生成简短的描述，使用现有的故事生成方法来叙述预测的情节。我们的目标是协助作家创作一致且引人入胜的故事情节。我们在 Amazon Mechanical Turk (AMT) 上进行了实验，以检查生成的故事情节在一致性和可存储性方面的质量。结果表明，我们的框架增强型 GPT-2 (FGPT-2) 生成的简短描述被评为所有模型中最一致和最可记录的； FGPT-2 的输出甚至击败了人类编写的一些随机故事片段。接下来，我们使用故事延续任务进行了初步用户研究，其中 AMT 工作人员可以访问机器生成的故事情节，并要求编写后续故事。 FGPT-2 可以对写作过程产生积极影响，尽管人们更喜欢其他基线。我们的研究揭示了未来创意写作支持系统超越完成句子范围的可能性。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/appleternity/Story-Plot-Generation。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种系统，利用现有的故事生成方法生成短描述以预测故事情节，旨在帮助作家创作连贯且引人入胜的故事。
AI.motivation: 创作写作非常困难，作家常遇到写作瓶颈。虽然自动故事生成技术有所进展，但通常被视为推动人工智能发展的‘玩具任务’，而非实际帮助人们。
AI.method: 本文创建了一个系统，使用现有的故事生成方法生成预测情节的短描述，并通过Amazon Mechanical Turk (AMT) 进行实验，评估生成故事的情节一致性和可叙述性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，基于框架增强的GPT-2 (FGPT-2) 生成的短描述在一致性和可叙述性方面评分最高，甚至优于一些人类随机写的故事片段。初步用户研究也显示，FGPT-2对写作过程有积极影响。
AI.conclusion: 这项研究展示了未来创意写作支持系统的新可能性，超越了简单的句子补全任务。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种系统，利用现有的故事生成方法生成短描述以预测故事情节，旨在帮助作家创作连贯且引人入胜的故事。
ai_content.motivation: 创作写作非常困难，作家常遇到写作瓶颈。虽然自动故事生成技术有所进展，但通常被视为推动人工智能发展的‘玩具任务’，而非实际帮助人们。
ai_content.method: 本文创建了一个系统，使用现有的故事生成方法生成预测情节的短描述，并通过Amazon Mechanical Turk (AMT) 进行实验，评估生成故事的情节一致性和可叙述性。
ai_content.result: 实验结果表明，基于框架增强的GPT-2 (FGPT-2) 生成的短描述在一致性和可叙述性方面评分最高，甚至优于一些人类随机写的故事片段。初步用户研究也显示，FGPT-2对写作过程有积极影响。
ai_content.conclusion: 这项研究展示了未来创意写作支持系统的新可能性，超越了简单的句子补全任务。

search_text: Conveying the Predicted Future to Users: A Case Study of Story Plot Prediction 向用户传达预测的未来：故事情节预测案例研究 Creative writing is hard: Novelists struggle with writer's block daily. While automatic story generation has advanced recently, it is treated as a "toy task" for advancing artificial intelligence rather than helping people. In this paper, we create a system that produces a short description that narrates a predicted plot using existing story generation approaches. Our goal is to assist writers in crafting a consistent and compelling story arc. We conducted experiments on Amazon Mechanical Turk (AMT) to examine the quality of the generated story plots in terms of consistency and storiability. The results show that short descriptions produced by our frame-enhanced GPT-2 (FGPT-2) were rated as the most consistent and storiable among all models; FGPT-2's outputs even beat some random story snippets written by humans. Next, we conducted a preliminary user study using a story continuation task where AMT workers were given access to machine-generated story plots and asked to write a follow-up story. FGPT-2 could positively affect the writing process, though people favor other baselines more. Our study shed some light on the possibilities of future creative writing support systems beyond the scope of completing sentences. Our code is available at: https://github.com/appleternity/Story-Plot-Generation. 创意写作很难：小说家每天都在与写作障碍作斗争。虽然自动故事生成最近取得了进展，但它被视为推进人工智能的“玩具任务”，而不是帮助人们。在本文中，我们创建了一个系统，该系统可以生成简短的描述，使用现有的故事生成方法来叙述预测的情节。我们的目标是协助作家创作一致且引人入胜的故事情节。我们在 Amazon Mechanical Turk (AMT) 上进行了实验，以检查生成的故事情节在一致性和可存储性方面的质量。结果表明，我们的框架增强型 GPT-2 (FGPT-2) 生成的简短描述被评为所有模型中最一致和最可记录的； FGPT-2 的输出甚至击败了人类编写的一些随机故事片段。接下来，我们使用故事延续任务进行了初步用户研究，其中 AMT 工作人员可以访问机器生成的故事情节，并要求编写后续故事。 FGPT-2 可以对写作过程产生积极影响，尽管人们更喜欢其他基线。我们的研究揭示了未来创意写作支持系统超越完成句子范围的可能性。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/appleternity/Story-Plot-Generation。 本文提出了一种系统，利用现有的故事生成方法生成短描述以预测故事情节，旨在帮助作家创作连贯且引人入胜的故事。 Chieh-Yang Huang,Saniya Naphade,Kavya Laalasa Karanam,Ting-Hao 'Kenneth' Huang cs.CL,cs.HC

title: Robot path planning using deep reinforcement learning
title_zh: 使用深度强化学习的机器人路径规划
abstract: Autonomous navigation is challenging for mobile robots, especially in an unknown environment. Commonly, the robot requires multiple sensors to map the environment, locate itself, and make a plan to reach the target. However, reinforcement learning methods offer an alternative to map-free navigation tasks by learning the optimal actions to take. In this article, deep reinforcement learning agents are implemented using variants of the deep Q networks method, the D3QN and rainbow algorithms, for both the obstacle avoidance and the goal-oriented navigation task. The agents are trained and evaluated in a simulated environment. Furthermore, an analysis of the changes in the behaviour and performance of the agents caused by modifications in the reward function is conducted.
summary: Autonomous navigation is challenging for mobile robots, especially in an unknown environment. Commonly, the robot requires multiple sensors to map the environment, locate itself, and make a plan to reach the target. However, reinforcement learning methods offer an alternative to map-free navigation tasks by learning the optimal actions to take. In this article, deep reinforcement learning agents are implemented using variants of the deep Q networks method, the D3QN and rainbow algorithms, for both the obstacle avoidance and the goal-oriented navigation task. The agents are trained and evaluated in a simulated environment. Furthermore, an analysis of the changes in the behaviour and performance of the agents caused by modifications in the reward function is conducted.
abstract_zh: 自主导航对于移动机器人来说是一个挑战，特别是在未知的环境中。通常，机器人需要多个传感器来绘制环境图、定位自身并制定到达目标的计划。然而，强化学习方法通​​过学习要采取的最佳行动，提供了无地图导航任务的替代方案。在本文中，深度强化学习代理使用深度 Q 网络方法的变体、D3QN 和彩虹算法来实现，用于避障和面向目标的导航任务。代理在模拟环境中接受训练和评估。此外，还对奖励函数的修改引起的代理行为和绩效的变化进行了分析。

AI.tldr: 本文研究使用深度强化学习方法解决机器人路径规划问题，通过D3QN和rainbow算法实现避障与目标导航。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人导航依赖复杂传感器和地图构建，难以适应未知动态环境，而强化学习可提供无需地图的自主决策方案。
AI.method: 基于深度Q网络改进算法D3QN和rainbow，设计模拟环境训练智能体，并分析奖励函数调整对导航性能的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明所提方法能有效完成避障与目标导航任务，不同奖励函数设计显著影响智能体行为策略与成功率。
AI.conclusion: 深度强化学习为机器人路径规划提供可行方案，奖励函数设计是影响算法性能的关键因素。

title: A Review on Generative Adversarial Networks for Data Augmentation in Person Re-Identification Systems
title_zh: 行人重识别系统中数据增强的生成对抗网络综述
abstract: Interest in automatic people re-identification systems has significantly grown in recent years, mainly for developing surveillance and smart shops software. Due to the variability in person posture, different lighting conditions, and occluded scenarios, together with the poor quality of the images obtained by different cameras, it is currently an unsolved problem. In machine learning-based computer vision applications with reduced data sets, one possibility to improve the performance of re-identification system is through the augmentation of the set of images or videos available for training the neural models. Currently, one of the most robust ways to generate synthetic information for data augmentation, whether it is video, images or text, are the generative adversarial networks. This article reviews the most relevant recent approaches to improve the performance of person re-identification models through data augmentation, using generative adversarial networks. We focus on three categories of data augmentation approaches: style transfer, pose transfer, and random generation.
summary: Interest in automatic people re-identification systems has significantly grown in recent years, mainly for developing surveillance and smart shops software. Due to the variability in person posture, different lighting conditions, and occluded scenarios, together with the poor quality of the images obtained by different cameras, it is currently an unsolved problem. In machine learning-based computer vision applications with reduced data sets, one possibility to improve the performance of re-identification system is through the augmentation of the set of images or videos available for training the neural models. Currently, one of the most robust ways to generate synthetic information for data augmentation, whether it is video, images or text, are the generative adversarial networks. This article reviews the most relevant recent approaches to improve the performance of person re-identification models through data augmentation, using generative adversarial networks. We focus on three categories of data augmentation approaches: style transfer, pose transfer, and random generation.
abstract_zh: 近年来，人们对自动人员重新识别系统的兴趣显着增长，主要用于开发监控和智能商店软件。由于人的姿势、不同的光照条件和遮挡场景的多变性，以及不同摄像机获得的图像质量较差，目前这是一个尚未解决的问题。在数据集减少的基于机器学习的计算机视觉应用中，提高重新识别系统性能的一种可能性是通过增加可用于训练神经模型的图像或视频集。目前，生成用于数据增强的合成信息（无论是视频、图像还是文本）的最强大方法之一是生成对抗网络。本文回顾了最近使用生成对抗网络通过数据增强来提高人员重新识别模型性能的最相关方法。我们专注于三类数据增强方法：风格迁移、姿势迁移和随机生成。

AI.tldr: 综述使用生成对抗网络（GANs）进行数据增强以提升行人重识别系统性能的方法
AI.motivation: 行人重识别系统因姿态变化、光照差异、遮挡及图像质量差导致性能受限，需通过数据增强提升模型表现
AI.method: 通过回顾风格迁移、姿态迁移和随机生成三种数据增强方法，评估其在行人重识别中的应用效果
AI.result: 总结了当前基于GAN的数据增强方法在提升行人重识别模型性能中的有效性及存在的挑战
AI.conclusion: 表明GAN在数据增强中的潜力，但需进一步解决生成图像质量与多样性之间的平衡问题

authors_text: Shashank Nag,Gourav Datta,Souvik Kundu,Nitin Chandrachoodan,Peter A. Beerel
title: ViTA: A Vision Transformer Inference Accelerator for Edge Applications
title_zh: ViTA：适用于边缘应用的 Vision Transformer 推理加速器
abstract: Vision Transformer models, such as ViT, Swin Transformer, and Transformer-in-Transformer, have recently gained significant traction in computer vision tasks due to their ability to capture the global relation between features which leads to superior performance. However, they are compute-heavy and difficult to deploy in resource-constrained edge devices. Existing hardware accelerators, including those for the closely-related BERT transformer models, do not target highly resource-constrained environments. In this paper, we address this gap and propose ViTA - a configurable hardware accelerator for inference of vision transformer models, targeting resource-constrained edge computing devices and avoiding repeated off-chip memory accesses. We employ a head-level pipeline and inter-layer MLP optimizations, and can support several commonly used vision transformer models with changes solely in our control logic. We achieve nearly 90% hardware utilization efficiency on most vision transformer models, report a power of 0.88W when synthesised with a clock of 150 MHz, and get reasonable frame rates - all of which makes ViTA suitable for edge applications.
summary: Vision Transformer models, such as ViT, Swin Transformer, and Transformer-in-Transformer, have recently gained significant traction in computer vision tasks due to their ability to capture the global relation between features which leads to superior performance. However, they are compute-heavy and difficult to deploy in resource-constrained edge devices. Existing hardware accelerators, including those for the closely-related BERT transformer models, do not target highly resource-constrained environments. In this paper, we address this gap and propose ViTA - a configurable hardware accelerator for inference of vision transformer models, targeting resource-constrained edge computing devices and avoiding repeated off-chip memory accesses. We employ a head-level pipeline and inter-layer MLP optimizations, and can support several commonly used vision transformer models with changes solely in our control logic. We achieve nearly 90% hardware utilization efficiency on most vision transformer models, report a power of 0.88W when synthesised with a clock of 150 MHz, and get reasonable frame rates - all of which makes ViTA suitable for edge applications.
abstract_zh: ViT、Swin Transformer 和 Transformer-in-Transformer 等 Vision Transformer 模型最近在计算机视觉任务中获得了巨大的关注，因为它们能够捕获特征之间的全局关系，从而实现卓越的性能。然而，它们的计算量很大，并且难以在资源有限的边缘设备中部署。现有的硬件加速器，包括用于密切相关的 BERT 变压器模型的加速器，并不针对资源高度受限的环境。在本文中，我们解决了这一差距并提出了 ViTA——一种用于视觉变换器模型推理的可配置硬件加速器，针对资源受限的边缘计算设备并避免重复的片外存储器访问。我们采用头级管道和层间 MLP 优化，并且只需更改控制逻辑即可支持几种常用的视觉变换器模型。我们在大多数视觉变压器模型上实现了近 90% 的硬件利用率，报告使用 150 MHz 时钟合成时的功率为 0.88W，并获得合理的帧速率 - 所有这些都使 ViTA 适合边缘应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ViTA，一种针对边缘设备的视觉Transformer推理加速器，解决资源受限环境下部署视觉Transformer模型的难题。
AI.motivation: 视觉Transformer模型虽性能优越，但计算量大且难以部署在资源受限的边缘设备上，现有加速器未能有效满足此类需求。
AI.method: 采用头级流水线和层间MLP优化技术，通过可配置控制逻辑支持多种视觉Transformer模型，减少片外内存访问。
AI.result: 在多数视觉Transformer模型上实现近90%的硬件利用率，综合功耗0.88W（150MHz时钟），帧率表现合理，适合边缘应用。
AI.conclusion: ViTA有效填补了边缘设备部署视觉Transformer的空白，兼顾高能效与低功耗，为边缘计算提供可行方案。

search_text: ViTA: A Vision Transformer Inference Accelerator for Edge Applications ViTA：适用于边缘应用的 Vision Transformer 推理加速器 Vision Transformer models, such as ViT, Swin Transformer, and Transformer-in-Transformer, have recently gained significant traction in computer vision tasks due to their ability to capture the global relation between features which leads to superior performance. However, they are compute-heavy and difficult to deploy in resource-constrained edge devices. Existing hardware accelerators, including those for the closely-related BERT transformer models, do not target highly resource-constrained environments. In this paper, we address this gap and propose ViTA - a configurable hardware accelerator for inference of vision transformer models, targeting resource-constrained edge computing devices and avoiding repeated off-chip memory accesses. We employ a head-level pipeline and inter-layer MLP optimizations, and can support several commonly used vision transformer models with changes solely in our control logic. We achieve nearly 90% hardware utilization efficiency on most vision transformer models, report a power of 0.88W when synthesised with a clock of 150 MHz, and get reasonable frame rates - all of which makes ViTA suitable for edge applications. ViT、Swin Transformer 和 Transformer-in-Transformer 等 Vision Transformer 模型最近在计算机视觉任务中获得了巨大的关注，因为它们能够捕获特征之间的全局关系，从而实现卓越的性能。然而，它们的计算量很大，并且难以在资源有限的边缘设备中部署。现有的硬件加速器，包括用于密切相关的 BERT 变压器模型的加速器，并不针对资源高度受限的环境。在本文中，我们解决了这一差距并提出了 ViTA——一种用于视觉变换器模型推理的可配置硬件加速器，针对资源受限的边缘计算设备并避免重复的片外存储器访问。我们采用头级管道和层间 MLP 优化，并且只需更改控制逻辑即可支持几种常用的视觉变换器模型。我们在大多数视觉变压器模型上实现了近 90% 的硬件利用率，报告使用 150 MHz 时钟合成时的功率为 0.88W，并获得合理的帧速率 - 所有这些都使 ViTA 适合边缘应用。 本文提出ViTA，一种针对边缘设备的视觉Transformer推理加速器，解决资源受限环境下部署视觉Transformer模型的难题。 Shashank Nag,Gourav Datta,Souvik Kundu,Nitin Chandrachoodan,Peter A. Beerel cs.AR,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Scaling Dimension
title_zh: 缩放维度
abstract: Conceptual Scaling is a useful standard tool in Formal Concept Analysis and beyond. Its mathematical theory, as elaborated in the last chapter of the FCA monograph, still has room for improvement. As it stands, even some of the basic definitions are in flux. Our contribution was triggered by the study of concept lattices for tree classifiers and the scaling methods used there. We extend some basic notions, give precise mathematical definitions for them and introduce the concept of scaling dimension. In addition to a detailed discussion of its properties, including an example, we show theoretical bounds related to the order dimension of concept lattices. We also study special subclasses, such as the ordinal and the interordinal scaling dimensions, and show for them first results and examples.
summary: Conceptual Scaling is a useful standard tool in Formal Concept Analysis and beyond. Its mathematical theory, as elaborated in the last chapter of the FCA monograph, still has room for improvement. As it stands, even some of the basic definitions are in flux. Our contribution was triggered by the study of concept lattices for tree classifiers and the scaling methods used there. We extend some basic notions, give precise mathematical definitions for them and introduce the concept of scaling dimension. In addition to a detailed discussion of its properties, including an example, we show theoretical bounds related to the order dimension of concept lattices. We also study special subclasses, such as the ordinal and the interordinal scaling dimensions, and show for them first results and examples.
abstract_zh: 概念缩放是形式概念分析及其他领域中有用的标准工具。正如FCA专着最后一章所阐述的那样，其数学理论仍有改进的空间。就目前情况而言，甚至一些基本定义也在不断变化。我们的贡献是由对树分类器的概念格及其使用的缩放方法的研究引发的。我们扩展了一些基本概念，给出了它们精确的数学定义，并引入了缩放维度的概念。除了对其属性的详细讨论（包括示例）之外，我们还展示了与概念格的阶维相关的理论界限。我们还研究特殊的子类，例如序数和序间尺度维度，并向它们展示第一个结果和示例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出概念缩放的数学定义并引入缩放维度概念，研究其在概念格理论中的性质与边界。
AI.motivation: 现有概念缩放理论存在定义不明确、数学基础不完善的问题，需通过精确化定义和维度分析推动理论发展。
AI.method: 扩展概念缩放基础理论，建立数学定义框架，通过性质分析、理论边界推导及特殊子类研究（如序缩放维度）验证有效性。
AI.result: 明确缩放维度的数学定义，证明其与概念格序维度的关联，提出理论上下界，并展示特殊子类的初步结果与实例。
AI.conclusion: 缩放维度为理解概念格结构提供了新视角，未来需进一步探索其在分类算法等实际场景中的应用潜力。

title: Advances in Automatically Rating the Trustworthiness of Text Processing Services
title_zh: 自动评估文本处理服务可信度的进展
comment: 9 pages, Accepted at 2023 Spring Symposium on AI Trustworthiness Assessment
comments: 9 pages, Accepted at 2023 Spring Symposium on AI Trustworthiness Assessment
abstract: AI services are known to have unstable behavior when subjected to changes in data, models or users. Such behaviors, whether triggered by omission or commission, lead to trust issues when AI works with humans. The current approach of assessing AI services in a black box setting, where the consumer does not have access to the AI's source code or training data, is limited. The consumer has to rely on the AI developer's documentation and trust that the system has been built as stated. Further, if the AI consumer reuses the service to build other services which they sell to their customers, the consumer is at the risk of the service providers (both data and model providers). Our approach, in this context, is inspired by the success of nutritional labeling in food industry to promote health and seeks to assess and rate AI services for trust from the perspective of an independent stakeholder. The ratings become a means to communicate the behavior of AI systems so that the consumer is informed about the risks and can make an informed decision. In this paper, we will first describe recent progress in developing rating methods for text-based machine translator AI services that have been found promising with user studies. Then, we will outline challenges and vision for a principled, multi-modal, causality-based rating methodologies and its implication for decision-support in real-world scenarios like health and food recommendation.
summary: AI services are known to have unstable behavior when subjected to changes in data, models or users. Such behaviors, whether triggered by omission or commission, lead to trust issues when AI works with humans. The current approach of assessing AI services in a black box setting, where the consumer does not have access to the AI's source code or training data, is limited. The consumer has to rely on the AI developer's documentation and trust that the system has been built as stated. Further, if the AI consumer reuses the service to build other services which they sell to their customers, the consumer is at the risk of the service providers (both data and model providers). Our approach, in this context, is inspired by the success of nutritional labeling in food industry to promote health and seeks to assess and rate AI services for trust from the perspective of an independent stakeholder. The ratings become a means to communicate the behavior of AI systems so that the consumer is informed about the risks and can make an informed decision. In this paper, we will first describe recent progress in developing rating methods for text-based machine translator AI services that have been found promising with user studies. Then, we will outline challenges and vision for a principled, multi-modal, causality-based rating methodologies and its implication for decision-support in real-world scenarios like health and food recommendation.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，当数据、模型或用户发生变化时，人工智能服务会表现出不稳定的行为。当人工智能与人类合作时，此类行为，无论是由疏忽还是委托引发的，都会导致信任问题。当前在黑盒环境中评估人工智能服务的方法是有限的，消费者无法访问人工智能的源代码或训练数据。消费者必须依赖人工智能开发人员的文档，并相信系统是按照规定构建的。此外，如果人工智能消费者重用该服务来构建其他服务并出售给客户，则消费者将面临服务提供商（数据和模型提供商）的风险。在这种背景下，我们的方法受到食品行业营养标签在促进健康方面的成功的启发，并寻求从独立利益相关者的角度评估和评级人工智能服务的信任度。评级成为传达人工智能系统行为的一种手段，以便消费者了解风险并做出明智的决定。在本文中，我们将首先描述基于文本的机器翻译人工智能服务开发评级方法的最新进展，这些方法在用户研究中被发现很有前景。然后，我们将概述有原则的、多模式的、基于因果关系的评级方法的挑战和愿景，及其对健康和食品推荐等现实场景中决策支持的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种借鉴食品营养标签的AI服务可信度自动评级方法，旨在解决黑盒评估模式下AI服务信任度评估不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有AI服务评估依赖开发者文档且缺乏透明度，用户难以评估潜在风险，尤其在AI服务被二次开发时存在双重风险。
AI.method: 基于用户研究验证文本机器翻译服务的评级方法，并提出多模态、因果关系驱动的新型评级框架设计思路。
AI.result: 验证了文本处理服务评级方法的有效性，明确了构建因果关系模型和跨模态评估体系的技术挑战与应用前景。
AI.conclusion: 独立第三方评级体系可提升AI服务透明度，未来需建立基于因果推理的多维度评估框架以支持关键领域决策。

conclusion: 独立第三方评级体系可提升AI服务透明度，未来需建立基于因果推理的多维度评估框架以支持关键领域决策。
search_text: Advances in Automatically Rating the Trustworthiness of Text Processing Services 自动评估文本处理服务可信度的进展 AI services are known to have unstable behavior when subjected to changes in data, models or users. Such behaviors, whether triggered by omission or commission, lead to trust issues when AI works with humans. The current approach of assessing AI services in a black box setting, where the consumer does not have access to the AI's source code or training data, is limited. The consumer has to rely on the AI developer's documentation and trust that the system has been built as stated. Further, if the AI consumer reuses the service to build other services which they sell to their customers, the consumer is at the risk of the service providers (both data and model providers). Our approach, in this context, is inspired by the success of nutritional labeling in food industry to promote health and seeks to assess and rate AI services for trust from the perspective of an independent stakeholder. The ratings become a means to communicate the behavior of AI systems so that the consumer is informed about the risks and can make an informed decision. In this paper, we will first describe recent progress in developing rating methods for text-based machine translator AI services that have been found promising with user studies. Then, we will outline challenges and vision for a principled, multi-modal, causality-based rating methodologies and its implication for decision-support in real-world scenarios like health and food recommendation. 众所周知，当数据、模型或用户发生变化时，人工智能服务会表现出不稳定的行为。当人工智能与人类合作时，此类行为，无论是由疏忽还是委托引发的，都会导致信任问题。当前在黑盒环境中评估人工智能服务的方法是有限的，消费者无法访问人工智能的源代码或训练数据。消费者必须依赖人工智能开发人员的文档，并相信系统是按照规定构建的。此外，如果人工智能消费者重用该服务来构建其他服务并出售给客户，则消费者将面临服务提供商（数据和模型提供商）的风险。在这种背景下，我们的方法受到食品行业营养标签在促进健康方面的成功的启发，并寻求从独立利益相关者的角度评估和评级人工智能服务的信任度。评级成为传达人工智能系统行为的一种手段，以便消费者了解风险并做出明智的决定。在本文中，我们将首先描述基于文本的机器翻译人工智能服务开发评级方法的最新进展，这些方法在用户研究中被发现很有前景。然后，我们将概述有原则的、多模式的、基于因果关系的评级方法的挑战和愿景，及其对健康和食品推荐等现实场景中决策支持的影响。 本文提出一种借鉴食品营养标签的AI服务可信度自动评级方法，旨在解决黑盒评估模式下AI服务信任度评估不足的问题。 Biplav Srivastava,Kausik Lakkaraju,Mariana Bernagozzi,Marco Valtorta cs.HC,cs.AI

title: To Switch or not to Switch: Predicting the Benefit of Switching between Algorithms based on Trajectory Features
title_zh: 切换还是不切换：根据轨迹特征预测算法之间切换的好处
abstract: Dynamic algorithm selection aims to exploit the complementarity of multiple optimization algorithms by switching between them during the search. While these kinds of dynamic algorithms have been shown to have potential to outperform their component algorithms, it is still unclear how this potential can best be realized. One promising approach is to make use of landscape features to enable a per-run trajectory-based switch. Here, the samples seen by the first algorithm are used to create a set of features which describe the landscape from the perspective of the algorithm. These features are then used to predict what algorithm to switch to. In this work, we extend this per-run trajectory-based approach to consider a wide variety of potential points at which to perform the switch. We show that using a sliding window to capture the local landscape features contains information which can be used to predict whether a switch at that point would be beneficial to future performance. By analyzing the resulting models, we identify what features are most important to these predictions. Finally, by evaluating the importance of features and comparing these values between multiple algorithms, we show clear differences in the way the second algorithm interacts with the local landscape features found before the switch.
summary: Dynamic algorithm selection aims to exploit the complementarity of multiple optimization algorithms by switching between them during the search. While these kinds of dynamic algorithms have been shown to have potential to outperform their component algorithms, it is still unclear how this potential can best be realized. One promising approach is to make use of landscape features to enable a per-run trajectory-based switch. Here, the samples seen by the first algorithm are used to create a set of features which describe the landscape from the perspective of the algorithm. These features are then used to predict what algorithm to switch to. In this work, we extend this per-run trajectory-based approach to consider a wide variety of potential points at which to perform the switch. We show that using a sliding window to capture the local landscape features contains information which can be used to predict whether a switch at that point would be beneficial to future performance. By analyzing the resulting models, we identify what features are most important to these predictions. Finally, by evaluating the importance of features and comparing these values between multiple algorithms, we show clear differences in the way the second algorithm interacts with the local landscape features found before the switch.
abstract_zh: 动态算法选择旨在通过在搜索过程中在多种优化算法之间进行切换来利用多种优化算法的互补性。虽然这些类型的动态算法已被证明有潜力胜过其组件算法，但仍不清楚如何最好地实现这种潜力。一种有前途的方法是利用景观特征来实现基于每次运行轨迹的切换。在这里，第一个算法看到的样本用于创建一组从算法角度描述景观的特征。然后使用这些特征来预测要切换到什么算法。在这项工作中，我们扩展了这种基于每次运行轨迹的方法，以考虑执行切换的各种潜在点。我们表明，使用滑动窗口捕获局部景观特征包含可用于预测该点的切换是否有利于未来性能的信息。通过分析生成的模型，我们确定哪些特征对这些预测最重要。最后，通过评估特征的重要性并比较多个算法之间的这些值，我们显示了第二种算法与切换之前发现的局部景观特征交互的方式的明显差异。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过轨迹特征预测算法切换的收益，以优化动态算法选择策略。
AI.motivation: 现有动态算法虽能通过切换算法提升性能，但缺乏有效方法判断何时切换最有益，需基于景观特征进行精准预测。
AI.method: 利用首个算法的轨迹样本提取景观特征，结合滑动窗口捕捉局部特征，并通过模型分析特征重要性以指导切换决策。
AI.result: 识别出关键预测特征，发现不同算法在切换前对局部景观特征的交互方式存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 基于轨迹特征的切换预测可有效提升动态算法性能，且不同算法与景观特征的交互模式具有独特性。

title: An anatomy-based V1 model: Extraction of Low-level Features, Reduction of distortion and a V1-inspired SOM
title_zh: 基于解剖学的 V1 模型：提取低级特征、减少失真和受 V1 启发的 SOM
abstract: We present a model of the primary visual cortex V1, guided by anatomical experiments. Unlike most machine learning systems our goal is not to maximize accuracy but to realize a system more aligned to biological systems. Our model consists of the V1 layers 4, 2/3, and 5, with inter-layer connections between them in accordance with the anatomy. We further include the orientation selectivity of the V1 neurons and lateral influences in each layer. Our V1 model, when applied to the BSDS500 ground truth images (indicating LGN contour detection before V1), can extract low-level features from the images and perform a significant amount of distortion reduction. As a follow-up to our V1 model, we propose a V1-inspired self-organizing map algorithm (V1-SOM), where the weight update of each neuron gets influenced by its neighbors. V1-SOM can tolerate noisy inputs as well as noise in the weight updates better than SOM and shows a similar level of performance when trained with high dimensional data such as the MNIST dataset. Finally, when we applied V1 processing to the MNIST dataset to extract low-level features and trained V1-SOM with the modified MNIST dataset, the quantization error was significantly reduced. Our results support the hypothesis that the ventral stream performs gradual untangling of input spaces.
summary: We present a model of the primary visual cortex V1, guided by anatomical experiments. Unlike most machine learning systems our goal is not to maximize accuracy but to realize a system more aligned to biological systems. Our model consists of the V1 layers 4, 2/3, and 5, with inter-layer connections between them in accordance with the anatomy. We further include the orientation selectivity of the V1 neurons and lateral influences in each layer. Our V1 model, when applied to the BSDS500 ground truth images (indicating LGN contour detection before V1), can extract low-level features from the images and perform a significant amount of distortion reduction. As a follow-up to our V1 model, we propose a V1-inspired self-organizing map algorithm (V1-SOM), where the weight update of each neuron gets influenced by its neighbors. V1-SOM can tolerate noisy inputs as well as noise in the weight updates better than SOM and shows a similar level of performance when trained with high dimensional data such as the MNIST dataset. Finally, when we applied V1 processing to the MNIST dataset to extract low-level features and trained V1-SOM with the modified MNIST dataset, the quantization error was significantly reduced. Our results support the hypothesis that the ventral stream performs gradual untangling of input spaces.
abstract_zh: 我们在解剖实验的指导下提出了初级视觉皮层 V1 的模型。与大多数机器学习系统不同，我们的目标不是最大化准确性，而是实现与生物系统更一致的系统。我们的模型由 V1 层 4、2/3 和 5 组成，它们之间根据解剖结构具有层间连接。我们进一步包括 V1 神经元的方向选择性和每层的横向影响。我们的 V1 模型，当应用于 BSDS500 地面真实图像（表示 V1 之前的 LGN 轮廓检测）时，可以从图像中提取低级特征并执行大量的失真减少。作为 V1 模型的后续，我们提出了一种受 V1 启发的自组织映射算法（V1-SOM），其中每个神经元的权重更新受到其邻居的影响。 V1-SOM 比 SOM 更好地容忍噪声输入以及权重更新中的噪声，并且在使用 MNIST 数据集等高维数据进行训练时显示出类似的性能水平。最后，当我们将 V1 处理应用于 MNIST 数据集以提取低级特征并使用修改后的 MNIST 数据集训练 V1-SOM 时，量化误差显着降低。我们的结果支持腹侧流对输入空间进行逐渐解开的假设。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于解剖学的V1视觉皮层模型，用于提取低级特征、减少失真，并开发了一种受V1启发的自组织映射算法（V1-SOM）。
AI.motivation: 不同于传统机器学习追求准确率，本文旨在构建更符合生物视觉系统特性的模型，模拟初级视觉皮层V1的神经机制。
AI.method: 构建包含V1层4、2/3、5的分层结构，结合神经元方向选择性和层间横向连接；基于该模型开发V1-SOM，通过邻居影响机制优化权重更新。
AI.result: 模型在BSDS500数据集上显著降低失真，在MNIST数据集上V1-SOM相较传统SOM具有更强的噪声鲁棒性且量化误差降低。
AI.conclusion: 实验支持腹侧视觉通路通过渐进式输入空间解缠实现特征提取的假设。

title: Rejecting Cognitivism: Computational Phenomenology for Deep Learning
title_zh: 拒绝认知主义：深度学习的计算现象学
abstract: We propose a non-representationalist framework for deep learning relying on a novel method: computational phenomenology, a dialogue between the first-person perspective (relying on phenomenology) and the mechanisms of computational models. We thereby reject the modern cognitivist interpretation of deep learning, according to which artificial neural networks encode representations of external entities. This interpretation mainly relies on neuro-representationalism, a position that combines a strong ontological commitment towards scientific theoretical entities and the idea that the brain operates on symbolic representations of these entities. We proceed as follows: after offering a review of cognitivism and neuro-representationalism in the field of deep learning, we first elaborate a phenomenological critique of these positions; we then sketch out computational phenomenology and distinguish it from existing alternatives; finally we apply this new method to deep learning models trained on specific tasks, in order to formulate a conceptual framework of deep-learning, that allows one to think of artificial neural networks' mechanisms in terms of lived experience.
summary: We propose a non-representationalist framework for deep learning relying on a novel method: computational phenomenology, a dialogue between the first-person perspective (relying on phenomenology) and the mechanisms of computational models. We thereby reject the modern cognitivist interpretation of deep learning, according to which artificial neural networks encode representations of external entities. This interpretation mainly relies on neuro-representationalism, a position that combines a strong ontological commitment towards scientific theoretical entities and the idea that the brain operates on symbolic representations of these entities. We proceed as follows: after offering a review of cognitivism and neuro-representationalism in the field of deep learning, we first elaborate a phenomenological critique of these positions; we then sketch out computational phenomenology and distinguish it from existing alternatives; finally we apply this new method to deep learning models trained on specific tasks, in order to formulate a conceptual framework of deep-learning, that allows one to think of artificial neural networks' mechanisms in terms of lived experience.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于新方法的深度学习的非表征主义框架：计算现象学，第一人称视角（依赖于现象学）和计算模型机制之间的对话。因此，我们拒绝对深度学习的现代认知主义解释，根据这种解释，人工神经网络对外部实体的表示进行编码。这种解释主要依赖于神经表征主义，这种立场结合了对科学理论实体的强烈本体论承诺和大脑对这些实体的符号表征进行操作的想法。我们的进展如下：在回顾了深度学习领域的认知主义和神经表征主义之后，我们首先阐述了对这些立场的现象学批判；然后我们勾画出计算现象学并将其与现有的替代方案区分开来；最后，我们将这种新方法应用于针对特定任务训练的深度学习模型，以制定深度学习的概念框架，使人们能够根据生活经验来思考人工神经网络的机制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种非代表性框架用于深度学习，通过计算现象学方法挑战现有认知主义解释。
AI.motivation: 现代认知主义认为神经网络编码外部实体表示，但作者认为该观点依赖神经表征主义的符号化假设，需建立新方法论。
AI.method: 结合现象学第一人称视角与计算模型机制，批判神经表征主义并构建计算现象学框架，应用于具体深度学习任务分析。
AI.result: 形成基于体验的深度学习概念框架，使神经网络机制可脱离符号表征理解。
AI.conclusion: 计算现象学为深度学习提供非认知主义解释路径，突破传统符号表征的理论局限。

authors_text: Reza Habibi,Johannes Pfau,Jonattan Holmes,Magy Seif El-Nasr
title: Empathetic AI for Empowering Resilience in Games
title_zh: 具有同理心的人工智能可增强游戏的弹性
abstract: Failure and resilience are important aspects of gameplay. This is especially important for serious and competitive games, where players need to adapt and cope with failure frequently. In such situations, emotion regulation -- the active process of modulating ones' emotions to cope and adapt to challenging situations -- becomes essential. It is one of the prominent aspects of human intelligence and promotes mental health and well-being. While there has been work on developing artificial emotional regulation assistants to help users cope with emotion regulation in the field of Intelligent Tutoring systems, little is done to incorporate such systems or ideas into (serious) video games. In this paper, we introduce a data-driven 6-phase approach to establish empathetic artificial intelligence (EAI), which operates on raw chat log data to detect key affective states, identify common sequences and emotion regulation strategies and generalizes these to make them applicable for intervention systems.
summary: Failure and resilience are important aspects of gameplay. This is especially important for serious and competitive games, where players need to adapt and cope with failure frequently. In such situations, emotion regulation -- the active process of modulating ones' emotions to cope and adapt to challenging situations -- becomes essential. It is one of the prominent aspects of human intelligence and promotes mental health and well-being. While there has been work on developing artificial emotional regulation assistants to help users cope with emotion regulation in the field of Intelligent Tutoring systems, little is done to incorporate such systems or ideas into (serious) video games. In this paper, we introduce a data-driven 6-phase approach to establish empathetic artificial intelligence (EAI), which operates on raw chat log data to detect key affective states, identify common sequences and emotion regulation strategies and generalizes these to make them applicable for intervention systems.
abstract_zh: 失败和恢复力是游戏玩法的重要方面。这对于严肃且竞技性的游戏尤其重要，玩家需要经常适应和应对失败。在这种情况下，情绪调节——调节情绪以应对和适应具有挑战性的情况的主动过程——变得至关重要。它是人类智力的突出方面之一，促进心理健康和福祉。尽管人们已经在开发人工情绪调节助手来帮助用户应对智能辅导系统领域的情绪调节方面开展了工作，但将此类系统或想法融入（严肃的）视频游戏中的工作却很少。在本文中，我们介绍了一种数据驱动的六阶段方法来建立同理心人工智能（EAI），该方法对原始聊天日志数据进行操作以检测关键情感状态，识别常见序列和情绪调节策略，并将其概括以使其适用于干预系统。

AI.tldr: 开发数据驱动的共情人工智能（EAI），通过分析聊天日志数据检测情感状态并生成干预策略，以增强游戏中的韧性。
AI.motivation: 现有情感调节系统多应用于智能辅导系统，缺乏在游戏中的应用，导致玩家在面对失败时难以有效调节情绪，影响韧性培养。
AI.method: 采用数据驱动的6阶段方法，处理原始聊天日志数据，检测关键情感状态，识别常见情感序列和调节策略，并将其推广至干预系统。
AI.result: 构建了EAI框架，能够有效识别玩家情感状态及调节策略，为游戏中的实时干预系统提供数据支持。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为游戏中的情感调节与韧性培养提供了新途径，未来可优化模型并拓展至更多游戏场景。

title: The Effect of Information Type on Human Cognitive Augmentation
title_zh: 信息类型对人类认知增强的影响
abstract: When performing a task alone, humans achieve a certain level of performance. When humans are assisted by a tool or automation to perform the same task, performance is enhanced (augmented). Recently developed cognitive systems are able to perform cognitive processing at or above the level of a human in some domains. When humans work collaboratively with such cogs in a human/cog ensemble, we expect augmentation of cognitive processing to be evident and measurable. This paper shows the degree of cognitive augmentation depends on the nature of the information the cog contributes to the ensemble. Results of an experiment are reported showing conceptual information is the most effective type of information resulting in increases in cognitive accuracy, cognitive precision, and cognitive power.
summary: When performing a task alone, humans achieve a certain level of performance. When humans are assisted by a tool or automation to perform the same task, performance is enhanced (augmented). Recently developed cognitive systems are able to perform cognitive processing at or above the level of a human in some domains. When humans work collaboratively with such cogs in a human/cog ensemble, we expect augmentation of cognitive processing to be evident and measurable. This paper shows the degree of cognitive augmentation depends on the nature of the information the cog contributes to the ensemble. Results of an experiment are reported showing conceptual information is the most effective type of information resulting in increases in cognitive accuracy, cognitive precision, and cognitive power.
abstract_zh: 当单独执行一项任务时，人类会达到一定水平的表现。当人类在工具或自动化的帮助下执行相同的任务时，性能就会得到增强（增强）。最近开发的认知系统能够在某些领域执行等于或高于人类水平的认知处理。当人类与人类/齿轮整体中的这些齿轮协作时，我们期望认知处理的增强是明显且可测量的。本文表明，认知增强的程度取决于齿轮为整体贡献的信息的性质。据报道，实验结果表明概念信息是最有效的信息类型，可提高认知准确性、认知精确度和认知能力。

AI.tldr: 研究不同类型信息对人类认知增强效果的影响
AI.motivation: 探讨人类与认知系统协作时，信息类型如何影响认知增强效果，以优化协作效率
AI.method: 通过实验比较概念信息、数据信息和指令信息对认知准确性、精确性和能力的影响
AI.result: 实验结果表明，概念信息最能提升认知准确性、精确性和能力
AI.conclusion: 信息类型显著影响认知增强效果，其中概念信息最为有效，为优化人机协作提供依据

When humans work collaboratively with such cogs in a human/cog ensemble, we expect augmentation of cognitive processing to be evident and measurable.
