search_text: Efficiently Forgetting What You Have Learned in Graph Representation Learning via Projection 通过投影有效地忘记在图表示学习中学到的知识 As privacy protection receives much attention, unlearning the effect of a specific node from a pre-trained graph learning model has become equally important. However, due to the node dependency in the graph-structured data, representation unlearning in Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) is challenging and less well explored. In this paper, we fill in this gap by first studying the unlearning problem in linear-GNNs, and then introducing its extension to non-linear structures. Given a set of nodes to unlearn, we propose PROJECTOR that unlearns by projecting the weight parameters of the pre-trained model onto a subspace that is irrelevant to features of the nodes to be forgotten. PROJECTOR could overcome the challenges caused by node dependency and enjoys a perfect data removal, i.e., the unlearned model parameters do not contain any information about the unlearned node features which is guaranteed by algorithmic construction. Empirical results on real-world datasets illustrate the effectiveness and efficiency of PROJECTOR. 随着隐私保护受到越来越多的关注，从预训练的图学习模型中消除特定节点的影响也变得同样重要。然而，由于图结构数据中的节点依赖性，图神经网络（GNN）中的表示取消学习具有挑战性且较少被探索。在本文中，我们首先研究线性 GNN 中的失学习问题，然后将其扩展到非线性结构，从而填补了这一空白。给定一组要遗忘的节点，我们提出了投影仪，它通过将预训练模型的权重参数投影到与要遗忘的节点的特征无关的子空间上来进行遗忘。 PROJECTOR可以克服节点依赖性带来的挑战，并具有完美的数据去除功能，即未学习的模型参数不包含任何有关未学习的节点特征的信息，这是由算法构造保证的。真实世界数据集的实证结果说明了 PROJECTOR 的有效性和效率。 该论文提出了一种在图表示学习中高效遗忘已学习节点的方法，以解决隐私保护问题。 Weilin Cong,Mehrdad Mahdavi cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Theory of coupled neuronal-synaptic dynamics
title_zh: 神经元突触耦合动力学理论
abstract: In neural circuits, synaptic strengths influence neuronal activity by shaping network dynamics, and neuronal activity influences synaptic strengths through activity-dependent plasticity. Motivated by this fact, we study a recurrent-network model in which neuronal units and synaptic couplings are interacting dynamic variables, with couplings subject to Hebbian modification with decay around quenched random strengths. Rather than assigning a specific role to the plasticity, we use dynamical mean-field theory and other techniques to systematically characterize the neuronal-synaptic dynamics, revealing a rich phase diagram. Adding Hebbian plasticity slows activity in chaotic networks and can induce chaos in otherwise quiescent networks. Anti-Hebbian plasticity quickens activity and produces an oscillatory component. Analysis of the Jacobian shows that Hebbian and anti-Hebbian plasticity push locally unstable modes toward the real and imaginary axes, explaining these behaviors. Both random-matrix and Lyapunov analysis show that strong Hebbian plasticity segregates network timescales into two bands with a slow, synapse-dominated band driving the dynamics, suggesting a flipped view of the network as synapses connected by neurons. For increasing strength, Hebbian plasticity initially raises the complexity of the dynamics, measured by the maximum Lyapunov exponent and attractor dimension, but then decreases these metrics, likely due to the proliferation of stable fixed points. We compute the marginally stable spectra of such fixed points as well as their number, showing exponential growth with network size. In chaotic states with strong Hebbian plasticity, a stable fixed point of neuronal dynamics is destabilized by synaptic dynamics, allowing any neuronal state to be stored as a stable fixed point by halting the plasticity. This phase of freezable chaos offers a new mechanism for working memory.
summary: In neural circuits, synaptic strengths influence neuronal activity by shaping network dynamics, and neuronal activity influences synaptic strengths through activity-dependent plasticity. Motivated by this fact, we study a recurrent-network model in which neuronal units and synaptic couplings are interacting dynamic variables, with couplings subject to Hebbian modification with decay around quenched random strengths. Rather than assigning a specific role to the plasticity, we use dynamical mean-field theory and other techniques to systematically characterize the neuronal-synaptic dynamics, revealing a rich phase diagram. Adding Hebbian plasticity slows activity in chaotic networks and can induce chaos in otherwise quiescent networks. Anti-Hebbian plasticity quickens activity and produces an oscillatory component. Analysis of the Jacobian shows that Hebbian and anti-Hebbian plasticity push locally unstable modes toward the real and imaginary axes, explaining these behaviors. Both random-matrix and Lyapunov analysis show that strong Hebbian plasticity segregates network timescales into two bands with a slow, synapse-dominated band driving the dynamics, suggesting a flipped view of the network as synapses connected by neurons. For increasing strength, Hebbian plasticity initially raises the complexity of the dynamics, measured by the maximum Lyapunov exponent and attractor dimension, but then decreases these metrics, likely due to the proliferation of stable fixed points. We compute the marginally stable spectra of such fixed points as well as their number, showing exponential growth with network size. In chaotic states with strong Hebbian plasticity, a stable fixed point of neuronal dynamics is destabilized by synaptic dynamics, allowing any neuronal state to be stored as a stable fixed point by halting the plasticity. This phase of freezable chaos offers a new mechanism for working memory.
abstract_zh: 在神经回路中，突触强度通过塑造网络动力学影响神经元活动，而神经元活动通过活动依赖性可塑性影响突触强度。受这一事实的启发，我们研究了一种循环网络模型，其中神经元单元和突触耦合是相互作用的动态变量，耦合受到赫布修正的影响，并在淬灭的随机强度周围衰减。我们没有为可塑性分配特定的角色，而是使用动态平均场理论和其他技术来系统地表征神经元突触动力学，揭示丰富的相图。添加赫布可塑性会减慢混沌网络中的活动，并可能在其他静止网络中引起混乱。反赫布塑性加速了活动并产生振荡成分。对雅可比行列式的分析表明，赫布和反赫布可塑性将局部不稳定模式推向实轴和虚轴，从而解释了这些行为。随机矩阵和李雅普诺夫分析都表明，强大的赫布可塑性将网络时间尺度分为两个带，其中一个缓慢的、由突触主导的带驱动动力学，这表明网络的翻转视图是由神经元连接的突触。为了增加强度，赫布塑性最初提高了动力学的复杂性，通过最大李雅普诺夫指数和吸引子维数来衡量，但随后降低了这些指标，这可能是由于稳定不动点的扩散。我们计算了这些固定点的边际稳定谱及其数量，显示出随着网络规模的指数增长。在具有强赫布可塑性的混沌状态下，神经元动力学的稳定固定点会被突触动力学破坏，从而允许通过停止可塑性将任何神经元状态存储为稳定的固定点。这一可冻结的混乱阶段为工作记忆提供了一种新的机制。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究神经元与突触动态相互作用的理论模型，探讨突触可塑性对网络动力学的影响。
AI.motivation: 神经元活动与突触强度相互影响，但现有研究未系统解析这种耦合动态的机制与相图。
AI.method: 构建包含神经元单元和突触耦合的递归网络模型，结合动态平均场理论、雅可比矩阵分析、随机矩阵理论及李雅普诺夫指数分析。
AI.result: 发现赫布可塑性可抑制混沌网络活动并诱导静息网络混沌，反赫布可塑性引发振荡；强赫布可塑性使网络时间尺度分层，且存在可冻结混沌相，为工作记忆提供新机制。
AI.conclusion: 突触-神经元耦合动力学揭示了网络结构的双重主导机制，并提出了基于可冻结混沌的工作记忆实现途径。

authors_text: Zhijie Jia,Lin Chen,Kaiwen Hu,Lechao Cheng,Zunlei Feng,Mingli Song
title: Model Doctor for Diagnosing and Treating Segmentation Error
title_zh: 诊断和治疗分割错误的模范医生
abstract: Despite the remarkable progress in semantic segmentation tasks with the advancement of deep neural networks, existing U-shaped hierarchical typical segmentation networks still suffer from local misclassification of categories and inaccurate target boundaries. In an effort to alleviate this issue, we propose a Model Doctor for semantic segmentation problems. The Model Doctor is designed to diagnose the aforementioned problems in existing pre-trained models and treat them without introducing additional data, with the goal of refining the parameters to achieve better performance. Extensive experiments on several benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/zhijiejia/SegDoctor}.
summary: Despite the remarkable progress in semantic segmentation tasks with the advancement of deep neural networks, existing U-shaped hierarchical typical segmentation networks still suffer from local misclassification of categories and inaccurate target boundaries. In an effort to alleviate this issue, we propose a Model Doctor for semantic segmentation problems. The Model Doctor is designed to diagnose the aforementioned problems in existing pre-trained models and treat them without introducing additional data, with the goal of refining the parameters to achieve better performance. Extensive experiments on several benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/zhijiejia/SegDoctor}.
abstract_zh: 尽管随着深度神经网络的进步，语义分割任务取得了显着进展，但现有的U型分层典型分割网络仍然存在局部类别错误分类和目标边界不准确的问题。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一个用于语义分割问题的模型医生。 Model Doctor旨在诊断现有预训练模型中的上述问题并在不引入额外数据的情况下进行处理，目的是细化参数以获得更好的性能。对几个基准数据集的广泛实验证明了我们方法的有效性。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/zhijiejia/SegDoctor} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Model Doctor的方法，用于诊断和修正语义分割模型中的局部分类错误和边界不准确问题，无需引入额外数据。
AI.motivation: 现有U型分层分割网络在局部分类和目标边界精度上存在不足，且传统改进方法常依赖额外数据，而本文旨在通过参数优化实现无数据增强的模型修复。
AI.method: 设计Model Doctor框架直接诊断预训练模型的缺陷区域，并通过参数细化策略进行针对性优化，提升分割精度。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验验证了该方法的有效性，代码已开源供复现。
AI.conclusion: Model Doctor无需额外数据即可有效提升分割模型性能，为模型优化提供了新思路。

search_text: Model Doctor for Diagnosing and Treating Segmentation Error 诊断和治疗分割错误的模范医生 Despite the remarkable progress in semantic segmentation tasks with the advancement of deep neural networks, existing U-shaped hierarchical typical segmentation networks still suffer from local misclassification of categories and inaccurate target boundaries. In an effort to alleviate this issue, we propose a Model Doctor for semantic segmentation problems. The Model Doctor is designed to diagnose the aforementioned problems in existing pre-trained models and treat them without introducing additional data, with the goal of refining the parameters to achieve better performance. Extensive experiments on several benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/zhijiejia/SegDoctor}. 尽管随着深度神经网络的进步，语义分割任务取得了显着进展，但现有的U型分层典型分割网络仍然存在局部类别错误分类和目标边界不准确的问题。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一个用于语义分割问题的模型医生。 Model Doctor旨在诊断现有预训练模型中的上述问题并在不引入额外数据的情况下进行处理，目的是细化参数以获得更好的性能。对几个基准数据集的广泛实验证明了我们方法的有效性。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/zhijiejia/SegDoctor} 获取。 本文提出一种名为Model Doctor的方法，用于诊断和修正语义分割模型中的局部分类错误和边界不准确问题，无需引入额外数据。 Zhijie Jia,Lin Chen,Kaiwen Hu,Lechao Cheng,Zunlei Feng,Mingli Song cs.CV

authors_text: Xin Zhang,Liangxiu Han,Lianghao Han,Haoming Chen,Darren Dancey,Daoqiang Zhang
title: sMRI-PatchNet: A novel explainable patch-based deep learning network for Alzheimer's disease diagnosis and discriminative atrophy localisation with Structural MRI
title_zh: sMRI-PatchNet：一种新型可解释的基于补丁的深度学习网络，用于通过结构 MRI 进行阿尔茨海默病诊断和判别性萎缩定位
abstract: Structural magnetic resonance imaging (sMRI) can identify subtle brain changes due to its high contrast for soft tissues and high spatial resolution. It has been widely used in diagnosing neurological brain diseases, such as Alzheimer disease (AD). However, the size of 3D high-resolution data poses a significant challenge for data analysis and processing. Since only a few areas of the brain show structural changes highly associated with AD, the patch-based methods dividing the whole image data into several small regular patches have shown promising for more efficient sMRI-based image analysis. The major challenges of the patch-based methods on sMRI include identifying the discriminative patches, combining features from the discrete discriminative patches, and designing appropriate classifiers. This work proposes a novel patch-based deep learning network (sMRI-PatchNet) with explainable patch localisation and selection for AD diagnosis using sMRI. Specifically, it consists of two primary components: 1) A fast and efficient explainable patch selection mechanism for determining the most discriminative patches based on computing the SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) contribution to a transfer learning model for AD diagnosis on massive medical data; and 2) A novel patch-based network for extracting deep features and AD classfication from the selected patches with position embeddings to retain position information, capable of capturing the global and local information of inter- and intra-patches. This method has been applied for the AD classification and the prediction of the transitional state moderate cognitive impairment (MCI) conversion with real datasets.
summary: Structural magnetic resonance imaging (sMRI) can identify subtle brain changes due to its high contrast for soft tissues and high spatial resolution. It has been widely used in diagnosing neurological brain diseases, such as Alzheimer disease (AD). However, the size of 3D high-resolution data poses a significant challenge for data analysis and processing. Since only a few areas of the brain show structural changes highly associated with AD, the patch-based methods dividing the whole image data into several small regular patches have shown promising for more efficient sMRI-based image analysis. The major challenges of the patch-based methods on sMRI include identifying the discriminative patches, combining features from the discrete discriminative patches, and designing appropriate classifiers. This work proposes a novel patch-based deep learning network (sMRI-PatchNet) with explainable patch localisation and selection for AD diagnosis using sMRI. Specifically, it consists of two primary components: 1) A fast and efficient explainable patch selection mechanism for determining the most discriminative patches based on computing the SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) contribution to a transfer learning model for AD diagnosis on massive medical data; and 2) A novel patch-based network for extracting deep features and AD classfication from the selected patches with position embeddings to retain position information, capable of capturing the global and local information of inter- and intra-patches. This method has been applied for the AD classification and the prediction of the transitional state moderate cognitive impairment (MCI) conversion with real datasets.
abstract_zh: 结构磁共振成像（sMRI）由于软组织的高对比度和高空间分辨率，可以识别细微的大脑变化。它已广泛用于诊断神经性脑部疾病，例如阿尔茨海默病（AD）。然而，3D高分辨率数据的规模给数据分析和处理带来了巨大的挑战。由于大脑中只有少数区域显示出与 AD 高度相关的结构变化，因此基于补丁的方法将整个图像数据划分为几个小的规则补丁，这对于更有效的基于 sMRI 的图像分析来说是有希望的。 sMRI 基于补丁的方法的主要挑战包括识别判别性补丁、组合离散判别性补丁的特征以及设计适当的分类器。这项工作提出了一种新颖的基于补丁的深度学习网络（sMRI-PatchNet），具有可解释的补丁定位和使用 sMRI 进行 AD 诊断的选择。具体来说，它由两个主要组成部分组成：1）快速高效的可解释补丁选择机制，用于基于计算 SHapley Additive exPlanations（SHAP）对海量医学数据 AD 诊断的迁移学习模型的贡献来确定最具辨别力的补丁； 2）一种新颖的基于补丁的网络，用于从具有位置嵌入的所选补丁中提取深度特征和AD分类以保留位置信息，能够捕获补丁间和补丁内的全局和局部信息。该方法已应用于 AD 分类和过渡状态中度认知障碍（MCI）与真实数据集转换的预测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于结构磁共振成像（sMRI）的可解释补丁网络sMRI-PatchNet，用于阿尔茨海默病（AD）诊断及鉴别萎缩定位。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率sMRI数据处理复杂且效率低，传统方法难以高效提取与AD相关的脑区特征，需开发可解释性强且高效的补丁分析方法。
AI.method: 设计包含两个核心模块的网络：1）基于SHAP值的可解释补丁选择机制，筛选对AD诊断贡献度高的补丁；2）结合位置嵌入的补丁网络，提取深层特征并分类，保留空间信息以捕捉局部与全局特征。
AI.result: 该方法在真实数据集上实现了AD分类及轻度认知障碍（MCI）转化为AD的预测，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: sMRI-PatchNet通过可解释的补丁选择与特征提取，提升了AD诊断的效率与准确性，为医学影像分析提供了新思路。

title: Grimm in Wonderland: Prompt Engineering with Midjourney to Illustrate Fairytales
title_zh: 格林童话：中途快速工程阐释童话故事
comment: 19th Conference on Information and Research science Connecting to Digital and Library Science, February 23-24, 2023, Bari, Italy
comments: 19th Conference on Information and Research science Connecting to Digital and Library Science, February 23-24, 2023, Bari, Italy
abstract: The quality of text-to-image generation is continuously improving, yet the boundaries of its applicability are still unclear. In particular, refinement of the text input with the objective of achieving better results - commonly called prompt engineering - so far seems to have not been geared towards work with pre-existing texts. We investigate whether text-to-image generation and prompt engineering could be used to generate basic illustrations of popular fairytales. Using Midjourney v4, we engage in action research with a dual aim: to attempt to generate 5 believable illustrations for each of 5 popular fairytales, and to define a prompt engineering process that starts from a pre-existing text and arrives at an illustration of it. We arrive at a tentative 4-stage process: i) initial prompt, ii) composition adjustment, iii) style refinement, and iv) variation selection. We also discuss three reasons why the generation model struggles with certain illustrations: difficulties with counts, bias from stereotypical configurations and inability to depict overly fantastic situations. Our findings are not limited to the specific generation model and are intended to be generalisable to future ones.
summary: The quality of text-to-image generation is continuously improving, yet the boundaries of its applicability are still unclear. In particular, refinement of the text input with the objective of achieving better results - commonly called prompt engineering - so far seems to have not been geared towards work with pre-existing texts. We investigate whether text-to-image generation and prompt engineering could be used to generate basic illustrations of popular fairytales. Using Midjourney v4, we engage in action research with a dual aim: to attempt to generate 5 believable illustrations for each of 5 popular fairytales, and to define a prompt engineering process that starts from a pre-existing text and arrives at an illustration of it. We arrive at a tentative 4-stage process: i) initial prompt, ii) composition adjustment, iii) style refinement, and iv) variation selection. We also discuss three reasons why the generation model struggles with certain illustrations: difficulties with counts, bias from stereotypical configurations and inability to depict overly fantastic situations. Our findings are not limited to the specific generation model and are intended to be generalisable to future ones.
abstract_zh: 文本到图像生成的质量正在不断提高，但其适用范围仍不清楚。特别是，以实现更好的结果为目标的文本输入的细化（通常称为提示工程）到目前为止似乎还没有适合与预先存在的文本一起工作。我们研究文本到图像生成和提示工程是否可用于生成流行童话故事的基本插图。使用 Midjourney v4，我们进行具有双重目标的行动研究：尝试为 5 个流行童话故事中的每一个生成 5 个可信的插图，并定义一个从预先存在的文本开始并得出其插图的快速工程过程。我们初步确定了 4 个阶段的过程：i) 初始提示，ii) 构图调整，iii) 风格细化，以及 iv) 变体选择。我们还讨论了生成模型在某些插图上遇到困难的三个原因：计数困难、刻板配置的偏差以及无法描绘过于奇妙的情况。我们的研究结果并不局限于特定的生成模型，而是旨在推广到未来的模型。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在利用Midjourney工具进行提示工程，生成经典童话故事的插图，并建立一套从现有文本生成图像的通用流程。
AI.motivation: 尽管文本到图像生成技术不断进步，但其适用边界及如何通过提示工程优化生成效果尚不明确，尤其是针对已有文本的处理。
AI.method: 采用Midjourney v4模型，通过行动研究方法，尝试为五个经典童话故事生成五幅可信插图，并构建从现有文本出发的四阶段提示工程流程。
AI.result: 提出包含初始提示、构图调整、风格优化和变体选择的四阶段流程，并指出模型在处理数量、刻板印象和过于奇幻场景时的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 研究发现不仅适用于Midjourney模型，也为其他文本到图像生成模型提供了可推广的提示工程方法和优化方向。

result: 提出包含初始提示、构图调整、风格优化和变体选择的四阶段流程，并指出模型在处理数量、刻板印象和过于奇幻场景时的局限性。
conclusion: 研究发现不仅适用于Midjourney模型，也为其他文本到图像生成模型提供了可推广的提示工程方法和优化方向。
search_text: Grimm in Wonderland: Prompt Engineering with Midjourney to Illustrate Fairytales 格林童话：中途快速工程阐释童话故事 The quality of text-to-image generation is continuously improving, yet the boundaries of its applicability are still unclear. In particular, refinement of the text input with the objective of achieving better results - commonly called prompt engineering - so far seems to have not been geared towards work with pre-existing texts. We investigate whether text-to-image generation and prompt engineering could be used to generate basic illustrations of popular fairytales. Using Midjourney v4, we engage in action research with a dual aim: to attempt to generate 5 believable illustrations for each of 5 popular fairytales, and to define a prompt engineering process that starts from a pre-existing text and arrives at an illustration of it. We arrive at a tentative 4-stage process: i) initial prompt, ii) composition adjustment, iii) style refinement, and iv) variation selection. We also discuss three reasons why the generation model struggles with certain illustrations: difficulties with counts, bias from stereotypical configurations and inability to depict overly fantastic situations. Our findings are not limited to the specific generation model and are intended to be generalisable to future ones. 文本到图像生成的质量正在不断提高，但其适用范围仍不清楚。特别是，以实现更好的结果为目标的文本输入的细化（通常称为提示工程）到目前为止似乎还没有适合与预先存在的文本一起工作。我们研究文本到图像生成和提示工程是否可用于生成流行童话故事的基本插图。使用 Midjourney v4，我们进行具有双重目标的行动研究：尝试为 5 个流行童话故事中的每一个生成 5 个可信的插图，并定义一个从预先存在的文本开始并得出其插图的快速工程过程。我们初步确定了 4 个阶段的过程：i) 初始提示，ii) 构图调整，iii) 风格细化，以及 iv) 变体选择。我们还讨论了生成模型在某些插图上遇到困难的三个原因：计数困难、刻板配置的偏差以及无法描绘过于奇妙的情况。我们的研究结果并不局限于特定的生成模型，而是旨在推广到未来的模型。 本论文旨在利用Midjourney工具进行提示工程，生成经典童话故事的插图，并建立一套从现有文本生成图像的通用流程。 Martin Ruskov cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.HC

authors_text: Zhihong Chen,Shizhe Diao,Benyou Wang,Guanbin Li,Xiang Wan
title: Towards Unifying Medical Vision-and-Language Pre-training via Soft Prompts
title_zh: 通过软提示统一医学视觉和语言预训练
abstract: Medical vision-and-language pre-training (Med-VLP) has shown promising improvements on many downstream medical tasks owing to its applicability to extracting generic representations from medical images and texts. Practically, there exist two typical types, \textit{i.e.}, the fusion-encoder type and the dual-encoder type, depending on whether a heavy fusion module is used. The former is superior at multi-modal tasks owing to the sufficient interaction between modalities; the latter is good at uni-modal and cross-modal tasks due to the single-modality encoding ability. To take advantage of these two types, we propose an effective yet straightforward scheme named PTUnifier to unify the two types. We first unify the input format by introducing visual and textual prompts, which serve as a feature bank that stores the most representative images/texts. By doing so, a single model could serve as a \textit{foundation model} that processes various tasks adopting different input formats (\textit{i.e.}, image-only, text-only, and image-text-pair). Furthermore, we construct a prompt pool (instead of static ones) to improve diversity and scalability. Experimental results show that our approach achieves state-of-the-art results on a broad range of tasks, spanning uni-modal tasks (\textit{i.e.}, image/text classification and text summarization), cross-modal tasks (\textit{i.e.}, image-to-text generation and image-text/text-image retrieval), and multi-modal tasks (\textit{i.e.}, visual question answering), demonstrating the effectiveness of our approach. Note that the adoption of prompts is orthogonal to most existing Med-VLP approaches and could be a beneficial and complementary extension to these approaches.
summary: Medical vision-and-language pre-training (Med-VLP) has shown promising improvements on many downstream medical tasks owing to its applicability to extracting generic representations from medical images and texts. Practically, there exist two typical types, \textit{i.e.}, the fusion-encoder type and the dual-encoder type, depending on whether a heavy fusion module is used. The former is superior at multi-modal tasks owing to the sufficient interaction between modalities; the latter is good at uni-modal and cross-modal tasks due to the single-modality encoding ability. To take advantage of these two types, we propose an effective yet straightforward scheme named PTUnifier to unify the two types. We first unify the input format by introducing visual and textual prompts, which serve as a feature bank that stores the most representative images/texts. By doing so, a single model could serve as a \textit{foundation model} that processes various tasks adopting different input formats (\textit{i.e.}, image-only, text-only, and image-text-pair). Furthermore, we construct a prompt pool (instead of static ones) to improve diversity and scalability. Experimental results show that our approach achieves state-of-the-art results on a broad range of tasks, spanning uni-modal tasks (\textit{i.e.}, image/text classification and text summarization), cross-modal tasks (\textit{i.e.}, image-to-text generation and image-text/text-image retrieval), and multi-modal tasks (\textit{i.e.}, visual question answering), demonstrating the effectiveness of our approach. Note that the adoption of prompts is orthogonal to most existing Med-VLP approaches and could be a beneficial and complementary extension to these approaches.
abstract_zh: 医学视觉和语言预训练（Med-VLP）由于适用于从医学图像和文本中提取通用表示，因此在许多下游医疗任务上显示出了有希望的改进。实际上，存在两种典型类型，即融合编码器类型和双编码器类型，具体取决于是否使用重型融合模块。前者由于模态之间的充分交互而在多模态任务中表现出色；后者由于单模态编码能力而擅长单模态和跨模态任务。为了利用这两种类型，我们提出了一种有效而简单的方案，名为 PTUnifier 来统一这两种类型。我们首先通过引入视觉和文本提示来统一输入格式，这些提示作为存储最具代表性的图像/文本的特征库。通过这样做，单个模型可以充当 \textit{基础模型}，处理采用不同输入格式（\textit{即}、仅图像、仅文本和图像文本对）的各种任务。此外，我们构建了一个提示池（而不是静态池）来提高多样性和可扩展性。实验结果表明，我们的方法在广泛的任务上取得了最先进的结果，涵盖单模态任务（\textit{i.e.}，图像/文本分类和文本摘要）、跨模态任务（\textit{i.e.}，图像到文本生成和图像文本/文本图像检索）和多模态任务（\textit{i.e.}，视觉问答），证明了我们方法的有效性。请注意，提示的采用与大多数现有的 Med-VLP 方法正交，并且可能是对这些方法的有益和补充扩展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过软提示统一医疗视觉-语言预训练的方法PTUnifier，以提升模型在多种医疗任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗视觉-语言预训练模型分为融合编码器和双编码器两类，分别擅长多模态和单模态任务，但缺乏统一框架。本文旨在设计一种通用方案，使单一模型能适应不同任务需求。
AI.method: 引入视觉和文本提示作为特征库，构建动态提示池替代静态提示，统一输入格式并实现单模型处理图像、文本及图文对等多种输入形式。
AI.result: 在单模态（图像/文本分类、文本摘要）、跨模态（图文生成、检索）及多模态（视觉问答）任务中均达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 提示机制与现有方法正交，可作为有益补充，为医疗视觉-语言模型提供了更灵活的统一框架。

authors_text: Vinicius Ribeiro,Yiteng Huang,Yuan Shangguan,Zhaojun Yang,Li Wan,Ming Sun
title: Handling the Alignment for Wake Word Detection: A Comparison Between Alignment-Based, Alignment-Free and Hybrid Approaches
title_zh: 处理唤醒词检测的对齐：基于对齐、无对齐和混合方法之间的比较
abstract: Wake word detection exists in most intelligent homes and portable devices. It offers these devices the ability to "wake up" when summoned at a low cost of power and computing. This paper focuses on understanding alignment's role in developing a wake-word system that answers a generic phrase. We discuss three approaches. The first is alignment-based, where the model is trained with frame-wise cross-entropy. The second is alignment-free, where the model is trained with CTC. The third, proposed by us, is a hybrid solution in which the model is trained with a small set of aligned data and then tuned with a sizeable unaligned dataset. We compare the three approaches and evaluate the impact of the different aligned-to-unaligned ratios for hybrid training. Our results show that the alignment-free system performs better than the alignment-based for the target operating point, and with a small fraction of the data (20%), we can train a model that complies with our initial constraints.
summary: Wake word detection exists in most intelligent homes and portable devices. It offers these devices the ability to "wake up" when summoned at a low cost of power and computing. This paper focuses on understanding alignment's role in developing a wake-word system that answers a generic phrase. We discuss three approaches. The first is alignment-based, where the model is trained with frame-wise cross-entropy. The second is alignment-free, where the model is trained with CTC. The third, proposed by us, is a hybrid solution in which the model is trained with a small set of aligned data and then tuned with a sizeable unaligned dataset. We compare the three approaches and evaluate the impact of the different aligned-to-unaligned ratios for hybrid training. Our results show that the alignment-free system performs better than the alignment-based for the target operating point, and with a small fraction of the data (20%), we can train a model that complies with our initial constraints.
abstract_zh: 大多数智能家居和便携式设备中都存在唤醒词检测。它为这些设备提供了在被召唤时以较低的电力和计算成本“唤醒”的能力。本文重点了解对齐在开发回答通用短语的唤醒词系统中的作用。我们讨论三种方法。第一个是基于对齐的，其中模型使用逐帧交叉熵进行训练。第二种是无需对齐的，模型使用 CTC 进行训练。我们提出的第三种解决方案是一种混合解决方案，其中模型使用一小组对齐数据进行训练，然后使用大量未对齐数据集进行调整。我们比较了这三种方法，并评估了不同的对齐与未对齐比率对混合训练的影响。我们的结果表明，对于目标操作点，免对齐系统的性能优于基于对齐的系统，并且利用一小部分数据（20%），我们可以训练一个符合初始约束的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了三种唤醒词检测方法：基于对齐、无对齐和混合方法，探讨对齐在通用短语检测中的作用。
AI.motivation: 唤醒词检测需在低功耗设备上实现高效准确的唤醒，传统对齐方法存在计算成本高、泛化能力弱的问题。
AI.method: 提出三种方法：1) 基于帧级交叉熵的对齐方法；2) 使用CTC的无对齐方法；3) 混合方法（少量对齐数据训练后用大量无对齐数据微调）。
AI.result: 无对齐方法在目标工作点表现优于对齐方法，混合方法仅需20%对齐数据即可满足初始约束条件。
AI.conclusion: 无对齐方法更适配唤醒词检测需求，混合方法在数据效率与性能间取得平衡，为实际部署提供新思路。

The third, proposed by us, is a hybrid solution in which the model is trained with a small set of aligned data and then tuned with a sizeable unaligned dataset. We compare the three approaches and evaluate the impact of the different aligned-to-unaligned ratios for hybrid training. Our results show that the alignment-free system performs better than the alignment-based for the target operating point, and with a small fraction of the data (20%), we can train a model that complies with our initial constraints. 大多数智能家居和便携式设备中都存在唤醒词检测。它为这些设备提供了在被召唤时以较低的电力和计算成本“唤醒”的能力。本文重点了解对齐在开发回答通用短语的唤醒词系统中的作用。我们讨论三种方法。第一个是基于对齐的，其中模型使用逐帧交叉熵进行训练。第二种是无需对齐的，模型使用 CTC 进行训练。我们提出的第三种解决方案是一种混合解决方案，其中模型使用一小组对齐数据进行训练，然后使用大量未对齐数据集进行调整。我们比较了这三种方法，并评估了不同的对齐与未对齐比率对混合训练的影响。我们的结果表明，对于目标操作点，免对齐系统的性能优于基于对齐的系统，并且利用一小部分数据（20%），我们可以训练一个符合初始约束的模型。 本文比较了三种唤醒词检测方法：基于对齐、无对齐和混合方法，探讨对齐在通用短语检测中的作用。 Vinicius Ribeiro,Yiteng Huang,Yuan Shangguan,Zhaojun Yang,Li Wan,Ming Sun cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

title: Entry Separation using a Mixed Visual and Textual Language Model: Application to 19th century French Trade Directories
title_zh: 使用混合视觉和文本语言模型的条目分离：在 19 世纪法国贸易名录中的应用
abstract: When extracting structured data from repetitively organized documents, such as dictionaries, directories, or even newspapers, a key challenge is to correctly segment what constitutes the basic text regions for the target database. Traditionally, such a problem was tackled as part of the layout analysis and was mostly based on visual clues for dividing (top-down) approaches. Some agglomerating (bottom-up) approaches started to consider textual information to link similar contents, but they required a proper over-segmentation of fine-grained units. In this work, we propose a new pragmatic approach whose efficiency is demonstrated on 19th century French Trade Directories. We propose to consider two sub-problems: coarse layout detection (text columns and reading order), which is assumed to be effective and not detailed here, and a fine-grained entry separation stage for which we propose to adapt a state-of-the-art Named Entity Recognition (NER) approach. By injecting special visual tokens, coding, for instance, indentation or breaks, into the token stream of the language model used for NER purpose, we can leverage both textual and visual knowledge simultaneously. Code, data, results and models are available at https://github.com/soduco/paper-entryseg-icdar23-code, https://huggingface.co/HueyNemud/ (icdar23-entrydetector* variants)
summary: When extracting structured data from repetitively organized documents, such as dictionaries, directories, or even newspapers, a key challenge is to correctly segment what constitutes the basic text regions for the target database. Traditionally, such a problem was tackled as part of the layout analysis and was mostly based on visual clues for dividing (top-down) approaches. Some agglomerating (bottom-up) approaches started to consider textual information to link similar contents, but they required a proper over-segmentation of fine-grained units. In this work, we propose a new pragmatic approach whose efficiency is demonstrated on 19th century French Trade Directories. We propose to consider two sub-problems: coarse layout detection (text columns and reading order), which is assumed to be effective and not detailed here, and a fine-grained entry separation stage for which we propose to adapt a state-of-the-art Named Entity Recognition (NER) approach. By injecting special visual tokens, coding, for instance, indentation or breaks, into the token stream of the language model used for NER purpose, we can leverage both textual and visual knowledge simultaneously. Code, data, results and models are available at https://github.com/soduco/paper-entryseg-icdar23-code, https://huggingface.co/HueyNemud/ (icdar23-entrydetector* variants)
abstract_zh: 当从重复组织的文档（例如词典、目录甚至报纸）中提取结构化数据时，一个关键的挑战是正确分割构成目标数据库基本文本区域的内容。传统上，此类问题是作为布局分析的一部分来解决的，并且主要基于划分（自上而下）方法的视觉线索。一些聚合（自下而上）方法开始考虑文本信息来链接相似的内容，但它们需要对细粒度单元进行适当的过度分割。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的务实方法，其效率在 19 世纪的法国贸易名录中得到了证明。我们建议考虑两个子问题：粗略布局检测（文本列和阅读顺序），假设它是有效的，这里没有详细说明；以及细粒度条目分离阶段，我们建议采用最先进的命名实体识别（NER）方法。通过将特殊的视觉标记、编码（例如缩进或中断）注入到用于 NER 目的的语言模型的标记流中，我们可以同时利用文本和视觉知识。代码、数据、结果和模型可在 https://github.com/sodico/paper-entryseg-icdar23-code、https://huggingface.co/HueyNemud/（icdar23-entryDetector* 变体）获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合视觉和文本信息的语言模型方法，用于解决19世纪法国贸易名录中条目分割的难题。
AI.motivation: 传统文档布局分析依赖视觉线索或文本相似性，但难以处理历史文档中复杂的排版和重复结构，需融合多模态信息提升分割精度。
AI.method: 通过向命名实体识别（NER）模型的输入流注入视觉标记（如缩进、换行符），将视觉特征与文本语义联合建模，实现细粒度条目分割。
AI.result: 在19世纪法国贸易名录数据集上验证了方法有效性，代码与模型已开源，分割效果优于纯文本或纯视觉方法。
AI.conclusion: 混合视觉-文本语言模型为历史文档结构化处理提供了新思路，证明多模态特征融合在复杂布局分析中的优势。

title: Learning from Label Proportion with Online Pseudo-Label Decision by Regret Minimization
title_zh: 通过后悔最小化在线伪标签决策来学习标签比例
abstract: This paper proposes a novel and efficient method for Learning from Label Proportions (LLP), whose goal is to train a classifier only by using the class label proportions of instance sets, called bags. We propose a novel LLP method based on an online pseudo-labeling method with regret minimization. As opposed to the previous LLP methods, the proposed method effectively works even if the bag sizes are large. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method using some benchmark datasets.
summary: This paper proposes a novel and efficient method for Learning from Label Proportions (LLP), whose goal is to train a classifier only by using the class label proportions of instance sets, called bags. We propose a novel LLP method based on an online pseudo-labeling method with regret minimization. As opposed to the previous LLP methods, the proposed method effectively works even if the bag sizes are large. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method using some benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖且有效的标签比例学习方法（LLP），其目标是仅使用实例集（称为袋）的类标签比例来训练分类器。我们提出了一种基于具有遗憾最小化的在线伪标记方法的新颖的 LLP 方法。与之前的 LLP 方法相反，即使袋子尺寸很大，所提出的方法也能有效地工作。我们使用一些基准数据集证明了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于在线伪标签和遗憾最小化的高效标签比例学习方法，解决大袋子场景下的分类问题。
AI.motivation: 传统LLP方法在处理大袋子时效果有限，需更高效的方法。
AI.method: 结合在线伪标签生成与遗憾最小化策略，优化分类器训练过程。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上验证了方法的有效性，表现优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决大袋子LLP问题，具有实际应用价值。

title: Long Range Object-Level Monocular Depth Estimation for UAVs
title_zh: 无人机远距离物体级单目深度估计
abstract: Computer vision-based object detection is a key modality for advanced Detect-And-Avoid systems that allow for autonomous flight missions of UAVs. While standard object detection frameworks do not predict the actual depth of an object, this information is crucial to avoid collisions. In this paper, we propose several novel extensions to state-of-the-art methods for monocular object detection from images at long range. Firstly, we propose Sigmoid and ReLU-like encodings when modeling depth estimation as a regression task. Secondly, we frame the depth estimation as a classification problem and introduce a Soft-Argmax function in the calculation of the training loss. The extensions are exemplarily applied to the YOLOX object detection framework. We evaluate the performance using the Amazon Airborne Object Tracking dataset. In addition, we introduce the Fitness score as a new metric that jointly assesses both object detection and depth estimation performance. Our results show that the proposed methods outperform state-of-the-art approaches w.r.t. existing, as well as the proposed metrics.
summary: Computer vision-based object detection is a key modality for advanced Detect-And-Avoid systems that allow for autonomous flight missions of UAVs. While standard object detection frameworks do not predict the actual depth of an object, this information is crucial to avoid collisions. In this paper, we propose several novel extensions to state-of-the-art methods for monocular object detection from images at long range. Firstly, we propose Sigmoid and ReLU-like encodings when modeling depth estimation as a regression task. Secondly, we frame the depth estimation as a classification problem and introduce a Soft-Argmax function in the calculation of the training loss. The extensions are exemplarily applied to the YOLOX object detection framework. We evaluate the performance using the Amazon Airborne Object Tracking dataset. In addition, we introduce the Fitness score as a new metric that jointly assesses both object detection and depth estimation performance. Our results show that the proposed methods outperform state-of-the-art approaches w.r.t. existing, as well as the proposed metrics.
abstract_zh: 基于计算机视觉的物体检测是先进的检测与避免系统的关键模式，可实现无人机的自主飞行任务。虽然标准对象检测框架无法预测对象的实际深度，但此信息对于避免碰撞至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了几种对最先进方法的新颖扩展，用于从远距离图像中进行单目目标检测。首先，我们在将深度估计建模为回归任务时提出了 Sigmoid 和 ReLU 类编码。其次，我们将深度估计视为分类问题，并在训练损失的计算中引入 Soft-Argmax 函数。这些扩展示例性地应用于YOLOX对象检测框架。我们使用 Amazon Airborne Object Tracking 数据集评估性能。此外，我们引入了健身得分作为一个新的指标，联合评估对象检测和深度估计性能。我们的结果表明，所提出的方法优于最先进的方法。现有的以及建议的指标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对无人机的远距离单目物体级深度估计方法，以增强自主飞行中的避障能力。
AI.motivation: 现有目标检测方法无法提供物体深度信息，而深度信息对无人机避障至关重要，因此需要改进深度估计方法。
AI.method: 提出两种方法：将深度估计作为回归任务时使用Sigmoid和ReLU-like编码，以及作为分类任务时引入Soft-Argmax函数；应用于YOLOX框架，并引入结合检测与深度估计的Fitness分数指标。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提方法在现有及新提出的指标上均优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法有效提升了无人机在远距离场景下的深度估计性能，为自主飞行避障提供了更可靠的解决方案。

method: 提出两种方法：将深度估计作为回归任务时使用Sigmoid和ReLU-like编码，以及作为分类任务时引入Soft-Argmax函数；应用于YOLOX框架，并引入结合检测与深度估计的Fitness分数指标。
result: 实验结果表明，所提方法在现有及新提出的指标上均优于现有先进方法。
conclusion: 本文方法有效提升了无人机在远距离场景下的深度估计性能，为自主飞行避障提供了更可靠的解决方案。
search_text: Long Range Object-Level Monocular Depth Estimation for UAVs 无人机远距离物体级单目深度估计 Computer vision-based object detection is a key modality for advanced Detect-And-Avoid systems that allow for autonomous flight missions of UAVs. While standard object detection frameworks do not predict the actual depth of an object, this information is crucial to avoid collisions. In this paper, we propose several novel extensions to state-of-the-art methods for monocular object detection from images at long range. Firstly, we propose Sigmoid and ReLU-like encodings when modeling depth estimation as a regression task. Secondly, we frame the depth estimation as a classification problem and introduce a Soft-Argmax function in the calculation of the training loss. The extensions are exemplarily applied to the YOLOX object detection framework. We evaluate the performance using the Amazon Airborne Object Tracking dataset. In addition, we introduce the Fitness score as a new metric that jointly assesses both object detection and depth estimation performance. Our results show that the proposed methods outperform state-of-the-art approaches w.r.t. existing, as well as the proposed metrics. 基于计算机视觉的物体检测是先进的检测与避免系统的关键模式，可实现无人机的自主飞行任务。虽然标准对象检测框架无法预测对象的实际深度，但此信息对于避免碰撞至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了几种对最先进方法的新颖扩展，用于从远距离图像中进行单目目标检测。首先，我们在将深度估计建模为回归任务时提出了 Sigmoid 和 ReLU 类编码。其次，我们将深度估计视为分类问题，并在训练损失的计算中引入 Soft-Argmax 函数。这些扩展示例性地应用于YOLOX对象检测框架。我们使用 Amazon Airborne Object Tracking 数据集评估性能。此外，我们引入了健身得分作为一个新的指标，联合评估对象检测和深度估计性能。我们的结果表明，所提出的方法优于最先进的方法。现有的以及建议的指标。 本文提出了一种针对无人机的远距离单目物体级深度估计方法，以增强自主飞行中的避障能力。 David Silva,Nicolas Jourdan,Nils Gählert cs.CV

title: PAC-Bayesian Generalization Bounds for Adversarial Generative Models
title_zh: 对抗性生成模型的 PAC-贝叶斯泛化界限
abstract: We extend PAC-Bayesian theory to generative models and develop generalization bounds for models based on the Wasserstein distance and the total variation distance. Our first result on the Wasserstein distance assumes the instance space is bounded, while our second result takes advantage of dimensionality reduction. Our results naturally apply to Wasserstein GANs and Energy-Based GANs, and our bounds provide new training objectives for these two. Although our work is mainly theoretical, we perform numerical experiments showing non-vacuous generalization bounds for Wasserstein GANs on synthetic datasets.
summary: We extend PAC-Bayesian theory to generative models and develop generalization bounds for models based on the Wasserstein distance and the total variation distance. Our first result on the Wasserstein distance assumes the instance space is bounded, while our second result takes advantage of dimensionality reduction. Our results naturally apply to Wasserstein GANs and Energy-Based GANs, and our bounds provide new training objectives for these two. Although our work is mainly theoretical, we perform numerical experiments showing non-vacuous generalization bounds for Wasserstein GANs on synthetic datasets.
abstract_zh: 我们将 PAC-贝叶斯理论扩展到生成模型，并根据 Wasserstein 距离和总变异距离开发模型的泛化界限。我们关于 Wasserstein 距离的第一个结果假设实例空间是有界的，而我们的第二个结果利用了降维。我们的结果自然适用于 Wasserstein GAN 和基于能量的 GAN，并且我们的界限为这两者提供了新的训练目标。尽管我们的工作主要是理论性的，但我们还是进行了数值实验，显示 Wasserstein GAN 在合成数据集上的非空泛化界限。

AI.tldr: 该论文将PAC-Bayesian理论扩展至对抗生成模型，建立基于Wasserstein距离和总变分距离的泛化界，并应用于Wasserstein GAN和Energy-Based GAN。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型的泛化界研究不足，尤其缺乏针对对抗生成网络（GAN）的理论分析，需通过PAC-Bayesian框架提供新的理论保障。
AI.method: 通过扩展PAC-Bayesian理论，分别基于有界实例空间和维度约简推导泛化界，并将其应用于Wasserstein GAN和Energy-Based GAN，设计新的训练目标。
AI.result: 提出两种距离下的泛化界，验证其在合成数据集上的Wasserstein GAN中的非空泛化界，为模型训练提供理论指导。
AI.conclusion: 理论成果为对抗生成模型提供了新的泛化分析工具，并通过实验验证了其有效性，未来可拓展至更多生成模型场景。

authors_text: Tao Hu,Xiaoqing Guan,Yixu Wang,Yifan Liu,Bixuan Zhang,Boyu Lin,You Wang,Guang Li
title: An MPC-based Optimal Motion Control Framework for Pendulum-driven Spherical Robots
title_zh: 基于 MPC 的摆驱动球形机器人最优运动控制框架
comment: This paper has been submitted to Control Engineering Practice
comments: This paper has been submitted to Control Engineering Practice
abstract: Motion control is essential for all autonomous mobile robots, and even more so for spherical robots. Due to the uniqueness of the spherical robot, its motion control must not only ensure accurate tracking of the target commands, but also minimize fluctuations in the robot's attitude and motors' current while tracking. In this paper, model predictive control (MPC) is applied to the control of spherical robots and an MPC-based motion control framework is designed. There are two controllers in the framework, an optimal velocity controller ESO-MPC which combines extend states observers (ESO) and MPC, and an optimal orientation controller that uses multilayer perceptron (MLP) to generate accurate trajectories and MPC with changing weights to achieve optimal control. Finally, the performance of individual controllers and the whole control framework are verified by physical experiments. The experimental results show that the MPC-based motion control framework proposed in this work is much better than PID in terms of rapidity and accuracy, and has great advantages over sliding mode controller (SMC) for overshoot, attitude stability, current stability and energy consumption.
summary: Motion control is essential for all autonomous mobile robots, and even more so for spherical robots. Due to the uniqueness of the spherical robot, its motion control must not only ensure accurate tracking of the target commands, but also minimize fluctuations in the robot's attitude and motors' current while tracking. In this paper, model predictive control (MPC) is applied to the control of spherical robots and an MPC-based motion control framework is designed. There are two controllers in the framework, an optimal velocity controller ESO-MPC which combines extend states observers (ESO) and MPC, and an optimal orientation controller that uses multilayer perceptron (MLP) to generate accurate trajectories and MPC with changing weights to achieve optimal control. Finally, the performance of individual controllers and the whole control framework are verified by physical experiments. The experimental results show that the MPC-based motion control framework proposed in this work is much better than PID in terms of rapidity and accuracy, and has great advantages over sliding mode controller (SMC) for overshoot, attitude stability, current stability and energy consumption.
abstract_zh: 运动控制对于所有自主移动机器人至关重要，对于球形机器人更是如此。由于球形机器人的独特性，其运动控制不仅要保证对目标指令的准确跟踪，还要尽量减少跟踪过程中机器人姿态和电机电流的波动。本文将模型预测控制（MPC）应用于球形机器人的控制，设计了基于MPC的运动控制框架。该框架中有两个控制器，一个最优速度控制器ESO-MPC，它结合了扩展状态观察器（ESO）和MPC，以及一个最优方向控制器，它使用多层感知器（MLP）生成精确的轨迹，并通过改变权重的MPC来实现最优控制。最后，通过物理实验验证了各个控制器和整个控制框架的性能。实验结果表明，本文提出的基于MPC的运动控制框架在快速性和准确性方面均远优于PID，并且在超调、姿态稳定性、电流稳定性和能耗方面比滑模控制器（SMC）具有很大优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模型预测控制（MPC）的摆动驱动球形机器人最优运动控制框架，旨在提升其运动控制性能。
AI.motivation: 球形机器人运动控制需兼顾轨迹跟踪精度与姿态、电机电流的稳定性，传统PID和滑模控制（SMC）在动态响应、超调和能耗方面存在不足。
AI.method: 设计包含两个控制器的框架：结合扩展状态观测器（ESO）与MPC的最优速度控制器ESO-MPC，以及采用多层感知机（MLP）生成轨迹并结合变权重MPC的最优姿态控制器。
AI.result: 实验表明，该框架在响应速度、跟踪精度、超调抑制、姿态稳定性及能耗方面均优于PID和SMC。
AI.conclusion: 基于MPC的控制框架有效解决了球形机器人运动控制中的多目标优化问题，为相关领域提供了更优的控制方案。

authors_text: Marvin Klemp,Kevin Rösch,Royden Wagner,Jannik Quehl,Martin Lauer
title: LDFA: Latent Diffusion Face Anonymization for Self-driving Applications
title_zh: LDFA：自动驾驶应用的潜在扩散人脸匿名化
abstract: In order to protect vulnerable road users (VRUs), such as pedestrians or cyclists, it is essential that intelligent transportation systems (ITS) accurately identify them. Therefore, datasets used to train perception models of ITS must contain a significant number of vulnerable road users. However, data protection regulations require that individuals are anonymized in such datasets. In this work, we introduce a novel deep learning-based pipeline for face anonymization in the context of ITS. In contrast to related methods, we do not use generative adversarial networks (GANs) but build upon recent advances in diffusion models. We propose a two-stage method, which contains a face detection model followed by a latent diffusion model to generate realistic face in-paintings. To demonstrate the versatility of anonymized images, we train segmentation methods on anonymized data and evaluate them on non-anonymized data. Our experiment reveal that our pipeline is better suited to anonymize data for segmentation than naive methods and performes comparably with recent GAN-based methods. Moreover, face detectors achieve higher mAP scores for faces anonymized by our method compared to naive or recent GAN-based methods.
summary: In order to protect vulnerable road users (VRUs), such as pedestrians or cyclists, it is essential that intelligent transportation systems (ITS) accurately identify them. Therefore, datasets used to train perception models of ITS must contain a significant number of vulnerable road users. However, data protection regulations require that individuals are anonymized in such datasets. In this work, we introduce a novel deep learning-based pipeline for face anonymization in the context of ITS. In contrast to related methods, we do not use generative adversarial networks (GANs) but build upon recent advances in diffusion models. We propose a two-stage method, which contains a face detection model followed by a latent diffusion model to generate realistic face in-paintings. To demonstrate the versatility of anonymized images, we train segmentation methods on anonymized data and evaluate them on non-anonymized data. Our experiment reveal that our pipeline is better suited to anonymize data for segmentation than naive methods and performes comparably with recent GAN-based methods. Moreover, face detectors achieve higher mAP scores for faces anonymized by our method compared to naive or recent GAN-based methods.
abstract_zh: 为了保护行人或骑自行车者等弱势道路使用者 (VRU)，智能交通系统 (ITS) 准确识别他们至关重要。因此，用于训练智能交通系统感知模型的数据集必须包含大量的弱势道路使用者。然而，数据保护法规要求个人在此类数据集中保持匿名。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种新颖的基于深度学习的管道，用于 ITS 背景下的人脸匿名化。与相关方法相比，我们不使用生成对抗网络（GAN），而是基于扩散模型的最新进展。我们提出了一种两阶段方法，其中包含面部检测模型和潜在扩散模型，以生成逼真的面部绘画。为了证明匿名图像的多功能性，我们在匿名数据上训练分割方法并在非匿名数据上对其进行评估。我们的实验表明，我们的流程比朴素方法更适合匿名化数据进行分割，并且其性能与最近基于 GAN 的方法相当。此外，与简单或最近的基于 GAN 的方法相比，人脸检测器对于通过我们的方法匿名的人脸获得了更高的 mAP 分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于潜在扩散模型的面部匿名化方法，用于自动驾驶场景中的数据集保护。
AI.motivation: 为了保护道路使用者的隐私，自动驾驶系统训练数据集中的个体需要匿名化，但现有方法存在不足，需开发更优的匿名化技术。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种两阶段方法，包括面部检测模型和潜在扩散模型，用于生成逼真的面部修复图像，以实现数据匿名化。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在数据匿名化方面优于简单方法，并且在分割任务上表现可与基于GAN的最新方法相媲美，同时面部检测器在匿名化图像上表现更好。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在自动驾驶场景中具有较高的实用性和有效性，为数据匿名化提供了新的解决方案。

search_text: LDFA: Latent Diffusion Face Anonymization for Self-driving Applications LDFA：自动驾驶应用的潜在扩散人脸匿名化 In order to protect vulnerable road users (VRUs), such as pedestrians or cyclists, it is essential that intelligent transportation systems (ITS) accurately identify them. Therefore, datasets used to train perception models of ITS must contain a significant number of vulnerable road users. However, data protection regulations require that individuals are anonymized in such datasets. In this work, we introduce a novel deep learning-based pipeline for face anonymization in the context of ITS. In contrast to related methods, we do not use generative adversarial networks (GANs) but build upon recent advances in diffusion models. We propose a two-stage method, which contains a face detection model followed by a latent diffusion model to generate realistic face in-paintings. To demonstrate the versatility of anonymized images, we train segmentation methods on anonymized data and evaluate them on non-anonymized data. Our experiment reveal that our pipeline is better suited to anonymize data for segmentation than naive methods and performes comparably with recent GAN-based methods. Moreover, face detectors achieve higher mAP scores for faces anonymized by our method compared to naive or recent GAN-based methods. 为了保护行人或骑自行车者等弱势道路使用者 (VRU)，智能交通系统 (ITS) 准确识别他们至关重要。因此，用于训练智能交通系统感知模型的数据集必须包含大量的弱势道路使用者。然而，数据保护法规要求个人在此类数据集中保持匿名。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种新颖的基于深度学习的管道，用于 ITS 背景下的人脸匿名化。与相关方法相比，我们不使用生成对抗网络（GAN），而是基于扩散模型的最新进展。我们提出了一种两阶段方法，其中包含面部检测模型和潜在扩散模型，以生成逼真的面部绘画。为了证明匿名图像的多功能性，我们在匿名数据上训练分割方法并在非匿名数据上对其进行评估。我们的实验表明，我们的流程比朴素方法更适合匿名化数据进行分割，并且其性能与最近基于 GAN 的方法相当。此外，与简单或最近的基于 GAN 的方法相比，人脸检测器对于通过我们的方法匿名的人脸获得了更高的 mAP 分数。 本文提出了一种基于潜在扩散模型的面部匿名化方法，用于自动驾驶场景中的数据集保护。 Marvin Klemp,Kevin Rösch,Royden Wagner,Jannik Quehl,Martin Lauer cs.CV

title: Towards Automated Homomorphic Encryption Parameter Selection with Fuzzy Logic and Linear Programming
title_zh: 利用模糊逻辑和线性规划实现自动同态加密参数选择
abstract: Homomorphic Encryption (HE) is a set of powerful properties of certain cryptosystems that allow for privacy-preserving operation over the encrypted text. Still, HE is not widespread due to limitations in terms of efficiency and usability. Among the challenges of HE, scheme parametrization (i.e., the selection of appropriate parameters within the algorithms) is a relevant multi-faced problem. First, the parametrization needs to comply with a set of properties to guarantee the security of the underlying scheme. Second, parametrization requires a deep understanding of the low-level primitives since the parameters have a confronting impact on the precision, performance, and security of the scheme. Finally, the circuit to be executed influences, and it is influenced by, the parametrization. Thus, there is no general optimal selection of parameters, and this selection depends on the circuit and the scenario of the application. Currently, most of the existing HE frameworks require cryptographers to address these considerations manually. It requires a minimum of expertise acquired through a steep learning curve. In this paper, we propose a unified solution for the aforementioned challenges. Concretely, we present an expert system combining Fuzzy Logic and Linear Programming. The Fuzzy Logic Modules receive a user selection of high-level priorities for the security, efficiency, and performance of the cryptosystem. Based on these preferences, the expert system generates a Linear Programming Model that obtains optimal combinations of parameters by considering those priorities while preserving a minimum level of security for the cryptosystem. We conduct an extended evaluation where we show that an expert system generates optimal parameter selections that maintain user preferences without undergoing the inherent complexity of analyzing the circuit.
summary: Homomorphic Encryption (HE) is a set of powerful properties of certain cryptosystems that allow for privacy-preserving operation over the encrypted text. Still, HE is not widespread due to limitations in terms of efficiency and usability. Among the challenges of HE, scheme parametrization (i.e., the selection of appropriate parameters within the algorithms) is a relevant multi-faced problem. First, the parametrization needs to comply with a set of properties to guarantee the security of the underlying scheme. Second, parametrization requires a deep understanding of the low-level primitives since the parameters have a confronting impact on the precision, performance, and security of the scheme. Finally, the circuit to be executed influences, and it is influenced by, the parametrization. Thus, there is no general optimal selection of parameters, and this selection depends on the circuit and the scenario of the application. Currently, most of the existing HE frameworks require cryptographers to address these considerations manually. It requires a minimum of expertise acquired through a steep learning curve. In this paper, we propose a unified solution for the aforementioned challenges. Concretely, we present an expert system combining Fuzzy Logic and Linear Programming. The Fuzzy Logic Modules receive a user selection of high-level priorities for the security, efficiency, and performance of the cryptosystem. Based on these preferences, the expert system generates a Linear Programming Model that obtains optimal combinations of parameters by considering those priorities while preserving a minimum level of security for the cryptosystem. We conduct an extended evaluation where we show that an expert system generates optimal parameter selections that maintain user preferences without undergoing the inherent complexity of analyzing the circuit.
abstract_zh: 同态加密 (HE) 是某些密码系统的一组强大属性，允许对加密文本进行隐私保护操作。尽管如此，由于效率和可用性方面的限制，HE 并没有得到广泛应用。在 HE 的挑战中，方案参数化（即在算法中选择适当的参数）是一个相关的多面问题。首先，参数化需要遵守一组属性以保证底层方案的安全性。其次，参数化需要对低级原语有深入的了解，因为参数对方案的精度、性能和安全性具有直接影响。最后，要执行的电路会影响参数化，并且受参数化的影响。因此，不存在通用的最佳参数选择，该选择取决于电路和应用场景。目前，大多数现有的 HE 框架都需要密码学家手动解决这些问题。它需要通过陡峭的学习曲线获得最少的专业知识。在本文中，我们针对上述挑战提出了统一的解决方案。具体来说，我们提出了一个结合模糊逻辑和线性规划的专家系统。模糊逻辑模块接收用户对密码系统的安全性、效率和性能的高级优先级的选择。基于这些偏好，专家系统生成一个线性规划模型，该模型通过考虑这些优先级来获得最佳参数组合，同时保留密码系统的最低安全级别。我们进行了扩展评估，表明专家系统可以生成最佳参数选择，从而保持用户偏好，而无需经历分析电路的固有复杂性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合模糊逻辑与线性规划的专家系统，用于自动化同态加密（HE）参数选择，以平衡安全、效率和性能需求。
AI.motivation: 当前HE框架需手动选择参数，依赖专家知识且复杂度高，缺乏统一解决方案。参数选择需兼顾安全性、性能及电路特性，难以满足多样化场景需求。
AI.method: 构建专家系统：通过模糊逻辑模块接收用户对安全、效率的高层优先级输入，生成线性规划模型，优化参数组合并确保最低安全阈值。
AI.result: 实验验证该系统可生成符合用户优先级的最优参数配置，无需手动分析电路即可满足性能与安全需求。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的混合方法为HE参数选择提供自动化方案，降低了使用门槛，提升了HE在实际场景中的可行性与适应性。

authors_text: Yan Zhao,Jincen Wang,Yuan Zong,Wenming Zheng,Hailun Lian,Li Zhao
title: Deep Implicit Distribution Alignment Networks for Cross-Corpus Speech Emotion Recognition
title_zh: 用于跨语料库语音情感识别的深度隐式分布对齐网络
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel deep transfer learning method called deep implicit distribution alignment networks (DIDAN) to deal with cross-corpus speech emotion recognition (SER) problem, in which the labeled training (source) and unlabeled testing (target) speech signals come from different corpora. Specifically, DIDAN first adopts a simple deep regression network consisting of a set of convolutional and fully connected layers to directly regress the source speech spectrums into the emotional labels such that the proposed DIDAN can own the emotion discriminative ability. Then, such ability is transferred to be also applicable to the target speech samples regardless of corpus variance by resorting to a well-designed regularization term called implicit distribution alignment (IDA). Unlike widely-used maximum mean discrepancy (MMD) and its variants, the proposed IDA absorbs the idea of sample reconstruction to implicitly align the distribution gap, which enables DIDAN to learn both emotion discriminative and corpus invariant features from speech spectrums. To evaluate the proposed DIDAN, extensive cross-corpus SER experiments on widely-used speech emotion corpora are carried out. Experimental results show that the proposed DIDAN can outperform lots of recent state-of-the-art methods in coping with the cross-corpus SER tasks.
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel deep transfer learning method called deep implicit distribution alignment networks (DIDAN) to deal with cross-corpus speech emotion recognition (SER) problem, in which the labeled training (source) and unlabeled testing (target) speech signals come from different corpora. Specifically, DIDAN first adopts a simple deep regression network consisting of a set of convolutional and fully connected layers to directly regress the source speech spectrums into the emotional labels such that the proposed DIDAN can own the emotion discriminative ability. Then, such ability is transferred to be also applicable to the target speech samples regardless of corpus variance by resorting to a well-designed regularization term called implicit distribution alignment (IDA). Unlike widely-used maximum mean discrepancy (MMD) and its variants, the proposed IDA absorbs the idea of sample reconstruction to implicitly align the distribution gap, which enables DIDAN to learn both emotion discriminative and corpus invariant features from speech spectrums. To evaluate the proposed DIDAN, extensive cross-corpus SER experiments on widely-used speech emotion corpora are carried out. Experimental results show that the proposed DIDAN can outperform lots of recent state-of-the-art methods in coping with the cross-corpus SER tasks.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种称为深度隐式分布对齐网络（DIDAN）的新型深度迁移学习方法来处理跨语料库语音情感识别（SER）问题，其中标记的训练（源）和未标记的测试（目标）语音信号来自不同的语料库。具体来说，DIDAN首先采用由一组卷积层和全连接层组成的简单深度回归网络，将源语音频谱直接回归为情感标签，使得所提出的DIDAN能够拥有情感辨别能力。然后，通过采用精心设计的正则化项（称为隐式分布对齐（IDA）），将这种能力转移到也适用于目标语音样本，而不管语料库方差如何。与广泛使用的最大平均差异（MMD）及其变体不同，所提出的 IDA 吸收了样本重建的思想来隐式对齐分布间隙，这使得 DIDAN 能够从语音频谱中学习情感区分特征和语料库不变特征。为了评估所提出的 DIDAN，对广泛使用的语音情感语料库进行了广泛的跨语料库 SER 实验。实验结果表明，所提出的 DIDAN 在处理跨语料库 SER 任务方面可以优于许多最新的最先进方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DIDAN的深度迁移学习方法，用于解决跨语料库语音情感识别问题。
AI.motivation: 跨语料库语音情感识别中，源语料库（带标签）与目标语料库（无标签）存在分布差异，传统方法难以有效迁移情感判别能力。
AI.method: DIDAN结合深度回归网络与隐式分布对齐（IDA）正则化项，通过样本重建思想隐式对齐分布差异，学习情感判别与语料库不变特征。
AI.result: 在多个跨语料库语音情感识别任务中，DIDAN优于许多最新方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: DIDAN通过IDA机制有效解决了跨语料库语音情感识别中的分布差异问题，为迁移学习提供了新思路。

search_text: Deep Implicit Distribution Alignment Networks for Cross-Corpus Speech Emotion Recognition 用于跨语料库语音情感识别的深度隐式分布对齐网络 In this paper, we propose a novel deep transfer learning method called deep implicit distribution alignment networks (DIDAN) to deal with cross-corpus speech emotion recognition (SER) problem, in which the labeled training (source) and unlabeled testing (target) speech signals come from different corpora. Specifically, DIDAN first adopts a simple deep regression network consisting of a set of convolutional and fully connected layers to directly regress the source speech spectrums into the emotional labels such that the proposed DIDAN can own the emotion discriminative ability. Then, such ability is transferred to be also applicable to the target speech samples regardless of corpus variance by resorting to a well-designed regularization term called implicit distribution alignment (IDA). Unlike widely-used maximum mean discrepancy (MMD) and its variants, the proposed IDA absorbs the idea of sample reconstruction to implicitly align the distribution gap, which enables DIDAN to learn both emotion discriminative and corpus invariant features from speech spectrums. To evaluate the proposed DIDAN, extensive cross-corpus SER experiments on widely-used speech emotion corpora are carried out. Experimental results show that the proposed DIDAN can outperform lots of recent state-of-the-art methods in coping with the cross-corpus SER tasks. 在本文中，我们提出了一种称为深度隐式分布对齐网络（DIDAN）的新型深度迁移学习方法来处理跨语料库语音情感识别（SER）问题，其中标记的训练（源）和未标记的测试（目标）语音信号来自不同的语料库。具体来说，DIDAN首先采用由一组卷积层和全连接层组成的简单深度回归网络，将源语音频谱直接回归为情感标签，使得所提出的DIDAN能够拥有情感辨别能力。然后，通过采用精心设计的正则化项（称为隐式分布对齐（IDA）），将这种能力转移到也适用于目标语音样本，而不管语料库方差如何。与广泛使用的最大平均差异（MMD）及其变体不同，所提出的 IDA 吸收了样本重建的思想来隐式对齐分布间隙，这使得 DIDAN 能够从语音频谱中学习情感区分特征和语料库不变特征。为了评估所提出的 DIDAN，对广泛使用的语音情感语料库进行了广泛的跨语料库 SER 实验。实验结果表明，所提出的 DIDAN 在处理跨语料库 SER 任务方面可以优于许多最新的最先进方法。 本文提出一种名为DIDAN的深度迁移学习方法，用于解决跨语料库语音情感识别问题。 Yan Zhao,Jincen Wang,Yuan Zong,Wenming Zheng,Hailun Lian,Li Zhao cs.SD,cs.CL,eess.AS

title: Referential communication in heterogeneous communities of pre-trained visual deep networks
title_zh: 预训练视觉深度网络异构社区中的参考通信
comment: Published in the Transactions of Machine Learning Research
comments: Published in the Transactions of Machine Learning Research
abstract: As large pre-trained image-processing neural networks are being embedded in autonomous agents such as self-driving cars or robots, the question arises of how such systems can communicate with each other about the surrounding world, despite their different architectures and training regimes. As a first step in this direction, we systematically explore the task of referential communication in a community of heterogeneous state-of-the-art pre-trained visual networks, showing that they can develop, in a self-supervised way, a shared protocol to refer to a target object among a set of candidates. This shared protocol can also be used, to some extent, to communicate about previously unseen object categories of different granularity. Moreover, a visual network that was not initially part of an existing community can learn the community's protocol with remarkable ease. Finally, we study, both qualitatively and quantitatively, the properties of the emergent protocol, providing some evidence that it is capturing high-level semantic features of objects.
summary: As large pre-trained image-processing neural networks are being embedded in autonomous agents such as self-driving cars or robots, the question arises of how such systems can communicate with each other about the surrounding world, despite their different architectures and training regimes. As a first step in this direction, we systematically explore the task of referential communication in a community of heterogeneous state-of-the-art pre-trained visual networks, showing that they can develop, in a self-supervised way, a shared protocol to refer to a target object among a set of candidates. This shared protocol can also be used, to some extent, to communicate about previously unseen object categories of different granularity. Moreover, a visual network that was not initially part of an existing community can learn the community's protocol with remarkable ease. Finally, we study, both qualitatively and quantitatively, the properties of the emergent protocol, providing some evidence that it is capturing high-level semantic features of objects.
abstract_zh: 随着大型预训练图像处理神经网络被嵌入到自动驾驶汽车或机器人等自主代理中，出现了这样的问题：尽管这些系统具有不同的架构和训练机制，但它们如何能够就周围的世界相互通信。作为朝这个方向迈出的第一步，我们系统地探索了异构最先进的预训练视觉网络社区中的引用通信任务，表明它们可以以自我监督的方式开发一个共享协议来引用一组候选对象中的目标对象。在某种程度上，这种共享协议还可以用于传达以前未见过的不同粒度的对象类别。此外，最初不属于现有社区的视觉网络可以非常轻松地学习社区的协议。最后，我们定性和定量地研究了新兴协议的属性，提供了一些证据表明它正在捕获对象的高级语义特征。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了异构预训练视觉网络社区中的指称通信问题，探索它们如何通过自监督方式发展共享协议来指代目标对象。
AI.motivation: 随着预训练视觉网络被嵌入自动驾驶汽车等自主代理，不同架构和训练背景的系统间需有效通信，但现有方法难以实现异构系统的协同。
AI.method: 通过系统性实验，让异构预训练视觉网络在无监督条件下共同学习指代协议，并测试协议对新类别和新网络的泛化能力。
AI.result: 网络社区成功发展出共享协议，可指代新类别对象；新网络能快速学习已有协议，且协议能捕捉物体高层语义特征。
AI.conclusion: 异构视觉网络可通过自监督学习形成语义协议，为多智能体协作提供新思路，未来可拓展至更复杂场景。

authors_text: Ihsan Ullah,Dustin Carrión-Ojeda,Sergio Escalera,Isabelle Guyon,Mike Huisman,Felix Mohr,Jan N van Rijn,Haozhe Sun,Joaquin Vanschoren,Phan Anh Vu
title: Meta-Album: Multi-domain Meta-Dataset for Few-Shot Image Classification
title_zh: 元相册：用于少镜头图像分类的多域元数据集
comment: ef:36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022) Track on Datasets and Benchmarks., NeurIPS, Nov 2022, New Orleans, United States
comments: ef:36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022) Track on Datasets and Benchmarks., NeurIPS, Nov 2022, New Orleans, United States
abstract: We introduce Meta-Album, an image classification meta-dataset designed to facilitate few-shot learning, transfer learning, meta-learning, among other tasks. It includes 40 open datasets, each having at least 20 classes with 40 examples per class, with verified licences. They stem from diverse domains, such as ecology (fauna and flora), manufacturing (textures, vehicles), human actions, and optical character recognition, featuring various image scales (microscopic, human scales, remote sensing). All datasets are preprocessed, annotated, and formatted uniformly, and come in 3 versions (Micro $\subset$ Mini $\subset$ Extended) to match users' computational resources. We showcase the utility of the first 30 datasets on few-shot learning problems. The other 10 will be released shortly after. Meta-Album is already more diverse and larger (in number of datasets) than similar efforts, and we are committed to keep enlarging it via a series of competitions. As competitions terminate, their test data are released, thus creating a rolling benchmark, available through OpenML.org. Our website https://meta-album.github.io/ contains the source code of challenge winning methods, baseline methods, data loaders, and instructions for contributing either new datasets or algorithms to our expandable meta-dataset.
summary: We introduce Meta-Album, an image classification meta-dataset designed to facilitate few-shot learning, transfer learning, meta-learning, among other tasks. It includes 40 open datasets, each having at least 20 classes with 40 examples per class, with verified licences. They stem from diverse domains, such as ecology (fauna and flora), manufacturing (textures, vehicles), human actions, and optical character recognition, featuring various image scales (microscopic, human scales, remote sensing). All datasets are preprocessed, annotated, and formatted uniformly, and come in 3 versions (Micro $\subset$ Mini $\subset$ Extended) to match users' computational resources. We showcase the utility of the first 30 datasets on few-shot learning problems. The other 10 will be released shortly after. Meta-Album is already more diverse and larger (in number of datasets) than similar efforts, and we are committed to keep enlarging it via a series of competitions. As competitions terminate, their test data are released, thus creating a rolling benchmark, available through OpenML.org. Our website https://meta-album.github.io/ contains the source code of challenge winning methods, baseline methods, data loaders, and instructions for contributing either new datasets or algorithms to our expandable meta-dataset.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了 Meta-Album，这是一个图像分类元数据集，旨在促进小样本学习、迁移学习、元学习等任务。它包括 40 个开放数据集，每个数据集至少有 20 个类，每个类有 40 个示例，并具有经过验证的许可证。它们源于不同的领域，例如生态学（动物和植物）、制造（纹理、车辆）、人类行为和光学字符识别，具有各种图像尺度（微观、人体尺度、遥感）。所有数据集都经过统一的预处理、注释和格式化，并有 3 个版本（Micro $\subset$ Mini $\subset$ Extended）以匹配用户的计算资源。我们展示了前 30 个数据集在小样本学习问题上的实用性。另外 10 个将在不久后发布。与类似的努力相比，元专辑已经更加多样化和更大（数据集数量），我们致力于通过一系列竞赛不断扩大它。随着比赛的结束，他们的测试数据将被发布，从而创建一个滚动基准，可通过 OpenML.org 获取。我们的网站 https://meta-album.github.io/ 包含挑战获胜方法、基线方法、数据加载器的源代码，以及向我们的可扩展元数据集贡献新数据集或算法的说明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Meta-Album，一个包含40个跨领域数据集的元数据集，用于支持少样本图像分类、迁移学习和元学习等任务。
AI.motivation: 现有元数据集在领域多样性、规模或资源适配性上存在不足，需构建一个统一、多样化且可扩展的元数据集以推动少样本学习研究。
AI.method: 整合40个开源数据集（含生态、制造、光学字符识别等），确保每类至少40样本，并提供三种版本（Micro/Mini/Extended）适配不同计算资源；通过竞赛持续扩展数据集并发布测试数据。
AI.result: 首次发布30个数据集验证少样本学习效果，数据集规模与多样性超越现有工作，配套提供代码、基线模型及贡献指南。
AI.conclusion: Meta-Album通过多领域覆盖、版本分级和竞赛驱动扩展，成为首个滚动更新的元数据集基准，为少样本学习提供长期支持。

tldr: 本文提出Meta-Album，一个包含40个跨领域数据集的元数据集，用于支持少样本图像分类、迁移学习和元学习等任务。
motivation: 现有元数据集在领域多样性、规模或资源适配性上存在不足，需构建一个统一、多样化且可扩展的元数据集以推动少样本学习研究。
method: 整合40个开源数据集（含生态、制造、光学字符识别等），确保每类至少40样本，并提供三种版本（Micro/Mini/Extended）适配不同计算资源；通过竞赛持续扩展数据集并发布测试数据。
result: 首次发布30个数据集验证少样本学习效果，数据集规模与多样性超越现有工作，配套提供代码、基线模型及贡献指南。
conclusion: Meta-Album通过多领域覆盖、版本分级和竞赛驱动扩展，成为首个滚动更新的元数据集基准，为少样本学习提供长期支持。
search_text: Meta-Album: Multi-domain Meta-Dataset for Few-Shot Image Classification 元相册：用于少镜头图像分类的多域元数据集 We introduce Meta-Album, an image classification meta-dataset designed to facilitate few-shot learning, transfer learning, meta-learning, among other tasks. It includes 40 open datasets, each having at least 20 classes with 40 examples per class, with verified licences. They stem from diverse domains, such as ecology (fauna and flora), manufacturing (textures, vehicles), human actions, and optical character recognition, featuring various image scales (microscopic, human scales, remote sensing). All datasets are preprocessed, annotated, and formatted uniformly, and come in 3 versions (Micro $\subset$ Mini $\subset$ Extended) to match users' computational resources. We showcase the utility of the first 30 datasets on few-shot learning problems. The other 10 will be released shortly after. Meta-Album is already more diverse and larger (in number of datasets) than similar efforts, and we are committed to keep enlarging it via a series of competitions. As competitions terminate, their test data are released, thus creating a rolling benchmark, available through OpenML.org. Our website https://meta-album.github.io/ contains the source code of challenge winning methods, baseline methods, data loaders, and instructions for contributing either new datasets or algorithms to our expandable meta-dataset. 我们引入了 Meta-Album，这是一个图像分类元数据集，旨在促进小样本学习、迁移学习、元学习等任务。它包括 40 个开放数据集，每个数据集至少有 20 个类，每个类有 40 个示例，并具有经过验证的许可证。它们源于不同的领域，例如生态学（动物和植物）、制造（纹理、车辆）、人类行为和光学字符识别，具有各种图像尺度（微观、人体尺度、遥感）。所有数据集都经过统一的预处理、注释和格式化，并有 3 个版本（Micro $\subset$ Mini $\subset$ Extended）以匹配用户的计算资源。我们展示了前 30 个数据集在小样本学习问题上的实用性。另外 10 个将在不久后发布。与类似的努力相比，元专辑已经更加多样化和更大（数据集数量），我们致力于通过一系列竞赛不断扩大它。随着比赛的结束，他们的测试数据将被发布，从而创建一个滚动基准，可通过 OpenML.org 获取。我们的网站 https://meta-album.github.io/ 包含挑战获胜方法、基线方法、数据加载器的源代码，以及向我们的可扩展元数据集贡献新数据集或算法的说明。 本文提出Meta-Album，一个包含40个跨领域数据集的元数据集，用于支持少样本图像分类、迁移学习和元学习等任务。 Ihsan Ullah,Dustin Carrión-Ojeda,Sergio Escalera,Isabelle Guyon,Mike Huisman,Felix Mohr,Jan N van Rijn,Haozhe Sun,Joaquin Vanschoren,Phan Anh Vu cs.CV

authors_text: Jiaxin Cheng,Xiao Liang,Xingjian Shi,Tong He,Tianjun Xiao,Mu Li
title: LayoutDiffuse: Adapting Foundational Diffusion Models for Layout-to-Image Generation
title_zh: LayoutDiffuse：调整基础扩散模型以生成布局到图像
abstract: Layout-to-image generation refers to the task of synthesizing photo-realistic images based on semantic layouts. In this paper, we propose LayoutDiffuse that adapts a foundational diffusion model pretrained on large-scale image or text-image datasets for layout-to-image generation. By adopting a novel neural adaptor based on layout attention and task-aware prompts, our method trains efficiently, generates images with both high perceptual quality and layout alignment, and needs less data. Experiments on three datasets show that our method significantly outperforms other 10 generative models based on GANs, VQ-VAE, and diffusion models.
summary: Layout-to-image generation refers to the task of synthesizing photo-realistic images based on semantic layouts. In this paper, we propose LayoutDiffuse that adapts a foundational diffusion model pretrained on large-scale image or text-image datasets for layout-to-image generation. By adopting a novel neural adaptor based on layout attention and task-aware prompts, our method trains efficiently, generates images with both high perceptual quality and layout alignment, and needs less data. Experiments on three datasets show that our method significantly outperforms other 10 generative models based on GANs, VQ-VAE, and diffusion models.
abstract_zh: 布局到图像生成是指基于语义布局合成逼真图像的任务。在本文中，我们提出了 LayoutDiffuse，它采用在大规模图像或文本图像数据集上预训练的基础扩散模型，以生成布局到图像。通过采用基于布局注意力和任务感知提示的新型神经适配器，我们的方法可以有效地进行训练，生成具有高感知质量和布局对齐的图像，并且需要更少的数据。对三个数据集的实验表明，我们的方法显着优于其他 10 种基于 GAN、VQ-VAE 和扩散模型的生成模型。

AI.tldr: 布局到图像生成
AI.motivation: 现有方法在生成高质量图像和布局对齐方面存在不足，且需要大量数据
AI.method: 采用基于布局注意力和任务感知提示的神经适配器，对预训练的扩散模型进行微调
AI.result: 在三个数据集上显著优于其他10种基于GAN、VQ-VAE和扩散模型的生成方法
AI.conclusion: 该方法在生成质量、布局对齐性、训练效率和数据需求方面均表现出显著优势

title: Fashion Image Retrieval with Multi-Granular Alignment
title_zh: 多粒度对齐的时尚图像检索
abstract: Fashion image retrieval task aims to search relevant clothing items of a query image from the gallery. The previous recipes focus on designing different distance-based loss functions, pulling relevant pairs to be close and pushing irrelevant images apart. However, these methods ignore fine-grained features (e.g. neckband, cuff) of clothing images. In this paper, we propose a novel fashion image retrieval method leveraging both global and fine-grained features, dubbed Multi-Granular Alignment (MGA). Specifically, we design a Fine-Granular Aggregator(FGA) to capture and aggregate detailed patterns. Then we propose Attention-based Token Alignment (ATA) to align image features at the multi-granular level in a coarse-to-fine manner. To prove the effectiveness of our proposed method, we conduct experiments on two sub-tasks (In-Shop & Consumer2Shop) of the public fashion datasets DeepFashion. The experimental results show that our MGA outperforms the state-of-the-art methods by 1.8% and 0.6% in the two sub-tasks on the R@1 metric, respectively.
summary: Fashion image retrieval task aims to search relevant clothing items of a query image from the gallery. The previous recipes focus on designing different distance-based loss functions, pulling relevant pairs to be close and pushing irrelevant images apart. However, these methods ignore fine-grained features (e.g. neckband, cuff) of clothing images. In this paper, we propose a novel fashion image retrieval method leveraging both global and fine-grained features, dubbed Multi-Granular Alignment (MGA). Specifically, we design a Fine-Granular Aggregator(FGA) to capture and aggregate detailed patterns. Then we propose Attention-based Token Alignment (ATA) to align image features at the multi-granular level in a coarse-to-fine manner. To prove the effectiveness of our proposed method, we conduct experiments on two sub-tasks (In-Shop & Consumer2Shop) of the public fashion datasets DeepFashion. The experimental results show that our MGA outperforms the state-of-the-art methods by 1.8% and 0.6% in the two sub-tasks on the R@1 metric, respectively.
abstract_zh: 时尚图像检索任务旨在从图库中搜索查询图像的相关服装项目。前面的方法侧重于设计不同的基于距离的损失函数，将相关图像对拉近，并将不相关图像推开。然而，这些方法忽略了服装图像的细粒度特征（例如领口、袖口）。在本文中，我们提出了一种利用全局和细粒度特征的新型时尚图像检索方法，称为多粒度对齐（MGA）。具体来说，我们设计了一个细粒度聚合器（FGA）来捕获和聚合详细模式。然后，我们提出基于注意力的令牌对齐（ATA），以从粗到细的方式在多粒度级别对齐图像特征。为了证明我们提出的方法的有效性，我们对公共时尚数据集 DeepFashion 的两个子任务（In-Shop 和 Consumer2Shop）进行了实验。实验结果表明，我们的 MGA 在 R@1 指标的两个子任务中分别优于最先进的方法 1.8% 和 0.6%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合全局和细粒度特征的时尚图像检索方法，以提高检索准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要依赖距离损失函数，但忽略了服装图像的细粒度特征（如领口、袖口），导致检索效果受限。
AI.method: 设计细粒度聚合器（FGA）提取局部特征，并提出基于注意力的多粒度对齐（ATA）实现从粗到细的多层级特征对齐。
AI.result: 在DeepFashion数据集的In-Shop和Consumer2Shop子任务中，R@1指标分别提升1.8%和0.6%，优于现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: 多粒度对齐方法有效融合了全局与局部特征，为时尚图像检索提供了新思路。

title: Exploring External Knowledge for Accurate modeling of Visual and Language Problems
title_zh: 探索外部知识以准确建模视觉和语言问题
abstract: The interest in Artificial Intelligence (AI) and its applications has seen unprecedented growth in the last few years. The success can be partly attributed to the advancements of deep neural networks made in the sub-fields of AI such as Computer Vision (CV) and Natural Language Processing (NLP). The promising research area that this dissertation focuses on is visual and language understanding which involves many challenging tasks, i.e., classification, detection, segmentation, machine translation and captioning, etc. The state-of-the-art methods for solving these problems usually involves only two parts: source data and target labels, which is rather insufficient especially when the dataset is small. Meanwhile, many external tools or sources can provide extra useful information (external knowledge) that can help improve the performance of these methods. For example, a detection model has been applied to provide better object features than state-of-the-art ResNet for image captioning models. Inspired by this observation, we developed a methodology that we can first extract external knowledge and then integrate it with the original models. The external knowledge has to be extracted from the dataset, or can directly come from external, e.g., grammar rules or scene graphs. We apply this methodology to different AI tasks, including machine translation and image captioning and improve the original state-of-the-art models by a large margin.
summary: The interest in Artificial Intelligence (AI) and its applications has seen unprecedented growth in the last few years. The success can be partly attributed to the advancements of deep neural networks made in the sub-fields of AI such as Computer Vision (CV) and Natural Language Processing (NLP). The promising research area that this dissertation focuses on is visual and language understanding which involves many challenging tasks, i.e., classification, detection, segmentation, machine translation and captioning, etc. The state-of-the-art methods for solving these problems usually involves only two parts: source data and target labels, which is rather insufficient especially when the dataset is small. Meanwhile, many external tools or sources can provide extra useful information (external knowledge) that can help improve the performance of these methods. For example, a detection model has been applied to provide better object features than state-of-the-art ResNet for image captioning models. Inspired by this observation, we developed a methodology that we can first extract external knowledge and then integrate it with the original models. The external knowledge has to be extracted from the dataset, or can directly come from external, e.g., grammar rules or scene graphs. We apply this methodology to different AI tasks, including machine translation and image captioning and improve the original state-of-the-art models by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 过去几年，人们对人工智能（AI）及其应用的兴趣空前增长。这一成功部分归功于深度神经网络在计算机视觉（CV）和自然语言处理（NLP）等人工智能子领域取得的进步。本论文关注的有前景的研究领域是视觉和语言理解，涉及许多具有挑战性的任务，即分类、检测、分割、机器翻译和字幕等。解决这些问题的最先进的方法通常只涉及两部分：源数据和目标标签，这是相当不足的，特别是当数据集较小时。同时，许多外部工具或来源可以提供额外有用的信息（外部知识），有助于提高这些方法的性能。例如，检测模型已被应用于为图像字幕模型提供比最先进的 ResNet 更好的对象特征。受这一观察的启发，我们开发了一种方法，可以首先提取外部知识，然后将其与原始模型集成。外部知识必须从数据集中提取，或者可以直接来自外部，例如语法规则或场景图。我们将这种方法应用于不同的人工智能任务，包括机器翻译和图像字幕，并大幅改进了原始的最先进模型。

AI.conclusion: 整合外部知识可有效提升视觉与语言模型性能，尤其在小数据集场景下
