search_text: Exploring External Knowledge for Accurate modeling of Visual and Language Problems 探索外部知识以准确建模视觉和语言问题 The interest in Artificial Intelligence (AI) and its applications has seen unprecedented growth in the last few years. The success can be partly attributed to the advancements of deep neural networks made in the sub-fields of AI such as Computer Vision (CV) and Natural Language Processing (NLP). The promising research area that this dissertation focuses on is visual and language understanding which involves many challenging tasks, i.e., classification, detection, segmentation, machine translation and captioning, etc. The state-of-the-art methods for solving these problems usually involves only two parts: source data and target labels, which is rather insufficient especially when the dataset is small. Meanwhile, many external tools or sources can provide extra useful information (external knowledge) that can help improve the performance of these methods. For example, a detection model has been applied to provide better object features than state-of-the-art ResNet for image captioning models. Inspired by this observation, we developed a methodology that we can first extract external knowledge and then integrate it with the original models. The external knowledge has to be extracted from the dataset, or can directly come from external, e.g., grammar rules or scene graphs. We apply this methodology to different AI tasks, including machine translation and image captioning and improve the original state-of-the-art models by a large margin. 过去几年，人们对人工智能（AI）及其应用的兴趣空前增长。这一成功部分归功于深度神经网络在计算机视觉（CV）和自然语言处理（NLP）等人工智能子领域取得的进步。本论文关注的有前景的研究领域是视觉和语言理解，涉及许多具有挑战性的任务，即分类、检测、分割、机器翻译和字幕等。解决这些问题的最先进的方法通常只涉及两部分：源数据和目标标签，这是相当不足的，特别是当数据集较小时。同时，许多外部工具或来源可以提供额外有用的信息（外部知识），有助于提高这些方法的性能。例如，检测模型已被应用于为图像字幕模型提供比最先进的 ResNet 更好的对象特征。受这一观察的启发，我们开发了一种方法，可以首先提取外部知识，然后将其与原始模型集成。外部知识必须从数据集中提取，或者可以直接来自外部，例如语法规则或场景图。我们将这种方法应用于不同的人工智能任务，包括机器翻译和图像字幕，并大幅改进了原始的最先进模型。 研究如何利用外部知识提升视觉与语言任务的模型性能 Xuewen Yang cs.CV,cs.CL

authors_text: Xu Zheng,Yexin Liu,Yunfan Lu,Tongyan Hua,Tianbo Pan,Weiming Zhang,Dacheng Tao,Lin Wang
title: Deep Learning for Event-based Vision: A Comprehensive Survey and Benchmarks
title_zh: 基于事件的视觉深度学习：综合调查和基准
abstract: Event cameras are bio-inspired sensors that capture the per-pixel intensity changes asynchronously and produce event streams encoding the time, pixel position, and polarity (sign) of the intensity changes. Event cameras possess a myriad of advantages over canonical frame-based cameras, such as high temporal resolution, high dynamic range, low latency, etc. Being capable of capturing information in challenging visual conditions, event cameras have the potential to overcome the limitations of frame-based cameras in the computer vision and robotics community. In very recent years, deep learning (DL) has been brought to this emerging field and inspired active research endeavors in mining its potential. However, there is still a lack of taxonomies in DL techniques for event-based vision. We first scrutinize the typical event representations with quality enhancement methods as they play a pivotal role as inputs to the DL models. We then provide a comprehensive survey of existing DL-based methods by structurally grouping them into two major categories: 1) image/video reconstruction and restoration; 2) event-based scene understanding and 3D vision. We conduct benchmark experiments for the existing methods in some representative research directions, i.e., image reconstruction, deblurring, and object recognition, to identify some critical insights and problems. Finally, we have discussions regarding the challenges and provide new perspectives for inspiring more research studies.
summary: Event cameras are bio-inspired sensors that capture the per-pixel intensity changes asynchronously and produce event streams encoding the time, pixel position, and polarity (sign) of the intensity changes. Event cameras possess a myriad of advantages over canonical frame-based cameras, such as high temporal resolution, high dynamic range, low latency, etc. Being capable of capturing information in challenging visual conditions, event cameras have the potential to overcome the limitations of frame-based cameras in the computer vision and robotics community. In very recent years, deep learning (DL) has been brought to this emerging field and inspired active research endeavors in mining its potential. However, there is still a lack of taxonomies in DL techniques for event-based vision. We first scrutinize the typical event representations with quality enhancement methods as they play a pivotal role as inputs to the DL models. We then provide a comprehensive survey of existing DL-based methods by structurally grouping them into two major categories: 1) image/video reconstruction and restoration; 2) event-based scene understanding and 3D vision. We conduct benchmark experiments for the existing methods in some representative research directions, i.e., image reconstruction, deblurring, and object recognition, to identify some critical insights and problems. Finally, we have discussions regarding the challenges and provide new perspectives for inspiring more research studies.
abstract_zh: 事件相机是仿生传感器，可以异步捕获每个像素的强度变化，并生成对强度变化的时间、像素位置和极性（符号）进行编码的事件流。与标准的基于帧的相机相比，事件相机具有许多优势，例如高时间分辨率、高动态范围、低延迟等。事件相机能够在具有挑战性的视觉条件下捕获信息，因此有可能克服计算机视觉和机器人领域中基于帧的相机的局限性。近年来，深度学习（DL）被引入这一新兴领域，并激发了人们积极研究挖掘其潜力。然而，基于事件的视觉的深度学习技术仍然缺乏分类法。我们首先使用质量增强方法仔细检查典型事件表示，因为它们作为深度学习模型的输入发挥着关键作用。然后，我们对现有的基于深度学习的方法进行了全面的调查，在结构上将它们分为两大类：1）图像/视频重建和恢复； 2）基于事件的场景理解和3D视觉。我们对图像重建、去模糊和目标识别等一些代表性研究方向的现有方法进行了基准实验，以确定一些关键的见解和问题。最后，我们讨论了挑战，并为激发更多的研究提供了新的视角。

AI.tldr: 本文对事件相机的深度学习方法进行全面综述并建立基准测试，探讨其在计算机视觉和机器人领域的应用潜力。
AI.motivation: 事件相机相比传统帧相机具有高时间分辨率、高动态范围等优势，但现有深度学习方法缺乏系统性分类和基准测试，限制了其发展。
AI.method: 通过分析事件表示与质量增强方法，将现有深度学习方法分为图像/视频重建与恢复、基于事件的场景理解及三维视觉两类，并在典型任务上进行基准实验。
AI.result: 实验揭示了事件相机在图像重建、去模糊和目标识别等任务中的关键洞察与现存问题，验证了深度学习方法的有效性与局限性。
AI.conclusion: 事件相机与深度学习的结合仍面临数据稀疏性、模型泛化等挑战，需从跨模态学习等角度推动未来研究。

authors_text: Qiying Yu,Yang Liu,Yimu Wang,Ke Xu,Jingjing Liu
title: Multimodal Federated Learning via Contrastive Representation Ensemble
title_zh: 通过对比表示集成的多模态联合学习
abstract: With the increasing amount of multimedia data on modern mobile systems and IoT infrastructures, harnessing these rich multimodal data without breaching user privacy becomes a critical issue. Federated learning (FL) serves as a privacy-conscious alternative to centralized machine learning. However, existing FL methods extended to multimodal data all rely on model aggregation on single modality level, which restrains the server and clients to have identical model architecture for each modality. This limits the global model in terms of both model complexity and data capacity, not to mention task diversity. In this work, we propose Contrastive Representation Ensemble and Aggregation for Multimodal FL (CreamFL), a multimodal federated learning framework that enables training larger server models from clients with heterogeneous model architectures and data modalities, while only communicating knowledge on public dataset. To achieve better multimodal representation fusion, we design a global-local cross-modal ensemble strategy to aggregate client representations. To mitigate local model drift caused by two unprecedented heterogeneous factors stemming from multimodal discrepancy (modality gap and task gap), we further propose two inter-modal and intra-modal contrasts to regularize local training, which complements information of the absent modality for uni-modal clients and regularizes local clients to head towards global consensus. Thorough evaluations and ablation studies on image-text retrieval and visual question answering tasks showcase the superiority of CreamFL over state-of-the-art FL methods and its practical value.
summary: With the increasing amount of multimedia data on modern mobile systems and IoT infrastructures, harnessing these rich multimodal data without breaching user privacy becomes a critical issue. Federated learning (FL) serves as a privacy-conscious alternative to centralized machine learning. However, existing FL methods extended to multimodal data all rely on model aggregation on single modality level, which restrains the server and clients to have identical model architecture for each modality. This limits the global model in terms of both model complexity and data capacity, not to mention task diversity. In this work, we propose Contrastive Representation Ensemble and Aggregation for Multimodal FL (CreamFL), a multimodal federated learning framework that enables training larger server models from clients with heterogeneous model architectures and data modalities, while only communicating knowledge on public dataset. To achieve better multimodal representation fusion, we design a global-local cross-modal ensemble strategy to aggregate client representations. To mitigate local model drift caused by two unprecedented heterogeneous factors stemming from multimodal discrepancy (modality gap and task gap), we further propose two inter-modal and intra-modal contrasts to regularize local training, which complements information of the absent modality for uni-modal clients and regularizes local clients to head towards global consensus. Thorough evaluations and ablation studies on image-text retrieval and visual question answering tasks showcase the superiority of CreamFL over state-of-the-art FL methods and its practical value.
abstract_zh: 随着现代移动系统和物联网基础设施上的多媒体数据量不断增加，在不侵犯用户隐私的情况下利用这些丰富的多模式数据成为一个关键问题。联邦学习 (FL) 是集中式机器学习的一种注重隐私的替代方案。然而，现有的扩展到多模态数据的FL方法都依赖于单一模态级别的模型聚合，这限制了服务器和客户端对于每种模态具有相同的模型架构。这在模型复杂性和数据容量方面限制了全局模型，更不用说任务多样性了。在这项工作中，我们提出了多模态 FL 的对比表示集成和聚合（CreamFL），这是一种多模态联合学习框架，能够从具有异构模型架构和数据模态的客户端训练更大的服务器模型，同时仅交流公共数据集的知识。为了实现更好的多模态表示融合，我们设计了一种全局-局部跨模态集成策略来聚合客户端表示。为了减轻由多模态差异（模态差距和任务差距）引起的两个前所未有的异质因素引起的局部模型漂移，我们进一步提出了两种模态间和模内对比来规范局部训练，这补充了单模态客户缺乏模态的信息，并使局部客户规范化以走向全球共识。对图像文本检索和视觉问答任务的全面评估和消融研究展示了 CreamFL 相对于最先进的 FL 方法的优越性及其实用价值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CreamFL的多模态联邦学习框架，通过对比表示集成解决异构客户端模型架构和数据模态下的多模态学习问题。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习方法在多模态数据处理时依赖单模态模型聚合，导致服务器与客户端模型架构必须一致，限制了模型复杂度、数据容量和任务多样性。
AI.method: 设计全局-局部跨模态集成策略融合客户端表示，并引入跨模态与内模态对比机制，通过公共数据集通信知识以缓解异构因素导致的模型漂移。
AI.result: 在图像-文本检索和视觉问答任务中，CreamFL优于现有联邦学习方法，验证了其在多模态异构环境下的有效性与实用性。
AI.conclusion: CreamFL通过创新的表示融合与正则化策略，有效解决了多模态联邦学习中模型架构异构与模态差异带来的挑战，为隐私保护下的多模态学习提供了新方案。

conclusion: CreamFL通过创新的表示融合与正则化策略，有效解决了多模态联邦学习中模型架构异构与模态差异带来的挑战，为隐私保护下的多模态学习提供了新方案。
search_text: Multimodal Federated Learning via Contrastive Representation Ensemble 通过对比表示集成的多模态联合学习 With the increasing amount of multimedia data on modern mobile systems and IoT infrastructures, harnessing these rich multimodal data without breaching user privacy becomes a critical issue. Federated learning (FL) serves as a privacy-conscious alternative to centralized machine learning. However, existing FL methods extended to multimodal data all rely on model aggregation on single modality level, which restrains the server and clients to have identical model architecture for each modality. This limits the global model in terms of both model complexity and data capacity, not to mention task diversity. In this work, we propose Contrastive Representation Ensemble and Aggregation for Multimodal FL (CreamFL), a multimodal federated learning framework that enables training larger server models from clients with heterogeneous model architectures and data modalities, while only communicating knowledge on public dataset. To achieve better multimodal representation fusion, we design a global-local cross-modal ensemble strategy to aggregate client representations. To mitigate local model drift caused by two unprecedented heterogeneous factors stemming from multimodal discrepancy (modality gap and task gap), we further propose two inter-modal and intra-modal contrasts to regularize local training, which complements information of the absent modality for uni-modal clients and regularizes local clients to head towards global consensus. Thorough evaluations and ablation studies on image-text retrieval and visual question answering tasks showcase the superiority of CreamFL over state-of-the-art FL methods and its practical value. 随着现代移动系统和物联网基础设施上的多媒体数据量不断增加，在不侵犯用户隐私的情况下利用这些丰富的多模式数据成为一个关键问题。联邦学习 (FL) 是集中式机器学习的一种注重隐私的替代方案。然而，现有的扩展到多模态数据的FL方法都依赖于单一模态级别的模型聚合，这限制了服务器和客户端对于每种模态具有相同的模型架构。这在模型复杂性和数据容量方面限制了全局模型，更不用说任务多样性了。在这项工作中，我们提出了多模态 FL 的对比表示集成和聚合（CreamFL），这是一种多模态联合学习框架，能够从具有异构模型架构和数据模态的客户端训练更大的服务器模型，同时仅交流公共数据集的知识。为了实现更好的多模态表示融合，我们设计了一种全局-局部跨模态集成策略来聚合客户端表示。为了减轻由多模态差异（模态差距和任务差距）引起的两个前所未有的异质因素引起的局部模型漂移，我们进一步提出了两种模态间和模内对比来规范局部训练，这补充了单模态客户缺乏模态的信息，并使局部客户规范化以走向全球共识。对图像文本检索和视觉问答任务的全面评估和消融研究展示了 CreamFL 相对于最先进的 FL 方法的优越性及其实用价值。 本文提出一种名为CreamFL的多模态联邦学习框架，通过对比表示集成解决异构客户端模型架构和数据模态下的多模态学习问题。 Qiying Yu,Yang Liu,Yimu Wang,Ke Xu,Jingjing Liu cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Julian Rodemann,Jann Goschenhofer,Emilio Dorigatti,Thomas Nagler,Thomas Augustin
title: Approximately Bayes-Optimal Pseudo Label Selection
title_zh: 近似贝叶斯最优伪标签选择
abstract: Semi-supervised learning by self-training heavily relies on pseudo-label selection (PLS). The selection often depends on the initial model fit on labeled data. Early overfitting might thus be propagated to the final model by selecting instances with overconfident but erroneous predictions, often referred to as confirmation bias. This paper introduces BPLS, a Bayesian framework for PLS that aims to mitigate this issue. At its core lies a criterion for selecting instances to label: an analytical approximation of the posterior predictive of pseudo-samples. We derive this selection criterion by proving Bayes optimality of the posterior predictive of pseudo-samples. We further overcome computational hurdles by approximating the criterion analytically. Its relation to the marginal likelihood allows us to come up with an approximation based on Laplace's method and the Gaussian integral. We empirically assess BPLS for parametric generalized linear and non-parametric generalized additive models on simulated and real-world data. When faced with high-dimensional data prone to overfitting, BPLS outperforms traditional PLS methods.
summary: Semi-supervised learning by self-training heavily relies on pseudo-label selection (PLS). The selection often depends on the initial model fit on labeled data. Early overfitting might thus be propagated to the final model by selecting instances with overconfident but erroneous predictions, often referred to as confirmation bias. This paper introduces BPLS, a Bayesian framework for PLS that aims to mitigate this issue. At its core lies a criterion for selecting instances to label: an analytical approximation of the posterior predictive of pseudo-samples. We derive this selection criterion by proving Bayes optimality of the posterior predictive of pseudo-samples. We further overcome computational hurdles by approximating the criterion analytically. Its relation to the marginal likelihood allows us to come up with an approximation based on Laplace's method and the Gaussian integral. We empirically assess BPLS for parametric generalized linear and non-parametric generalized additive models on simulated and real-world data. When faced with high-dimensional data prone to overfitting, BPLS outperforms traditional PLS methods.
abstract_zh: 自训练的半监督学习严重依赖于伪标签选择（PLS）。选择通常取决于标记数据的初始模型拟合。因此，通过选择具有过度自信但错误的预测（通常称为确认偏差）的实例，早期的过度拟合可能会传播到最终模型。本文介绍了 BPLS，这是一种 PLS 的贝叶斯框架，旨在缓解这一问题。其核心在于选择要标记的实例的标准：伪样本后验预测的分析近似。我们通过证明伪样本后验预测的贝叶斯最优性来推导出这个选择标准。我们通过分析近似标准进一步克服了计算障碍。它与边际似然的关系使我们能够得出基于拉普拉斯方法和高斯积分的近似值。我们根据模拟和真实数据对参数广义线性和非参数广义加性模型的 BPLS 进行实证评估。当面对容易出现过拟合的高维数据时，BPLS 优于传统 PLS 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为BPLS的贝叶斯框架，用于改进半监督学习中的伪标签选择（PLS），以减少确认偏见带来的过拟合问题。
AI.motivation: 传统伪标签选择方法可能因早期过拟合而传播错误预测，导致最终模型性能下降。需要一种更可靠的伪标签选择策略来缓解这一问题。
AI.method: 通过分析伪样本的后验预测分布，推导出贝叶斯最优选择准则，并利用拉普拉斯方法和高斯积分进行近似计算，克服计算难题。
AI.result: 在模拟数据和实际数据集上，BPLS在高维数据场景下显著优于传统PLS方法，有效抑制了过拟合。
AI.conclusion: BPLS通过贝叶斯框架选择更可靠的伪标签，成功缓解了确认偏见问题，为半监督学习提供了更稳健的解决方案。

authors_text: Florian Merkle,David Weber,Pascal Schöttle,Stephan Schlögl,Martin Nocker
title: Less is More: The Influence of Pruning on the Explainability of CNNs
title_zh: 少即是多：剪枝对 CNN 可解释性的影响
abstract: Over the last century, deep learning models have become the state-of-the-art for solving complex computer vision problems. These modern computer vision models have millions of parameters, which presents two major challenges: (1) the increased computational requirements hamper the deployment in resource-constrained environments, such as mobile or IoT devices, and (2) explaining the complex decisions of such networks to humans is challenging. Network pruning is a technical approach to reduce the complexity of models, where less important parameters are removed. The work presented in this paper investigates whether this reduction in technical complexity also helps with perceived explainability. To do so, we conducted a pre-study and two human-grounded experiments, assessing the effects of different pruning ratios on explainability. Overall, we evaluate four different compression rates (i.e., 2, 4, 8, and 32) with 37 500 tasks on Mechanical Turk. Results indicate that lower compression rates have a positive influence on explainability, while higher compression rates show negative effects. Furthermore, we were able to identify sweet spots that increase both the perceived explainability and the model's performance.
summary: Over the last century, deep learning models have become the state-of-the-art for solving complex computer vision problems. These modern computer vision models have millions of parameters, which presents two major challenges: (1) the increased computational requirements hamper the deployment in resource-constrained environments, such as mobile or IoT devices, and (2) explaining the complex decisions of such networks to humans is challenging. Network pruning is a technical approach to reduce the complexity of models, where less important parameters are removed. The work presented in this paper investigates whether this reduction in technical complexity also helps with perceived explainability. To do so, we conducted a pre-study and two human-grounded experiments, assessing the effects of different pruning ratios on explainability. Overall, we evaluate four different compression rates (i.e., 2, 4, 8, and 32) with 37 500 tasks on Mechanical Turk. Results indicate that lower compression rates have a positive influence on explainability, while higher compression rates show negative effects. Furthermore, we were able to identify sweet spots that increase both the perceived explainability and the model's performance.
abstract_zh: 在上个世纪，深度学习模型已成为解决复杂计算机视觉问题的最先进技术。这些现代计算机视觉模型具有数百万个参数，这带来了两个主要挑战：（1）增加的计算要求阻碍了在资源有限的环境（例如移动或物联网设备）中的部署，以及（2）向人类解释此类网络的复杂决策具有挑战性。网络剪枝是一种降低模型复杂性的技术方法，即删除不太重要的参数。本文提出的工作调查了技术复杂性的降低是否也有助于感知的可解释性。为此，我们进行了一项预研究和两项以人为基础的实验，评估不同修剪比率对可解释性的影响。总体而言，我们在 Mechanical Turk 上评估了 4 种不同的压缩率（即 2、4、8 和 32）以及 37 500 个任务。结果表明，较低的压缩率对可解释性有积极影响，而较高的压缩率则显示出负面影响。此外，我们能够确定提高感知可解释性和模型性能的最佳点。

AI.tldr: 本文研究网络剪枝对卷积神经网络（CNNs）可解释性的影响，通过实验分析不同剪枝比例对模型可解释性的效果。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型参数量大导致计算资源消耗高且难以向人类解释决策过程，网络剪枝可降低复杂度，但其对可解释性的影响尚不明确。
AI.method: 通过预研究和两个基于人类参与的实验，评估4种剪枝压缩率（2、4、8、32）对可解释性的影响，共完成37500个任务。
AI.result: 低压缩率剪枝提升可解释性，高压缩率则降低；同时发现可解释性与模型性能的平衡点（sweet spots）。
AI.conclusion: 适当剪枝（低压缩率）可增强CNN的可解释性，同时保持模型性能，需权衡压缩率与可解释性之间的关系。

authors_text: Ziyi Zou,Ziang Zhang,Zhen Lu,Xiang Li,You Wang,Jie Hao,Guang Li
title: Discrete States-Based Trajectory Planning for Nonholonomic Robots
title_zh: 非完整机器人的基于离散状态的轨迹规划
abstract: Due to nonholonomic dynamics, the motion planning of nonholonomic robots is always a difficult problem. This letter presents a Discrete States-based Trajectory Planning(DSTP) algorithm for autonomous nonholonomic robots. The proposed algorithm represents the trajectory as x and y positions, orientation angle, longitude velocity and acceleration, angular velocity, and time intervals. More variables make the expression of optimization and constraints simpler, reduce the error caused by too many approximations, and also handle the gear shifting situation. L-BFGS-B is used to deal with the optimization of many variables and box constraints, thus speeding up the problem solving. Various simulation experiments compared with prior works have validated that our algorithm has an order-of-magnitude efficiency advantage and can generate a smoother trajectory with a high speed and low control effort. Besides, real-world experiments are also conducted to verify the feasibility of our algorithm in real scenes. We will release our codes as ros packages.
summary: Due to nonholonomic dynamics, the motion planning of nonholonomic robots is always a difficult problem. This letter presents a Discrete States-based Trajectory Planning(DSTP) algorithm for autonomous nonholonomic robots. The proposed algorithm represents the trajectory as x and y positions, orientation angle, longitude velocity and acceleration, angular velocity, and time intervals. More variables make the expression of optimization and constraints simpler, reduce the error caused by too many approximations, and also handle the gear shifting situation. L-BFGS-B is used to deal with the optimization of many variables and box constraints, thus speeding up the problem solving. Various simulation experiments compared with prior works have validated that our algorithm has an order-of-magnitude efficiency advantage and can generate a smoother trajectory with a high speed and low control effort. Besides, real-world experiments are also conducted to verify the feasibility of our algorithm in real scenes. We will release our codes as ros packages.
abstract_zh: 由于非完整动力学的原因，非完整机器人的运动规划始终是一个难题。这封信提出了一种用于自主非完整机器人的基于离散状态的轨迹规划（DSTP）算法。该算法将轨迹表示为 x 和 y 位置、方向角、经度速度和加速度、角速度和时间间隔。更多的变量使得优化和约束的表达更加简单，减少了过多近似带来的误差，也能处理换档情况。 L-BFGS-B用于处理多变量和框约束的优化，从而加快问题求解速度。与先前的工作相比，各种仿真实验验证了我们的算法具有数量级的效率优势，并且可以以高速和低控制量生成更平滑的轨迹。此外，还进行了真实世界实验，以验证我们的算法在实际场景中的可行性。我们将以 ros 包的形式发布我们的代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于离散状态的轨迹规划算法（DSTP），用于解决非完整机器人运动规划难题。
AI.motivation: 非完整机器人因动力学特性导致轨迹规划困难，传统方法存在效率低、轨迹不光滑等问题，需改进优化方法。
AI.method: 通过引入离散状态变量（位置、方向角、速度、加速度等）简化优化约束，采用L-BFGS-B算法处理多变量优化及箱型约束。
AI.result: 仿真与实验证明该算法效率比现有方法高一个数量级，生成轨迹更平滑且控制能耗低，实际场景验证可行性。
AI.conclusion: DSTP算法有效解决了非完整机器人轨迹规划问题，代码以ROS包形式开源，具备实际应用价值。

title: Partitioning the Bags of a Tree Decomposition Into Cliques
title_zh: 将树分解的包划分为派系
abstract: We consider a variant of treewidth that we call clique-partitioned treewidth in which each bag is partitioned into cliques. This is motivated by the recent development of FPT-algorithms based on similar parameters for various problems. With this paper, we take a first step towards computing clique-partitioned tree decompositions. Our focus lies on the subproblem of computing clique partitions, i.e., for each bag of a given tree decomposition, we compute an optimal partition of the induced subgraph into cliques. The goal here is to minimize the product of the clique sizes (plus 1). We show that this problem is NP-hard. We also describe four heuristic approaches as well as an exact branch-and-bound algorithm. Our evaluation shows that the branch-and-bound solver is sufficiently efficient to serve as a good baseline. Moreover, our heuristics yield solutions close to the optimum. As a bonus, our algorithms allow us to compute first upper bounds for the clique-partitioned treewidth of real-world networks. A comparison to traditional treewidth indicates that clique-partitioned treewidth is a promising parameter for graphs with high clustering.
summary: We consider a variant of treewidth that we call clique-partitioned treewidth in which each bag is partitioned into cliques. This is motivated by the recent development of FPT-algorithms based on similar parameters for various problems. With this paper, we take a first step towards computing clique-partitioned tree decompositions. Our focus lies on the subproblem of computing clique partitions, i.e., for each bag of a given tree decomposition, we compute an optimal partition of the induced subgraph into cliques. The goal here is to minimize the product of the clique sizes (plus 1). We show that this problem is NP-hard. We also describe four heuristic approaches as well as an exact branch-and-bound algorithm. Our evaluation shows that the branch-and-bound solver is sufficiently efficient to serve as a good baseline. Moreover, our heuristics yield solutions close to the optimum. As a bonus, our algorithms allow us to compute first upper bounds for the clique-partitioned treewidth of real-world networks. A comparison to traditional treewidth indicates that clique-partitioned treewidth is a promising parameter for graphs with high clustering.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑树宽度的一种变体，称为团分区树宽度，其中每个包都被划分为团。这是由于最近开发的 FPT 算法基于针对各种问题的相似参数。通过本文，我们向计算派系划分树分解迈出了第一步。我们的重点在于计算派系划分的子问题，即，对于给定树分解的每个包，我们计算归纳子图到派系的最佳划分。这里的目标是最小化团大小的乘积（加 1）。我们证明这个问题是 NP 困难的。我们还描述了四种启发式方法以及精确的分支定界算法。我们的评估表明，分支定界求解器足够高效，可以作为良好的基线。此外，我们的启发式方法产生的解决方案接近最优。作为奖励，我们的算法允许我们计算现实世界网络的派系划分树宽的第一个上限。与传统树宽的比较表明，派分区树宽对于高聚类图来说是一个有前途的参数。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何将树分解的每个袋子划分为团，以最小化团大小乘积加1的目标，提出了一种称为团划分树宽的新参数。
AI.motivation: 受基于类似参数的FPT算法发展的启发，旨在为具有高聚类特性的图提供更有效的参数化方法。
AI.method: 证明问题NP难，设计四种启发式方法和精确分支定界算法，并通过实验评估其性能。
AI.result: 分支定界算法可作为有效基准，启发式方法接近最优解，并为现实网络计算了团划分树宽的上界。
AI.conclusion: 团划分树宽相比传统树宽，在高聚类图中展现出作为有前途参数的潜力。

authors_text: Jack Breen,Katie Allen,Kieran Zucker,Geoff Hall,Nicolas M. Orsi,Nishant Ravikumar
title: Efficient subtyping of ovarian cancer histopathology whole slide images using active sampling in multiple instance learning
title_zh: 在多实例学习中使用主动采样对卵巢癌组织病理学全幻灯片图像进行有效的分型
abstract: Weakly-supervised classification of histopathology slides is a computationally intensive task, with a typical whole slide image (WSI) containing billions of pixels to process. We propose Discriminative Region Active Sampling for Multiple Instance Learning (DRAS-MIL), a computationally efficient slide classification method using attention scores to focus sampling on highly discriminative regions. We apply this to the diagnosis of ovarian cancer histological subtypes, which is an essential part of the patient care pathway as different subtypes have different genetic and molecular profiles, treatment options, and patient outcomes. We use a dataset of 714 WSIs acquired from 147 epithelial ovarian cancer patients at Leeds Teaching Hospitals NHS Trust to distinguish the most common subtype, high-grade serous carcinoma, from the other four subtypes (low-grade serous, endometrioid, clear cell, and mucinous carcinomas) combined. We demonstrate that DRAS-MIL can achieve similar classification performance to exhaustive slide analysis, with a 3-fold cross-validated AUC of 0.8679 compared to 0.8781 with standard attention-based MIL classification. Our approach uses at most 18% as much memory as the standard approach, while taking 33% of the time when evaluating on a GPU and only 14% on a CPU alone. Reducing prediction time and memory requirements may benefit clinical deployment and the democratisation of AI, reducing the extent to which computational hardware limits end-user adoption.
summary: Weakly-supervised classification of histopathology slides is a computationally intensive task, with a typical whole slide image (WSI) containing billions of pixels to process. We propose Discriminative Region Active Sampling for Multiple Instance Learning (DRAS-MIL), a computationally efficient slide classification method using attention scores to focus sampling on highly discriminative regions. We apply this to the diagnosis of ovarian cancer histological subtypes, which is an essential part of the patient care pathway as different subtypes have different genetic and molecular profiles, treatment options, and patient outcomes. We use a dataset of 714 WSIs acquired from 147 epithelial ovarian cancer patients at Leeds Teaching Hospitals NHS Trust to distinguish the most common subtype, high-grade serous carcinoma, from the other four subtypes (low-grade serous, endometrioid, clear cell, and mucinous carcinomas) combined. We demonstrate that DRAS-MIL can achieve similar classification performance to exhaustive slide analysis, with a 3-fold cross-validated AUC of 0.8679 compared to 0.8781 with standard attention-based MIL classification. Our approach uses at most 18% as much memory as the standard approach, while taking 33% of the time when evaluating on a GPU and only 14% on a CPU alone. Reducing prediction time and memory requirements may benefit clinical deployment and the democratisation of AI, reducing the extent to which computational hardware limits end-user adoption.
abstract_zh: 组织病理学切片的弱监督分类是一项计算密集型任务，典型的整个切片图像 (WSI) 包含数十亿个像素需要处理。我们提出了用于多实例学习的判别区域主动采样（DRAS-MIL），这是一种计算高效的幻灯片分类方法，使用注意力分数将采样集中在高度判别区域。我们将其应用于卵巢癌组织学亚型的诊断，这是患者护理途径的重要组成部分，因为不同的亚型具有不同的遗传和分子特征、治疗选择和患者结果。我们使用从利兹教学医院 NHS Trust 的 147 名上皮性卵巢癌患者获得的 714 个 WSI 数据集，将最常见的亚型（高级别浆液性癌）与其他四种亚型（低级别浆液性癌、子宫内膜样癌、透明细胞癌和粘液性癌）相结合。我们证明，DRAS-MIL 可以实现与详尽幻灯片分析类似的分类性能，与基于标准注意力的 MIL 分类的 0.8781 相比，其 3 倍交叉验证的 AUC 为 0.8679。我们的方法最多使用标准方法 18% 的内存，而在 GPU 上进行评估时需要花费 33% 的时间，而仅在 CPU 上进行评估时只需要 14%。减少预测时间和内存需求可能有利于临床部署和人工智能的民主化，减少计算硬件限制最终用户采用的程度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于主动采样的多实例学习方法（DRAS-MIL），用于高效分类卵巢癌组织病理学全切片图像，以区分不同亚型。
AI.motivation: 全切片图像（WSI）处理计算量大，传统方法耗时耗资源；卵巢癌不同亚型需差异化治疗，亟需高效准确的分类方法。
AI.method: 通过注意力机制筛选高判别性区域进行主动采样，结合多实例学习框架（MIL），显著降低计算资源消耗。
AI.result: 在147例患者数据集上，DRAS-MIL的AUC为0.8679（对比标准方法0.8781），内存占用减少82%，GPU推理时间缩短67%，CPU上仅需14%时间。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持分类性能的同时大幅降低计算成本，有助于推动AI在临床的部署与普及，减少硬件限制对应用的影响。

search_text: Efficient subtyping of ovarian cancer histopathology whole slide images using active sampling in multiple instance learning 在多实例学习中使用主动采样对卵巢癌组织病理学全幻灯片图像进行有效的分型 Weakly-supervised classification of histopathology slides is a computationally intensive task, with a typical whole slide image (WSI) containing billions of pixels to process. We propose Discriminative Region Active Sampling for Multiple Instance Learning (DRAS-MIL), a computationally efficient slide classification method using attention scores to focus sampling on highly discriminative regions. We apply this to the diagnosis of ovarian cancer histological subtypes, which is an essential part of the patient care pathway as different subtypes have different genetic and molecular profiles, treatment options, and patient outcomes. We use a dataset of 714 WSIs acquired from 147 epithelial ovarian cancer patients at Leeds Teaching Hospitals NHS Trust to distinguish the most common subtype, high-grade serous carcinoma, from the other four subtypes (low-grade serous, endometrioid, clear cell, and mucinous carcinomas) combined. We demonstrate that DRAS-MIL can achieve similar classification performance to exhaustive slide analysis, with a 3-fold cross-validated AUC of 0.8679 compared to 0.8781 with standard attention-based MIL classification. Our approach uses at most 18% as much memory as the standard approach, while taking 33% of the time when evaluating on a GPU and only 14% on a CPU alone. Reducing prediction time and memory requirements may benefit clinical deployment and the democratisation of AI, reducing the extent to which computational hardware limits end-user adoption. 组织病理学切片的弱监督分类是一项计算密集型任务，典型的整个切片图像 (WSI) 包含数十亿个像素需要处理。我们提出了用于多实例学习的判别区域主动采样（DRAS-MIL），这是一种计算高效的幻灯片分类方法，使用注意力分数将采样集中在高度判别区域。我们将其应用于卵巢癌组织学亚型的诊断，这是患者护理途径的重要组成部分，因为不同的亚型具有不同的遗传和分子特征、治疗选择和患者结果。我们使用从利兹教学医院 NHS Trust 的 147 名上皮性卵巢癌患者获得的 714 个 WSI 数据集，将最常见的亚型（高级别浆液性癌）与其他四种亚型（低级别浆液性癌、子宫内膜样癌、透明细胞癌和粘液性癌）相结合。我们证明，DRAS-MIL 可以实现与详尽幻灯片分析类似的分类性能，与基于标准注意力的 MIL 分类的 0.8781 相比，其 3 倍交叉验证的 AUC 为 0.8679。我们的方法最多使用标准方法 18% 的内存，而在 GPU 上进行评估时需要花费 33% 的时间，而仅在 CPU 上进行评估时只需要 14%。减少预测时间和内存需求可能有利于临床部署和人工智能的民主化，减少计算硬件限制最终用户采用的程度。 本文提出了一种基于主动采样的多实例学习方法（DRAS-MIL），用于高效分类卵巢癌组织病理学全切片图像，以区分不同亚型。 Jack Breen,Katie Allen,Kieran Zucker,Geoff Hall,Nicolas M. Orsi,Nishant Ravikumar eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Wenyan Yang,Huiling Wang,Dingding Cai,Joni Pajarinen,Joni-Kristen Kämäräinen
title: Swapped goal-conditioned offline reinforcement learning
title_zh: 交换目标条件离线强化学习
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2302.07741
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2302.07741
abstract: Offline goal-conditioned reinforcement learning (GCRL) can be challenging due to overfitting to the given dataset. To generalize agents' skills outside the given dataset, we propose a goal-swapping procedure that generates additional trajectories. To alleviate the problem of noise and extrapolation errors, we present a general offline reinforcement learning method called deterministic Q-advantage policy gradient (DQAPG). In the experiments, DQAPG outperforms state-of-the-art goal-conditioned offline RL methods in a wide range of benchmark tasks, and goal-swapping further improves the test results. It is noteworthy, that the proposed method obtains good performance on the challenging dexterous in-hand manipulation tasks for which the prior methods failed.
summary: Offline goal-conditioned reinforcement learning (GCRL) can be challenging due to overfitting to the given dataset. To generalize agents' skills outside the given dataset, we propose a goal-swapping procedure that generates additional trajectories. To alleviate the problem of noise and extrapolation errors, we present a general offline reinforcement learning method called deterministic Q-advantage policy gradient (DQAPG). In the experiments, DQAPG outperforms state-of-the-art goal-conditioned offline RL methods in a wide range of benchmark tasks, and goal-swapping further improves the test results. It is noteworthy, that the proposed method obtains good performance on the challenging dexterous in-hand manipulation tasks for which the prior methods failed.
abstract_zh: 由于对给定数据集的过度拟合，离线目标条件强化学习 (GCRL) 可能具有挑战性。为了概括给定数据集之外的智能体技能，我们提出了一种生成额外轨迹的目标交换过程。为了缓解噪声和外推误差问题，我们提出了一种通用的离线强化学习方法，称为确定性 Q 优势策略梯度（DQAPG）。在实验中，DQAPG 在各种基准任务中都优于最先进的目标条件离线 RL 方法，并且目标交换进一步改善了测试结果。值得注意的是，所提出的方法在现有方法失败的具有挑战性的灵巧手动操作任务中获得了良好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合目标交换和确定性Q优势策略梯度（DQAPG）的方法，以解决离线目标条件强化学习中的过拟合问题并提升泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有离线目标条件强化学习方法容易因数据集过拟合导致泛化能力不足，难以处理复杂任务。
AI.method: 通过目标交换生成额外轨迹增强数据多样性，并设计DQAPG算法结合确定性策略梯度与Q优势函数，减少噪声干扰和外推误差。
AI.result: DQAPG在多个基准任务中优于现有方法，目标交换进一步提升性能，尤其在复杂的手部精细操作任务中表现显著。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效缓解了离线GCRL的过拟合问题，在保持数据安全的前提下提升了智能体的泛化能力和复杂任务表现。

authors_text: Marlon E. Bran Lorenzana,Shekhar S. Chandra,Feng Liu
title: AliasNet: Alias Artefact Suppression Network for Accelerated Phase-Encode MRI
title_zh: AliasNet：用于加速相位编码 MRI 的 Alias 伪影抑制网络
abstract: Sparse reconstruction is an important aspect of MRI, helping to reduce acquisition time and improve spatial-temporal resolution. Popular methods are based mostly on compressed sensing (CS), which relies on the random sampling of k-space to produce incoherent (noise-like) artefacts. Due to hardware constraints, 1D Cartesian phase-encode under-sampling schemes are popular for 2D CS-MRI. However, 1D under-sampling limits 2D incoherence between measurements, yielding structured aliasing artefacts (ghosts) that may be difficult to remove assuming a 2D sparsity model. Reconstruction algorithms typically deploy direction-insensitive 2D regularisation for these direction-associated artefacts. Recognising that phase-encode artefacts can be separated into contiguous 1D signals, we develop two decoupling techniques that enable explicit 1D regularisation and leverage the excellent 1D incoherence characteristics. We also derive a combined 1D + 2D reconstruction technique that takes advantage of spatial relationships within the image. Experiments conducted on retrospectively under-sampled brain and knee data demonstrate that combination of the proposed 1D AliasNet modules with existing 2D deep learned (DL) recovery techniques leads to an improvement in image quality. We also find AliasNet enables a superior scaling of performance compared to increasing the size of the original 2D network layers. AliasNet therefore improves the regularisation of aliasing artefacts arising from phase-encode under-sampling, by tailoring the network architecture to account for their expected appearance. The proposed 1D + 2D approach is compatible with any existing 2D DL recovery technique deployed for this application.
summary: Sparse reconstruction is an important aspect of MRI, helping to reduce acquisition time and improve spatial-temporal resolution. Popular methods are based mostly on compressed sensing (CS), which relies on the random sampling of k-space to produce incoherent (noise-like) artefacts. Due to hardware constraints, 1D Cartesian phase-encode under-sampling schemes are popular for 2D CS-MRI. However, 1D under-sampling limits 2D incoherence between measurements, yielding structured aliasing artefacts (ghosts) that may be difficult to remove assuming a 2D sparsity model. Reconstruction algorithms typically deploy direction-insensitive 2D regularisation for these direction-associated artefacts. Recognising that phase-encode artefacts can be separated into contiguous 1D signals, we develop two decoupling techniques that enable explicit 1D regularisation and leverage the excellent 1D incoherence characteristics. We also derive a combined 1D + 2D reconstruction technique that takes advantage of spatial relationships within the image. Experiments conducted on retrospectively under-sampled brain and knee data demonstrate that combination of the proposed 1D AliasNet modules with existing 2D deep learned (DL) recovery techniques leads to an improvement in image quality. We also find AliasNet enables a superior scaling of performance compared to increasing the size of the original 2D network layers. AliasNet therefore improves the regularisation of aliasing artefacts arising from phase-encode under-sampling, by tailoring the network architecture to account for their expected appearance. The proposed 1D + 2D approach is compatible with any existing 2D DL recovery technique deployed for this application.
abstract_zh: 稀疏重建是 MRI 的一个重要方面，有助于减少采集时间并提高时空分辨率。流行的方法主要基于压缩感知 (CS)，它依赖于 k 空间的随机采样来产生不相干（类似噪声）的伪影。由于硬件限制，1D 笛卡尔相位编码欠采样方案在 2D CS-MRI 中很流行。然而，一维欠采样限制了测量之间的二维不相干性，从而产生结构化混叠伪影（重影），在假设二维稀疏模型的情况下，这些伪影可能难以消除。重建算法通常对这些与方向相关的伪像部署方向不敏感的二维正则化。认识到相位编码伪影可以分为连续的一维信号，我们开发了两种解耦技术，可以实现显式一维正则化并利用出色的一维不相干特性。我们还推导了一种组合的 1D + 2D 重建技术，该技术利用图像内的空间关系。对大脑和膝盖数据进行回顾性欠采样实验表明，将所提出的 1D AliasNet 模块与现有的 2D 深度学习 (DL) 恢复技术相结合可以提高图像质量。我们还发现，与增加原始 2D 网络层的大小相比，AliasNet 能够实现卓越的性能扩展。因此，AliasNet 通过定制网络架构来考虑其预期外观，从而改进了因相位编码欠采样而产生的混叠伪像的正则化。所提出的 1D + 2D 方法与为此应用部署的任何现有 2D DL 恢复技术兼容。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AliasNet的网络，用于加速相位编码MRI中的别名伪影抑制。
AI.motivation: 在MRI中，使用1D相位编码欠采样方案虽然流行，但会产生结构化的别名伪影，而传统的2D稀疏性模型难以有效去除这些伪影。
AI.method: 作者开发了两种解耦技术，以实现显式的1D正则化，并利用了1D的出色不相关特性，还提出了一种结合1D和2D的重建技术。
AI.result: 实验表明，将AliasNet模块与现有的2D深度学习恢复技术结合，可以提升图像质量，并且AliasNet在性能扩展方面优于单纯增加2D网络层的大小。
AI.conclusion: AliasNet通过定制网络架构，有效抑制了相位编码欠采样引起的别名伪影，其1D+2D方法兼容任何现有的2D深度学习恢复技术。

We also find AliasNet enables a superior scaling of performance compared to increasing the size of the original 2D network layers. AliasNet therefore improves the regularisation of aliasing artefacts arising from phase-encode under-sampling, by tailoring the network architecture to account for their expected appearance. The proposed 1D + 2D approach is compatible with any existing 2D DL recovery technique deployed for this application. 稀疏重建是 MRI 的一个重要方面，有助于减少采集时间并提高时空分辨率。流行的方法主要基于压缩感知 (CS)，它依赖于 k 空间的随机采样来产生不相干（类似噪声）的伪影。由于硬件限制，1D 笛卡尔相位编码欠采样方案在 2D CS-MRI 中很流行。然而，一维欠采样限制了测量之间的二维不相干性，从而产生结构化混叠伪影（重影），在假设二维稀疏模型的情况下，这些伪影可能难以消除。重建算法通常对这些与方向相关的伪像部署方向不敏感的二维正则化。认识到相位编码伪影可以分为连续的一维信号，我们开发了两种解耦技术，可以实现显式一维正则化并利用出色的一维不相干特性。我们还推导了一种组合的 1D + 2D 重建技术，该技术利用图像内的空间关系。对大脑和膝盖数据进行回顾性欠采样实验表明，将所提出的 1D AliasNet 模块与现有的 2D 深度学习 (DL) 恢复技术相结合可以提高图像质量。我们还发现，与增加原始 2D 网络层的大小相比，AliasNet 能够实现卓越的性能扩展。因此，AliasNet 通过定制网络架构来考虑其预期外观，从而改进了因相位编码欠采样而产生的混叠伪像的正则化。所提出的 1D + 2D 方法与为此应用部署的任何现有 2D DL 恢复技术兼容。 本文提出了一种名为AliasNet的网络，用于加速相位编码MRI中的别名伪影抑制。 Marlon E. Bran Lorenzana,Shekhar S. Chandra,Feng Liu eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Nina Klobas,George B. Mertzios,Hendrik Molter,Paul G. Spirakis
title: Realizing temporal graphs from fastest travel times
title_zh: 从最快的旅行时间实现时间图
abstract: In this paper we initiate the study of the temporal graph realization problem with respect to the fastest path durations among its vertices, while we focus on periodic temporal graphs. Given an $n \times n$ matrix $D$ and a $Δ\in \mathbb{N}$, the goal is to construct a $Δ$-periodic temporal graph with $n$ vertices such that the duration of a fastest path from $v_i$ to $v_j$ is equal to $D_{i,j}$, or to decide that such a temporal graph does not exist. The variations of the problem on static graphs have been well studied and understood since the 1960's (e.g. [Erdős and Gallai, 1960], [Hakimi and Yau, 1965]). As it turns out, the periodic temporal graph realization problem has a very different computational complexity behavior than its static (i.e. non-temporal) counterpart. First, we show that the problem is NP-hard in general, but polynomial-time solvable if the so-called underlying graph is a tree. Building upon those results, we investigate its parameterized computational complexity with respect to structural parameters of the underlying static graph which measure the ``tree-likeness''. We prove a tight classification between such parameters that allow fixed-parameter tractability (FPT) and those which imply W[1]-hardness. We show that our problem is W[1]-hard when parameterized by the feedback vertex number (and therefore also any smaller parameter such as treewidth, degeneracy, and cliquewidth) of the underlying graph, while we show that it is in FPT when parameterized by the feedback edge number (and therefore also any larger parameter such as maximum leaf number) of the underlying graph.
summary: In this paper we initiate the study of the temporal graph realization problem with respect to the fastest path durations among its vertices, while we focus on periodic temporal graphs. Given an $n \times n$ matrix $D$ and a $Δ\in \mathbb{N}$, the goal is to construct a $Δ$-periodic temporal graph with $n$ vertices such that the duration of a fastest path from $v_i$ to $v_j$ is equal to $D_{i,j}$, or to decide that such a temporal graph does not exist. The variations of the problem on static graphs have been well studied and understood since the 1960's (e.g. [Erdős and Gallai, 1960], [Hakimi and Yau, 1965]). As it turns out, the periodic temporal graph realization problem has a very different computational complexity behavior than its static (i.e. non-temporal) counterpart. First, we show that the problem is NP-hard in general, but polynomial-time solvable if the so-called underlying graph is a tree. Building upon those results, we investigate its parameterized computational complexity with respect to structural parameters of the underlying static graph which measure the ``tree-likeness''. We prove a tight classification between such parameters that allow fixed-parameter tractability (FPT) and those which imply W[1]-hardness. We show that our problem is W[1]-hard when parameterized by the feedback vertex number (and therefore also any smaller parameter such as treewidth, degeneracy, and cliquewidth) of the underlying graph, while we show that it is in FPT when parameterized by the feedback edge number (and therefore also any larger parameter such as maximum leaf number) of the underlying graph.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们开始研究关于其顶点之间最快路径持续时间的时间图实现问题，同时我们关注周期性时间图。给定一个 $n \times n$ 矩阵 $D$ 和一个 $Δ\in \mathbb{N}$，目标是构造一个具有 $n$ 个顶点的 $Δ$ 周期时间图，使得从 $v_i$ 到 $v_j$ 的最快路径的持续时间等于 $D_{i,j}$，或者确定这样的时间图不存在。自 20 世纪 60 年代以来，静态图问题的变化已得到充分研究和理解（例如 [Erdős 和 Gallai，1960]、[Hakimi 和 Yau，1965]）。事实证明，周期性时间图实现问题与其静态（即非时间）对应问题具有非常不同的计算复杂性行为。首先，我们证明这个问题一般来说是 NP 困难的，但如果所谓的底层图是一棵树，则多项式时间可解。基于这些结果，我们研究了其相对于测量“树状性”的底层静态图的结构参数的参数化计算复杂性。我们证明了允许固定参数易处理性 (FPT) 的参数和暗示 W[1]-硬度的参数之间的严格分类。我们表明，当通过底层图的反馈顶点数（因此还有任何较小的参数，如树宽、简并性和团宽度）进行参数化时，我们的问题是 W[1]-困难的，而我们表明，当通过底层图的反馈边数（因此也是任何较大的参数，如最大叶数）进行参数化时，它是 FPT 问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何根据顶点间的最快路径持续时间构建周期性时间图，或判定其不可行。
AI.motivation: 静态图的最短路径问题已有成熟理论，但时间图的周期性特性带来不同的计算复杂性，需探索其参数化复杂性边界。
AI.method: 通过分析时间图的周期性结构，结合静态图的树状参数（如反馈边数、反馈顶点数），研究参数化复杂性分类。
AI.result: 问题在一般情况下NP难，但当底层图为树时可多项式求解；参数化复杂性上，以反馈边数为参数时属于FPT，以反馈顶点数为参数时属于W[1]-难。
AI.conclusion: 时间图的构建复杂性高度依赖底层图的结构特性，树状参数是区分固定参数可解与不可解的关键因素。

title: A Three-Phase Artificial Orcas Algorithm for Continuous and Discrete Problems
title_zh: 连续和离散问题的三相人工虎鲸算法
comment: ef:International Journal of Applied Metaheuristic Computing, 2022, Volume 13, Issue 1
comments: ef:International Journal of Applied Metaheuristic Computing, 2022, Volume 13, Issue 1
abstract: In this paper, a new swarm intelligence algorithm based on orca behaviors is proposed for problem solving. The algorithm called artificial orca algorithm (AOA) consists of simulating the orca lifestyle and in particular the social organization, the echolocation mechanism, and some hunting techniques. The originality of the proposal is that for the first time a meta-heuristic simulates simultaneously several behaviors of just one animal species. AOA was adapted to discrete problems and applied on the maze game with four level of complexity. A bunch of substantial experiments were undertaken to set the algorithm parameters for this issue. The algorithm performance was assessed by considering the success rate, the run time, and the solution path size. Finally, for comparison purposes, the authors conducted a set of experiments on state-of-the-art evolutionary algorithms, namely ACO, BA, BSO, EHO, PSO, and WOA. The overall obtained results clearly show the superiority of AOA over the other tested algorithms.
summary: In this paper, a new swarm intelligence algorithm based on orca behaviors is proposed for problem solving. The algorithm called artificial orca algorithm (AOA) consists of simulating the orca lifestyle and in particular the social organization, the echolocation mechanism, and some hunting techniques. The originality of the proposal is that for the first time a meta-heuristic simulates simultaneously several behaviors of just one animal species. AOA was adapted to discrete problems and applied on the maze game with four level of complexity. A bunch of substantial experiments were undertaken to set the algorithm parameters for this issue. The algorithm performance was assessed by considering the success rate, the run time, and the solution path size. Finally, for comparison purposes, the authors conducted a set of experiments on state-of-the-art evolutionary algorithms, namely ACO, BA, BSO, EHO, PSO, and WOA. The overall obtained results clearly show the superiority of AOA over the other tested algorithms.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于逆戟鲸行为的新群体智能算法来解决问题。这种算法被称为人工虎鲸算法（AOA），包括模拟虎鲸的生活方式，特别是社会组织、回声定位机制和一些狩猎技术。该提案的独创性在于，元启发式方法首次同时模拟一种动物物种的多种行为。 AOA适应离散问题，应用于四级复杂度的迷宫游戏。为了解决这个问题，我们进行了大量的实验来设置算法参数。通过考虑成功率、运行时间和解决方案路径大小来评估算法性能。最后，为了进行比较，作者对最先进的进化算法（即 ACO、BA、BSO、EHO、PSO 和 WOA）进行了一组实验。获得的总体结果清楚地表明了 AOA 相对于其他测试算法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于座头鲸行为的新型群体智能算法（AOA），用于解决连续和离散问题，并在迷宫游戏中验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有元启发式算法多模拟单一动物行为，缺乏对单一物种多种行为的综合模拟，限制了算法性能。本文旨在通过模拟座头鲸的社交组织、回声定位和捕猎技术，提出更高效的优化算法。
AI.method: 设计AOA算法，模拟座头鲸的群体行为与捕猎策略，适应离散问题并应用于四层级复杂度的迷宫游戏，通过参数实验优化算法，并与ACO、PSO等经典算法对比测试。
AI.result: AOA在成功 rate、运行时间及路径长度指标上显著优于ACO、BA、PSO等对比算法，验证了其优越性。
AI.conclusion: AOA通过综合模拟座头鲸多行为特征，在离散优化问题中表现出更强的求解能力，为群体智能算法设计提供新思路。

title: Lip-to-Speech Synthesis in the Wild with Multi-task Learning
title_zh: 通过多任务学习进行野外唇语合成
abstract: Recent studies have shown impressive performance in Lip-to-speech synthesis that aims to reconstruct speech from visual information alone. However, they have been suffering from synthesizing accurate speech in the wild, due to insufficient supervision for guiding the model to infer the correct content. Distinct from the previous methods, in this paper, we develop a powerful Lip2Speech method that can reconstruct speech with correct contents from the input lip movements, even in a wild environment. To this end, we design multi-task learning that guides the model using multimodal supervision, i.e., text and audio, to complement the insufficient word representations of acoustic feature reconstruction loss. Thus, the proposed framework brings the advantage of synthesizing speech containing the right content of multiple speakers with unconstrained sentences. We verify the effectiveness of the proposed method using LRS2, LRS3, and LRW datasets.
summary: Recent studies have shown impressive performance in Lip-to-speech synthesis that aims to reconstruct speech from visual information alone. However, they have been suffering from synthesizing accurate speech in the wild, due to insufficient supervision for guiding the model to infer the correct content. Distinct from the previous methods, in this paper, we develop a powerful Lip2Speech method that can reconstruct speech with correct contents from the input lip movements, even in a wild environment. To this end, we design multi-task learning that guides the model using multimodal supervision, i.e., text and audio, to complement the insufficient word representations of acoustic feature reconstruction loss. Thus, the proposed framework brings the advantage of synthesizing speech containing the right content of multiple speakers with unconstrained sentences. We verify the effectiveness of the proposed method using LRS2, LRS3, and LRW datasets.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，唇语合成具有令人印象深刻的性能，旨在仅根据视觉信息重建语音。然而，由于指导模型推断正确内容的监督不足，他们一直在野外合成准确的语音。与以前的方法不同，在本文中，我们开发了一种强大的 Lip2Speech 方法，即使在野外环境中，也可以根据输入的嘴唇运动重建具有正确内容的语音。为此，我们设计了多任务学习，使用多模态监督（即文本和音频）指导模型，以补充声学特征重建损失的词表示不足。因此，所提出的框架带来了合成包含多个说话者的正确内容和不受约束的句子的语音的优点。我们使用 LRS2、LRS3 和 LRW 数据集验证了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多任务学习的唇语到语音合成方法，旨在解决真实环境下语音内容重建不准确的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有唇语到语音合成方法在真实场景中因缺乏足够监督信号导致内容重建误差较大，需通过多模态信息提升准确性。
AI.method: 设计多任务学习框架，结合文本和音频监督信号补充声学特征重建损失，提升模型对多说话人和自由句子的合成能力。
AI.result: 在LRS2、LRS3和LRW数据集上验证了方法有效性，证明其在真实环境下的语音内容重建性能优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 多任务学习通过融合多模态监督显著提升了唇语到语音合成的准确性，为真实场景应用提供了可行方案。

title: h-analysis and data-parallel physics-informed neural networks
title_zh: h 分析和数据并行物理信息神经网络
abstract: We explore the data-parallel acceleration of physics-informed machine learning (PIML) schemes, with a focus on physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) for multiple graphics processing units (GPUs) architectures. In order to develop scale-robust and high-throughput PIML models for sophisticated applications which may require a large number of training points (e.g., involving complex and high-dimensional domains, non-linear operators or multi-physics), we detail a novel protocol based on $h$-analysis and data-parallel acceleration through the Horovod training framework. The protocol is backed by new convergence bounds for the generalization error and the train-test gap. We show that the acceleration is straightforward to implement, does not compromise training, and proves to be highly efficient and controllable, paving the way towards generic scale-robust PIML. Extensive numerical experiments with increasing complexity illustrate its robustness and consistency, offering a wide range of possibilities for real-world simulations.
summary: We explore the data-parallel acceleration of physics-informed machine learning (PIML) schemes, with a focus on physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) for multiple graphics processing units (GPUs) architectures. In order to develop scale-robust and high-throughput PIML models for sophisticated applications which may require a large number of training points (e.g., involving complex and high-dimensional domains, non-linear operators or multi-physics), we detail a novel protocol based on $h$-analysis and data-parallel acceleration through the Horovod training framework. The protocol is backed by new convergence bounds for the generalization error and the train-test gap. We show that the acceleration is straightforward to implement, does not compromise training, and proves to be highly efficient and controllable, paving the way towards generic scale-robust PIML. Extensive numerical experiments with increasing complexity illustrate its robustness and consistency, offering a wide range of possibilities for real-world simulations.
abstract_zh: 我们探索物理信息机器学习 (PIML) 方案的数据并行加速，重点关注用于多个图形处理单元 (GPU) 架构的物理信息神经网络 (PINN)。为了为可能需要大量训练点（例如，涉及复杂和高维域、非线性算子或多物理场）的复杂应用开发规模稳健和高吞吐量的 PIML 模型，我们详细介绍了一种基于 $h$ 分析和通过 Horovod 训练框架进行数据并行加速的新颖协议。该协议由泛化误差和训练测试间隙的新收敛边界支持。我们表明，这种加速方法实施起来很简单，不会影响训练，并且被证明是高效且可控的，为通用的规模稳健的 PIML 铺平了道路。复杂性不断增加的大量数值实验说明了其鲁棒性和一致性，为现实世界的模拟提供了广泛的可能性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于h分析和数据并行加速的物理信息神经网络（PINNs）协议，旨在提升复杂应用场景下物理信息机器学习（PIML）模型的可扩展性和训练效率。
AI.motivation: 复杂物理问题（如高维域、非线性算子或多物理场）需要大量训练点，传统PIML方法在大规模计算时面临效率瓶颈，亟需一种高效且可扩展的解决方案。
AI.method: 结合h分析理论与Horovod框架实现数据并行加速，通过推导泛化误差和训练-测试差距的收敛性边界，设计无需牺牲训练质量的高效并行协议。
AI.result: 数值实验表明该方法在复杂度递增的场景中具有鲁棒性和一致性，验证了其高效性、可控性及对大规模物理模拟的适用性。
AI.conclusion: 该协议为通用型可扩展PIML模型提供了理论支撑和技术路径，可有效推动物理信息机器学习在实际工程中的应用。

authors_text: Elena Demidova,Alishiba Dsouza,Simon Gottschalk,Nicolas Tempelmeier,Ran Yu
title: Creating Knowledge Graphs for Geographic Data on the Web
title_zh: 为网络上的地理数据创建知识图
abstract: Geographic data plays an essential role in various Web, Semantic Web and machine learning applications. OpenStreetMap and knowledge graphs are critical complementary sources of geographic data on the Web. However, data veracity, the lack of integration of geographic and semantic characteristics, and incomplete representations substantially limit the data utility. Verification, enrichment and semantic representation are essential for making geographic data accessible for the Semantic Web and machine learning. This article describes recent approaches we developed to tackle these challenges.
summary: Geographic data plays an essential role in various Web, Semantic Web and machine learning applications. OpenStreetMap and knowledge graphs are critical complementary sources of geographic data on the Web. However, data veracity, the lack of integration of geographic and semantic characteristics, and incomplete representations substantially limit the data utility. Verification, enrichment and semantic representation are essential for making geographic data accessible for the Semantic Web and machine learning. This article describes recent approaches we developed to tackle these challenges.
abstract_zh: 地理数据在各种网络、语义网和机器学习应用程序中发挥着重要作用。 OpenStreetMap 和知识图是网络上地理数据的重要补充来源。然而，数据的准确性、地理和语义特征的缺乏整合以及不完整的表示极大地限制了数据的实用性。验证、丰富和语义表示对于使地理数据可供语义网和机器学习访问至关重要。本文介绍了我们为应对这些挑战而开发的最新方法。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决地理数据在语义网络和机器学习应用中的关键问题，通过验证、丰富和语义表示来提升数据可用性。
AI.motivation: 现有地理数据存在真实性不足、地理与语义特征整合困难及表示不完整等问题，严重限制了其在语义网和机器学习中的应用。
AI.method: 开发了数据验证技术、知识图谱构建方法及地理语义特征整合框架，结合OpenStreetMap等数据源进行优化。
AI.result: 提出的方法有效提高了地理数据的准确性与完整性，增强了其在语义网络和机器学习场景中的适用性。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合地理数据与知识图谱，本文的方法为提升地理数据的语义表达和应用价值提供了可行路径。

search_text: Creating Knowledge Graphs for Geographic Data on the Web 为网络上的地理数据创建知识图 Geographic data plays an essential role in various Web, Semantic Web and machine learning applications. OpenStreetMap and knowledge graphs are critical complementary sources of geographic data on the Web. However, data veracity, the lack of integration of geographic and semantic characteristics, and incomplete representations substantially limit the data utility. Verification, enrichment and semantic representation are essential for making geographic data accessible for the Semantic Web and machine learning. This article describes recent approaches we developed to tackle these challenges. 地理数据在各种网络、语义网和机器学习应用程序中发挥着重要作用。 OpenStreetMap 和知识图是网络上地理数据的重要补充来源。然而，数据的准确性、地理和语义特征的缺乏整合以及不完整的表示极大地限制了数据的实用性。验证、丰富和语义表示对于使地理数据可供语义网和机器学习访问至关重要。本文介绍了我们为应对这些挑战而开发的最新方法。 本文旨在解决地理数据在语义网络和机器学习应用中的关键问题，通过验证、丰富和语义表示来提升数据可用性。 Elena Demidova,Alishiba Dsouza,Simon Gottschalk,Nicolas Tempelmeier,Ran Yu cs.AI,cs.DB,cs.IR

authors_text: Hesham Elsayed,Martin Weigel,Florian Müller,George Ibrahim,Jan Gugenheimer,Martin Schmitz,Sebastian Günther,Max Mühlhäuser
title: Understanding Stationary and Moving Direct Skin Vibrotactile Stimulation on the Palm
title_zh: 了解手掌上的固定和移动直接皮肤振动触觉刺激
abstract: Palm-based tactile displays have the potential to evolve from single motor interfaces (e.g., smartphones) to high-resolution tactile displays (e.g., back-of-device haptic interfaces) enabling richer multi-modal experiences with more information. However, we lack a systematic understanding of vibrotactile perception on the palm and the influence of various factors on the core design decisions of tactile displays (number of actuators, resolution, and intensity). In a first experiment (N=16), we investigated the effect of these factors on the users' ability to localize stationary sensations. In a second experiment (N=20), we explored the influence of resolution on recognition rate for moving tactile sensations.Findings show that for stationary sensations a 9 actuator display offers a good trade-off and a $3\times3$ resolution can be accurately localized. For moving sensations, a $2\times4$ resolution led to the highest recognition accuracy, while $5\times10$ enables higher resolution output with a reasonable accuracy.
summary: Palm-based tactile displays have the potential to evolve from single motor interfaces (e.g., smartphones) to high-resolution tactile displays (e.g., back-of-device haptic interfaces) enabling richer multi-modal experiences with more information. However, we lack a systematic understanding of vibrotactile perception on the palm and the influence of various factors on the core design decisions of tactile displays (number of actuators, resolution, and intensity). In a first experiment (N=16), we investigated the effect of these factors on the users' ability to localize stationary sensations. In a second experiment (N=20), we explored the influence of resolution on recognition rate for moving tactile sensations.Findings show that for stationary sensations a 9 actuator display offers a good trade-off and a $3\times3$ resolution can be accurately localized. For moving sensations, a $2\times4$ resolution led to the highest recognition accuracy, while $5\times10$ enables higher resolution output with a reasonable accuracy.
abstract_zh: 基于掌上电脑的触觉显示器有可能从单一电机界面（例如智能手机）发展到高分辨率触觉显示器（例如设备背面触觉界面），从而实现更丰富的多模式体验和更多信息。然而，我们对手掌上的振动触觉感知以及各种因素对触觉显示器核心设计决策（执行器的数量、分辨率和强度）的影响缺乏系统的了解。在第一个实验（N=16）中，我们研究了这些因素对用户定位静止感觉的能力的影响。在第二个实验 (N=20) 中，我们探讨了分辨率对移动触觉识别率的影响。研究结果表明，对于静止感觉，9 个驱动器显示器提供了良好的权衡，并且可以准确定位 3\times3$ 分辨率。对于移动感觉，$2\times4$ 分辨率可带来最高的识别准确度，而 $5\times10$ 则可实现更高分辨率的输出和合理的准确度。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究手掌区域对固定和移动振动触觉刺激的感知特性，探讨不同因素对触觉显示设计的影响。
AI.motivation: 当前触觉显示设备从单一电机接口向高分辨率发展，但缺乏对手掌振动感知的系统性研究及核心设计参数（如执行器数量、分辨率、强度）的指导原则。
AI.method: 通过两组实验（N=16和N=20）分别研究固定振动定位能力与移动振动识别率，测试不同分辨率（如3×3、2×4、5×10）及执行器数量对感知效果的影响。
AI.result: 固定振动中9个执行器的3×3分辨率定位准确；移动振动中2×4分辨率识别率最高，5×10分辨率在保持合理精度下可实现更高输出精度。
AI.conclusion: 研究为触觉显示设计提供了分辨率与执行器配置的优化建议，平衡了精度与实用性需求。

authors_text: Robert Rouš,Joseph Peller,Gerrit Polder,Selwin Hageraats,Thijs Ruigrok,Pieter M. Blok
title: Apple scab detection in orchards using deep learning on colour and multispectral images
title_zh: 使用彩色和多光谱图像深度学习检测果园中的苹果黑星病
abstract: Apple scab is a fungal disease caused by Venturia inaequalis. Disease is of particular concern for growers, as it causes significant damage to fruit and leaves, leading to loss of fruit and yield. This article examines the ability of deep learning and hyperspectral imaging to accurately identify an apple symptom infection in apple trees. In total, 168 image scenes were collected using conventional RGB and Visible to Near-infrared (VIS-NIR) spectral imaging (8 channels) in infected orchards. Spectral data were preprocessed with an Artificial Neural Network (ANN) trained in segmentation to detect scab pixels based on spectral information. Linear Discriminant Analysis (LDA) was used to find the most discriminating channels in spectral data based on the healthy leaf and scab infested leaf spectra. Five combinations of false-colour images were created from the spectral data and the segmentation net results. The images were trained and evaluated with a modified version of the YOLOv5 network. Despite the promising results of deep learning using RGB images (P=0.8, mAP@50=0.73), the detection of apple scab in apple trees using multispectral imaging proved to be a difficult task. The high-light environment of the open field made it difficult to collect a balanced spectrum from the multispectral camera, since the infrared channel and the visible channels needed to be constantly balanced so that they did not overexpose in the images.
summary: Apple scab is a fungal disease caused by Venturia inaequalis. Disease is of particular concern for growers, as it causes significant damage to fruit and leaves, leading to loss of fruit and yield. This article examines the ability of deep learning and hyperspectral imaging to accurately identify an apple symptom infection in apple trees. In total, 168 image scenes were collected using conventional RGB and Visible to Near-infrared (VIS-NIR) spectral imaging (8 channels) in infected orchards. Five combinations of false-colour images were created from the spectral data and the segmentation net results. The images were trained and evaluated with a modified version of the YOLOv5 network. Despite the promising results of deep learning using RGB images (P=0.8, mAP@50=0.73), the detection of apple scab in apple trees using multispectral imaging proved to be a difficult task. The high-light environment of the open field made it difficult to collect a balanced spectrum from the multispectral camera, since the infrared channel and the visible channels needed to be constantly balanced so that they did not overexpose in the images.
abstract_zh: 苹果黑星病是由黑星文氏菌（Venturia inaequalis）引起的一种真菌病害。疾病是种植者特别关注的问题，因为它会对果实和叶子造成严重损害，导致果实和产量损失。本文探讨了深度学习和高光谱成像准确识别苹果树中苹果症状感染的能力。使用传统 RGB 和可见光到近红外 (VIS-NIR) 光谱成像（8 通道）在受感染的果园中总共收集了 168 个图像场景。光谱数据使用经过分割训练的人工神经网络 (ANN) 进行预处理，以根据光谱信息检测痂像素。线性判别分析 (LDA) 用于根据健康叶子和黑星病侵染的叶子光谱来查找光谱数据中最具辨别力的通道。根据光谱数据和分割净结果创建了五种假色图像组合。使用 YOLOv5 网络的修改版本对图像进行训练和评估。尽管使用 RGB 图像的深度学习取得了有希望的结果（P=0.8，mAP@50=0.73），但使用多光谱成像检测苹果树上的苹果黑星病被证明是一项艰巨的任务。开放场的高光环境使得多光谱相机很难收集平衡的光谱，因为红外通道和可见光通道需要不断平衡，以免在图像中曝光过度。

AI.tldr: 利用深度学习和多光谱成像技术检测果园中的苹果黑星病
AI.motivation: 苹果黑星病对果实和产量造成重大损害，需要更准确的检测方法以减少损失
AI.method: 收集RGB和多光谱图像，使用ANN进行光谱预处理，LDA筛选关键通道，生成假彩色图像，并采用改进YOLOv5网络进行训练与评估
AI.result: 深度学习在RGB图像上表现良好（P=0.8，mAP@50=0.73），但多光谱成像因户外强光导致光谱采集不平衡而效果有限
AI.conclusion: 尽管RGB图像检测效果较好，但多光谱成像受户外光照影响较大，需进一步优化光照条件或算法以提高检测准确性

authors_text: Nuo Chen,Hongguang Li,Yinan Bao,Baoyuan Wang,Jia Li
title: Natural Response Generation for Chinese Reading Comprehension
title_zh: 中文阅读理解的自然反应生成
abstract: Machine reading comprehension (MRC) is an important area of conversation agents and draws a lot of attention. However, there is a notable limitation to current MRC benchmarks: The labeled answers are mostly either spans extracted from the target corpus or the choices of the given candidates, ignoring the natural aspect of high-quality responses. As a result, MRC models trained on these datasets can not generate human-like responses in real QA scenarios. To this end, we construct a new dataset called Penguin to promote the research of MRC, providing a training and test bed for natural response generation to real scenarios. Concretely, Penguin consists of 200k training data with high-quality fluent, and well-informed responses. Penguin is the first benchmark towards natural response generation in Chinese MRC on a relatively large scale. To address the challenges in Penguin, we develop two strong baselines: end-to-end and two-stage frameworks. Following that, we further design Prompt-BART: fine-tuning the pre-trained generative language models with a mixture of prefix prompts in Penguin. Extensive experiments validated the effectiveness of this design.
summary: Machine reading comprehension (MRC) is an important area of conversation agents and draws a lot of attention. However, there is a notable limitation to current MRC benchmarks: The labeled answers are mostly either spans extracted from the target corpus or the choices of the given candidates, ignoring the natural aspect of high-quality responses. As a result, MRC models trained on these datasets can not generate human-like responses in real QA scenarios. To this end, we construct a new dataset called Penguin to promote the research of MRC, providing a training and test bed for natural response generation to real scenarios. Concretely, Penguin consists of 200k training data with high-quality fluent, and well-informed responses. Penguin is the first benchmark towards natural response generation in Chinese MRC on a relatively large scale. To address the challenges in Penguin, we develop two strong baselines: end-to-end and two-stage frameworks. Following that, we further design Prompt-BART: fine-tuning the pre-trained generative language models with a mixture of prefix prompts in Penguin. Extensive experiments validated the effectiveness of this design.
abstract_zh: 机器阅读理解（MRC）是对话代理的一个重要领域，引起了很多关注。然而，当前的 MRC 基准有一个显着的限制：标记的答案大多是从目标语料库中提取的跨度或给定候选者的选择，忽略了高质量答案的自然方面。因此，在这些数据集上训练的 MRC 模型无法在真实的 QA 场景中生成类似人类的响应。为此，我们构建了一个名为 Penguin 的新数据集来促进 MRC 的研究，为真实场景的自然响应生成提供训练和测试床。具体来说，Penguin 由 20 万个训练数据组成，具有高质量、流畅且信息灵通的响应。 Penguin是中国MRC中第一个规模较大的自然响应生成基准。为了应对企鹅的挑战，我们开发了两个强大的基线：端到端框架和两阶段框架。接下来，我们进一步设计 Prompt-BART：使用 Penguin 中的混合前缀提示对预先训练的生成语言模型进行微调。大量的实验验证了该设计的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在构建一个用于中文机器阅读理解的自然响应生成数据集，并提出相应的生成方法。
AI.motivation: 现有阅读理解数据集的答案多为抽取式或候选选项，缺乏自然流畅的高质量响应，导致模型难以生成符合真实场景的问答。
AI.method: 构建包含20万高质量响应的Penguin数据集，并设计端到端框架、两阶段框架及Prompt-BART模型（基于预训练生成模型的前缀提示微调）。
AI.result: 实验验证了Prompt-BART等方法在自然响应生成任务中的有效性，Penguin成为首个大规模中文自然响应生成基准。
AI.conclusion: Penguin数据集和Prompt-BART方法为中文机器阅读理解的自然响应生成研究提供了新方向和实验基础。

search_text: Natural Response Generation for Chinese Reading Comprehension 中文阅读理解的自然反应生成 Machine reading comprehension (MRC) is an important area of conversation agents and draws a lot of attention. However, there is a notable limitation to current MRC benchmarks: The labeled answers are mostly either spans extracted from the target corpus or the choices of the given candidates, ignoring the natural aspect of high-quality responses. As a result, MRC models trained on these datasets can not generate human-like responses in real QA scenarios. To this end, we construct a new dataset called Penguin to promote the research of MRC, providing a training and test bed for natural response generation to real scenarios. Concretely, Penguin consists of 200k training data with high-quality fluent, and well-informed responses. Penguin is the first benchmark towards natural response generation in Chinese MRC on a relatively large scale. To address the challenges in Penguin, we develop two strong baselines: end-to-end and two-stage frameworks. Following that, we further design Prompt-BART: fine-tuning the pre-trained generative language models with a mixture of prefix prompts in Penguin. Extensive experiments validated the effectiveness of this design. 机器阅读理解（MRC）是对话代理的一个重要领域，引起了很多关注。然而，当前的 MRC 基准有一个显着的限制：标记的答案大多是从目标语料库中提取的跨度或给定候选者的选择，忽略了高质量答案的自然方面。因此，在这些数据集上训练的 MRC 模型无法在真实的 QA 场景中生成类似人类的响应。为此，我们构建了一个名为 Penguin 的新数据集来促进 MRC 的研究，为真实场景的自然响应生成提供训练和测试床。具体来说，Penguin 由 20 万个训练数据组成，具有高质量、流畅且信息灵通的响应。 Penguin是中国MRC中第一个规模较大的自然响应生成基准。为了应对企鹅的挑战，我们开发了两个强大的基线：端到端框架和两阶段框架。接下来，我们进一步设计 Prompt-BART：使用 Penguin 中的混合前缀提示对预先训练的生成语言模型进行微调。大量的实验验证了该设计的有效性。 本文旨在构建一个用于中文机器阅读理解的自然响应生成数据集，并提出相应的生成方法。 Nuo Chen,Hongguang Li,Yinan Bao,Baoyuan Wang,Jia Li cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Paint it Black: Generating paintings from text descriptions
title_zh: Paint it Black：根据文本描述生成绘画
abstract: Two distinct tasks - generating photorealistic pictures from given text prompts and transferring the style of a painting to a real image to make it appear as though it were done by an artist, have been addressed many times, and several approaches have been proposed to accomplish them. However, the intersection of these two, i.e., generating paintings from a given caption, is a relatively unexplored area with little data available. In this paper, we have explored two distinct strategies and have integrated them together. First strategy is to generate photorealistic images and then apply style transfer and the second strategy is to train an image generation model on real images with captions and then fine-tune it on captioned paintings later. These two models are evaluated using different metrics as well as a user study is conducted to get human feedback on the produced results.
summary: Two distinct tasks - generating photorealistic pictures from given text prompts and transferring the style of a painting to a real image to make it appear as though it were done by an artist, have been addressed many times, and several approaches have been proposed to accomplish them. However, the intersection of these two, i.e., generating paintings from a given caption, is a relatively unexplored area with little data available. In this paper, we have explored two distinct strategies and have integrated them together. First strategy is to generate photorealistic images and then apply style transfer and the second strategy is to train an image generation model on real images with captions and then fine-tune it on captioned paintings later. These two models are evaluated using different metrics as well as a user study is conducted to get human feedback on the produced results.
abstract_zh: 两个不同的任务——根据给定的文本提示生成照片级真实感图片以及将绘画风格转移到真实图像以使其看起来像是由艺术家完成的——已经被多次解决，并且已经提出了几种方法来完成这些任务。然而，这两者的交叉点，即从给定的标题生成绘画，是一个相对未经探索的领域，可用数据很少。在本文中，我们探索了两种不同的策略并将它们整合在一起。第一个策略是生成照片级真实感图像，然后应用风格迁移，第二个策略是在带有标题的真实图像上训练图像生成模型，然后在带标题的绘画上对其进行微调。这两个模型使用不同的指标进行评估，并进行用户研究以获得对生成结果的人类反馈。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在探索根据文本描述生成绘画作品的方法，结合两种策略并评估其效果。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多集中于生成逼真图像或风格迁移，而结合两者生成绘画的研究较少，数据稀缺，需探索有效方法。
AI.method: 采用两种方法：1）生成逼真图像后进行风格迁移；2）在真实图像数据集上预训练模型，再在带标题的绘画数据集上微调。
AI.result: 通过多指标评估和用户研究验证，两种方法在生成质量与风格匹配度上表现良好，用户反馈积极。
AI.conclusion: 两种方法均有效，结合策略可提升生成效果，未来需更多数据与优化。

authors_text: Chengbo Zheng,Yuheng Wu,Chuhan Shi,Shuai Ma,Jiehui Luo,Xiaojuan Ma
title: Competent but Rigid: Identifying the Gap in Empowering AI to Participate Equally in Group Decision-Making
title_zh: 有能力但又僵化：找出赋能人工智能平等参与群体决策的差距
abstract: Existing research on human-AI collaborative decision-making focuses mainly on the interaction between AI and individual decision-makers. There is a limited understanding of how AI may perform in group decision-making. This paper presents a wizard-of-oz study in which two participants and an AI form a committee to rank three English essays. One novelty of our study is that we adopt a speculative design by endowing AI equal power to humans in group decision-making.We enable the AI to discuss and vote equally with other human members. We find that although the voice of AI is considered valuable, AI still plays a secondary role in the group because it cannot fully follow the dynamics of the discussion and make progressive contributions. Moreover, the divergent opinions of our participants regarding an "equal AI" shed light on the possible future of human-AI relations.
summary: Existing research on human-AI collaborative decision-making focuses mainly on the interaction between AI and individual decision-makers. There is a limited understanding of how AI may perform in group decision-making. This paper presents a wizard-of-oz study in which two participants and an AI form a committee to rank three English essays. One novelty of our study is that we adopt a speculative design by endowing AI equal power to humans in group decision-making.We enable the AI to discuss and vote equally with other human members. We find that although the voice of AI is considered valuable, AI still plays a secondary role in the group because it cannot fully follow the dynamics of the discussion and make progressive contributions. Moreover, the divergent opinions of our participants regarding an "equal AI" shed light on the possible future of human-AI relations.
abstract_zh: 现有的人机协同决策研究主要集中在人工智能与个体决策者之间的交互。人们对人工智能如何在群体决策中发挥作用的了解还很有限。本文提出了一项绿野仙踪研究，其中两名参与者和一个人工智能组成一个委员会，对三篇英语论文进行排名。我们研究的一个新颖之处是，我们采用了一种推测性设计，在群体决策中赋予人工智能与人类平等的权力。我们使人工智能能够与其他人类成员平等地讨论和投票。我们发现，尽管人工智能的声音被认为很有价值，但人工智能在群体中仍然扮演次要角色，因为它无法完全跟随讨论的动态并做出渐进的贡献。此外，与会者对“平等人工智能”的不同看法也揭示了人类与人工智能关系的可能未来。

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验研究AI在群体决策中的角色，探讨其与人类平等参与时的表现与局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注AI与个体决策者的互动，但对AI在群体决策中的表现缺乏理解，需探索其平等参与的可行性与挑战。
AI.method: 采用‘巫师的OZ’实验方法，设计三人委员会（两人人类+AI）对三篇英文作文进行排序，赋予AI与人类平等的讨论与投票权。
AI.result: AI的观点被认可但作用有限，因无法动态跟进讨论并持续贡献；参与者对‘平等AI’的分歧揭示了未来人机关系的潜在方向。
AI.conclusion: AI在群体决策中虽具能力但表现僵化，需改进其动态适应性；人类对AI角色的多元认知为未来协作模式提供研究基础。

Moreover, the divergent opinions of our participants regarding an "equal AI" shed light on the possible future of human-AI relations. 现有的人机协同决策研究主要集中在人工智能与个体决策者之间的交互。人们对人工智能如何在群体决策中发挥作用的了解还很有限。本文提出了一项绿野仙踪研究，其中两名参与者和一个人工智能组成一个委员会，对三篇英语论文进行排名。我们研究的一个新颖之处是，我们采用了一种推测性设计，在群体决策中赋予人工智能与人类平等的权力。我们使人工智能能够与其他人类成员平等地讨论和投票。我们发现，尽管人工智能的声音被认为很有价值，但人工智能在群体中仍然扮演次要角色，因为它无法完全跟随讨论的动态并做出渐进的贡献。此外，与会者对“平等人工智能”的不同看法也揭示了人类与人工智能关系的可能未来。 本文通过实验研究AI在群体决策中的角色，探讨其与人类平等参与时的表现与局限性。 Chengbo Zheng,Yuheng Wu,Chuhan Shi,Shuai Ma,Jiehui Luo,Xiaojuan Ma cs.HC,cs.AI

authors_text: Philipp Sommer,Yixing Huang,Christoph Bert,Andreas Maier,Manuel Schmidt,Arnd Dörfler,Rainer Fietkau,Florian Putz
title: Risk Classification of Brain Metastases via Radiomics, Delta-Radiomics and Machine Learning
title_zh: 通过放射组学、Delta-放射组学和机器学习对脑转移瘤进行风险分类
abstract: Stereotactic radiotherapy (SRT) is one of the most important treatment for patients with brain metastases (BM). Conventionally, following SRT patients are monitored by serial imaging and receive salvage treatments in case of significant tumor growth. We hypothesized that using radiomics and machine learning (ML), metastases at high risk for subsequent progression could be identified during follow-up prior to the onset of significant tumor growth, enabling personalized follow-up intervals and early selection for salvage treatment. All experiments are performed on a dataset from clinical routine of the Radiation Oncology department of the University Hospital Erlangen (UKER). The classification is realized via the maximum-relevance minimal-redundancy (MRMR) technique and support vector machines (SVM). The pipeline leads to a classification with a mean area under the curve (AUC) score of 0.83 in internal cross-validation and allows a division of the cohort into two subcohorts that differ significantly in their median time to progression (low-risk metastasis (LRM): 17.3 months, high-risk metastasis (HRM): 9.6 months, p < 0.01). The classification performance is especially enhanced by the analysis of medical images from different points in time (AUC 0.53 -> AUC 0.74). The results indicate that risk stratification of BM based on radiomics and machine learning during post-SRT follow-up is possible with good accuracy and should be further pursued to personalize and improve post-SRT follow-up.
summary: Stereotactic radiotherapy (SRT) is one of the most important treatment for patients with brain metastases (BM). Conventionally, following SRT patients are monitored by serial imaging and receive salvage treatments in case of significant tumor growth. We hypothesized that using radiomics and machine learning (ML), metastases at high risk for subsequent progression could be identified during follow-up prior to the onset of significant tumor growth, enabling personalized follow-up intervals and early selection for salvage treatment. All experiments are performed on a dataset from clinical routine of the Radiation Oncology department of the University Hospital Erlangen (UKER). The classification is realized via the maximum-relevance minimal-redundancy (MRMR) technique and support vector machines (SVM). The pipeline leads to a classification with a mean area under the curve (AUC) score of 0.83 in internal cross-validation and allows a division of the cohort into two subcohorts that differ significantly in their median time to progression (low-risk metastasis (LRM): 17.3 months, high-risk metastasis (HRM): 9.6 months, p < 0.01). The classification performance is especially enhanced by the analysis of medical images from different points in time (AUC 0.53 -> AUC 0.74). The results indicate that risk stratification of BM based on radiomics and machine learning during post-SRT follow-up is possible with good accuracy and should be further pursued to personalize and improve post-SRT follow-up.
abstract_zh: 立体定向放射治疗（SRT）是脑转移（BM）患者最重要的治疗方法之一。传统上，SRT 治疗后的患者会通过连续成像进行监测，并在肿瘤显着生长的情况下接受挽救治疗。我们假设，使用放射组学和机器学习（ML），可以在肿瘤显着生长之前的随访期间识别后续进展的高风险转移，从而实现个性化的随访间隔和早期选择挽救治疗。所有实验均在埃尔兰根大学医院 (UKER) 放射肿瘤科临床常规数据集上进行。该分类是通过最大相关最小冗余（MRMR）技术和支持向量机（SVM）来实现的。该管道在内部交叉验证中得出平均曲线下面积 (AUC) 评分为 0.83 的分类，并允许将队列分为两个亚队列，这两个亚队列的中位进展时间差异显着（低风险转移 (LRM)：17.3 个月，高风险转移 (HRM)：9.6 个月，p < 0.01）。通过对不同时间点的医学图像的分析（AUC 0.53 -> AUC 0.74），分类性能尤其得到增强。结果表明，在 SRT 后随访期间，基于放射组学和机器学习的 BM 风险分层是可能且具有良好的准确性，应进一步追求个性化和改进 SRT 后随访。

AI.tldr: 通过放射组学、Delta-放射组学和机器学习对脑转移瘤进行风险分类，以在立体定向放射治疗后早期识别高风险病灶。
AI.motivation: 传统随访依赖影像学检查，无法在肿瘤显著生长前识别高风险转移瘤，需通过放射组学和机器学习实现个性化随访和早期干预。
AI.method: 采用最大相关最小冗余（MRMR）特征选择和支持向量机（SVM）分类，结合不同时间点的影像数据（Delta-放射组学）进行风险分层。
AI.result: 内部交叉验证AUC达0.83，高风险组（HRM）中位进展时间9.6个月，低风险组（LRM）为17.3个月（p<0.01），时间序列分析使AUC从0.53提升至0.74。
AI.conclusion: 基于放射组学和机器学习的脑转移瘤风险分层具有较高准确性，可为个体化随访和治疗决策提供依据，需进一步验证推广。
