title: Wizard of Errors: Introducing and Evaluating Machine Learning Errors in Wizard of Oz Studies
title_zh: 错误向导：在绿野仙踪研究中介绍和评估机器学习错误
comment: ef:In Extended Abstracts of the 2022 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI EA '22). ACM, New York, NY, USA, Article 426, 1-7
comments: ef:In Extended Abstracts of the 2022 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI EA '22). ACM, New York, NY, USA, Article 426, 1-7
abstract: When designing Machine Learning (ML) enabled solutions, designers often need to simulate ML behavior through the Wizard of Oz (WoZ) approach to test the user experience before the ML model is available. Although reproducing ML errors is essential for having a good representation, they are rarely considered. We introduce Wizard of Errors (WoE), a tool for conducting WoZ studies on ML-enabled solutions that allows simulating ML errors during user experience assessment. We explored how this system can be used to simulate the behavior of a computer vision model. We tested WoE with design students to determine the importance of considering ML errors in design, the relevance of using descriptive error types instead of confusion matrix, and the suitability of manual error control in WoZ studies. Our work identifies several challenges, which prevent realistic error representation by designers in such studies. We discuss the implications of these findings for design.
summary: When designing Machine Learning (ML) enabled solutions, designers often need to simulate ML behavior through the Wizard of Oz (WoZ) approach to test the user experience before the ML model is available. Although reproducing ML errors is essential for having a good representation, they are rarely considered. We introduce Wizard of Errors (WoE), a tool for conducting WoZ studies on ML-enabled solutions that allows simulating ML errors during user experience assessment. We explored how this system can be used to simulate the behavior of a computer vision model. We tested WoE with design students to determine the importance of considering ML errors in design, the relevance of using descriptive error types instead of confusion matrix, and the suitability of manual error control in WoZ studies. Our work identifies several challenges, which prevent realistic error representation by designers in such studies. We discuss the implications of these findings for design.
abstract_zh: 在设计支持机器学习 (ML) 的解决方案时，设计人员通常需要通过 Wizard of Oz (WoZ) 方法模拟 ML 行为，以便在 ML 模型可用之前测试用户体验。尽管再现 ML 错误对于获得良好的表示至关重要，但很少考虑它们。我们引入了错误向导 (WoE)，这是一种用于对支持 ML 的解决方案进行 WoZ 研究的工具，允许在用户体验评估期间模拟 ML 错误。我们探索了如何使用该系统来模拟计算机视觉模型的行为。我们与设计专业的学生一起测试了 WoE，以确定在设计中考虑 ML 错误的重要性、使用描述性错误类型而不是混淆矩阵的相关性，以及 WoZ 研究中手动错误控制的适用性。我们的工作发现了一些挑战，这些挑战阻碍了设计者在此类研究中再现真实的错误。我们讨论这些发现对设计的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种名为Wizard of Errors (WoE)的工具，用于在Wizard of Oz (WoZ)研究中模拟机器学习错误，以评估ML解决方案的用户体验。
AI.motivation: 在设计ML解决方案时，尽管模拟ML错误对用户体验测试至关重要，但现有研究很少考虑这一因素，导致设计者难以真实反映错误场景。
AI.method: 开发WoE工具，通过模拟计算机视觉模型的行为，在设计学生中进行实验，对比描述性错误类型与混淆矩阵的适用性，并验证人工控制错误的可行性。
AI.result: 实验发现设计者在模拟ML错误时面临现实挑战，例如难以准确表征错误类型及控制错误场景，且传统混淆矩阵不如描述性分类有效。
AI.conclusion: 需在设计实践中更重视ML错误的模拟，采用描述性错误分类并结合人工控制，以提升WoZ研究对真实ML系统问题的反映能力。

authors_text: Csaba Márton Köllőd,András Adolf,Gergely Márton,István Ulbert
title: Deep comparisons of Neural Networks from the EEGNet family
title_zh: EEGNet 系列神经网络的深入比较
abstract: Most of the Brain-Computer Interface (BCI) publications, which propose artificial neural networks for Motor Imagery (MI) Electroencephalography (EEG) signal classification, are presented using one of the BCI Competition datasets. However, these databases contain MI EEG data from less than or equal to 10 subjects . In addition, these algorithms usually include only bandpass filtering to reduce noise and increase signal quality. In this article, we compared 5 well-known neural networks (Shallow ConvNet, Deep ConvNet, EEGNet, EEGNet Fusion, MI-EEGNet) using open-access databases with many subjects next to the BCI Competition 4 2a dataset to acquire statistically significant results. We removed artifacts from the EEG using the FASTER algorithm as a signal processing step. Moreover, we investigated whether transfer learning can further improve the classification results on artifact filtered data. We aimed to rank the neural networks; therefore, next to the classification accuracy, we introduced two additional metrics: the accuracy improvement from chance level and the effect of transfer learning. The former can be used with different class-numbered databases, while the latter can highlight neural networks with sufficient generalization abilities. Our metrics showed that the researchers should not avoid Shallow ConvNet and Deep ConvNet because they can perform better than the later published ones from the EEGNet family.
summary: Most of the Brain-Computer Interface (BCI) publications, which propose artificial neural networks for Motor Imagery (MI) Electroencephalography (EEG) signal classification, are presented using one of the BCI Competition datasets. However, these databases contain MI EEG data from less than or equal to 10 subjects . In addition, these algorithms usually include only bandpass filtering to reduce noise and increase signal quality. In this article, we compared 5 well-known neural networks (Shallow ConvNet, Deep ConvNet, EEGNet, EEGNet Fusion, MI-EEGNet) using open-access databases with many subjects next to the BCI Competition 4 2a dataset to acquire statistically significant results. We removed artifacts from the EEG using the FASTER algorithm as a signal processing step. Moreover, we investigated whether transfer learning can further improve the classification results on artifact filtered data. We aimed to rank the neural networks; therefore, next to the classification accuracy, we introduced two additional metrics: the accuracy improvement from chance level and the effect of transfer learning. The former can be used with different class-numbered databases, while the latter can highlight neural networks with sufficient generalization abilities. Our metrics showed that the researchers should not avoid Shallow ConvNet and Deep ConvNet because they can perform better than the later published ones from the EEGNet family.
abstract_zh: 大多数脑机接口 (BCI) 出版物提出了用于运动意象 (MI) 脑电图 (EEG) 信号分类的人工神经网络，都是使用 BCI 竞赛数据集之一来呈现的。然而，这些数据库包含来自少于或等于 10 名受试者的 MI EEG 数据。此外，这些算法通常仅包括带通滤波，以减少噪声并提高信号质量。在本文中，我们使用开放访问数据库将 5 个著名的神经网络（Shallow ConvNet、Deep ConvNet、EEGNet、EEGNet Fusion、MI-EEGNet）与 BCI竞赛 4 2a 数据集旁边的许多主题进行了比较，以获得统计上显着的结果。我们使用 FASTER 算法作为信号处理步骤从 EEG 中去除伪影。此外，我们还研究了迁移学习是否可以进一步改善伪影过滤数据的分类结果。我们的目标是对神经网络进行排名；因此，除了分类准确性之外，我们还引入了两个额外的指标：机会水平的准确性改进和迁移学习的效果。前者可以与不同类别编号的数据库一起使用，而后者可以突出具有足够泛化能力的神经网络。我们的指标表明，研究人员不应避免浅层卷积网络和深度卷积网络，因为它们的性能比 EEGNet 系列后来发布的网络更好。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了五种知名的神经网络模型在EEG信号分类任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 由于BCI竞赛数据集中的受试者数量有限，且通常仅使用带通滤波进行预处理，因此需要在更大规模的开放数据集上对不同的神经网络模型进行全面比较，以获得具有统计显著性的结果。
AI.method: 作者使用了BCI Competition 4 2a数据集以及其它开放数据集，并采用FASTER算法去除EEG中的伪影。此外，还通过迁移学习进一步提升分类效果，并引入了两个新的评估指标：从偶然水平的准确率提升和迁移学习的效果。
AI.result: 结果显示，浅层卷积网络和深层卷积网络在某些情况下表现优于后来发布的EEGNet系列模型。
AI.conclusion: 研究人员不应忽视浅层和深层卷积网络，因为它们在某些情况下可能比后来的EEGNet系列模型表现更好。

authors_text: Miyoko Tsumaki,Yu Teshima,Takao Tsuchiya,Kaoru Ashihara,Kohta I. Kobayasi,Shizuko Hiryu
title: Build a training interface to install the bat's echolocation skills in humans
title_zh: 构建一个训练界面，将蝙蝠的回声定位技能安装到人类身上
abstract: Bats use a sophisticated ultrasonic sensing method called echolocation to recognize the environment. Recently, it has been reported that sighted human participants with no prior experience in echolocation can improve their ability to perceive the spatial layout of various environments through training to listen to echoes (Norman, et al., 2021). In this study, we developed the new training system for human echolocation using the eye-tracker. Binaural echoes of consecutive downward linear FM pulses that were inspired by feeding strategies of echolocating bats were simulated using the wave equation finite difference time domain method. The virtual echoes were presented to the sighted subject in response to his or her eye movements on the monitor. The latency from eye gazing to the echo presentation wasn't audible delay to perceive. In a preliminary experiment in which the participants were asked to identify the shapes of the hidden target, the participants were found to concentrate their gaze on the edges of the hidden target on the monitor. We will conduct a psycho-acoustical experiment to examine the learning process of human echolocation in a shape-identification task, which will lead to device development in the field of welfare engineering.
summary: Bats use a sophisticated ultrasonic sensing method called echolocation to recognize the environment. Recently, it has been reported that sighted human participants with no prior experience in echolocation can improve their ability to perceive the spatial layout of various environments through training to listen to echoes (Norman, et al., 2021). In this study, we developed the new training system for human echolocation using the eye-tracker. Binaural echoes of consecutive downward linear FM pulses that were inspired by feeding strategies of echolocating bats were simulated using the wave equation finite difference time domain method. The virtual echoes were presented to the sighted subject in response to his or her eye movements on the monitor. The latency from eye gazing to the echo presentation wasn't audible delay to perceive. In a preliminary experiment in which the participants were asked to identify the shapes of the hidden target, the participants were found to concentrate their gaze on the edges of the hidden target on the monitor. We will conduct a psycho-acoustical experiment to examine the learning process of human echolocation in a shape-identification task, which will lead to device development in the field of welfare engineering.
abstract_zh: 蝙蝠使用一种称为回声定位的复杂超声波传感方法来识别环境。最近，有报道称，没有回声定位经验的视力正常的人类参与者可以通过听回声的训练来提高他们感知各种环境的空间布局的能力（Norman等人，2021）。在这项研究中，我们开发了使用眼动仪进行人类回声定位的新训练系统。受回声定位蝙蝠进食策略启发，使用波动方程有限差分时域方法模拟了连续向下线性调频脉冲的双耳回声。虚拟回声被呈现给有视力的受试者，以响应他或她在监视器上的眼球运动。从眼睛注视到回声呈现的延迟并不是可听的延迟。在一项初步实验中，参与者被要求识别隐藏目标的形状，结果发现参与者将目光集中在显示器上隐藏目标的边缘。我们将进行心理声学实验，以检查人类回声定位在形状识别任务中的学习过程，这将导致福利工程领域的设备开发。

AI.tldr: 开发基于眼动追踪的人类回声定位训练系统，模拟蝙蝠声呐特性以提升人类空间感知能力。
AI.motivation: 通过训练使人类获得类似蝙蝠的回声定位能力，为视障人士开发辅助设备并推动福利工程领域技术进步。
AI.method: 采用有限差分时域法模拟蝙蝠声呐脉冲的双耳回声，结合眼动追踪实时响应受试者视线位置呈现虚拟回声。
AI.result: 初步实验发现受试者在识别隐藏目标时会聚焦于目标边缘区域，验证了视觉-听觉反馈机制的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该训练系统为研究人类回声定位学习过程提供了新方法，未来可推动辅助技术设备的研发应用。

title: MixNeRF: Modeling a Ray with Mixture Density for Novel View Synthesis from Sparse Inputs
title_zh: MixNeRF：使用混合密度对光线进行建模，以实现稀疏输入的新颖视图合成
abstract: Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) has broken new ground in the novel view synthesis due to its simple concept and state-of-the-art quality. However, it suffers from severe performance degradation unless trained with a dense set of images with different camera poses, which hinders its practical applications. Although previous methods addressing this problem achieved promising results, they relied heavily on the additional training resources, which goes against the philosophy of sparse-input novel-view synthesis pursuing the training efficiency. In this work, we propose MixNeRF, an effective training strategy for novel view synthesis from sparse inputs by modeling a ray with a mixture density model. Our MixNeRF estimates the joint distribution of RGB colors along the ray samples by modeling it with mixture of distributions. We also propose a new task of ray depth estimation as a useful training objective, which is highly correlated with 3D scene geometry. Moreover, we remodel the colors with regenerated blending weights based on the estimated ray depth and further improves the robustness for colors and viewpoints. Our MixNeRF outperforms other state-of-the-art methods in various standard benchmarks with superior efficiency of training and inference.
summary: Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) has broken new ground in the novel view synthesis due to its simple concept and state-of-the-art quality. However, it suffers from severe performance degradation unless trained with a dense set of images with different camera poses, which hinders its practical applications. Although previous methods addressing this problem achieved promising results, they relied heavily on the additional training resources, which goes against the philosophy of sparse-input novel-view synthesis pursuing the training efficiency. In this work, we propose MixNeRF, an effective training strategy for novel view synthesis from sparse inputs by modeling a ray with a mixture density model. Our MixNeRF estimates the joint distribution of RGB colors along the ray samples by modeling it with mixture of distributions. We also propose a new task of ray depth estimation as a useful training objective, which is highly correlated with 3D scene geometry. Moreover, we remodel the colors with regenerated blending weights based on the estimated ray depth and further improves the robustness for colors and viewpoints. Our MixNeRF outperforms other state-of-the-art methods in various standard benchmarks with superior efficiency of training and inference.
abstract_zh: 神经辐射场 (NeRF) 凭借其简单的概念和最先进的质量，在新颖的视图合成方面开辟了新天地。然而，除非使用具有不同相机姿势的密集图像集进行训练，否则它的性能会严重下降，这阻碍了其实际应用。尽管之前解决这个问题的方法取得了可喜的结果，但它们严重依赖额外的训练资源，这违背了稀疏输入新颖视图合成追求训练效率的理念。在这项工作中，我们提出了 MixNeRF，这是一种有效的训练策略，通过使用混合密度模型对光线进行建模，从稀疏输入中合成新颖的视图。我们的 MixNeRF 通过使用混合分布建模来估计 RGB 颜色沿光线样本的联合分布。我们还提出了光线深度估计的新任务作为有用的训练目标，它与 3D 场景几何高度相关。此外，我们根据估计的光线深度使用重新生成的混合权重来重新建模颜色，并进一步提高颜色和视点的鲁棒性。我们的 MixNeRF 在各种标准基准中都优于其他最先进的方法，具有卓越的训练和推理效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MixNeRF方法，通过混合密度模型建模光线，实现从稀疏输入的新型视角合成。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF需要密集视角图像训练，效率低下；现有方法依赖额外资源，违背稀疏输入训练的高效目标。
AI.method: 采用混合密度模型估计光线RGB分布，引入光线深度估计任务，并基于深度重构混合权重提升颜色和视角鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中优于现有方法，训练和推理效率更优。
AI.conclusion: MixNeRF通过创新训练策略有效解决稀疏输入下的新型视角合成问题，兼具性能与效率优势。

search_text: MixNeRF: Modeling a Ray with Mixture Density for Novel View Synthesis from Sparse Inputs MixNeRF：使用混合密度对光线进行建模，以实现稀疏输入的新颖视图合成 Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) has broken new ground in the novel view synthesis due to its simple concept and state-of-the-art quality. However, it suffers from severe performance degradation unless trained with a dense set of images with different camera poses, which hinders its practical applications. Although previous methods addressing this problem achieved promising results, they relied heavily on the additional training resources, which goes against the philosophy of sparse-input novel-view synthesis pursuing the training efficiency. In this work, we propose MixNeRF, an effective training strategy for novel view synthesis from sparse inputs by modeling a ray with a mixture density model. Our MixNeRF estimates the joint distribution of RGB colors along the ray samples by modeling it with mixture of distributions. We also propose a new task of ray depth estimation as a useful training objective, which is highly correlated with 3D scene geometry. Moreover, we remodel the colors with regenerated blending weights based on the estimated ray depth and further improves the robustness for colors and viewpoints. Our MixNeRF outperforms other state-of-the-art methods in various standard benchmarks with superior efficiency of training and inference. 神经辐射场 (NeRF) 凭借其简单的概念和最先进的质量，在新颖的视图合成方面开辟了新天地。然而，除非使用具有不同相机姿势的密集图像集进行训练，否则它的性能会严重下降，这阻碍了其实际应用。尽管之前解决这个问题的方法取得了可喜的结果，但它们严重依赖额外的训练资源，这违背了稀疏输入新颖视图合成追求训练效率的理念。在这项工作中，我们提出了 MixNeRF，这是一种有效的训练策略，通过使用混合密度模型对光线进行建模，从稀疏输入中合成新颖的视图。我们的 MixNeRF 通过使用混合分布建模来估计 RGB 颜色沿光线样本的联合分布。我们还提出了光线深度估计的新任务作为有用的训练目标，它与 3D 场景几何高度相关。此外，我们根据估计的光线深度使用重新生成的混合权重来重新建模颜色，并进一步提高颜色和视点的鲁棒性。我们的 MixNeRF 在各种标准基准中都优于其他最先进的方法，具有卓越的训练和推理效率。 本文提出MixNeRF方法，通过混合密度模型建模光线，实现从稀疏输入的新型视角合成。 Seunghyeon Seo,Donghoon Han,Yeonjin Chang,Nojun Kwak cs.CV

title: Few-shot 3D LiDAR Semantic Segmentation for Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 用于自动驾驶的少样本 3D LiDAR 语义分割
abstract: In autonomous driving, the novel objects and lack of annotations challenge the traditional 3D LiDAR semantic segmentation based on deep learning. Few-shot learning is a feasible way to solve these issues. However, currently few-shot semantic segmentation methods focus on camera data, and most of them only predict the novel classes without considering the base classes. This setting cannot be directly applied to autonomous driving due to safety concerns. Thus, we propose a few-shot 3D LiDAR semantic segmentation method that predicts both novel classes and base classes simultaneously. Our method tries to solve the background ambiguity problem in generalized few-shot semantic segmentation. We first review the original cross-entropy and knowledge distillation losses, then propose a new loss function that incorporates the background information to achieve 3D LiDAR few-shot semantic segmentation. Extensive experiments on SemanticKITTI demonstrate the effectiveness of our method.
summary: In autonomous driving, the novel objects and lack of annotations challenge the traditional 3D LiDAR semantic segmentation based on deep learning. Few-shot learning is a feasible way to solve these issues. However, currently few-shot semantic segmentation methods focus on camera data, and most of them only predict the novel classes without considering the base classes. This setting cannot be directly applied to autonomous driving due to safety concerns. Thus, we propose a few-shot 3D LiDAR semantic segmentation method that predicts both novel classes and base classes simultaneously. Our method tries to solve the background ambiguity problem in generalized few-shot semantic segmentation. We first review the original cross-entropy and knowledge distillation losses, then propose a new loss function that incorporates the background information to achieve 3D LiDAR few-shot semantic segmentation. Extensive experiments on SemanticKITTI demonstrate the effectiveness of our method.
abstract_zh: 在自动驾驶中，新颖的对象和缺乏注释对基于深度学习的传统 3D LiDAR 语义分割提出了挑战。 Few-shot Learning是解决这些问题的一种可行方法。然而，目前的少镜头语义分割方法主要关注相机数据，并且大多数只预测新类而不考虑基类。出于安全考虑，该设置不能直接应用于自动驾驶。因此，我们提出了一种少镜头 3D LiDAR 语义分割方法，可以同时预测新类和基类。我们的方法试图解决广义少样本语义分割中的背景模糊问题。我们首先回顾了原始的交叉熵和知识蒸馏损失，然后提出了一种新的损失函数，该损失函数结合了背景信息来实现 3D LiDAR 少镜头语义分割。 SemanticKITTI 上的大量实验证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于自动驾驶的少样本3D激光雷达语义分割方法，可同时预测新类别和基础类别。
AI.motivation: 传统3D LiDAR语义分割面临新物体识别困难和标注不足问题，现有少样本方法仅预测新类别而忽略基础类别，无法满足自动驾驶安全需求。
AI.method: 通过改进交叉熵和知识蒸馏损失函数，设计融合背景信息的新损失函数，解决通用少样本分割中的背景模糊问题。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI数据集上的实验验证了方法有效性，实现了同时准确预测新旧类别的3D语义分割。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为自动驾驶场景下的少样本3D感知提供了安全可靠的解决方案，推动了激光雷达语义分割技术的发展。

authors_text: Yangning Li,Jiaoyan Chen,Yinghui Li,Yuejia Xiang,Xi Chen,Hai-Tao Zheng
title: Vision, Deduction and Alignment: An Empirical Study on Multi-modal Knowledge Graph Alignment
title_zh: 愿景、演绎与对齐：多模态知识图谱对齐的实证研究
abstract: Entity alignment (EA) for knowledge graphs (KGs) plays a critical role in knowledge engineering. Existing EA methods mostly focus on utilizing the graph structures and entity attributes (including literals), but ignore images that are common in modern multi-modal KGs. In this study we first constructed Multi-OpenEA -- eight large-scale, image-equipped EA benchmarks, and then evaluated some existing embedding-based methods for utilizing images. In view of the complementary nature of visual modal information and logical deduction, we further developed a new multi-modal EA method named LODEME using logical deduction and multi-modal KG embedding, with state-of-the-art performance achieved on Multi-OpenEA and other existing multi-modal EA benchmarks.
summary: Entity alignment (EA) for knowledge graphs (KGs) plays a critical role in knowledge engineering. Existing EA methods mostly focus on utilizing the graph structures and entity attributes (including literals), but ignore images that are common in modern multi-modal KGs. In this study we first constructed Multi-OpenEA -- eight large-scale, image-equipped EA benchmarks, and then evaluated some existing embedding-based methods for utilizing images. In view of the complementary nature of visual modal information and logical deduction, we further developed a new multi-modal EA method named LODEME using logical deduction and multi-modal KG embedding, with state-of-the-art performance achieved on Multi-OpenEA and other existing multi-modal EA benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 知识图（KG）的实体对齐（EA）在知识工程中起着至关重要的作用。现有的 EA 方法主要侧重于利用图结构和实体属性（包括文字），但忽略了现代多模态知识图谱中常见的图像。在这项研究中，我们首先构建了 Multi-OpenEA——八个大规模的、配备图像的 EA 基准，然后评估了一些现有的基于嵌入的利用图像的方法。鉴于视觉模态信息和逻辑推导的互补性，我们利用逻辑推导和多模态 KG 嵌入进一步开发了一种名为 LODEME 的新多模态 EA 方法，在 Multi-OpenEA 和其他现有多模态 EA 基准上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究多模态知识图谱对齐问题，提出结合视觉信息与逻辑推理的新型实体对齐方法。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱实体对齐方法忽视了多模态KG中常见的图像信息，而视觉信息与逻辑推理具有互补性。
AI.method: 构建包含图像的Multi-OpenEA基准，提出融合逻辑推理与多模态嵌入的LODEME方法。
AI.result: LODEME在Multi-OpenEA及多个多模态EA基准上取得最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 结合视觉模态与逻辑推理能有效提升多模态知识图谱对齐效果，为后续研究提供新方向。

Existing EA methods mostly focus on utilizing the graph structures and entity attributes (including literals), but ignore images that are common in modern multi-modal KGs. In this study we first constructed Multi-OpenEA -- eight large-scale, image-equipped EA benchmarks, and then evaluated some existing embedding-based methods for utilizing images. In view of the complementary nature of visual modal information and logical deduction, we further developed a new multi-modal EA method named LODEME using logical deduction and multi-modal KG embedding, with state-of-the-art performance achieved on Multi-OpenEA and other existing multi-modal EA benchmarks. 知识图（KG）的实体对齐（EA）在知识工程中起着至关重要的作用。现有的 EA 方法主要侧重于利用图结构和实体属性（包括文字），但忽略了现代多模态知识图谱中常见的图像。在这项研究中，我们首先构建了 Multi-OpenEA——八个大规模的、配备图像的 EA 基准，然后评估了一些现有的基于嵌入的利用图像的方法。鉴于视觉模态信息和逻辑推导的互补性，我们利用逻辑推导和多模态 KG 嵌入进一步开发了一种名为 LODEME 的新多模态 EA 方法，在 Multi-OpenEA 和其他现有多模态 EA 基准上实现了最先进的性能。 本文研究多模态知识图谱对齐问题，提出结合视觉信息与逻辑推理的新型实体对齐方法。 Yangning Li,Jiaoyan Chen,Yinghui Li,Yuejia Xiang,Xi Chen,Hai-Tao Zheng cs.AI,cs.MM

authors_text: Yuzheng Wang,Zuhao Ge,Zhaoyu Chen,Xian Liu,Chuangjia Ma,Yunquan Sun,Lizhe Qi
title: Explicit and Implicit Knowledge Distillation via Unlabeled Data
title_zh: 通过未标记数据进行显性和隐性知识蒸馏
abstract: Data-free knowledge distillation is a challenging model lightweight task for scenarios in which the original dataset is not available. Previous methods require a lot of extra computational costs to update one or more generators and their naive imitate-learning lead to lower distillation efficiency. Based on these observations, we first propose an efficient unlabeled sample selection method to replace high computational generators and focus on improving the training efficiency of the selected samples. Then, a class-dropping mechanism is designed to suppress the label noise caused by the data domain shifts. Finally, we propose a distillation method that incorporates explicit features and implicit structured relations to improve the effect of distillation. Experimental results show that our method can quickly converge and obtain higher accuracy than other state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Data-free knowledge distillation is a challenging model lightweight task for scenarios in which the original dataset is not available. Previous methods require a lot of extra computational costs to update one or more generators and their naive imitate-learning lead to lower distillation efficiency. Based on these observations, we first propose an efficient unlabeled sample selection method to replace high computational generators and focus on improving the training efficiency of the selected samples. Then, a class-dropping mechanism is designed to suppress the label noise caused by the data domain shifts. Finally, we propose a distillation method that incorporates explicit features and implicit structured relations to improve the effect of distillation. Experimental results show that our method can quickly converge and obtain higher accuracy than other state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 对于原始数据集不可用的场景，无数据知识蒸馏是一项具有挑战性的模型轻量级任务。以前的方法需要大量额外的计算成本来更新一个或多个生成器，并且它们的简单模仿学习导致蒸馏效率较低。基于这些观察，我们首先提出了一种高效的无标签样本选择方法来取代高计算生成器，并专注于提高所选样本的训练效率。然后，设计了类丢弃机制来抑制数据域移位引起的标签噪声。最后，我们提出了一种结合显式特征和隐式结构化关系的蒸馏方法，以提高蒸馏的效果。实验结果表明，我们的方法可以快速收敛并获得比其他最先进的方法更高的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过未标记数据进行显式和隐式知识蒸馏的方法，以解决数据不可用场景下的模型轻量化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统数据无关知识蒸馏方法依赖高计算成本的生成器，且简单模仿学习导致效率低下，亟需更高效的蒸馏策略。
AI.method: 提出高效未标记样本选择方法替代生成器，设计类别丢弃机制抑制领域偏移导致的标签噪声，并融合显式特征与隐式结构关系进行蒸馏。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法收敛速度更快，在多个基准数据集上准确率优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化样本选择与噪声抑制机制，结合多粒度知识迁移，本文方法有效提升了数据无关场景下的知识蒸馏效率与性能。

title: Collaborative Discrepancy Optimization for Reliable Image Anomaly Localization
title_zh: 用于可靠图像异常定位的协作差异优化
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Industrial Informatics
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Industrial Informatics
abstract: Most unsupervised image anomaly localization methods suffer from overgeneralization because of the high generalization abilities of convolutional neural networks, leading to unreliable predictions. To mitigate the overgeneralization, this study proposes to collaboratively optimize normal and abnormal feature distributions with the assistance of synthetic anomalies, namely collaborative discrepancy optimization (CDO). CDO introduces a margin optimization module and an overlap optimization module to optimize the two key factors determining the localization performance, i.e., the margin and the overlap between the discrepancy distributions (DDs) of normal and abnormal samples. With CDO, a large margin and a small overlap between normal and abnormal DDs are obtained, and the prediction reliability is boosted. Experiments on MVTec2D and MVTec3D show that CDO effectively mitigates the overgeneralization and achieves great anomaly localization performance with real-time computation efficiency. A real-world automotive plastic parts inspection application further demonstrates the capability of the proposed CDO. Code is available on https://github.com/caoyunkang/CDO.
summary: Most unsupervised image anomaly localization methods suffer from overgeneralization because of the high generalization abilities of convolutional neural networks, leading to unreliable predictions. To mitigate the overgeneralization, this study proposes to collaboratively optimize normal and abnormal feature distributions with the assistance of synthetic anomalies, namely collaborative discrepancy optimization (CDO). CDO introduces a margin optimization module and an overlap optimization module to optimize the two key factors determining the localization performance, i.e., the margin and the overlap between the discrepancy distributions (DDs) of normal and abnormal samples. With CDO, a large margin and a small overlap between normal and abnormal DDs are obtained, and the prediction reliability is boosted. Experiments on MVTec2D and MVTec3D show that CDO effectively mitigates the overgeneralization and achieves great anomaly localization performance with real-time computation efficiency. A real-world automotive plastic parts inspection application further demonstrates the capability of the proposed CDO. Code is available on https://github.com/caoyunkang/CDO.
abstract_zh: 由于卷积神经网络的高泛化能力，大多数无监督图像异常定位方法都存在过度泛化的问题，导致预测不可靠。为了减轻过度概括，本研究提出在合成异常的帮助下协同优化正常和异常特征分布，即协作差异优化（CDO）。 CDO引入了边际优化模块和重叠优化模块来优化决定定位性能的两个关键因素，即正常样本和异常样本的差异分布（DD）之间的边际和重叠。通过CDO，正常和异常DD之间的余量较大且重叠较小，从而提高了预测可靠性。 MVTec2D 和 MVTec3D 上的实验表明，CDO 有效地缓解了过度泛化，并以实时计算效率实现了良好的异常定位性能。真实的汽车塑料零件检测应用进一步证明了所提出的 CDO 的功能。代码可在 https://github.com/caoyunkang/CDO 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出协同差异优化（CDO）方法，解决无监督图像异常定位中的过度泛化问题，提升预测可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督图像异常定位方法因卷积神经网络高泛化能力导致预测不可靠，需通过优化特征分布差异缓解过度泛化。
AI.method: 设计协同差异优化（CDO）框架，包含边距优化模块和重叠优化模块，通过调整正常与异常样本差异分布的边距和重叠程度提升定位性能。
AI.result: 在MVTec2D和MVTec3D数据集上验证CDO有效缓解过度泛化，实现高精度异常定位，且具备实时计算效率；实际汽车塑料件检测案例进一步验证有效性。
AI.conclusion: CDO通过协同优化特征分布差异，显著提升无监督图像异常定位的可靠性，具有实际应用价值。

title: On the Regularising Levenberg-Marquardt Method for Blinn-Phong Photometric Stereo
title_zh: Blinn-Phong光度立体正则化Levenberg-Marquardt方法
comment: 11 pages, 3 figure, to be published in proceedings of OAGM 2022
comments: 11 pages, 3 figure, to be published in proceedings of OAGM 2022
abstract: Photometric stereo refers to the process to compute the 3D shape of an object using information on illumination and reflectance from several input images from the same point of view. The most often used reflectance model is the Lambertian reflectance, however this does not include specular highlights in input images. In this paper we consider the arising non-linear optimisation problem when employing Blinn-Phong reflectance for modeling specular effects. To this end we focus on the regularising Levenberg-Marquardt scheme. We show how to derive an explicit bound that gives information on the convergence reliability of the method depending on given data, and we show how to gain experimental evidence of numerical correctness of the iteration by making use of the Scherzer condition. The theoretical investigations that are at the heart of this paper are supplemented by some tests with real-world imagery.
summary: Photometric stereo refers to the process to compute the 3D shape of an object using information on illumination and reflectance from several input images from the same point of view. The most often used reflectance model is the Lambertian reflectance, however this does not include specular highlights in input images. In this paper we consider the arising non-linear optimisation problem when employing Blinn-Phong reflectance for modeling specular effects. To this end we focus on the regularising Levenberg-Marquardt scheme. We show how to derive an explicit bound that gives information on the convergence reliability of the method depending on given data, and we show how to gain experimental evidence of numerical correctness of the iteration by making use of the Scherzer condition. The theoretical investigations that are at the heart of this paper are supplemented by some tests with real-world imagery.
abstract_zh: 光度立体是指使用来自同一视角的多个输入图像的照明和反射率信息来计算物体 3D 形状的过程。最常用的反射率模型是朗伯反射率，但这不包括输入图像中的镜面高光。在本文中，我们考虑使用 Blinn-Phong 反射率来建模镜面效果时出现的非线性优化问题。为此，我们关注正则化 Levenberg-Marquardt 方案。我们展示了如何导出一个显式界限，该界限根据给定数据提供有关该方法收敛可靠性的信息，并且展示了如何通过利用 Scherzer 条件获得迭代数值正确性的实验证据。本文的核心理论研究是通过一些现实世界图像的测试来补充的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在Blinn-Phong反射模型下光度立体视觉的非线性优化问题，提出基于正则化Levenberg-Marquardt方法的收敛性分析与实验验证方案。
AI.motivation: 传统Lambertian模型无法处理镜面高光，而Blinn-Phong模型虽能建模但导致非线性优化问题，需研究数值方法的收敛可靠性以确保实际应用稳定性。
AI.method: 采用正则化Levenberg-Marquardt算法，推导收敛性显式界限，并通过Scherzer条件进行实验验证，结合理论分析与真实图像测试。
AI.result: 理论推导出收敛性判据，实验验证了方法在真实图像中的数值正确性，证明该方法能有效处理含镜面高光的光度立体视觉问题。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过理论分析与实验验证，为Blinn-Phong模型下的光度立体视觉提供了可靠数值方法，补充了现有研究在非线性优化领域的空白。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究了在Blinn-Phong反射模型下光度立体视觉的非线性优化问题，提出基于正则化Levenberg-Marquardt方法的收敛性分析与实验验证方案。
ai_content.motivation: 传统Lambertian模型无法处理镜面高光，而Blinn-Phong模型虽能建模但导致非线性优化问题，需研究数值方法的收敛可靠性以确保实际应用稳定性。
ai_content.method: 采用正则化Levenberg-Marquardt算法，推导收敛性显式界限，并通过Scherzer条件进行实验验证，结合理论分析与真实图像测试。
ai_content.result: 理论推导出收敛性判据，实验验证了方法在真实图像中的数值正确性，证明该方法能有效处理含镜面高光的光度立体视觉问题。
ai_content.conclusion: 本文通过理论分析与实验验证，为Blinn-Phong模型下的光度立体视觉提供了可靠数值方法，补充了现有研究在非线性优化领域的空白。

search_text: On the Regularising Levenberg-Marquardt Method for Blinn-Phong Photometric Stereo Blinn-Phong光度立体正则化Levenberg-Marquardt方法 Photometric stereo refers to the process to compute the 3D shape of an object using information on illumination and reflectance from several input images from the same point of view. The most often used reflectance model is the Lambertian reflectance, however this does not include specular highlights in input images. In this paper we consider the arising non-linear optimisation problem when employing Blinn-Phong reflectance for modeling specular effects. To this end we focus on the regularising Levenberg-Marquardt scheme. We show how to derive an explicit bound that gives information on the convergence reliability of the method depending on given data, and we show how to gain experimental evidence of numerical correctness of the iteration by making use of the Scherzer condition. The theoretical investigations that are at the heart of this paper are supplemented by some tests with real-world imagery. 光度立体是指使用来自同一视角的多个输入图像的照明和反射率信息来计算物体 3D 形状的过程。最常用的反射率模型是朗伯反射率，但这不包括输入图像中的镜面高光。在本文中，我们考虑使用 Blinn-Phong 反射率来建模镜面效果时出现的非线性优化问题。为此，我们关注正则化 Levenberg-Marquardt 方案。我们展示了如何导出一个显式界限，该界限根据给定数据提供有关该方法收敛可靠性的信息，并且展示了如何通过利用 Scherzer 条件获得迭代数值正确性的实验证据。本文的核心理论研究是通过一些现实世界图像的测试来补充的。 本文研究了在Blinn-Phong反射模型下光度立体视觉的非线性优化问题，提出基于正则化Levenberg-Marquardt方法的收敛性分析与实验验证方案。 Georg Radow,Michael Breuß cs.CV

authors_text: Yuzheng Wang,Zhaoyu Chen,Dingkang Yang,Yang Liu,Siao Liu,Wenqiang Zhang,Lizhe Qi
title: Adversarial Contrastive Distillation with Adaptive Denoising
title_zh: 具有自适应去噪的对抗性对比蒸馏
abstract: Adversarial Robustness Distillation (ARD) is a novel method to boost the robustness of small models. Unlike general adversarial training, its robust knowledge transfer can be less easily restricted by the model capacity. However, the teacher model that provides the robustness of knowledge does not always make correct predictions, interfering with the student's robust performances. Besides, in the previous ARD methods, the robustness comes entirely from one-to-one imitation, ignoring the relationship between examples. To this end, we propose a novel structured ARD method called Contrastive Relationship DeNoise Distillation (CRDND). We design an adaptive compensation module to model the instability of the teacher. Moreover, we utilize the contrastive relationship to explore implicit robustness knowledge among multiple examples. Experimental results on multiple attack benchmarks show CRDND can transfer robust knowledge efficiently and achieves state-of-the-art performances.
summary: Adversarial Robustness Distillation (ARD) is a novel method to boost the robustness of small models. Unlike general adversarial training, its robust knowledge transfer can be less easily restricted by the model capacity. However, the teacher model that provides the robustness of knowledge does not always make correct predictions, interfering with the student's robust performances. Besides, in the previous ARD methods, the robustness comes entirely from one-to-one imitation, ignoring the relationship between examples. To this end, we propose a novel structured ARD method called Contrastive Relationship DeNoise Distillation (CRDND). We design an adaptive compensation module to model the instability of the teacher. Moreover, we utilize the contrastive relationship to explore implicit robustness knowledge among multiple examples. Experimental results on multiple attack benchmarks show CRDND can transfer robust knowledge efficiently and achieves state-of-the-art performances.
abstract_zh: 对抗性鲁棒性蒸馏（ARD）是一种提高小模型鲁棒性的新方法。与一般的对抗训练不同，其强大的知识转移不太容易受到模型容量的限制。然而，提供知识稳健性的教师模型并不总是能够做出正确的预测，从而干扰了学生的稳健表现。此外，在之前的ARD方法中，鲁棒性完全来自于一对一的模仿，忽略了示例之间的关系。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的结构化 ARD 方法，称为对比关系降噪蒸馏 (CRDND)。我们设计了一个自适应补偿模块来模拟教师的不稳定性。此外，我们利用对比关系来探索多个示例之间隐含的鲁棒性知识。多个攻击基准的实验结果表明，CRNDD 可以有效地传输可靠的知识并实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的结构化对抗鲁棒性蒸馏方法CRDND，通过自适应补偿和对比关系提升小模型的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗鲁棒性蒸馏方法受限于教师模型预测误差和单样本模仿模式，无法有效挖掘多样本间的隐式鲁棒性知识。
AI.method: 设计自适应补偿模块建模教师模型不稳定性，结合对比学习挖掘多样本间的隐式鲁棒性关系进行知识蒸馏。
AI.result: 在多个攻击基准测试中高效传递鲁棒性知识，达到当前最优性能。
AI.conclusion: CRDND通过建模教师不稳定性和挖掘样本间对比关系，有效解决了传统ARD方法的局限性，显著提升小模型鲁棒性。

authors_text: Yangyuxuan Kang,Yuyang Liu,Anbang Yao,Shandong Wang,Enhua Wu
title: 3D Human Pose Lifting with Grid Convolution
title_zh: 使用网格卷积进行 3D 人体姿势提升
comment: Oral paper at AAAI 2023. Project website: https://github.com/OSVAI/GridConv
comments: Oral paper at AAAI 2023. Project website: https://github.com/OSVAI/GridConv
abstract: Existing lifting networks for regressing 3D human poses from 2D single-view poses are typically constructed with linear layers based on graph-structured representation learning. In sharp contrast to them, this paper presents Grid Convolution (GridConv), mimicking the wisdom of regular convolution operations in image space. GridConv is based on a novel Semantic Grid Transformation (SGT) which leverages a binary assignment matrix to map the irregular graph-structured human pose onto a regular weave-like grid pose representation joint by joint, enabling layer-wise feature learning with GridConv operations. We provide two ways to implement SGT, including handcrafted and learnable designs. Surprisingly, both designs turn out to achieve promising results and the learnable one is better, demonstrating the great potential of this new lifting representation learning formulation. To improve the ability of GridConv to encode contextual cues, we introduce an attention module over the convolutional kernel, making grid convolution operations input-dependent, spatial-aware and grid-specific. We show that our fully convolutional grid lifting network outperforms state-of-the-art methods with noticeable margins under (1) conventional evaluation on Human3.6M and (2) cross-evaluation on MPI-INF-3DHP. Code is available at https://github.com/OSVAI/GridConv
summary: Existing lifting networks for regressing 3D human poses from 2D single-view poses are typically constructed with linear layers based on graph-structured representation learning. In sharp contrast to them, this paper presents Grid Convolution (GridConv), mimicking the wisdom of regular convolution operations in image space. GridConv is based on a novel Semantic Grid Transformation (SGT) which leverages a binary assignment matrix to map the irregular graph-structured human pose onto a regular weave-like grid pose representation joint by joint, enabling layer-wise feature learning with GridConv operations. We provide two ways to implement SGT, including handcrafted and learnable designs. Surprisingly, both designs turn out to achieve promising results and the learnable one is better, demonstrating the great potential of this new lifting representation learning formulation. To improve the ability of GridConv to encode contextual cues, we introduce an attention module over the convolutional kernel, making grid convolution operations input-dependent, spatial-aware and grid-specific. We show that our fully convolutional grid lifting network outperforms state-of-the-art methods with noticeable margins under (1) conventional evaluation on Human3.6M and (2) cross-evaluation on MPI-INF-3DHP. Code is available at https://github.com/OSVAI/GridConv
abstract_zh: 现有的用于从 2D 单视图姿势回归 3D 人体姿势的提升网络通常是使用基于图结构表示学习的线性层构建的。与它们形成鲜明对比的是，本文提出了网格卷积（GridConv），模仿图像空间中常规卷积运算的智慧。 GridConv 基于一种新颖的语义网格变换 (SGT)，它利用二进制分配矩阵将不规则的图结构人体姿势逐个关节映射到规则的编织状网格姿势表示，从而能够通过 GridConv 操作进行分层特征学习。我们提供两种实现 SGT 的方法，包括手工设计和可学习设计。令人惊讶的是，这两种设计都取得了有希望的结果，并且可学习的设计更好，展示了这种新的提升表示学习公式的巨大潜力。为了提高 GridConv 编码上下文线索的能力，我们在卷积核上引入了注意力模块，使网格卷积操作依赖于输入、空间感知和特定于网格。我们表明，我们的全卷积网格提升网络在（1）Human3.6M 上的常规评估和（2）MPI-INF-3DHP 上的交叉评估下优于最先进的方法，并具有明显的优势。代码可在 https://github.com/OSVAI/GridConv 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于网格卷积的3D人体姿态提升方法，通过将不规则图结构映射到规则网格表示以改进现有线性层方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图结构的3D姿态回归方法存在表达能力局限，而图像空间的常规卷积操作在特征学习中表现优异，因此需探索新的网格化表示学习方案。
AI.method: 设计语义网格变换（SGT）将人体姿态映射至规则网格，结合可学习的二值分配矩阵实现两种SGT方案，并引入注意力模块增强卷积核的上下文感知能力。
AI.result: 在Human3.6M和MPI-INF-3DHP数据集上均显著优于现有SOTA方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 网格卷积为3D姿态提升提供了新的有效表示学习框架，可学习的SGT设计与注意力机制有效提升了模型性能。

To improve the ability of GridConv to encode contextual cues, we introduce an attention module over the convolutional kernel, making grid convolution operations input-dependent, spatial-aware and grid-specific. We show that our fully convolutional grid lifting network outperforms state-of-the-art methods with noticeable margins under (1) conventional evaluation on Human3.6M and (2) cross-evaluation on MPI-INF-3DHP. Code is available at https://github.com/OSVAI/GridConv 现有的用于从 2D 单视图姿势回归 3D 人体姿势的提升网络通常是使用基于图结构表示学习的线性层构建的。与它们形成鲜明对比的是，本文提出了网格卷积（GridConv），模仿图像空间中常规卷积运算的智慧。 GridConv 基于一种新颖的语义网格变换 (SGT)，它利用二进制分配矩阵将不规则的图结构人体姿势逐个关节映射到规则的编织状网格姿势表示，从而能够通过 GridConv 操作进行分层特征学习。我们提供两种实现 SGT 的方法，包括手工设计和可学习设计。令人惊讶的是，这两种设计都取得了有希望的结果，并且可学习的设计更好，展示了这种新的提升表示学习公式的巨大潜力。为了提高 GridConv 编码上下文线索的能力，我们在卷积核上引入了注意力模块，使网格卷积操作依赖于输入、空间感知和特定于网格。我们表明，我们的全卷积网格提升网络在（1）Human3.6M 上的常规评估和（2）MPI-INF-3DHP 上的交叉评估下优于最先进的方法，并具有明显的优势。代码可在 https://github.com/OSVAI/GridConv 获取 本文提出一种基于网格卷积的3D人体姿态提升方法，通过将不规则图结构映射到规则网格表示以改进现有线性层方法。 Yangyuxuan Kang,Yuyang Liu,Anbang Yao,Shandong Wang,Enhua Wu cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Value Engineering for Autonomous Agents
title_zh: 自主代理的价值工程
abstract: Machine Ethics (ME) is concerned with the design of Artificial Moral Agents (AMAs), i.e. autonomous agents capable of reasoning and behaving according to moral values. Previous approaches have treated values as labels associated with some actions or states of the world, rather than as integral components of agent reasoning. It is also common to disregard that a value-guided agent operates alongside other value-guided agents in an environment governed by norms, thus omitting the social dimension of AMAs. In this blue sky paper, we propose a new AMA paradigm grounded in moral and social psychology, where values are instilled into agents as context-dependent goals. These goals intricately connect values at individual levels to norms at a collective level by evaluating the outcomes most incentivized by the norms in place. We argue that this type of normative reasoning, where agents are endowed with an understanding of norms' moral implications, leads to value-awareness in autonomous agents. Additionally, this capability paves the way for agents to align the norms enforced in their societies with respect to the human values instilled in them, by complementing the value-based reasoning on norms with agreement mechanisms to help agents collectively agree on the best set of norms that suit their human values. Overall, our agent model goes beyond the treatment of values as inert labels by connecting them to normative reasoning and to the social functionalities needed to integrate value-aware agents into our modern hybrid human-computer societies.

We argue that this type of normative reasoning, where agents are endowed with an understanding of norms' moral implications, leads to value-awareness in autonomous agents. Overall, our agent model goes beyond the treatment of values as inert labels by connecting them to normative reasoning and to the social functionalities needed to integrate value-aware agents into our modern hybrid human-computer societies.
abstract_zh: 机器伦理 (ME) 涉及人工道德主体 (AMA) 的设计，即能够根据道德价值观进行推理和行为的自主主体。以前的方法将值视为与世界的某些行为或状态相关的标签，而不是代理推理的组成部分。人们普遍忽视了价值导向主体与其他价值导向主体在规范管理的环境中一起运作，从而忽略了 AMA 的社会维度。在这篇蓝天论文中，我们提出了一种基于道德和社会心理学的新 AMA 范式，其中价值观作为依赖于上下文的目标被灌输给代理。这些目标通过评估现有规范最能激励的结果，将个人层面的价值观与集体层面的规范错综复杂地联系起来。我们认为，这种类型的规范推理，即代理人被赋予对规范道德含义的理解，会导致自主代理人的价值意识。此外，这种能力为主体根据灌输的人类价值观调整社会中执行的规范铺平了道路，通过协议机制补充基于价值的规范推理，帮助主体集体就适合其人类价值观的最佳规范达成一致。总体而言，我们的代理模型超越了将价值视为惰性标签的处理，而是将它们与规范推理以及将价值意识代理集成到现代混合人机社会所需的社会功能联系起来。

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的自主代理范式，将价值观融入规范推理和社会功能中，以实现价值感知的自主代理。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将价值观视为静态标签，忽略了代理在规范环境中与其他价值导向代理互动的社会维度。
AI.method: 通过将价值观作为情境依赖目标植入代理，结合规范推理与共识机制，实现个体价值与集体规范的动态关联。
AI.result: 使代理具备价值感知能力，并通过共识机制实现社会规范与人类价值观的对齐。
AI.conclusion: 该模型通过将价值观与规范推理及社会功能结合，超越了传统标签化处理，为构建价值感知的混合人机社会提供了新范式。

title: MDPose: Real-Time Multi-Person Pose Estimation via Mixture Density Model
title_zh: MDPose：通过混合密度模型进行实时多人姿势估计
abstract: One of the major challenges in multi-person pose estimation is instance-aware keypoint estimation. Previous methods address this problem by leveraging an off-the-shelf detector, heuristic post-grouping process or explicit instance identification process, hindering further improvements in the inference speed which is an important factor for practical applications. From the statistical point of view, those additional processes for identifying instances are necessary to bypass learning the high-dimensional joint distribution of human keypoints, which is a critical factor for another major challenge, the occlusion scenario. In this work, we propose a novel framework of single-stage instance-aware pose estimation by modeling the joint distribution of human keypoints with a mixture density model, termed as MDPose. Our MDPose estimates the distribution of human keypoints' coordinates using a mixture density model with an instance-aware keypoint head consisting simply of 8 convolutional layers. It is trained by minimizing the negative log-likelihood of the ground truth keypoints. Also, we propose a simple yet effective training strategy, Random Keypoint Grouping (RKG), which significantly alleviates the underflow problem leading to successful learning of relations between keypoints. On OCHuman dataset, which consists of images with highly occluded people, our MDPose achieves state-of-the-art performance by successfully learning the high-dimensional joint distribution of human keypoints. Furthermore, our MDPose shows significant improvement in inference speed with a competitive accuracy on MS COCO, a widely-used human keypoint dataset, thanks to the proposed much simpler single-stage pipeline.
summary: One of the major challenges in multi-person pose estimation is instance-aware keypoint estimation. Previous methods address this problem by leveraging an off-the-shelf detector, heuristic post-grouping process or explicit instance identification process, hindering further improvements in the inference speed which is an important factor for practical applications. From the statistical point of view, those additional processes for identifying instances are necessary to bypass learning the high-dimensional joint distribution of human keypoints, which is a critical factor for another major challenge, the occlusion scenario. In this work, we propose a novel framework of single-stage instance-aware pose estimation by modeling the joint distribution of human keypoints with a mixture density model, termed as MDPose. Our MDPose estimates the distribution of human keypoints' coordinates using a mixture density model with an instance-aware keypoint head consisting simply of 8 convolutional layers. It is trained by minimizing the negative log-likelihood of the ground truth keypoints. Also, we propose a simple yet effective training strategy, Random Keypoint Grouping (RKG), which significantly alleviates the underflow problem leading to successful learning of relations between keypoints. On OCHuman dataset, which consists of images with highly occluded people, our MDPose achieves state-of-the-art performance by successfully learning the high-dimensional joint distribution of human keypoints. Furthermore, our MDPose shows significant improvement in inference speed with a competitive accuracy on MS COCO, a widely-used human keypoint dataset, thanks to the proposed much simpler single-stage pipeline.
abstract_zh: 多人姿态估计的主要挑战之一是实例感知关键点估计。以前的方法通过利用现成的检测器、启发式后分组过程或显式实例识别过程来解决这个问题，阻碍了推理速度的进一步提高，而推理速度是实际应用的一个重要因素。从统计的角度来看，这些用于识别实例的额外过程对于绕过学习人类关键点的高维联合分布是必要的，这是另一个主要挑战（遮挡场景）的关键因素。在这项工作中，我们通过使用混合密度模型（称为 MDPose）对人体关键点的联合分布进行建模，提出了一种单阶段实例感知姿势估计的新框架。我们的 MDpose 使用混合密度模型来估计人类关键点坐标的分布，该模型具有实例感知关键点头，仅由 8 个卷积层组成。它是通过最小化地面实况关键点的负对数似然来训练的。此外，我们提出了一种简单而有效的训练策略，即随机关键点分组（RKG），它可以显着缓解下溢问题，从而成功学习关键点之间的关系。在由高度遮挡人物图像组成的 OCHuman 数据集上，我们的 MDPose 通过成功学习人类关键点的高维联合分布，实现了最先进的性能。此外，由于提出了更简单的单级管道，我们的 MDPos 在 MS COCO（一种广泛使用的人类关键点数据集）上显示出推理速度的显着提高和具有竞争力的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MDPose，一种通过混合密度模型实现实时多人姿态估计的单阶段框架，解决实例感知关键点估计的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖额外检测器或后处理步骤，导致推理速度受限且难以处理遮挡场景。直接建模高维关键点联合分布是解决实例感知和遮挡问题的关键。
AI.method: 设计包含8层卷积的实例感知关键点头，利用混合密度模型估计关键点坐标分布，采用负对数似然损失训练，并提出随机关键点分组策略（RKG）缓解下溢问题。
AI.result: 在OCHuman数据集上达到SOTA性能，在MS COCO数据集上实现具有竞争力的精度和显著加速的推理速度。
AI.conclusion: MDPose通过单阶段管道直接建模联合分布，简化流程并提升速度，为实时多人姿态估计提供有效解决方案。

Furthermore, our MDPose shows significant improvement in inference speed with a competitive accuracy on MS COCO, a widely-used human keypoint dataset, thanks to the proposed much simpler single-stage pipeline. 多人姿态估计的主要挑战之一是实例感知关键点估计。以前的方法通过利用现成的检测器、启发式后分组过程或显式实例识别过程来解决这个问题，阻碍了推理速度的进一步提高，而推理速度是实际应用的一个重要因素。从统计的角度来看，这些用于识别实例的额外过程对于绕过学习人类关键点的高维联合分布是必要的，这是另一个主要挑战（遮挡场景）的关键因素。在这项工作中，我们通过使用混合密度模型（称为 MDPose）对人体关键点的联合分布进行建模，提出了一种单阶段实例感知姿势估计的新框架。我们的 MDpose 使用混合密度模型来估计人类关键点坐标的分布，该模型具有实例感知关键点头，仅由 8 个卷积层组成。它是通过最小化地面实况关键点的负对数似然来训练的。此外，我们提出了一种简单而有效的训练策略，即随机关键点分组（RKG），它可以显着缓解下溢问题，从而成功学习关键点之间的关系。在由高度遮挡人物图像组成的 OCHuman 数据集上，我们的 MDPose 通过成功学习人类关键点的高维联合分布，实现了最先进的性能。此外，由于提出了更简单的单级管道，我们的 MDPos 在 MS COCO（一种广泛使用的人类关键点数据集）上显示出推理速度的显着提高和具有竞争力的准确性。 本文提出MDPose，一种通过混合密度模型实现实时多人姿态估计的单阶段框架，解决实例感知关键点估计的挑战。 Seunghyeon Seo,Jaeyoung Yoo,Jihye Hwang,Nojun Kwak cs.CV

title: Utilization of domain knowledge to improve POMDP belief estimation
title_zh: 利用领域知识改进 POMDP 置信度估计
abstract: The partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP) framework is a common approach for decision making under uncertainty. Recently, multiple studies have shown that by integrating relevant domain knowledge into POMDP belief estimation, we can improve the learned policy's performance. In this study, we propose a novel method for integrating the domain knowledge into probabilistic belief update in POMDP framework using Jeffrey's rule and normalization. We show that the domain knowledge can be utilized to reduce the data requirement and improve performance for POMDP policy learning with RL.
summary: The partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP) framework is a common approach for decision making under uncertainty. Recently, multiple studies have shown that by integrating relevant domain knowledge into POMDP belief estimation, we can improve the learned policy's performance. In this study, we propose a novel method for integrating the domain knowledge into probabilistic belief update in POMDP framework using Jeffrey's rule and normalization. We show that the domain knowledge can be utilized to reduce the data requirement and improve performance for POMDP policy learning with RL.
abstract_zh: 部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）框架是不确定性下决策的常用方法。最近，多项研究表明，通过将相关领域知识集成到 POMDP 信念估计中，我们可以提高学习策略的性能。在本研究中，我们提出了一种使用 Jeffrey 规则和归一化将领域知识集成到 POMDP 框架中的概率信念更新的新方法。我们表明，可以利用领域知识来减少数据需求并提高通过 RL 进行 POMDP 策略学习的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Jeffrey规则和归一化的方法，将领域知识整合到POMDP的信念估计中以提升策略性能。
AI.motivation: 现有POMDP方法在数据需求和策略性能上存在局限，而领域知识的引入可有效优化信念估计过程。
AI.method: 通过Jeffrey规则结合领域知识约束概率分布，并利用归一化实现信念更新。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法能减少数据需求，提升强化学习在POMDP框架下的策略性能。
AI.conclusion: 领域知识驱动的信念更新方法为数据受限场景下的POMDP决策提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Dahuin Jung,Dongjin Lee,Sunwon Hong,Hyemi Jang,Ho Bae,Sungroh Yoon
title: New Insights for the Stability-Plasticity Dilemma in Online Continual Learning
title_zh: 在线持续学习中稳定性-塑性困境的新见解
abstract: The aim of continual learning is to learn new tasks continuously (i.e., plasticity) without forgetting previously learned knowledge from old tasks (i.e., stability). In the scenario of online continual learning, wherein data comes strictly in a streaming manner, the plasticity of online continual learning is more vulnerable than offline continual learning because the training signal that can be obtained from a single data point is limited. To overcome the stability-plasticity dilemma in online continual learning, we propose an online continual learning framework named multi-scale feature adaptation network (MuFAN) that utilizes a richer context encoding extracted from different levels of a pre-trained network. Additionally, we introduce a novel structure-wise distillation loss and replace the commonly used batch normalization layer with a newly proposed stability-plasticity normalization module to train MuFAN that simultaneously maintains high plasticity and stability. MuFAN outperforms other state-of-the-art continual learning methods on the SVHN, CIFAR100, miniImageNet, and CORe50 datasets. Extensive experiments and ablation studies validate the significance and scalability of each proposed component: 1) multi-scale feature maps from a pre-trained encoder, 2) the structure-wise distillation loss, and 3) the stability-plasticity normalization module in MuFAN. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/whitesnowdrop/MuFAN.
summary: The aim of continual learning is to learn new tasks continuously (i.e., plasticity) without forgetting previously learned knowledge from old tasks (i.e., stability). In the scenario of online continual learning, wherein data comes strictly in a streaming manner, the plasticity of online continual learning is more vulnerable than offline continual learning because the training signal that can be obtained from a single data point is limited. To overcome the stability-plasticity dilemma in online continual learning, we propose an online continual learning framework named multi-scale feature adaptation network (MuFAN) that utilizes a richer context encoding extracted from different levels of a pre-trained network. Additionally, we introduce a novel structure-wise distillation loss and replace the commonly used batch normalization layer with a newly proposed stability-plasticity normalization module to train MuFAN that simultaneously maintains high plasticity and stability. MuFAN outperforms other state-of-the-art continual learning methods on the SVHN, CIFAR100, miniImageNet, and CORe50 datasets. Extensive experiments and ablation studies validate the significance and scalability of each proposed component: 1) multi-scale feature maps from a pre-trained encoder, 2) the structure-wise distillation loss, and 3) the stability-plasticity normalization module in MuFAN. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/whitesnowdrop/MuFAN.
abstract_zh: 持续学习的目的是不断学习新任务（即可塑性），而不忘记以前从旧任务中学到的知识（即稳定性）。在在线持续学习的场景中，数据严格以流的方式到来，在线持续学习的可塑性比离线持续学习更脆弱，因为从单个数据点可以获得的训练信号是有限的。为了克服在线持续学习中的稳定性-可塑性困境，我们提出了一种名为多尺度特征适应网络（MuFAN）的在线持续学习框架，该框架利用从预训练网络的不同级别提取的更丰富的上下文编码。此外，我们引入了一种新颖的结构式蒸馏损失，并用新提出的稳定性-可塑性归一化模块取代了常用的批量归一化层，以训练同时保持高可塑性和稳定性的 MuFAN。 MuFAN 在 SVHN、CIFAR100、miniImageNet 和 CORe50 数据集上优于其他最先进的持续学习方法。大量的实验和消融研究验证了每个提出的组件的重要性和可扩展性：1）来自预训练编码器的多尺度特征图，2）结构方面的蒸馏损失，3）MuFAN 中的稳定性-可塑性归一化模块。代码可在 https://github.com/whitesnowdrop/MuFAN 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种在线持续学习框架MuFAN，以解决稳定性与可塑性之间的矛盾。
AI.motivation: 在线持续学习中数据流式到达，单个数据点的训练信号有限，导致模型可塑性不足且易遗忘旧知识。
AI.method: 设计多尺度特征自适应网络（MuFAN），结合预训练网络多层级特征，引入结构蒸馏损失与稳定性-可塑性归一化模块。
AI.result: 在SVHN、CIFAR100等数据集上优于现有方法，消融实验证明各组件有效性。
AI.conclusion: MuFAN通过多尺度特征融合与新型归一化机制，有效平衡了在线持续学习的稳定性与可塑性。

authors_text: Longlong Lin,Pingpeng Yuan,Rong-Hua Li,Chunxue Zhu,Hongchao Qin,Hai Jin,Tao Jia
title: Query-Centered Temporal Community Search via Time-Constrained Personalized PageRank
title_zh: 通过时间受限的个性化 PageRank 以查询为中心的时态社区搜索
abstract: Existing temporal community search suffers from two defects: (i) they ignore the temporal proximity between the query vertex $q$ and other vertices but simply require the result to include $q$. Thus, they find many temporal irrelevant vertices (these vertices are called \emph{query-drifted vertices}) to $q$ for satisfying their cohesiveness, resulting in $q$ being marginalized; (ii) their methods are NP-hard, incurring high costs for exact solutions or compromised qualities for approximate/heuristic algorithms. Inspired by these, we propose a novel problem named \emph{query-centered} temporal community search to circumvent \emph{query-drifted vertices}. Specifically, we first present a novel concept of Time-Constrained Personalized PageRank to characterize the temporal proximity between $q$ and other vertices. Then, we introduce a model called $β$-temporal proximity core, which can combine temporal proximity and structural cohesiveness. Subsequently, our problem is formulated as an optimization task that finds a $β$-temporal proximity core with the largest $β$. To solve our problem, we first devise an exact and near-linear time greedy removing algorithm that iteratively removes unpromising vertices. To improve efficiency, we then design an approximate two-stage local search algorithm with bound-based pruning techniques. Finally, extensive experiments on eight real-life datasets and nine competitors show the superiority of the proposed solutions.
summary: Existing temporal community search suffers from two defects: (i) they ignore the temporal proximity between the query vertex $q$ and other vertices but simply require the result to include $q$. Thus, they find many temporal irrelevant vertices (these vertices are called \emph{query-drifted vertices}) to $q$ for satisfying their cohesiveness, resulting in $q$ being marginalized; (ii) their methods are NP-hard, incurring high costs for exact solutions or compromised qualities for approximate/heuristic algorithms. Inspired by these, we propose a novel problem named \emph{query-centered} temporal community search to circumvent \emph{query-drifted vertices}. Specifically, we first present a novel concept of Time-Constrained Personalized PageRank to characterize the temporal proximity between $q$ and other vertices. Then, we introduce a model called $β$-temporal proximity core, which can combine temporal proximity and structural cohesiveness. Subsequently, our problem is formulated as an optimization task that finds a $β$-temporal proximity core with the largest $β$. To solve our problem, we first devise an exact and near-linear time greedy removing algorithm that iteratively removes unpromising vertices. To improve efficiency, we then design an approximate two-stage local search algorithm with bound-based pruning techniques. Finally, extensive experiments on eight real-life datasets and nine competitors show the superiority of the proposed solutions.
abstract_zh: 现有的时态社区搜索存在两个缺陷：（i）它们忽略了查询顶点 $q$ 与其他顶点之间的时间邻近性，而只要求结果包含 $q$。因此，他们找到了许多与$q$时间无关的顶点（这些顶点被称为\emph{查询漂移顶点}）来满足它们的内聚性，导致$q$被边缘化； (ii) 他们的方法是 NP 难的，导致精确解的成本很高，或者近似/启发式算法的质量受到影响。受这些启发，我们提出了一个名为 \emph{以查询为中心} 的时间社区搜索的新问题，以规避 \emph{查询漂移的顶点}。具体来说，我们首先提出了时间受限个性化 PageRank 的新概念来表征 $q$ 与其他顶点之间的时间接近度。然后，我们引入了一种称为$β$-时间邻近核心的模型，它可以结合时间邻近性和结构内聚性。随后，我们的问题被表述为一个优化任务，找到一个具有最大 $β$ 的 $β$-时间邻近核心。为了解决我们的问题，我们首先设计一种精确且接近线性的时间贪婪删除算法，该算法迭代地删除无希望的顶点。为了提高效率，我们设计了一种具有基于边界的剪枝技术的近似两阶段局部搜索算法。最后，对八个现实数据集和九个竞争对手进行的广泛实验表明了所提出的解决方案的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时间约束的个性化PageRank的查询中心化时态社区搜索方法，以解决现有方法忽略时间邻近性及计算复杂度高的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有时态社区搜索方法存在两个缺陷：忽略查询顶点与其他顶点的时间邻近性导致查询漂移顶点被纳入结果，且方法复杂度高导致精确求解成本高或近似算法质量差。
AI.method: 提出时间约束个性化PageRank刻画时间邻近性，构建β-时态接近度核心模型融合时间邻近性与结构紧密性，并设计精确贪心移除算法与近似两阶段局部搜索算法。
AI.result: 在八个真实数据集上的实验表明，所提方法在九个竞争算法中表现最优，有效避免查询漂移顶点并提升计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过引入时间约束模型与高效算法，成功解决了查询中心化时态社区搜索中的时间相关性缺失与计算复杂度问题。

search_text: Query-Centered Temporal Community Search via Time-Constrained Personalized PageRank 通过时间受限的个性化 PageRank 以查询为中心的时态社区搜索 Existing temporal community search suffers from two defects: (i) they ignore the temporal proximity between the query vertex $q$ and other vertices but simply require the result to include $q$. Thus, they find many temporal irrelevant vertices (these vertices are called \emph{query-drifted vertices}) to $q$ for satisfying their cohesiveness, resulting in $q$ being marginalized; (ii) their methods are NP-hard, incurring high costs for exact solutions or compromised qualities for approximate/heuristic algorithms. Inspired by these, we propose a novel problem named \emph{query-centered} temporal community search to circumvent \emph{query-drifted vertices}. Specifically, we first present a novel concept of Time-Constrained Personalized PageRank to characterize the temporal proximity between $q$ and other vertices. Then, we introduce a model called $β$-temporal proximity core, which can combine temporal proximity and structural cohesiveness. Subsequently, our problem is formulated as an optimization task that finds a $β$-temporal proximity core with the largest $β$. To solve our problem, we first devise an exact and near-linear time greedy removing algorithm that iteratively removes unpromising vertices. To improve efficiency, we then design an approximate two-stage local search algorithm with bound-based pruning techniques. Finally, extensive experiments on eight real-life datasets and nine competitors show the superiority of the proposed solutions. 现有的时态社区搜索存在两个缺陷：（i）它们忽略了查询顶点 $q$ 与其他顶点之间的时间邻近性，而只要求结果包含 $q$。因此，他们找到了许多与$q$时间无关的顶点（这些顶点被称为\emph{查询漂移顶点}）来满足它们的内聚性，导致$q$被边缘化； (ii) 他们的方法是 NP 难的，导致精确解的成本很高，或者近似/启发式算法的质量受到影响。受这些启发，我们提出了一个名为 \emph{以查询为中心} 的时间社区搜索的新问题，以规避 \emph{查询漂移的顶点}。具体来说，我们首先提出了时间受限个性化 PageRank 的新概念来表征 $q$ 与其他顶点之间的时间接近度。然后，我们引入了一种称为$β$-时间邻近核心的模型，它可以结合时间邻近性和结构内聚性。随后，我们的问题被表述为一个优化任务，找到一个具有最大 $β$ 的 $β$-时间邻近核心。为了解决我们的问题，我们首先设计一种精确且接近线性的时间贪婪删除算法，该算法迭代地删除无希望的顶点。为了提高效率，我们设计了一种具有基于边界的剪枝技术的近似两阶段局部搜索算法。最后，对八个现实数据集和九个竞争对手进行的广泛实验表明了所提出的解决方案的优越性。 本文提出了一种基于时间约束的个性化PageRank的查询中心化时态社区搜索方法，以解决现有方法忽略时间邻近性及计算复杂度高的问题。 Longlong Lin,Pingpeng Yuan,Rong-Hua Li,Chunxue Zhu,Hongchao Qin,Hai Jin,Tao Jia cs.DS

title: Exploiting Unlabeled Data for Feedback Efficient Human Preference based Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 利用未标记数据进行基于反馈的高效人类偏好强化学习
abstract: Preference Based Reinforcement Learning has shown much promise for utilizing human binary feedback on queried trajectory pairs to recover the underlying reward model of the Human in the Loop (HiL). While works have attempted to better utilize the queries made to the human, in this work we make two observations about the unlabeled trajectories collected by the agent and propose two corresponding loss functions that ensure participation of unlabeled trajectories in the reward learning process, and structure the embedding space of the reward model such that it reflects the structure of state space with respect to action distances. We validate the proposed method on one locomotion domain and one robotic manipulation task and compare with the state-of-the-art baseline PEBBLE. We further present an ablation of the proposed loss components across both the domains and find that not only each of the loss components perform better than the baseline, but the synergic combination of the two has much better reward recovery and human feedback sample efficiency.
summary: Preference Based Reinforcement Learning has shown much promise for utilizing human binary feedback on queried trajectory pairs to recover the underlying reward model of the Human in the Loop (HiL). While works have attempted to better utilize the queries made to the human, in this work we make two observations about the unlabeled trajectories collected by the agent and propose two corresponding loss functions that ensure participation of unlabeled trajectories in the reward learning process, and structure the embedding space of the reward model such that it reflects the structure of state space with respect to action distances. We validate the proposed method on one locomotion domain and one robotic manipulation task and compare with the state-of-the-art baseline PEBBLE. We further present an ablation of the proposed loss components across both the domains and find that not only each of the loss components perform better than the baseline, but the synergic combination of the two has much better reward recovery and human feedback sample efficiency.
abstract_zh: 基于偏好的强化学习在利用查询轨迹对上的人类二进制反馈来恢复人类循环 (HiL) 的底层奖励模型方面表现出了很大的前景。虽然一些工作试图更好地利用对人类的查询，但在这项工作中，我们对代理收集的未标记轨迹进行了两次观察，并提出了两个相应的损失函数，以确保未标记轨迹参与奖励学习过程，并构建奖励模​​型的嵌入空间，使其反映相对于动作距离的状态空间结构。我们在一个运动域和一项机器人操作任务上验证了所提出的方法，并与最先进的基线 PEBBLE 进行比较。我们进一步对两个领域中所提出的损失成分进行了消融，发现不仅每个损失成分的表现都比基线更好，而且两者的协同组合具有更好的奖励恢复和人类反馈样本效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用未标记轨迹数据提升基于人类偏好的强化学习效率，通过设计损失函数使未标记数据参与奖励模型学习。
AI.motivation: 现有方法过度依赖人类反馈查询，未充分利用代理收集的未标记轨迹数据，而这些数据可能蕴含状态空间结构信息。
AI.method: 设计两种损失函数：1) 强制未标记轨迹参与奖励模型训练；2) 结构化嵌入空间以反映状态空间与动作距离的关系。
AI.result: 在运动控制与机器人操作任务中，新方法在奖励恢复精度和样本效率上均优于PEBBLE基线，且两种损失函数协同效果更优。
AI.conclusion: 未标记数据的有效利用可显著提升偏好强化学习效率，为人类在环系统提供更高效的奖励模型学习框架。

title: Probabilistic Qualitative Localization and Mapping
title_zh: 概率定性定位和绘图
abstract: Simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) are essential in numerous robotics applications, such as autonomous navigation. Traditional SLAM approaches infer the metric state of the robot along with a metric map of the environment. While existing algorithms exhibit good results, they are still sensitive to measurement noise, sensor quality, and data association and are still computationally expensive. Alternatively, some navigation and mapping missions can be achieved using only qualitative geometric information, an approach known as qualitative spatial reasoning (QSR). We contribute a novel probabilistic qualitative localization and mapping approach in this work. We infer both the qualitative map and the qualitative state of the camera poses (localization). For the first time, we also incorporate qualitative probabilistic constraints between camera poses (motion model), improving computation time and performance. Furthermore, we take advantage of qualitative inference properties to achieve very fast approximated algorithms with good performance. In addition, we show how to propagate probabilistic information between nodes in the qualitative map, which improves estimation performance and enables inference of unseen map nodes - an important building block for qualitative active planning. We also conduct a study that shows how well we can estimate unseen nodes. Our method particularly appeals to scenarios with few salient landmarks and low-quality sensors. We evaluate our approach in simulation and on a real-world dataset and show its superior performance and low complexity compared to the state-of-the-art. Our analysis also indicates good prospects for using qualitative navigation and planning in real-world scenarios.
summary: Simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) are essential in numerous robotics applications, such as autonomous navigation. Traditional SLAM approaches infer the metric state of the robot along with a metric map of the environment. While existing algorithms exhibit good results, they are still sensitive to measurement noise, sensor quality, and data association and are still computationally expensive. Alternatively, some navigation and mapping missions can be achieved using only qualitative geometric information, an approach known as qualitative spatial reasoning (QSR). We contribute a novel probabilistic qualitative localization and mapping approach in this work. We infer both the qualitative map and the qualitative state of the camera poses (localization). For the first time, we also incorporate qualitative probabilistic constraints between camera poses (motion model), improving computation time and performance. Furthermore, we take advantage of qualitative inference properties to achieve very fast approximated algorithms with good performance. In addition, we show how to propagate probabilistic information between nodes in the qualitative map, which improves estimation performance and enables inference of unseen map nodes - an important building block for qualitative active planning. We also conduct a study that shows how well we can estimate unseen nodes. Our method particularly appeals to scenarios with few salient landmarks and low-quality sensors. We evaluate our approach in simulation and on a real-world dataset and show its superior performance and low complexity compared to the state-of-the-art. Our analysis also indicates good prospects for using qualitative navigation and planning in real-world scenarios.
abstract_zh: 同步定位和建图 (SLAM) 在许多机器人应用中至关重要，例如自主导航。传统的 SLAM 方法会推断机器人的度量状态以及环境的度量地图。虽然现有算法表现出良好的结果，但它们仍然对测量噪声、传感器质量和数据关联敏感，并且计算成本仍然很高。或者，一些导航和测绘任务可以仅使用定性几何信息来实现，这种方法称为定性空间推理（QSR）。我们在这项工作中贡献了一种新颖的概率定性定位和映射方法。我们推断相机姿势的定性地图和定性状态（定位）。我们还首次纳入了相机姿势（运动模型）之间的定性概率约束，从而提高了计算时间和性能。此外，我们利用定性推理特性来实现具有良好性能的非常快速的近似算法。此外，我们还展示了如何在定性地图中的节点之间传播概率信息，这提高了估计性能并能够推断未见过的地图节点——这是定性主动规划的重要构建块。我们还进行了一项研究，展示了我们如何能够很好地估计看不见的节点。我们的方法特别适合具有很少显着地标和低质量传感器的场景。我们在模拟和现实数据集上评估了我们的方法，并展示了与最先进的技术相比，其卓越的性能和较低的复杂性。我们的分析还表明在现实场景中使用定性导航和规划具有良好的前景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于概率质性推理的新型定位与地图构建方法，解决传统SLAM在噪声敏感性和计算复杂度方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统SLAM方法依赖精确度量信息，易受噪声和传感器质量影响且计算量大，而质性空间推理(QSR)可通过几何关系实现更鲁棒的导航，尤其适用于地标稀疏和传感器质量差的场景。
AI.method: 融合质性地图推断与相机位姿的概率质性状态估计，引入质性运动模型约束，利用质性推理特性设计高效算法，并通过概率传播机制实现未见节点的估计。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实数据集测试中，该方法在保持高性能的同时显著降低计算复杂度，并有效估计未见地图节点，优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为低质量传感器和稀疏环境下的机器人导航提供了可行方案，质性推理在主动规划等场景具有重要应用潜力。

search_text: Probabilistic Qualitative Localization and Mapping 概率定性定位和绘图 Simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) are essential in numerous robotics applications, such as autonomous navigation. Traditional SLAM approaches infer the metric state of the robot along with a metric map of the environment. While existing algorithms exhibit good results, they are still sensitive to measurement noise, sensor quality, and data association and are still computationally expensive. Alternatively, some navigation and mapping missions can be achieved using only qualitative geometric information, an approach known as qualitative spatial reasoning (QSR). We contribute a novel probabilistic qualitative localization and mapping approach in this work. We infer both the qualitative map and the qualitative state of the camera poses (localization). For the first time, we also incorporate qualitative probabilistic constraints between camera poses (motion model), improving computation time and performance. Furthermore, we take advantage of qualitative inference properties to achieve very fast approximated algorithms with good performance. In addition, we show how to propagate probabilistic information between nodes in the qualitative map, which improves estimation performance and enables inference of unseen map nodes - an important building block for qualitative active planning. We also conduct a study that shows how well we can estimate unseen nodes. Our method particularly appeals to scenarios with few salient landmarks and low-quality sensors. We evaluate our approach in simulation and on a real-world dataset and show its superior performance and low complexity compared to the state-of-the-art. Our analysis also indicates good prospects for using qualitative navigation and planning in real-world scenarios. 同步定位和建图 (SLAM) 在许多机器人应用中至关重要，例如自主导航。传统的 SLAM 方法会推断机器人的度量状态以及环境的度量地图。虽然现有算法表现出良好的结果，但它们仍然对测量噪声、传感器质量和数据关联敏感，并且计算成本仍然很高。或者，一些导航和测绘任务可以仅使用定性几何信息来实现，这种方法称为定性空间推理（QSR）。我们在这项工作中贡献了一种新颖的概率定性定位和映射方法。我们推断相机姿势的定性地图和定性状态（定位）。我们还首次纳入了相机姿势（运动模型）之间的定性概率约束，从而提高了计算时间和性能。此外，我们利用定性推理特性来实现具有良好性能的非常快速的近似算法。此外，我们还展示了如何在定性地图中的节点之间传播概率信息，这提高了估计性能并能够推断未见过的地图节点——这是定性主动规划的重要构建块。我们还进行了一项研究，展示了我们如何能够很好地估计看不见的节点。我们的方法特别适合具有很少显着地标和低质量传感器的场景。我们在模拟和现实数据集上评估了我们的方法，并展示了与最先进的技术相比，其卓越的性能和较低的复杂性。我们的分析还表明在现实场景中使用定性导航和规划具有良好的前景。 本文提出一种基于概率质性推理的新型定位与地图构建方法，解决传统SLAM在噪声敏感性和计算复杂度方面的不足。 Roee Mor,Vadim Indelman cs.RO

title: A State Augmentation based approach to Reinforcement Learning from Human Preferences
title_zh: 基于状态增强的人类偏好强化学习方法
abstract: Reinforcement Learning has suffered from poor reward specification, and issues for reward hacking even in simple enough domains. Preference Based Reinforcement Learning attempts to solve the issue by utilizing binary feedbacks on queried trajectory pairs by a human in the loop indicating their preferences about the agent's behavior to learn a reward model. In this work, we present a state augmentation technique that allows the agent's reward model to be robust and follow an invariance consistency that significantly improved performance, i.e. the reward recovery and subsequent return computed using the learned policy over our baseline PEBBLE. We validate our method on three domains, Mountain Car, a locomotion task of Quadruped-Walk, and a robotic manipulation task of Sweep-Into, and find that using the proposed augmentation the agent not only benefits in the overall performance but does so, quite early in the agent's training phase.
summary: Reinforcement Learning has suffered from poor reward specification, and issues for reward hacking even in simple enough domains. Preference Based Reinforcement Learning attempts to solve the issue by utilizing binary feedbacks on queried trajectory pairs by a human in the loop indicating their preferences about the agent's behavior to learn a reward model. In this work, we present a state augmentation technique that allows the agent's reward model to be robust and follow an invariance consistency that significantly improved performance, i.e. the reward recovery and subsequent return computed using the learned policy over our baseline PEBBLE. We validate our method on three domains, Mountain Car, a locomotion task of Quadruped-Walk, and a robotic manipulation task of Sweep-Into, and find that using the proposed augmentation the agent not only benefits in the overall performance but does so, quite early in the agent's training phase.
abstract_zh: 强化学习一直受到奖励规范不佳的困扰，即使在足够简单的领域也存在奖励黑客攻击的问题。基于偏好的强化学习试图通过利用循环中的人对查询轨迹对的二进制反馈来解决该问题，表明他们对代理行为的偏好，以学习奖励模型。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种状态增强技术，使代理的奖励模型变得稳健，并遵循不变性一致性，从而显着提高了性能，即使用学习策略在我们的基线 PEBBLE 上计算的奖励恢复和后续回报。我们在三个领域验证了我们的方法：Mountain Car、Quadruped-Walk 的运动任务和 Sweep-Into 的机器人操作任务，并发现使用所提出的增强功能，代理不仅可以提高整体性能，而且可以在代理训练阶段的早期就实现这一点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于状态增强的强化学习方法，通过人类偏好反馈改进奖励模型，解决传统强化学习中奖励设定和奖励黑客问题。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习存在奖励函数设计困难及奖励黑客问题，基于人类偏好的方法虽可缓解但性能不稳定，需更稳健的模型构建方式。
AI.method: 通过状态增强技术扩展状态空间，使奖励模型具备不变性一致性特性，提升从人类偏好反馈中学习奖励函数的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在Mountain Car、Quadruped-Walk和Sweep-Into三个任务中验证，方法在早期训练阶段即显著优于基线PEBBLE方法，整体性能提升明显。
AI.conclusion: 状态增强技术有效提升了基于人类偏好强化学习的奖励恢复能力与策略性能，适用于多种连续控制任务。

title: Data Driven Reward Initialization for Preference based Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 基于偏好的强化学习的数据驱动奖励初始化
abstract: Preference-based Reinforcement Learning (PbRL) methods utilize binary feedback from the human in the loop (HiL) over queried trajectory pairs to learn a reward model in an attempt to approximate the human's underlying reward function capturing their preferences. In this work, we investigate the issue of a high degree of variability in the initialized reward models which are sensitive to random seeds of the experiment. This further compounds the issue of degenerate reward functions PbRL methods already suffer from. We propose a data-driven reward initialization method that does not add any additional cost to the human in the loop and negligible cost to the PbRL agent and show that doing so ensures that the predicted rewards of the initialized reward model are uniform in the state space and this reduces the variability in the performance of the method across multiple runs and is shown to improve the overall performance compared to other initialization methods.
summary: Preference-based Reinforcement Learning (PbRL) methods utilize binary feedback from the human in the loop (HiL) over queried trajectory pairs to learn a reward model in an attempt to approximate the human's underlying reward function capturing their preferences. In this work, we investigate the issue of a high degree of variability in the initialized reward models which are sensitive to random seeds of the experiment. This further compounds the issue of degenerate reward functions PbRL methods already suffer from. We propose a data-driven reward initialization method that does not add any additional cost to the human in the loop and negligible cost to the PbRL agent and show that doing so ensures that the predicted rewards of the initialized reward model are uniform in the state space and this reduces the variability in the performance of the method across multiple runs and is shown to improve the overall performance compared to other initialization methods.
abstract_zh: 基于偏好的强化学习 (PbRL) 方法利用来自循环中的人 (HiL) 对查询轨迹对的二进制反馈来学习奖励模型，试图近似人类捕获其偏好的潜在奖励函数。在这项工作中，我们研究了初始化奖励模型中高度可变性的问题，该模型对实验的随机种子敏感。这进一步加剧了 PbRL 方法已经遭受的退化奖励函数问题。我们提出了一种数据驱动的奖励初始化方法，该方法不会给循环中的人类增加任何额外成本，并且给 PbRL 代理带来可忽略不计的成本，并表明这样做可以确保初始化奖励模型的预测奖励在状态空间中是均匀的，这减少了该方法在多次运行中性能的可变性，并且与其他初始化方法相比，可以提高整体性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种数据驱动的奖励初始化方法，以解决基于偏好的强化学习中奖励模型初始化的高可变性问题，并提升整体性能。
AI.motivation: 现有PbRL方法的奖励初始化对随机种子敏感，导致性能不稳定，且存在退化奖励函数的问题，需改进初始化方法以提高鲁棒性和性能。
AI.method: 提出一种无需额外人类成本的数据驱动奖励初始化方法，通过使初始化奖励模型在状态空间中预测奖励均匀，降低性能波动。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法降低了跨多次运行的性能变异，并优于其他初始化方法。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动的奖励初始化有效缓解了PbRL的初始化可变性问题，提升了方法的稳定性和性能。

title: Loss of Distributed Coverage Using Lazy Agents Operating Under Discrete, Local, Event-Triggered Communication
title_zh: 使用在离散、本地、事件触发通信下运行的惰性代理丢失分布式覆盖范围
comment: 14 pages, 4 figures, extended abstract in AAMAS 2023
comments: 14 pages, 4 figures, extended abstract in AAMAS 2023
abstract: Continuous surveillance of a spatial region using distributed robots and sensors is a well-studied application in the area of multi-agent systems. This paper investigates a practically-relevant scenario where robotic sensors are introduced asynchronously and inter-robot communication is discrete, event-driven, local and asynchronous. Furthermore, we work with lazy robots; i.e., the robots seek to minimize their area of responsibility by equipartitioning the domain to be covered. We adapt a well-known algorithm which is practicable and known to generally work well for coverage problems. For a specially chosen geometry of the spatial domain, we show that there exists a non-trivial sequence of inter-robot communication events which leads to an instantaneous loss of coverage when the number of robots exceeds a certain threshold. The same sequence of events preserves coverage and, further, leads to an equipartition of the domain when the number of robots is smaller than the threshold. This result demonstrates that coverage guarantees for a given algorithm might be sensitive to the number of robots and, therefore, may not scale in obvious ways. It also suggests that when such algorithms are to be verified and validated prior to field deployment, the number of robots or sensors used in test scenarios should match that deployed on the field.
summary: Continuous surveillance of a spatial region using distributed robots and sensors is a well-studied application in the area of multi-agent systems. This paper investigates a practically-relevant scenario where robotic sensors are introduced asynchronously and inter-robot communication is discrete, event-driven, local and asynchronous. Furthermore, we work with lazy robots; i.e., the robots seek to minimize their area of responsibility by equipartitioning the domain to be covered. We adapt a well-known algorithm which is practicable and known to generally work well for coverage problems. For a specially chosen geometry of the spatial domain, we show that there exists a non-trivial sequence of inter-robot communication events which leads to an instantaneous loss of coverage when the number of robots exceeds a certain threshold. The same sequence of events preserves coverage and, further, leads to an equipartition of the domain when the number of robots is smaller than the threshold. This result demonstrates that coverage guarantees for a given algorithm might be sensitive to the number of robots and, therefore, may not scale in obvious ways. It also suggests that when such algorithms are to be verified and validated prior to field deployment, the number of robots or sensors used in test scenarios should match that deployed on the field.
abstract_zh: 使用分布式机器人和传感器对空间区域进行连续监视是多智能体系统领域中经过充分研究的应用。本文研究了一个与实际相关的场景，其中异步引入机器人传感器，并且机器人间通信是离散的、事件驱动的、本地的和异步的。此外，我们与懒惰的机器人一起工作；即，机器人试图通过均匀划分要覆盖的领域来最小化其责任范围。我们采用了一种众所周知的算法，该算法是可行的，并且通常可以很好地解决覆盖问题。对于特别选择的空间域几何结构，我们表明存在一个不平凡的机器人间通信事件序列，当机器人数量超过一定阈值时，会导致覆盖范围瞬时丢失。相同的事件序列保留了覆盖范围，并且当机器人的数量小于阈值时，进一步导致域的均分。该结果表明，给定算法的覆盖保证可能对机器人的数量敏感，因此可能不会以明显的方式扩展。它还建议，当要在现场部署之前验证和验证此类算法时，测试场景中使用的机器人或传感器的数量应与现场部署的数量相匹配。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在离散、局部、事件触发通信条件下，懒惰机器人进行分布式区域覆盖时可能出现的覆盖丢失问题。
AI.motivation: 现有覆盖算法在机器人数量变化时可能无法保持覆盖性能，需验证其鲁棒性及可扩展性。
AI.method: 采用均分责任区域的懒惰机器人策略，结合特定几何空间分析通信事件序列对覆盖的影响。
AI.result: 当机器人数量超过阈值时，特定通信序列会导致瞬间覆盖丢失；低于阈值时则保持覆盖并实现均分。
AI.conclusion: 覆盖性能对机器人数量敏感，算法扩展需谨慎，测试场景应匹配实际部署规模。
