title: GPT4MIA: Utilizing Generative Pre-trained Transformer (GPT-3) as A Plug-and-Play Transductive Model for Medical Image Analysis
title_zh: GPT4MIA：利用生成式预训练 Transformer (GPT-3) 作为医学图像分析的即插即用转换模型
comment: Version 3: Added appendix with more results and visualizations. Questions and suggestions are welcome
comments: Version 3: Added appendix with more results and visualizations. Questions and suggestions are welcome
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel approach (called GPT4MIA) that utilizes Generative Pre-trained Transformer (GPT) as a plug-and-play transductive inference tool for medical image analysis (MIA). We provide theoretical analysis on why a large pre-trained language model such as GPT-3 can be used as a plug-and-play transductive inference model for MIA. At the methodological level, we develop several technical treatments to improve the efficiency and effectiveness of GPT4MIA, including better prompt structure design, sample selection, and prompt ordering of representative samples/features. We present two concrete use cases (with workflow) of GPT4MIA: (1) detecting prediction errors and (2) improving prediction accuracy, working in conjecture with well-established vision-based models for image classification (e.g., ResNet). Experiments validate that our proposed method is effective for these two tasks. We further discuss the opportunities and challenges in utilizing Transformer-based large language models for broader MIA applications.
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel approach (called GPT4MIA) that utilizes Generative Pre-trained Transformer (GPT) as a plug-and-play transductive inference tool for medical image analysis (MIA). We provide theoretical analysis on why a large pre-trained language model such as GPT-3 can be used as a plug-and-play transductive inference model for MIA. At the methodological level, we develop several technical treatments to improve the efficiency and effectiveness of GPT4MIA, including better prompt structure design, sample selection, and prompt ordering of representative samples/features. We present two concrete use cases (with workflow) of GPT4MIA: (1) detecting prediction errors and (2) improving prediction accuracy, working in conjecture with well-established vision-based models for image classification (e.g., ResNet). Experiments validate that our proposed method is effective for these two tasks. We further discuss the opportunities and challenges in utilizing Transformer-based large language models for broader MIA applications.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法（称为 GPT4MIA），该方法利用生成式预训练变压器（GPT）作为用于医学图像分析（MIA）的即插即用转导推理工具。我们提供了理论分析，说明为什么 GPT-3 等大型预训练语言模型可以用作 MIA 的即插即用转导推理模型。在方法论层面，我们开发了多种技术处理来提高 GPT4MIA 的效率和有效性，包括更好的提示结构设计、样本选择以及代表性样本/特征的提示排序。我们提出了 GPT4MIA 的两个具体用例（带有工作流程）：(1) 检测预测误差和 (2) 提高预测精度，推测与用于图像分类的完善的基于视觉的模型（例如 ResNet）一起工作。实验验证了我们提出的方法对于这两个任务是有效的。我们进一步讨论了将基于 Transformer 的大型语言模型用于更广泛的 MIA 应用的机遇和挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将GPT-3作为即插即用的归纳推理工具应用于医学图像分析（MIA），并通过理论分析与方法改进验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有医学图像分析方法依赖专用模型，缺乏灵活性与泛化能力，而大型语言模型（如GPT-3）可能通过跨模态理解提供新思路。
AI.method: 设计优化提示结构、样本筛选与排序策略，结合视觉模型（如ResNet）实现错误检测与精度提升两种应用场景。
AI.result: 实验验证GPT4MIA在错误检测和精度提升任务中均表现有效，证明其作为跨模态推理工具的可行性。
AI.conclusion: Transformer类大语言模型为医学图像分析提供新机遇，但需进一步解决模态对齐、计算效率等挑战以拓展应用。

authors_text: Nicolaas J. Annau,Alex J. Cannon,Adam H. Monahan
title: Algorithmic Hallucinations of Near-Surface Winds: Statistical Downscaling with Generative Adversarial Networks to Convection-Permitting Scales
title_zh: 近地表风的算法幻觉：使用生成对抗网络将统计尺度缩小到允许对流的尺度
comment: 43 pages, including 11 main figures, and 16 supplemental figures
comments: 43 pages, including 11 main figures, and 16 supplemental figures
abstract: This paper explores the application of emerging machine learning methods from image super-resolution (SR) to the task of statistical downscaling. We specifically focus on convolutional neural network-based Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs). Our GANs are conditioned on low-resolution (LR) inputs to generate high-resolution (HR) surface winds emulating Weather Research and Forecasting (WRF) model simulations over North America. Unlike traditional SR models, where LR inputs are idealized coarsened versions of the HR images, WRF emulation involves using non-idealized LR and HR pairs resulting in shared-scale mismatches due to internal variability. Our study builds upon current SR-based statistical downscaling by experimenting with a novel frequency-separation (FS) approach from the computer vision field. To assess the skill of SR models, we carefully select evaluation metrics, and focus on performance measures based on spatial power spectra. Our analyses reveal how GAN configurations influence spatial structures in the generated fields, particularly biases in spatial variability spectra. Using power spectra to evaluate the FS experiments reveals that successful applications of FS in computer vision do not translate to climate fields. However, the FS experiments demonstrate the sensitivity of power spectra to a commonly used GAN-based SR objective function, which helps interpret and understand its role in determining spatial structures. This result motivates the development of a novel partial frequency-separation scheme as a promising configuration option. We also quantify the influence on GAN performance of non-idealized LR fields resulting from internal variability. Furthermore, we conduct a spectra-based feature-importance experiment allowing us to explore the dependence of the spatial structure of generated fields on different physically relevant LR covariates.
summary: This paper explores the application of emerging machine learning methods from image super-resolution (SR) to the task of statistical downscaling. We specifically focus on convolutional neural network-based Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs). Our GANs are conditioned on low-resolution (LR) inputs to generate high-resolution (HR) surface winds emulating Weather Research and Forecasting (WRF) model simulations over North America. Unlike traditional SR models, where LR inputs are idealized coarsened versions of the HR images, WRF emulation involves using non-idealized LR and HR pairs resulting in shared-scale mismatches due to internal variability. Our study builds upon current SR-based statistical downscaling by experimenting with a novel frequency-separation (FS) approach from the computer vision field. To assess the skill of SR models, we carefully select evaluation metrics, and focus on performance measures based on spatial power spectra. Our analyses reveal how GAN configurations influence spatial structures in the generated fields, particularly biases in spatial variability spectra. Using power spectra to evaluate the FS experiments reveals that successful applications of FS in computer vision do not translate to climate fields. However, the FS experiments demonstrate the sensitivity of power spectra to a commonly used GAN-based SR objective function, which helps interpret and understand its role in determining spatial structures. This result motivates the development of a novel partial frequency-separation scheme as a promising configuration option. We also quantify the influence on GAN performance of non-idealized LR fields resulting from internal variability. Furthermore, we conduct a spectra-based feature-importance experiment allowing us to explore the dependence of the spatial structure of generated fields on different physically relevant LR covariates.
abstract_zh: 本文探讨了从图像超分辨率（SR）到统计缩小任务的新兴机器学习方法的应用。我们特别关注基于卷积神经网络的生成对抗网络（GAN）。我们的 GAN 以低分辨率 (LR) 输入为条件，生成高分辨率 (HR) 表面风，模拟北美的天气研究和预报 (WRF) 模型模拟。与传统的 SR 模型（其中 LR 输入是 HR 图像的理想化粗化版本）不同，WRF 仿真涉及使用非理想化的 LR 和 HR 对，从而导致由于内部可变性而导致共享尺度不匹配。我们的研究建立在当前基于 SR 的统计降尺度的基础上，通过试验计算机视觉领域的一种新颖的频率分离 (FS) 方法。为了评估 SR 模型的技能，我们仔细选择评估指标，并重点关注基于空间功率谱的性能指标。我们的分析揭示了 GAN 配置如何影响生成场中的空间结构，特别是空间变异性谱中的偏差。使用功率谱来评估 FS 实验表明，FS 在计算机视觉中的成功应用并不能转化为气候领域。然而，FS 实验证明了功率谱对常用的基于 GAN 的 SR 目标函数的敏感性，这有助于解释和理解其在确定空间结构中的作用。这一结果激励了一种新颖的部分频率分离方案的开发，作为一种有前途的配置选项。我们还量化了内部变异性对非理想化 LR 场的 GAN 性能的影响。此外，我们进行了基于光谱的特征重要性实验，使我们能够探索生成场的空间结构对不同物理相关 LR 协变量的依赖性。

AI.tldr: 本文将图像超分辨率技术中的生成对抗网络（GAN）应用于统计降尺度，生成高分辨率近地表风场数据，以模拟北美地区的天气研究与预报（WRF）模型。
AI.motivation: 传统统计降尺度方法难以有效处理非理想化低分辨率（LR）与高分辨率（HR）数据对的尺度不匹配问题，需探索新型机器学习方法以提升生成数据的空间结构准确性。
AI.method: 基于卷积神经网络的GAN模型，结合频率分离（FS）策略，利用WRF模拟的LR输入生成HR风场，并通过空间功率谱分析评估模型性能及配置影响。
AI.result: FS策略在计算机视觉中的成功未直接适用于气候场，但揭示了GAN目标函数对功率谱的敏感性；非理想化LR数据显著影响GAN表现，且物理相关协变量对生成场空间结构有关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 需开发适应气候数据特性的改进频率分离方案，强调功率谱分析在理解GAN生成机制中的价值，并指出低分辨率输入内部变异性对模型性能的重要影响。

search_text: Algorithmic Hallucinations of Near-Surface Winds: Statistical Downscaling with Generative Adversarial Networks to Convection-Permitting Scales 近地表风的算法幻觉：使用生成对抗网络将统计尺度缩小到允许对流的尺度 This paper explores the application of emerging machine learning methods from image super-resolution (SR) to the task of statistical downscaling. We specifically focus on convolutional neural network-based Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs). Our GANs are conditioned on low-resolution (LR) inputs to generate high-resolution (HR) surface winds emulating Weather Research and Forecasting (WRF) model simulations over North America. Unlike traditional SR models, where LR inputs are idealized coarsened versions of the HR images, WRF emulation involves using non-idealized LR and HR pairs resulting in shared-scale mismatches due to internal variability. Our study builds upon current SR-based statistical downscaling by experimenting with a novel frequency-separation (FS) approach from the computer vision field. To assess the skill of SR models, we carefully select evaluation metrics, and focus on performance measures based on spatial power spectra. Our analyses reveal how GAN configurations influence spatial structures in the generated fields, particularly biases in spatial variability spectra. Using power spectra to evaluate the FS experiments reveals that successful applications of FS in computer vision do not translate to climate fields. However, the FS experiments demonstrate the sensitivity of power spectra to a commonly used GAN-based SR objective function, which helps interpret and understand its role in determining spatial structures. This result motivates the development of a novel partial frequency-separation scheme as a promising configuration option. We also quantify the influence on GAN performance of non-idealized LR fields resulting from internal variability. Furthermore, we conduct a spectra-based feature-importance experiment allowing us to explore the dependence of the spatial structure of generated fields on different physically relevant LR covariates. 本文探讨了从图像超分辨率（SR）到统计缩小任务的新兴机器学习方法的应用。我们特别关注基于卷积神经网络的生成对抗网络（GAN）。我们的 GAN 以低分辨率 (LR) 输入为条件，生成高分辨率 (HR) 表面风，模拟北美的天气研究和预报 (WRF) 模型模拟。与传统的 SR 模型（其中 LR 输入是 HR 图像的理想化粗化版本）不同，WRF 仿真涉及使用非理想化的 LR 和 HR 对，从而导致由于内部可变性而导致共享尺度不匹配。我们的研究建立在当前基于 SR 的统计降尺度的基础上，通过试验计算机视觉领域的一种新颖的频率分离 (FS) 方法。为了评估 SR 模型的技能，我们仔细选择评估指标，并重点关注基于空间功率谱的性能指标。我们的分析揭示了 GAN 配置如何影响生成场中的空间结构，特别是空间变异性谱中的偏差。使用功率谱来评估 FS 实验表明，FS 在计算机视觉中的成功应用并不能转化为气候领域。然而，FS 实验证明了功率谱对常用的基于 GAN 的 SR 目标函数的敏感性，这有助于解释和理解其在确定空间结构中的作用。这一结果激励了一种新颖的部分频率分离方案的开发，作为一种有前途的配置选项。我们还量化了内部变异性对非理想化 LR 场的 GAN 性能的影响。此外，我们进行了基于光谱的特征重要性实验，使我们能够探索生成场的空间结构对不同物理相关 LR 协变量的依赖性。 本文将图像超分辨率技术中的生成对抗网络（GAN）应用于统计降尺度，生成高分辨率近地表风场数据，以模拟北美地区的天气研究与预报（WRF）模型。 Nicolaas J. authors_text: Zicheng Zhang,Wei Sun,Yingjie Zhou,Wei Lu,Yucheng Zhu,Xiongkuo Min,Guangtao Zhai
title: EEP-3DQA: Efficient and Effective Projection-based 3D Model Quality Assessment
title_zh: EEP-3DQA：高效且有效的基于投影的 3D 模型质量评估
abstract: Currently, great numbers of efforts have been put into improving the effectiveness of 3D model quality assessment (3DQA) methods. However, little attention has been paid to the computational costs and inference time, which is also important for practical applications. Unlike 2D media, 3D models are represented by more complicated and irregular digital formats, such as point cloud and mesh. Thus it is normally difficult to perform an efficient module to extract quality-aware features of 3D models. In this paper, we address this problem from the aspect of projection-based 3DQA and develop a no-reference (NR) \underline{E}fficient and \underline{E}ffective \underline{P}rojection-based \underline{3D} Model \underline{Q}uality \underline{A}ssessment (\textbf{EEP-3DQA}) method. The input projection images of EEP-3DQA are randomly sampled from the six perpendicular viewpoints of the 3D model and are further spatially downsampled by the grid-mini patch sampling strategy. Further, the lightweight Swin-Transformer tiny is utilized as the backbone to extract the quality-aware features. Finally, the proposed EEP-3DQA and EEP-3DQA-t (tiny version) achieve the best performance than the existing state-of-the-art NR-3DQA methods and even outperforms most full-reference (FR) 3DQA methods on the point cloud and mesh quality assessment databases while consuming less inference time than the compared 3DQA methods.
summary: Currently, great numbers of efforts have been put into improving the effectiveness of 3D model quality assessment (3DQA) methods. However, little attention has been paid to the computational costs and inference time, which is also important for practical applications. Unlike 2D media, 3D models are represented by more complicated and irregular digital formats, such as point cloud and mesh. Thus it is normally difficult to perform an efficient module to extract quality-aware features of 3D models. In this paper, we address this problem from the aspect of projection-based 3DQA and develop a no-reference (NR) \underline{E}fficient and \underline{E}ffective \underline{P}rojection-based \underline{3D} Model \underline{Q}uality \underline{A}ssessment (\textbf{EEP-3DQA}) method. The input projection images of EEP-3DQA are randomly sampled from the six perpendicular viewpoints of the 3D model and are further spatially downsampled by the grid-mini patch sampling strategy. Further, the lightweight Swin-Transformer tiny is utilized as the backbone to extract the quality-aware features. Finally, the proposed EEP-3DQA and EEP-3DQA-t (tiny version) achieve the best performance than the existing state-of-the-art NR-3DQA methods and even outperforms most full-reference (FR) 3DQA methods on the point cloud and mesh quality assessment databases while consuming less inference time than the compared 3DQA methods.
abstract_zh: 目前，人们在提高3D模型质量评估（3DQA）方法的有效性方面做出了大量努力。然而，很少有人关注计算成本和推理时间，这对于实际应用也很重要。与 2D 媒体不同，3D 模型由更复杂且不规则的数字格式表示，例如点云和网格。因此，通常很难执行有效的模块来提取 3D 模型的质量感知特征。在本文中，我们从基于投影的3DQA方面解决了这个问题，并开发了一种无参考（NR）\underline{E}高效和\underline{E}有效\underline{P}基于投影的\underline{3D}模型\underline{Q}质量\underline{A}ssessment（\textbf{EEP-3DQA}）方法。 EEP-3DQA 的输入投影图像从 3D 模型的六个垂直视点随机采样，并通过网格迷你补丁采样策略进一步进行空间下采样。此外，轻量级的 Swin-Transformer tiny 被用作提取质量感知特征的骨干。最后，所提出的 EEP-3DQA 和 EEP-3DQA-t（微型版本）比现有最先进的 NR-3DQA 方法实现了最佳性能，甚至在点云和网格质量评估数据库上优于大多数全参考（FR）3DQA 方法，同时比比较的 3DQA 方法消耗更少的推理时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于投影的高效且有效的3D模型质量评估方法EEP-3DQA，解决现有方法在计算成本和推理时间上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有3D模型质量评估方法过度关注效果而忽视计算效率，且3D模型复杂格式导致特征提取困难，需兼顾效率与性能。
AI.method: 从六个视角随机采样投影图像并采用网格小块下采样策略，结合轻量级Swin-Transformer提取质量感知特征，构建无参考评估模型。
AI.result: 在点云和网格质量评估数据集上，EEP-3DQA及精简版在性能上超越现有无参考方法，甚至优于多数全参考方法，同时推理时间更短。
AI.conclusion: EEP-3DQA通过投影策略与轻量网络设计，在保证评估精度的同时显著提升计算效率，为实际应用提供可行方案。

authors_text: Yukang Gan,Yixiao Ge,Chang Zhou,Shupeng Su,Zhouchuan Xu,Xuyuan Xu,Quanchao Hui,Xiang Chen,Yexin Wang,Ying Shan
title: Binary Embedding-based Retrieval at Tencent
title_zh: 腾讯基于二进制嵌入的检索
abstract: Large-scale embedding-based retrieval (EBR) is the cornerstone of search-related industrial applications. Given a user query, the system of EBR aims to identify relevant information from a large corpus of documents that may be tens or hundreds of billions in size. The storage and computation turn out to be expensive and inefficient with massive documents and high concurrent queries, making it difficult to further scale up. To tackle the challenge, we propose a binary embedding-based retrieval (BEBR) engine equipped with a recurrent binarization algorithm that enables customized bits per dimension. Specifically, we compress the full-precision query and document embeddings, formulated as float vectors in general, into a composition of multiple binary vectors using a lightweight transformation model with residual multilayer perception (MLP) blocks. We can therefore tailor the number of bits for different applications to trade off accuracy loss and cost savings. Importantly, we enable task-agnostic efficient training of the binarization model using a new embedding-to-embedding strategy. We also exploit the compatible training of binary embeddings so that the BEBR engine can support indexing among multiple embedding versions within a unified system. To further realize efficient search, we propose Symmetric Distance Calculation (SDC) to achieve lower response time than Hamming codes. We successfully employed the introduced BEBR to Tencent products, including Sogou, Tencent Video, QQ World, etc. The binarization algorithm can be seamlessly generalized to various tasks with multiple modalities. Extensive experiments on offline benchmarks and online A/B tests demonstrate the efficiency and effectiveness of our method, significantly saving 30%~50% index costs with almost no loss of accuracy at the system level.
summary: Large-scale embedding-based retrieval (EBR) is the cornerstone of search-related industrial applications. Given a user query, the system of EBR aims to identify relevant information from a large corpus of documents that may be tens or hundreds of billions in size. The storage and computation turn out to be expensive and inefficient with massive documents and high concurrent queries, making it difficult to further scale up. To tackle the challenge, we propose a binary embedding-based retrieval (BEBR) engine equipped with a recurrent binarization algorithm that enables customized bits per dimension. Specifically, we compress the full-precision query and document embeddings, formulated as float vectors in general, into a composition of multiple binary vectors using a lightweight transformation model with residual multilayer perception (MLP) blocks. We can therefore tailor the number of bits for different applications to trade off accuracy loss and cost savings. Importantly, we enable task-agnostic efficient training of the binarization model using a new embedding-to-embedding strategy. We also exploit the compatible training of binary embeddings so that the BEBR engine can support indexing among multiple embedding versions within a unified system. To further realize efficient search, we propose Symmetric Distance Calculation (SDC) to achieve lower response time than Hamming codes. We successfully employed the introduced BEBR to Tencent products, including Sogou, Tencent Video, QQ World, etc. The binarization algorithm can be seamlessly generalized to various tasks with multiple modalities. Extensive experiments on offline benchmarks and online A/B tests demonstrate the efficiency and effectiveness of our method, significantly saving 30%~50% index costs with almost no loss of accuracy at the system level.
abstract_zh: 大规模基于嵌入的检索（EBR）是搜索相关工业应用的基石。给定用户查询，EBR 系统的目标是从规模可能达到数百或数千亿的大型文档语料库中识别相关信息。海量文档和高并发查询导致存储和计算成本高昂且效率低下，难以进一步扩展。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种基于二进制嵌入的检索（BEBR）引擎，配备了循环二值化算法，可以实现每维的定制位。具体来说，我们使用带有残差多层感知（MLP）块的轻量级转换模型，将全精度查询和文档嵌入（通常表示为浮点向量）压缩为多个二进制向量的组合。因此，我们可以针对不同的应用定制位数，以权衡精度损失和成本节省。重要的是，我们使用新的嵌入到嵌入策略来实现与任务无关的二值化模型的高效训练。我们还利用二进制嵌入的兼容训练，使 BEBR 引擎可以支持统一系统内多个嵌入版本之间的索引。为了进一步实现高效搜索，我们提出对称距离计算（SDC）以实现比汉明码更低的响应时间。我们成功地将引入的BEBR应用于腾讯产品，包括搜狗、腾讯视频、QQ世界等。二值化算法可以无缝推广到多种模式的各种任务。离线基准测试和在线 A/B 测试的大量实验证明了我们方法的效率和有效性，显着节省了 30%~50% 的索引成本，而系统级别的准确性几乎没有损失。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于二进制嵌入的检索引擎（BEBR），通过压缩高精度嵌入向量为二进制向量，解决大规模检索中的存储和计算效率问题。
AI.motivation: 传统嵌入式检索系统在处理海量文档和高并发查询时面临存储成本高、计算效率低的挑战，亟需一种可扩展且高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计轻量级变换模型（含残差MLP模块）将浮点嵌入压缩为多组二进制向量，并引入对称距离计算（SDC）加速搜索；采用嵌入到嵌入的训练策略实现任务无关的高效训练。
AI.result: 在腾讯多个产品中成功应用，节省30%~50%索引成本且系统级精度损失几乎为零，方法可泛化至多模态任务。
AI.conclusion: BEBR通过二进制嵌入压缩与优化算法，在保持精度的同时显著降低检索成本，为大规模工业级检索提供了高效解决方案。

title: Multimodal Propaganda Processing
title_zh: 多模式宣传处理
abstract: Propaganda campaigns have long been used to influence public opinion via disseminating biased and/or misleading information. Despite the increasing prevalence of propaganda content on the Internet, few attempts have been made by AI researchers to analyze such content. We introduce the task of multimodal propaganda processing, where the goal is to automatically analyze propaganda content. We believe that this task presents a long-term challenge to AI researchers and that successful processing of propaganda could bring machine understanding one important step closer to human understanding. We discuss the technical challenges associated with this task and outline the steps that need to be taken to address it.
summary: Propaganda campaigns have long been used to influence public opinion via disseminating biased and/or misleading information. Despite the increasing prevalence of propaganda content on the Internet, few attempts have been made by AI researchers to analyze such content. We introduce the task of multimodal propaganda processing, where the goal is to automatically analyze propaganda content. We believe that this task presents a long-term challenge to AI researchers and that successful processing of propaganda could bring machine understanding one important step closer to human understanding. We discuss the technical challenges associated with this task and outline the steps that need to be taken to address it.
abstract_zh: 长期以来，宣传活动一直被用来通过传播有偏见和/或误导性的信息来影响公众舆论。尽管互联网上的宣传内容越来越普遍，但人工智能研究人员很少尝试分析此类内容。我们引入多模态宣传处理的任务，其目标是自动分析宣传内容。我们相信，这项任务对人工智能研究人员提出了长期挑战，成功地处理宣传可以使机器理解向人类理解迈进重要一步。我们讨论了与此任务相关的技术挑战，并概述了解决该问题所需采取的步骤。

AI.tldr: 提出多模态宣传处理任务，旨在自动分析网络上的宣传内容以提升AI对人类理解的接近性。
AI.motivation: 当前网络宣传内容泛滥，但AI领域缺乏对此类内容的系统分析方法，需推动相关研究以促进机器理解接近人类水平。
AI.method: 通过分析多模态数据（文本、图像、视频等）和技术挑战的探讨，提出未来研究方向和处理步骤。
AI.result: 明确了多模态宣传处理的技术难点，并为后续研究提供了方向和步骤。
AI.conclusion: 多模态宣传处理是AI长期挑战，成功解决将显著提升机器对人类信息的理解能力。

title: Fine-grained Cross-modal Fusion based Refinement for Text-to-Image Synthesis
title_zh: 基于细粒度跨模态融合的文本到图像合成细化
comment: 13 pages, 8 figures, accepted by Chinese Journal of Electronics
comments: 13 pages, 8 figures, accepted by Chinese Journal of Electronics
abstract: Text-to-image synthesis refers to generating visual-realistic and semantically consistent images from given textual descriptions. Previous approaches generate an initial low-resolution image and then refine it to be high-resolution. Despite the remarkable progress, these methods are limited in fully utilizing the given texts and could generate text-mismatched images, especially when the text description is complex. We propose a novel Fine-grained text-image Fusion based Generative Adversarial Networks, dubbed FF-GAN, which consists of two modules: Fine-grained text-image Fusion Block (FF-Block) and Global Semantic Refinement (GSR). The proposed FF-Block integrates an attention block and several convolution layers to effectively fuse the fine-grained word-context features into the corresponding visual features, in which the text information is fully used to refine the initial image with more details. And the GSR is proposed to improve the global semantic consistency between linguistic and visual features during the refinement process. Extensive experiments on CUB-200 and COCO datasets demonstrate the superiority of FF-GAN over other state-of-the-art approaches in generating images with semantic consistency to the given texts.Code is available at https://github.com/haoranhfut/FF-GAN.
summary: Text-to-image synthesis refers to generating visual-realistic and semantically consistent images from given textual descriptions. Previous approaches generate an initial low-resolution image and then refine it to be high-resolution. Despite the remarkable progress, these methods are limited in fully utilizing the given texts and could generate text-mismatched images, especially when the text description is complex. We propose a novel Fine-grained text-image Fusion based Generative Adversarial Networks, dubbed FF-GAN, which consists of two modules: Fine-grained text-image Fusion Block (FF-Block) and Global Semantic Refinement (GSR). The proposed FF-Block integrates an attention block and several convolution layers to effectively fuse the fine-grained word-context features into the corresponding visual features, in which the text information is fully used to refine the initial image with more details. And the GSR is proposed to improve the global semantic consistency between linguistic and visual features during the refinement process. Extensive experiments on CUB-200 and COCO datasets demonstrate the superiority of FF-GAN over other state-of-the-art approaches in generating images with semantic consistency to the given texts.Code is available at https://github.com/haoranhfut/FF-GAN.
abstract_zh: 文本到图像合成是指根据给定的文本描述生成视觉逼真且语义一致的图像。以前的方法生成初始低分辨率图像，然后将其细化为高分辨率。尽管取得了显着的进步，但这些方法在充分利用给定文本方面受到限制，并且可能生成文本不匹配的图像，特别是当文本描述复杂时。我们提出了一种新颖的基于细粒度文本图像融合的生成对抗网络，称为 FF-GAN，它由两个模块组成：细粒度文本图像融合块（FF-Block）和全局语义细化（GSR）。所提出的FF-Block集成了注意块和多个卷积层，以有效地将细粒度的单词上下文特征融合到相应的视觉特征中，其中文本信息被充分利用来细化具有更多细节的初始图像。提出GSR是为了在细化过程中提高语言和视觉特征之间的全局语义一致性。 CUB-200 和 COCO 数据集上的大量实验证明了 FF-GAN 在生成与给定文本具有语义一致性的图像方面优于其他最先进的方法。代码可在 https://github.com/haoranhfut/FF-GAN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于细粒度跨模态融合的生成对抗网络（FF-GAN），旨在解决文本到图像生成中语义不一致的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在生成高分辨率图像时未能充分利用文本信息，导致复杂描述下生成图像与文本语义不匹配。
AI.method: 设计包含细粒度文本-图像融合块（FF-Block）和全局语义优化模块（GSR）的FF-GAN框架，通过注意力机制和卷积层融合文本细节特征，并优化全局语义一致性。
AI.result: 在CUB-200和COCO数据集上的实验表明，FF-GAN在生成语义与文本一致的图像方面优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过细粒度跨模态融合与全局语义优化，FF-GAN有效提升了文本到图像生成的语义一致性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于细粒度跨模态融合的生成对抗网络（FF-GAN），旨在解决文本到图像生成中语义不一致的问题。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法在生成高分辨率图像时未能充分利用文本信息，导致复杂描述下生成图像与文本语义不匹配。
ai_content.method: 设计包含细粒度文本-图像融合块（FF-Block）和全局语义优化模块（GSR）的FF-GAN框架，通过注意力机制和卷积层融合文本细节特征，并优化全局语义一致性。
ai_content.result: 在CUB-200和COCO数据集上的实验表明，FF-GAN在生成语义与文本一致的图像方面优于现有最先进方法。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过细粒度跨模态融合与全局语义优化，FF-GAN有效提升了文本到图像生成的语义一致性。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于细粒度跨模态融合的生成对抗网络（FF-GAN），旨在解决文本到图像生成中语义不一致的问题。
motivation: 现有方法在生成高分辨率图像时未能充分利用文本信息，导致复杂描述下生成图像与文本语义不匹配。
method: 设计包含细粒度文本-图像融合块（FF-Block）和全局语义优化模块（GSR）的FF-GAN框架，通过注意力机制和卷积层融合文本细节特征，并优化全局语义一致性。
result: 在CUB-200和COCO数据集上的实验表明，FF-GAN在生成语义与文本一致的图像方面优于现有最先进方法。
conclusion: 通过细粒度跨模态融合与全局语义优化，FF-GAN有效提升了文本到图像生成的语义一致性。
search_text: Fine-grained Cross-modal Fusion based Refinement for Text-to-Image Synthesis 基于细粒度跨模态融合的文本到图像合成细化 Text-to-image synthesis refers to generating visual-realistic and semantically consistent images from given textual descriptions. Previous approaches generate an initial low-resolution image and then refine it to be high-resolution. Despite the remarkable progress, these methods are limited in fully utilizing the given texts and could generate text-mismatched images, especially when the text description is complex. We propose a novel Fine-grained text-image Fusion based Generative Adversarial Networks, dubbed FF-GAN, which consists of two modules: Fine-grained text-image Fusion Block (FF-Block) and Global Semantic Refinement (GSR). The proposed FF-Block integrates an attention block and several convolution layers to effectively fuse the fine-grained word-context features into the corresponding visual features, in which the text information is fully used to refine the initial image with more details. And the GSR is proposed to improve the global semantic consistency between linguistic and visual features during the refinement process. Extensive experiments on CUB-200 and COCO datasets demonstrate the superiority of FF-GAN over other state-of-the-art approaches in generating images with semantic consistency to the given texts.Code is available at https://github.com/haoranhfut/FF-GAN. 文本到图像合成是指根据给定的文本描述生成视觉逼真且语义一致的图像。以前的方法生成初始低分辨率图像，然后将其细化为高分辨率。尽管取得了显着的进步，但这些方法在充分利用给定文本方面受到限制，并且可能生成文本不匹配的图像，特别是当文本描述复杂时。我们提出了一种新颖的基于细粒度文本图像融合的生成对抗网络，称为 FF-GAN，它由两个模块组成：细粒度文本图像融合块（FF-Block）和全局语义细化（GSR）。所提出的FF-Block集成了注意块和多个卷积层，以有效地将细粒度的单词上下文特征融合到相应的视觉特征中，其中文本信息被充分利用来细化具有更多细节的初始图像。提出GSR是为了在细化过程中提高语言和视觉特征之间的全局语义一致性。 CUB-200 和 COCO 数据集上的大量实验证明了 FF-GAN 在生成与给定文本具有语义一致性的图像方面优于其他最先进的方法。代码可在 https://github.com/haoranhfut/FF-GAN 获取。 本文提出一种基于细粒度跨模态融合的生成对抗网络（FF-GAN），旨在解决文本到图像生成中语义不一致的问题。 Haoran Sun,Yang Wang,Haipeng Liu,Biao Qian cs.CV
